| Symbol (LaTeX)             | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                   | Definition                                                                                | Examples                                                                                                                                                                    |
| -------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| —                          | polygon, polygone, 多边形                                                              | A closed plane figure made of straight line segments.                                     | EN: A pentagon is a polygon with five sides.<br>FR: Un pentagone est un polygone à cinq côtés.<br>中：五边形是有五条边的多边形。                                                           |
| `n`-gon                    | n-gon, polygone à n côtés, n 边形                                                     | A polygon with `n` sides.                                                                 | EN: An `8`-gon is an octagon.<br>FR: Un polygone à `8` côtés est un octogone.<br>中：`8` 边形是八边形。                                                                              |
| —                          | regular polygon, polygone régulier, 正多边形                                            | A polygon with all sides equal and all angles equal.                                      | EN: A square is a regular quadrilateral.<br>FR: Un carré est un quadrilatère régulier.<br>中：正方形是正四边形。                                                                       |
| `(n-2)180^\circ`           | interior angle sum, somme des angles intérieurs, 内角和                                | The sum of the interior angles of an `n`-sided polygon.                                   | EN: A pentagon has interior angle sum `540^\circ`.<br>FR: Un pentagone a une somme d’angles intérieurs de `540^\circ`.<br>中：五边形的内角和是 `540^\circ`。                           |
| `\frac{(n-2)180^\circ}{n}` | interior angle of a regular polygon, angle intérieur d’un polygone régulier, 正多边形内角 | The measure of each interior angle in a regular `n`-gon.                                  | EN: Each interior angle of a regular hexagon is `120^\circ`.<br>FR: Chaque angle intérieur d’un hexagone régulier vaut `120^\circ`.<br>中：正六边形的每个内角是 `120^\circ`。            |
| `360^\circ`                | exterior angle sum, somme des angles extérieurs, 外角和                                | The sum of one exterior angle at each vertex of a convex polygon.                         | EN: The exterior angle sum of any convex polygon is `360^\circ`.<br>FR: La somme des angles extérieurs d’un polygone convexe est `360^\circ`.<br>中：任意凸多边形的外角和是 `360^\circ`。 |
| —                          | quadrilateral, quadrilatère, 四边形                                                    | A polygon with four sides.                                                                | EN: A rectangle is a quadrilateral.<br>FR: Un rectangle est un quadrilatère.<br>中：矩形是四边形。                                                                                   |
| —                          | parallelogram, parallélogramme, 平行四边形                                               | A quadrilateral with two pairs of opposite parallel sides.                                | EN: Opposite sides of a parallelogram are equal.<br>FR: Les côtés opposés d’un parallélogramme sont égaux.<br>中：平行四边形的对边相等。                                                 |
| —                          | rectangle, rectangle, 矩形                                                            | A quadrilateral with four right angles.                                                   | EN: A rectangle has equal diagonals.<br>FR: Un rectangle a des diagonales de même longueur.<br>中：矩形的两条对角线相等。                                                                |
| —                          | square, carré, 正方形                                                                  | A quadrilateral with four equal sides and four right angles.                              | EN: A square is both a rectangle and a rhombus.<br>FR: Un carré est à la fois un rectangle et un losange.<br>中：正方形既是矩形，也是菱形。                                                |
| —                          | rhombus, losange, 菱形                                                                | A quadrilateral with four equal sides.                                                    | EN: The diagonals of a rhombus are perpendicular.<br>FR: Les diagonales d’un losange sont perpendiculaires.<br>中：菱形的对角线互相垂直。                                                |
| —                          | trapezoid, trapèze, 梯形                                                              | A quadrilateral with at least one pair of parallel sides; conventions vary by curriculum. | EN: A trapezoid has a pair of parallel sides.<br>FR: Un trapèze possède une paire de côtés parallèles.<br>中：梯形至少有一组对边平行。                                                    |
| —                          | diagonal, diagonale, 对角线                                                            | A segment connecting two nonadjacent vertices of a polygon.                               | EN: A quadrilateral has two diagonals.<br>FR: Un quadrilatère a deux diagonales.<br>中：四边形有两条对角线。                                                                            |

## 5.7 Circles and arcs

| Symbol (LaTeX) | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                       | Definition                                                           | Examples                                                                                                                                                                 |
| -------------- | --------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `O`            | center, centre, 圆心                      | The point equidistant from all points on a circle.                   | EN: `O` is the center of the circle.<br>FR: `O` est le centre du cercle.<br>中：`O` 是圆心。                                                                                   |
| `r`            | radius, rayon, 半径                       | A segment from the center of a circle to a point on the circle.      | EN: If `r=5`, the radius is `5`.<br>FR: Si `r=5`, le rayon vaut `5`.<br>中：若 `r=5`，半径为 `5`。                                                                               |
| `d=2r`         | diameter, diamètre, 直径                  | A chord passing through the center; its length is twice the radius.  | EN: If `r=5`, then `d=10`.<br>FR: Si `r=5`, alors `d=10`.<br>中：若 `r=5`，则直径 `d=10`。                                                                                       |
| —              | chord, corde, 弦                         | A segment whose endpoints lie on a circle.                           | EN: A diameter is the longest chord of a circle.<br>FR: Un diamètre est la plus longue corde d’un cercle.<br>中：直径是圆中最长的弦。                                                |
| —              | arc, arc, 弧                             | A connected part of a circle.                                        | EN: An arc is measured by its central angle.<br>FR: Un arc est mesuré par son angle au centre.<br>中：弧可由其对应的圆心角度量。                                                        |
| —              | central angle, angle au centre, 圆心角     | An angle whose vertex is the center of a circle.                     | EN: A `60^\circ` central angle cuts off a `60^\circ` arc.<br>FR: Un angle au centre de `60^\circ` intercepte un arc de `60^\circ`.<br>中：`60^\circ` 的圆心角对应 `60^\circ` 的弧。 |
| —              | inscribed angle, angle inscrit, 圆周角     | An angle whose vertex lies on the circle and whose sides are chords. | EN: An inscribed angle measures half its intercepted arc.<br>FR: Un angle inscrit mesure la moitié de l’arc intercepté.<br>中：圆周角的度数等于所对弧度数的一半。                           |
| `C=2\pi r`     | circumference, circonférence, 圆周长       | The perimeter of a circle.                                           | EN: A circle with radius `3` has circumference `6\pi`.<br>FR: Un cercle de rayon `3` a une circonférence de `6\pi`.<br>中：半径为 `3` 的圆周长是 `6\pi`。                           |
| `A=\pi r^2`    | area of a circle, aire d’un disque, 圆面积 | The area enclosed by a circle of radius `r`.                         | EN: A circle with radius `4` has area `16\pi`.<br>FR: Un disque de rayon `4` a une aire de `16\pi`.<br>中：半径为 `4` 的圆面积是 `16\pi`。                                          |
| —              | tangent line, tangente, 切线              | A line that touches a circle at exactly one point.                   | EN: A tangent line is perpendicular to the radius at the point of tangency.<br>FR: Une tangente est perpendiculaire au rayon au point de tangence.<br>中：切线与过切点的半径垂直。     |
| —              | secant line, sécante, 割线                | A line intersecting a circle at two points.                          | EN: A secant line cuts the circle at two points.<br>FR: Une sécante coupe le cercle en deux points.<br>中：割线与圆相交于两个点。                                                     |
| —              | sector, secteur circulaire, 扇形          | A region bounded by two radii and an arc.                            | EN: A sector with angle `90^\circ` is one quarter of a circle.<br>FR: Un secteur d’angle `90^\circ` représente un quart du disque.<br>中：圆心角为 `90^\circ` 的扇形是圆的四分之一。      |

## 5.8 Area, perimeter, surface area, and volume

| Symbol (LaTeX)            | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                            | Definition                                                           | Examples                                                                                                                                                                        |
| ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `P`                       | perimeter, périmètre, 周长                                     | The total length around a plane figure.                              | EN: A rectangle with sides `3` and `5` has perimeter `16`.<br>FR: Un rectangle de côtés `3` et `5` a un périmètre de `16`.<br>中：长为 `5`、宽为 `3` 的矩形周长是 `16`。                      |
| `A`                       | area, aire, 面积                                               | The measure of the region enclosed by a plane figure.                | EN: A rectangle with sides `3` and `5` has area `15`.<br>FR: Un rectangle de côtés `3` et `5` a une aire de `15`.<br>中：长为 `5`、宽为 `3` 的矩形面积是 `15`。                               |
| `A=bh`                    | area of a rectangle, aire d’un rectangle, 矩形面积               | The product of base and height.                                      | EN: If `b=6` and `h=4`, then `A=24`.<br>FR: Si `b=6` et `h=4`, alors `A=24`.<br>中：若 `b=6` 且 `h=4`，则面积 `A=24`。                                                                   |
| `A=s^2`                   | area of a square, aire d’un carré, 正方形面积                     | The square of the side length.                                       | EN: A square with side `5` has area `25`.<br>FR: Un carré de côté `5` a une aire de `25`.<br>中：边长为 `5` 的正方形面积是 `25`。                                                            |
| `A=\frac{1}{2}bh`         | area of a triangle, aire d’un triangle, 三角形面积                | Half the product of a base and its corresponding height.             | EN: If `b=10` and `h=6`, then `A=30`.<br>FR: Si `b=10` et `h=6`, alors `A=30`.<br>中：若底为 `10`、高为 `6`，则三角形面积为 `30`。                                                               |
| `A=\frac{1}{2}(b_1+b_2)h` | area of a trapezoid, aire d’un trapèze, 梯形面积                 | Half the sum of the parallel bases multiplied by height.             | EN: If `b_1=4`, `b_2=8`, and `h=3`, then `A=18`.<br>FR: Si `b_1=4`, `b_2=8` et `h=3`, alors `A=18`.<br>中：若上底 `4`、下底 `8`、高 `3`，则梯形面积是 `18`。                                      |
| `A=bh`                    | area of a parallelogram, aire d’un parallélogramme, 平行四边形面积  | The product of a base and its corresponding height.                  | EN: A parallelogram with base `7` and height `3` has area `21`.<br>FR: Un parallélogramme de base `7` et de hauteur `3` a une aire de `21`.<br>中：底为 `7`、高为 `3` 的平行四边形面积是 `21`。  |
| `S`                       | surface area, aire de surface, 表面积                           | The total area of all outer faces of a three-dimensional object.     | EN: Surface area measures the outside of a solid.<br>FR: L’aire de surface mesure l’extérieur d’un solide.<br>中：表面积度量立体图形外表面的总面积。                                               |
| `V`                       | volume, volume, 体积                                           | The amount of three-dimensional space occupied by a solid.           | EN: Volume is measured in cubic units.<br>FR: Le volume se mesure en unités cubiques.<br>中：体积用立方单位度量。                                                                           |
| `V=lwh`                   | volume of a rectangular prism, volume d’un pavé droit, 长方体体积 | The product of length, width, and height.                            | EN: If `l=2`, `w=3`, and `h=4`, then `V=24`.<br>FR: Si `l=2`, `w=3` et `h=4`, alors `V=24`.<br>中：若长 `2`、宽 `3`、高 `4`，则体积 `V=24`。                                                 |
| `V=s^3`                   | volume of a cube, volume d’un cube, 正方体体积                    | The cube of the side length.                                         | EN: A cube with side `3` has volume `27`.<br>FR: Un cube de côté `3` a un volume de `27`.<br>中：边长为 `3` 的正方体体积是 `27`。                                                            |
| `V=\pi r^2h`              | volume of a cylinder, volume d’un cylindre, 圆柱体积             | The area of the circular base multiplied by height.                  | EN: A cylinder with radius `2` and height `5` has volume `20\pi`.<br>FR: Un cylindre de rayon `2` et de hauteur `5` a un volume de `20\pi`.<br>中：半径为 `2`、高为 `5` 的圆柱体积是 `20\pi`。 |
| `V=\frac{4}{3}\pi r^3`    | volume of a sphere, volume d’une sphère, 球体积                 | The volume enclosed by a sphere of radius `r`.                       | EN: A sphere with radius `3` has volume `36\pi`.<br>FR: Une sphère de rayon `3` a un volume de `36\pi`.<br>中：半径为 `3` 的球体积是 `36\pi`。                                             |
| `V=\frac{1}{3}\pi r^2h`   | volume of a cone, volume d’un cône, 圆锥体积                     | One third of the volume of a cylinder with the same base and height. | EN: A cone with radius `3` and height `4` has volume `12\pi`.<br>FR: Un cône de rayon `3` et de hauteur `4` a un volume de `12\pi`.<br>中：半径为 `3`、高为 `4` 的圆锥体积是 `12\pi`。         |

## 5.9 Coordinate geometry

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                       | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                     | Definition                                                             | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| ---------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `(x,y)`                                              | Cartesian coordinates, coordonnées cartésiennes, 直角坐标 | A pair of numbers locating a point in the plane.                       | EN: The point `(4,2)` has coordinates `x=4`, `y=2`.<br>FR: Le point `(4,2)` a pour coordonnées `x=4`, `y=2`.<br>中：点 `(4,2)` 的坐标为 `x=4`、`y=2`。                                                           |
| `d=\sqrt{(x_2-x_1)^2+(y_2-y_1)^2}`                   | distance formula, formule de distance, 距离公式           | A formula for the distance between two points in the coordinate plane. | EN: The distance between `(0,0)` and `(3,4)` is `5`.<br>FR: La distance entre `(0,0)` et `(3,4)` est `5`.<br>中：点 `(0,0)` 与 `(3,4)` 的距离是 `5`。                                                            |
| `M=\left(\frac{x_1+x_2}{2},\frac{y_1+y_2}{2}\right)` | midpoint formula, formule du milieu, 中点公式             | A formula for the midpoint of a segment in the coordinate plane.       | EN: The midpoint of `(0,0)` and `(4,2)` is `(2,1)`.<br>FR: Le milieu de `(0,0)` et `(4,2)` est `(2,1)`.<br>中：点 `(0,0)` 与 `(4,2)` 的中点是 `(2,1)`。                                                          |
| `m=\frac{y_2-y_1}{x_2-x_1}`                          | slope, pente, 斜率                                      | The ratio of vertical change to horizontal change between two points.  | EN: The slope through `(1,2)` and `(3,6)` is `2`.<br>FR: La pente de la droite passant par `(1,2)` et `(3,6)` est `2`.<br>中：经过 `(1,2)` 和 `(3,6)` 的直线斜率是 `2`。                                            |
| `y=mx+b`                                             | slope-intercept form, forme réduite, 斜截式              | A line equation showing slope and `y`-intercept.                       | EN: In `y=2x+1`, the slope is `2` and the `y`-intercept is `1`.<br>FR: Dans `y=2x+1`, la pente est `2` et l’ordonnée à l’origine est `1`.<br>中：在 `y=2x+1` 中，斜率是 `2`，`y` 截距是 `1`。                        |
| `Ax+By=C`                                            | standard form of a line, forme cartésienne, 直线标准式     | A general linear equation representing a line.                         | EN: `2x+3y=6` is a line in standard form.<br>FR: `2x+3y=6` est une droite sous forme cartésienne.<br>中：`2x+3y=6` 是直线的标准式。                                                                               |
| `x=a`                                                | vertical line, droite verticale, 竖直直线                 | A line where all points have the same `x`-coordinate.                  | EN: `x=3` is a vertical line.<br>FR: `x=3` est une droite verticale.<br>中：`x=3` 是一条竖直直线。                                                                                                                |
| `y=b`                                                | horizontal line, droite horizontale, 水平直线             | A line where all points have the same `y`-coordinate.                  | EN: `y=-2` is a horizontal line.<br>FR: `y=-2` est une droite horizontale.<br>中：`y=-2` 是一条水平直线。                                                                                                         |
| `(x-h)^2+(y-k)^2=r^2`                                | equation of a circle, équation d’un cercle, 圆的方程      | The set of points at distance `r` from center `(h,k)`.                 | EN: `(x-1)^2+(y-2)^2=9` is a circle centered at `(1,2)` with radius `3`.<br>FR: `(x-1)^2+(y-2)^2=9` est un cercle de centre `(1,2)` et de rayon `3`.<br>中：`(x-1)^2+(y-2)^2=9` 表示圆心为 `(1,2)`、半径为 `3` 的圆。 |

## 5.10 Geometric transformations

| Symbol (LaTeX) | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                             | Definition                                                                       | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| —              | transformation, transformation, 变换                            | A rule that moves or changes a geometric figure.                                 | EN: A transformation sends each point of a figure to a new point.<br>FR: Une transformation envoie chaque point d’une figure vers un nouveau point.<br>中：变换把图形中的每个点映到新的点。                                          |
| —              | translation, translation, 平移                                  | A transformation moving every point by the same distance in the same direction.  | EN: A translation by vector `(2,3)` sends `(x,y)` to `(x+2,y+3)`.<br>FR: Une translation de vecteur `(2,3)` envoie `(x,y)` sur `(x+2,y+3)`.<br>中：向量 `(2,3)` 的平移把 `(x,y)` 变为 `(x+2,y+3)`。                           |
| —              | rotation, rotation, 旋转                                        | A transformation turning a figure around a fixed point.                          | EN: A `90^\circ` rotation about the origin sends `(x,y)` to `(-y,x)`.<br>FR: Une rotation de `90^\circ` autour de l’origine envoie `(x,y)` sur `(-y,x)`.<br>中：绕原点旋转 `90^\circ` 把 `(x,y)` 变为 `(-y,x)`。              |
| —              | reflection, réflexion / symétrie axiale, 反射 / 轴对称             | A transformation flipping a figure across a line.                                | EN: Reflection across the `x`-axis sends `(x,y)` to `(x,-y)`.<br>FR: La symétrie par rapport à l’axe des abscisses envoie `(x,y)` sur `(x,-y)`.<br>中：关于 `x` 轴反射把 `(x,y)` 变为 `(x,-y)`。                              |
| —              | dilation, homothétie, 位似 / 缩放                                 | A transformation that enlarges or reduces a figure by a scale factor.            | EN: A dilation with factor `2` sends `(x,y)` to `(2x,2y)`.<br>FR: Une homothétie de rapport `2` envoie `(x,y)` sur `(2x,2y)`.<br>中：比例因子为 `2` 的缩放把 `(x,y)` 变为 `(2x,2y)`。                                            |
| —              | rigid motion, isométrie, 刚体运动 / 保距变换                          | A transformation preserving distances and angles.                                | EN: Translations, rotations, and reflections are rigid motions.<br>FR: Les translations, rotations et réflexions sont des isométries.<br>中：平移、旋转和反射都是保距变换。                                                         |
| —              | symmetry, symétrie, 对称                                        | A property where a figure remains unchanged under a transformation.              | EN: A square has rotational and reflection symmetries.<br>FR: Un carré possède des symétries de rotation et de réflexion.<br>中：正方形具有旋转对称和轴对称。                                                                      |
| —              | line of symmetry, axe de symétrie, 对称轴                        | A line across which a figure reflects onto itself.                               | EN: An isosceles triangle has a line of symmetry through its vertex and base midpoint.<br>FR: Un triangle isocèle a un axe de symétrie passant par son sommet et le milieu de sa base.<br>中：等腰三角形有一条经过顶点和底边中点的对称轴。 |
| —              | rotational symmetry, symétrie de rotation, 旋转对称               | A property where a figure matches itself after a rotation less than `360^\circ`. | EN: A square has rotational symmetry of order `4`.<br>FR: Un carré a une symétrie de rotation d’ordre `4`.<br>中：正方形有 `4` 阶旋转对称。                                                                                    |
| —              | congruence transformation, transformation de congruence, 全等变换 | A transformation preserving size and shape.                                      | EN: Any rigid motion is a congruence transformation.<br>FR: Toute isométrie est une transformation de congruence.<br>中：任何保距变换都是全等变换。                                                                               |
# 6. Trigonometry, Circular Functions, and Basic Vectors

## 6.1 Angle measure and circular language

| Symbol (LaTeX)                     | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                             | Definition                                                                                      | Examples                                                                                                                                                                    |
| ---------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `^\circ`                           | degree, degré, 度                                              | A unit of angle measure in which a full turn is `360^\circ`.                                    | EN: A right angle is `90^\circ`.<br>FR: Un angle droit mesure `90^\circ`.<br>中：直角是 `90^\circ`。                                                                              |
| `\operatorname{rad}`               | radian, radian, 弧度                                            | A unit of angle measure defined by arc length divided by radius.                                | EN: An angle of `1` radian cuts an arc equal in length to the radius.<br>FR: Un angle de `1` radian intercepte un arc de même longueur que le rayon.<br>中：`1` 弧度的角所对弧长等于半径。 |
| `2\pi`                             | full turn, tour complet, 一周 / 周角                              | One complete rotation around a circle.                                                          | EN: One full turn is `2\pi` radians.<br>FR: Un tour complet vaut `2\pi` radians.<br>中：一周等于 `2\pi` 弧度。                                                                       |
| `\pi`                              | half turn, demi-tour, 半周 / 平角                                 | Half of a complete rotation.                                                                    | EN: A half turn is `\pi` radians, or `180^\circ`.<br>FR: Un demi-tour vaut `\pi` radians, soit `180^\circ`.<br>中：半周等于 `\pi` 弧度，也就是 `180^\circ`。                             |
| `\frac{\pi}{2}`                    | quarter turn, quart de tour, 四分之一周 / 直角                       | One quarter of a complete rotation.                                                             | EN: A quarter turn is `\frac{\pi}{2}` radians.<br>FR: Un quart de tour vaut `\frac{\pi}{2}` radians.<br>中：四分之一周等于 `\frac{\pi}{2}` 弧度。                                       |
| `\theta`                           | angle, angle, 角                                               | A measure of rotation between two rays or directions.                                           | EN: Let `\theta=60^\circ`.<br>FR: Soit `\theta=60^\circ`.<br>中：令 `\theta=60^\circ`。                                                                                         |
| `s=r\theta`                        | arc length, longueur d’arc, 弧长                                | The length of an arc cut off by a central angle `\theta`, when `\theta` is measured in radians. | EN: If `r=3` and `\theta=2`, then `s=6`.<br>FR: Si `r=3` et `\theta=2`, alors `s=6`.<br>中：若 `r=3` 且 `\theta=2`，则弧长 `s=6`。                                                   |
| `A=\frac{1}{2}r^2\theta`           | sector area, aire d’un secteur, 扇形面积                          | The area of a circular sector with radius `r` and central angle `\theta` in radians.            | EN: If `r=4` and `\theta=\frac{\pi}{2}`, then `A=4\pi`.<br>FR: Si `r=4` et `\theta=\frac{\pi}{2}`, alors `A=4\pi`.<br>中：若 `r=4` 且 `\theta=\frac{\pi}{2}`，则扇形面积为 `4\pi`。     |
| `\theta^\circ\cdot\frac{\pi}{180}` | degree-to-radian conversion, conversion degrés-radians, 角度转弧度 | A formula converting degrees into radians.                                                      | EN: `180^\circ=\pi` radians.<br>FR: `180^\circ=\pi` radians.<br>中：`180^\circ` 等于 `\pi` 弧度。                                                                                  |
| `\theta\cdot\frac{180}{\pi}`       | radian-to-degree conversion, conversion radians-degrés, 弧度转角度 | A formula converting radians into degrees.                                                      | EN: `\frac{\pi}{3}` radians equals `60^\circ`.<br>FR: `\frac{\pi}{3}` radians vaut `60^\circ`.<br>中：`\frac{\pi}{3}` 弧度等于 `60^\circ`。                                        |

## 6.2 Right-triangle trigonometry

| Symbol (LaTeX)                             | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                           | Definition                                                                | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\sin\theta`                               | sine, sinus, 正弦                             | In a right triangle, the ratio of the opposite side to the hypotenuse.    | EN: `\sin\theta=\frac{\text{opposite}}{\text{hypotenuse}}`.<br>FR: `\sin\theta=\frac{\text{côté opposé}}{\text{hypoténuse}}`.<br>中：`\sin\theta=\frac{\text{对边}}{\text{斜边}}`。                                                        |
| `\cos\theta`                               | cosine, cosinus, 余弦                         | In a right triangle, the ratio of the adjacent side to the hypotenuse.    | EN: `\cos\theta=\frac{\text{adjacent}}{\text{hypotenuse}}`.<br>FR: `\cos\theta=\frac{\text{côté adjacent}}{\text{hypoténuse}}`.<br>中：`\cos\theta=\frac{\text{邻边}}{\text{斜边}}`。                                                      |
| `\tan\theta`                               | tangent, tangente, 正切                       | In a right triangle, the ratio of the opposite side to the adjacent side. | EN: `\tan\theta=\frac{\text{opposite}}{\text{adjacent}}`.<br>FR: `\tan\theta=\frac{\text{côté opposé}}{\text{côté adjacent}}`.<br>中：`\tan\theta=\frac{\text{对边}}{\text{邻边}}`。                                                       |
| `\csc\theta`                               | cosecant, cosécante, 余割                     | The reciprocal of sine.                                                   | EN: `\csc\theta=\frac{1}{\sin\theta}`.<br>FR: `\csc\theta=\frac{1}{\sin\theta}`.<br>中：`\csc\theta=\frac{1}{\sin\theta}`。                                                                                                            |
| `\sec\theta`                               | secant, sécante, 正割                         | The reciprocal of cosine.                                                 | EN: `\sec\theta=\frac{1}{\cos\theta}`.<br>FR: `\sec\theta=\frac{1}{\cos\theta}`.<br>中：`\sec\theta=\frac{1}{\cos\theta}`。                                                                                                            |
| `\cot\theta`                               | cotangent, cotangente, 余切                   | The reciprocal of tangent.                                                | EN: `\cot\theta=\frac{1}{\tan\theta}`.<br>FR: `\cot\theta=\frac{1}{\tan\theta}`.<br>中：`\cot\theta=\frac{1}{\tan\theta}`。                                                                                                            |
| —                                          | opposite side, côté opposé, 对边              | In a right triangle, the side opposite the chosen angle.                  | EN: For angle `\theta`, the opposite side is across from `\theta`.<br>FR: Pour l’angle `\theta`, le côté opposé est en face de `\theta`.<br>中：对于角 `\theta`，对边是位于该角对面的边。                                                             |
| —                                          | adjacent side, côté adjacent, 邻边            | In a right triangle, the non-hypotenuse side touching the chosen angle.   | EN: The adjacent side touches `\theta` and is not the hypotenuse.<br>FR: Le côté adjacent touche `\theta` et n’est pas l’hypoténuse.<br>中：邻边与角 `\theta` 相邻，但不是斜边。                                                                   |
| —                                          | hypotenuse, hypoténuse, 斜边                  | The longest side of a right triangle, opposite the right angle.           | EN: The hypotenuse is opposite the `90^\circ` angle.<br>FR: L’hypoténuse est opposée à l’angle droit.<br>中：斜边与 `90^\circ` 角相对。                                                                                                      |
| `\tan\theta=\frac{\sin\theta}{\cos\theta}` | quotient identity, identité quotient, 商数恒等式 | Tangent is the quotient of sine and cosine wherever cosine is nonzero.    | EN: If `\cos\theta\neq 0`, then `\tan\theta=\frac{\sin\theta}{\cos\theta}`.<br>FR: Si `\cos\theta\neq 0`, alors `\tan\theta=\frac{\sin\theta}{\cos\theta}`.<br>中：若 `\cos\theta\neq 0`，则 `\tan\theta=\frac{\sin\theta}{\cos\theta}`。 |

## 6.3 Unit circle and circular functions

| Symbol (LaTeX)                       | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                        | Definition                                                                         | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| ------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `x^2+y^2=1`                          | unit circle, cercle trigonométrique, 单位圆                 | The circle centered at the origin with radius `1`.                                 | EN: The unit circle has equation `x^2+y^2=1`.<br>FR: Le cercle trigonométrique a pour équation `x^2+y^2=1`.<br>中：单位圆的方程是 `x^2+y^2=1`。                                                                                            |
| `(\cos\theta,\sin\theta)`            | circular coordinates, coordonnées trigonométriques, 三角坐标 | The point on the unit circle corresponding to angle `\theta`.                      | EN: At angle `\theta`, the unit-circle point is `(\cos\theta,\sin\theta)`.<br>FR: Pour l’angle `\theta`, le point du cercle trigonométrique est `(\cos\theta,\sin\theta)`.<br>中：角 `\theta` 在单位圆上的对应点是 `(\cos\theta,\sin\theta)`。 |
| `\sin\theta`                         | sine as y-coordinate, sinus comme ordonnée, 正弦作为纵坐标      | On the unit circle, sine is the `y`-coordinate of the corresponding point.         | EN: At `\theta=\frac{\pi}{2}`, `\sin\theta=1`.<br>FR: Pour `\theta=\frac{\pi}{2}`, `\sin\theta=1`.<br>中：当 `\theta=\frac{\pi}{2}` 时，`\sin\theta=1`。                                                                               |
| `\cos\theta`                         | cosine as x-coordinate, cosinus comme abscisse, 余弦作为横坐标  | On the unit circle, cosine is the `x`-coordinate of the corresponding point.       | EN: At `\theta=0`, `\cos\theta=1`.<br>FR: Pour `\theta=0`, `\cos\theta=1`.<br>中：当 `\theta=0` 时，`\cos\theta=1`。                                                                                                                   |
| `\tan\theta`                         | tangent as slope, tangente comme pente, 正切作为斜率           | On the unit circle, tangent is the slope of the ray from the origin, when defined. | EN: `\tan\theta` is undefined when `\cos\theta=0`.<br>FR: `\tan\theta` n’est pas définie quand `\cos\theta=0`.<br>中：当 `\cos\theta=0` 时，`\tan\theta` 无定义。                                                                         |
| `\theta+2\pi`                        | coterminal angles, angles coterminaux, 终边相同的角            | Angles differing by an integer multiple of a full turn.                            | EN: `\theta` and `\theta+2\pi` have the same terminal side.<br>FR: `\theta` et `\theta+2\pi` ont le même côté terminal.<br>中：`\theta` 与 `\theta+2\pi` 的终边相同。                                                                     |
| `0,\frac{\pi}{2},\pi,\frac{3\pi}{2}` | quadrantal angles, angles quadrantal, 象限边界角              | Angles whose terminal sides lie on the coordinate axes.                            | EN: `\pi` is a quadrantal angle.<br>FR: `\pi` est un angle quadrantal.<br>中：`\pi` 是象限边界角。                                                                                                                                        |
| —                                    | reference angle, angle de référence, 参考角                 | The acute angle between a terminal side and the `x`-axis.                          | EN: The reference angle of `\frac{5\pi}{6}` is `\frac{\pi}{6}`.<br>FR: L’angle de référence de `\frac{5\pi}{6}` est `\frac{\pi}{6}`.<br>中：`\frac{5\pi}{6}` 的参考角是 `\frac{\pi}{6}`。                                                |
| `I,II,III,IV`                        | quadrant, quadrant, 象限                                   | One of the four regions of the coordinate plane divided by the axes.               | EN: In Quadrant II, sine is positive and cosine is negative.<br>FR: Dans le deuxième quadrant, le sinus est positif et le cosinus est négatif.<br>中：在第二象限，正弦为正，余弦为负。                                                             |

## 6.4 Special angles and exact values

| Symbol (LaTeX)             | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                 | Definition                                                                         | Examples                                                                                                                                                                    |
| -------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `30^\circ=\frac{\pi}{6}`   | thirty degrees, trente degrés, 三十度                                | A special angle commonly arising from a `30^\circ`-`60^\circ`-`90^\circ` triangle. | EN: `\sin\frac{\pi}{6}=\frac{1}{2}`.<br>FR: `\sin\frac{\pi}{6}=\frac{1}{2}`.<br>中：`\sin\frac{\pi}{6}=\frac{1}{2}`。                                                          |
| `45^\circ=\frac{\pi}{4}`   | forty-five degrees, quarante-cinq degrés, 四十五度                    | A special angle commonly arising from an isosceles right triangle.                 | EN: `\cos\frac{\pi}{4}=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}`.<br>FR: `\cos\frac{\pi}{4}=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}`.<br>中：`\cos\frac{\pi}{4}=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}`。                                     |
| `60^\circ=\frac{\pi}{3}`   | sixty degrees, soixante degrés, 六十度                               | A special angle commonly arising from an equilateral triangle.                     | EN: `\sin\frac{\pi}{3}=\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}`.<br>FR: `\sin\frac{\pi}{3}=\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}`.<br>中：`\sin\frac{\pi}{3}=\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}`。                                     |
| `90^\circ=\frac{\pi}{2}`   | ninety degrees, quatre-vingt-dix degrés, 九十度                      | A right angle.                                                                     | EN: `\sin\frac{\pi}{2}=1`.<br>FR: `\sin\frac{\pi}{2}=1`.<br>中：`\sin\frac{\pi}{2}=1`。                                                                                        |
| `180^\circ=\pi`            | one hundred eighty degrees, cent quatre-vingts degrés, 一百八十度      | A straight angle.                                                                  | EN: `\cos\pi=-1`.<br>FR: `\cos\pi=-1`.<br>中：`\cos\pi=-1`。                                                                                                                   |
| `270^\circ=\frac{3\pi}{2}` | two hundred seventy degrees, deux cent soixante-dix degrés, 二百七十度 | Three quarters of a full turn.                                                     | EN: `\sin\frac{3\pi}{2}=-1`.<br>FR: `\sin\frac{3\pi}{2}=-1`.<br>中：`\sin\frac{3\pi}{2}=-1`。                                                                                  |
| `360^\circ=2\pi`           | three hundred sixty degrees, trois cent soixante degrés, 三百六十度    | One full turn.                                                                     | EN: `\cos 2\pi=1`.<br>FR: `\cos 2\pi=1`.<br>中：`\cos 2\pi=1`。                                                                                                                |
| `\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}`       | exact trigonometric value, valeur trigonométrique exacte, 三角函数精确值 | A trigonometric value written exactly, not as a decimal approximation.             | EN: `\sin\frac{\pi}{4}=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}` is exact.<br>FR: `\sin\frac{\pi}{4}=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}` est une valeur exacte.<br>中：`\sin\frac{\pi}{4}=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}` 是精确值。 |
| `0,1,-1`                   | axis-angle values, valeurs sur les axes, 坐标轴角的三角值                 | The sine and cosine values at quadrantal angles.                                   | EN: At `\theta=0`, `(\cos\theta,\sin\theta)=(1,0)`.<br>FR: Pour `\theta=0`, `(\cos\theta,\sin\theta)=(1,0)`.<br>中：当 `\theta=0` 时，`(\cos\theta,\sin\theta)=(1,0)`。           |

## 6.5 Trigonometric identities

| Symbol (LaTeX)                | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                   | Definition                                                                        | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| ----------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\sin^2\theta+\cos^2\theta=1` | Pythagorean identity, identité pythagoricienne, 勾股恒等式                               | The fundamental identity derived from the unit circle.                            | EN: `\sin^2\theta+\cos^2\theta=1` for every real `\theta`.<br>FR: `\sin^2\theta+\cos^2\theta=1` pour tout réel `\theta`.<br>中：对任意实数 `\theta`，都有 `\sin^2\theta+\cos^2\theta=1`。                                                  |
| `1+\tan^2\theta=\sec^2\theta` | tangent Pythagorean identity, identité pythagoricienne avec tangente, 正切勾股恒等式       | An identity obtained by dividing `\sin^2\theta+\cos^2\theta=1` by `\cos^2\theta`. | EN: `1+\tan^2\theta=\sec^2\theta` when `\cos\theta\neq 0`.<br>FR: `1+\tan^2\theta=\sec^2\theta` si `\cos\theta\neq 0`.<br>中：当 `\cos\theta\neq 0` 时，`1+\tan^2\theta=\sec^2\theta`。                                               |
| `1+\cot^2\theta=\csc^2\theta` | cotangent Pythagorean identity, identité pythagoricienne avec cotangente, 余切勾股恒等式   | An identity obtained by dividing `\sin^2\theta+\cos^2\theta=1` by `\sin^2\theta`. | EN: `1+\cot^2\theta=\csc^2\theta` when `\sin\theta\neq 0`.<br>FR: `1+\cot^2\theta=\csc^2\theta` si `\sin\theta\neq 0`.<br>中：当 `\sin\theta\neq 0` 时，`1+\cot^2\theta=\csc^2\theta`。                                               |
| `\sin(-\theta)=-\sin\theta`   | odd identity for sine, identité impaire du sinus, 正弦奇函数恒等式                          | Sine is an odd function.                                                          | EN: `\sin(-x)=-\sin x`.<br>FR: `\sin(-x)=-\sin x`.<br>中：`\sin(-x)=-\sin x`。                                                                                                                                                     |
| `\cos(-\theta)=\cos\theta`    | even identity for cosine, identité paire du cosinus, 余弦偶函数恒等式                       | Cosine is an even function.                                                       | EN: `\cos(-x)=\cos x`.<br>FR: `\cos(-x)=\cos x`.<br>中：`\cos(-x)=\cos x`。                                                                                                                                                        |
| `\tan(-\theta)=-\tan\theta`   | odd identity for tangent, identité impaire de la tangente, 正切奇函数恒等式                 | Tangent is an odd function.                                                       | EN: `\tan(-x)=-\tan x`.<br>FR: `\tan(-x)=-\tan x`.<br>中：`\tan(-x)=-\tan x`。                                                                                                                                                     |
| `\sin(\alpha+\beta)`          | sine addition formula, formule d’addition du sinus, 正弦和角公式                          | An identity for the sine of a sum of angles.                                      | EN: `\sin(\alpha+\beta)=\sin\alpha\cos\beta+\cos\alpha\sin\beta`.<br>FR: `\sin(\alpha+\beta)=\sin\alpha\cos\beta+\cos\alpha\sin\beta`.<br>中：`\sin(\alpha+\beta)=\sin\alpha\cos\beta+\cos\alpha\sin\beta`。                       |
| `\cos(\alpha+\beta)`          | cosine addition formula, formule d’addition du cosinus, 余弦和角公式                      | An identity for the cosine of a sum of angles.                                    | EN: `\cos(\alpha+\beta)=\cos\alpha\cos\beta-\sin\alpha\sin\beta`.<br>FR: `\cos(\alpha+\beta)=\cos\alpha\cos\beta-\sin\alpha\sin\beta`.<br>中：`\cos(\alpha+\beta)=\cos\alpha\cos\beta-\sin\alpha\sin\beta`。                       |
| `\sin(2\theta)`               | double-angle formula for sine, formule de l’angle double du sinus, 正弦二倍角公式          | A formula expressing sine of a double angle.                                      | EN: `\sin(2\theta)=2\sin\theta\cos\theta`.<br>FR: `\sin(2\theta)=2\sin\theta\cos\theta`.<br>中：`\sin(2\theta)=2\sin\theta\cos\theta`。                                                                                            |
| `\cos(2\theta)`               | double-angle formula for cosine, formule de l’angle double du cosinus, 余弦二倍角公式      | A formula expressing cosine of a double angle.                                    | EN: `\cos(2\theta)=\cos^2\theta-\sin^2\theta`.<br>FR: `\cos(2\theta)=\cos^2\theta-\sin^2\theta`.<br>中：`\cos(2\theta)=\cos^2\theta-\sin^2\theta`。                                                                                |
| `\tan(2\theta)`               | double-angle formula for tangent, formule de l’angle double de la tangente, 正切二倍角公式 | A formula expressing tangent of a double angle.                                   | EN: `\tan(2\theta)=\frac{2\tan\theta}{1-\tan^2\theta}` when defined.<br>FR: `\tan(2\theta)=\frac{2\tan\theta}{1-\tan^2\theta}` lorsque l’expression est définie.<br>中：在有定义时，`\tan(2\theta)=\frac{2\tan\theta}{1-\tan^2\theta}`。 |

## 6.6 Graphs of trigonometric functions

| Symbol (LaTeX)         | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                             | Definition                                                                      | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| ---------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `y=\sin x`             | sine function, fonction sinus, 正弦函数                                           | A periodic function giving the `y`-coordinate on the unit circle.               | EN: `y=\sin x` has period `2\pi`.<br>FR: `y=\sin x` a pour période `2\pi`.<br>中：`y=\sin x` 的周期是 `2\pi`。                                                                                                               |
| `y=\cos x`             | cosine function, fonction cosinus, 余弦函数                                       | A periodic function giving the `x`-coordinate on the unit circle.               | EN: `y=\cos x` has maximum value `1`.<br>FR: `y=\cos x` a pour valeur maximale `1`.<br>中：`y=\cos x` 的最大值是 `1`。                                                                                                        |
| `y=\tan x`             | tangent function, fonction tangente, 正切函数                                     | A periodic function defined as `\sin x/\cos x` where `\cos x\neq 0`.            | EN: `y=\tan x` has period `\pi`.<br>FR: `y=\tan x` a pour période `\pi`.<br>中：`y=\tan x` 的周期是 `\pi`。                                                                                                                  |
| `[-1,1]`               | range of sine and cosine, image du sinus et du cosinus, 正弦余弦值域                | The set of possible output values of sine and cosine.                           | EN: For every real `x`, `-1\leq\sin x\leq 1`.<br>FR: Pour tout réel `x`, `-1\leq\sin x\leq 1`.<br>中：对任意实数 `x`，都有 `-1\leq\sin x\leq 1`。                                                                                |
| `2\pi`                 | period of sine and cosine, période du sinus et du cosinus, 正弦余弦周期             | The horizontal length after which sine and cosine repeat.                       | EN: `\sin(x+2\pi)=\sin x`.<br>FR: `\sin(x+2\pi)=\sin x`.<br>中：`\sin(x+2\pi)=\sin x`。                                                                                                                                  |
| `\pi`                  | period of tangent, période de la tangente, 正切周期                               | The horizontal length after which tangent repeats.                              | EN: `\tan(x+\pi)=\tan x`.<br>FR: `\tan(x+\pi)=\tan x`.<br>中：`\tan(x+\pi)=\tan x`。                                                                                                                                     |
| `A` in `A\sin x`       | amplitude, amplitude, 振幅                                                      | Half the distance between the maximum and minimum values of a sinusoidal graph. | EN: The amplitude of `3\sin x` is `3`.<br>FR: L’amplitude de `3\sin x` est `3`.<br>中：`3\sin x` 的振幅是 `3`。                                                                                                              |
| `B` in `\sin(Bx)`      | angular frequency, fréquence angulaire, 角频率                                   | A factor controlling how quickly a sinusoidal function oscillates.              | EN: The period of `\sin(2x)` is `\pi`.<br>FR: La période de `\sin(2x)` est `\pi`.<br>中：`\sin(2x)` 的周期是 `\pi`。                                                                                                         |
| `C` in `\sin(x-C)`     | phase shift, déphasage, 相位平移                                                  | A horizontal shift of a sinusoidal graph.                                       | EN: `\sin(x-\frac{\pi}{2})` shifts `\sin x` right by `\frac{\pi}{2}`.<br>FR: `\sin(x-\frac{\pi}{2})` décale `\sin x` vers la droite de `\frac{\pi}{2}`.<br>中：`\sin(x-\frac{\pi}{2})` 将 `\sin x` 向右平移 `\frac{\pi}{2}`。 |
| `D` in `A\sin(Bx-C)+D` | vertical shift, translation verticale, 竖直平移                                   | A constant added to move a sinusoidal graph up or down.                         | EN: `\sin x+2` shifts the sine graph up by `2`.<br>FR: `\sin x+2` translate le graphe du sinus vers le haut de `2`.<br>中：`\sin x+2` 将正弦图像向上平移 `2` 个单位。                                                                |
| `x=\frac{\pi}{2}+k\pi` | vertical asymptotes of tangent, asymptotes verticales de la tangente, 正切垂直渐近线 | Lines where tangent is undefined because cosine is zero.                        | EN: `\tan x` has a vertical asymptote at `x=\frac{\pi}{2}`.<br>FR: `\tan x` a une asymptote verticale en `x=\frac{\pi}{2}`.<br>中：`\tan x` 在 `x=\frac{\pi}{2}` 处有垂直渐近线。                                                |

## 6.7 Inverse trigonometric functions

| Symbol (LaTeX)                   | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                    | Definition                                                             | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\arcsin x`                      | arcsine, arc sinus, 反正弦                                                              | The inverse of sine restricted to `[-\frac{\pi}{2},\frac{\pi}{2}]`.    | EN: `\arcsin\frac{1}{2}=\frac{\pi}{6}`.<br>FR: `\arcsin\frac{1}{2}=\frac{\pi}{6}`.<br>中：`\arcsin\frac{1}{2}=\frac{\pi}{6}`。                                                                           |
| `\arccos x`                      | arccosine, arc cosinus, 反余弦                                                          | The inverse of cosine restricted to `[0,\pi]`.                         | EN: `\arccos\frac{1}{2}=\frac{\pi}{3}`.<br>FR: `\arccos\frac{1}{2}=\frac{\pi}{3}`.<br>中：`\arccos\frac{1}{2}=\frac{\pi}{3}`。                                                                           |
| `\arctan x`                      | arctangent, arc tangente, 反正切                                                        | The inverse of tangent restricted to `(-\frac{\pi}{2},\frac{\pi}{2})`. | EN: `\arctan 1=\frac{\pi}{4}`.<br>FR: `\arctan 1=\frac{\pi}{4}`.<br>中：`\arctan 1=\frac{\pi}{4}`。                                                                                                      |
| `\sin^{-1}x`                     | inverse sine notation, notation du sinus réciproque, 反正弦记号                           | A common notation for `\arcsin x`, not the reciprocal of sine.         | EN: `\sin^{-1}x` usually means `\arcsin x`.<br>FR: `\sin^{-1}x` désigne généralement `\arcsin x`.<br>中：`\sin^{-1}x` 通常表示 `\arcsin x`，不是 `1/\sin x`。                                                   |
| `[-1,1]`                         | domain of arcsine and arccosine, domaine de l’arcsinus et de l’arccosinus, 反正弦反余弦定义域 | The allowed input interval for `\arcsin x` and `\arccos x`.            | EN: `\arcsin 2` is not real because `2\notin[-1,1]`.<br>FR: `\arcsin 2` n’est pas réel car `2\notin[-1,1]`.<br>中：`\arcsin 2` 不是实数，因为 `2\notin[-1,1]`。                                                 |
| `[-\frac{\pi}{2},\frac{\pi}{2}]` | principal range of arcsine, image principale de l’arcsinus, 反正弦主值范围                  | The output interval chosen to make inverse sine a function.            | EN: `\arcsin x` always lies in `[-\frac{\pi}{2},\frac{\pi}{2}]`.<br>FR: `\arcsin x` appartient toujours à `[-\frac{\pi}{2},\frac{\pi}{2}]`.<br>中：`\arcsin x` 的值总在 `[-\frac{\pi}{2},\frac{\pi}{2}]` 内。 |
| `[0,\pi]`                        | principal range of arccosine, image principale de l’arccosinus, 反余弦主值范围              | The output interval chosen to make inverse cosine a function.          | EN: `\arccos x` always lies in `[0,\pi]`.<br>FR: `\arccos x` appartient toujours à `[0,\pi]`.<br>中：`\arccos x` 的值总在 `[0,\pi]` 内。                                                                      |
| `(-\frac{\pi}{2},\frac{\pi}{2})` | principal range of arctangent, image principale de l’arctangente, 反正切主值范围            | The output interval chosen to make inverse tangent a function.         | EN: `\arctan x` always lies in `(-\frac{\pi}{2},\frac{\pi}{2})`.<br>FR: `\arctan x` appartient toujours à `(-\frac{\pi}{2},\frac{\pi}{2})`.<br>中：`\arctan x` 的值总在 `(-\frac{\pi}{2},\frac{\pi}{2})` 内。 |

## 6.8 Laws for solving triangles

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                       | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                               | Definition                                                                              | Examples                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ---------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\frac{a}{\sin A}=\frac{b}{\sin B}=\frac{c}{\sin C}` | law of sines, loi des sinus, 正弦定理                               | A relation between sides and opposite angles in any triangle.                           | EN: Use the law of sines when an angle and its opposite side are known.<br>FR: On utilise la loi des sinus quand un angle et son côté opposé sont connus.<br>中：当已知一组对角与对边时，可用正弦定理。 |
| `c^2=a^2+b^2-2ab\cos C`                              | law of cosines, loi des cosinus, 余弦定理                           | A relation generalizing the Pythagorean theorem to any triangle.                        | EN: If `C=90^\circ`, the law of cosines becomes `c^2=a^2+b^2`.<br>FR: Si `C=90^\circ`, la loi des cosinus devient `c^2=a^2+b^2`.<br>中：当 `C=90^\circ` 时，余弦定理化为 `c^2=a^2+b^2`。       |
| `A+B+C=180^\circ`                                    | angle sum of a triangle, somme des angles d’un triangle, 三角形内角和 | In Euclidean geometry, the three interior angles of a triangle sum to `180^\circ`.      | EN: If `A=40^\circ` and `B=60^\circ`, then `C=80^\circ`.<br>FR: Si `A=40^\circ` et `B=60^\circ`, alors `C=80^\circ`.<br>中：若 `A=40^\circ` 且 `B=60^\circ`，则 `C=80^\circ`。            |
| `K=\frac{1}{2}ab\sin C`                              | triangle area by sine, aire par sinus, 正弦面积公式                   | The area of a triangle using two sides and the included angle.                          | EN: If `a=5`, `b=6`, and `C=30^\circ`, then `K=7.5`.<br>FR: Si `a=5`, `b=6` et `C=30^\circ`, alors `K=7,5`.<br>中：若 `a=5`、`b=6`、`C=30^\circ`，则面积 `K=7.5`。                           |
| `s=\frac{a+b+c}{2}`                                  | semiperimeter, demi-périmètre, 半周长                              | Half the perimeter of a triangle.                                                       | EN: For sides `3`, `4`, and `5`, the semiperimeter is `6`.<br>FR: Pour les côtés `3`, `4` et `5`, le demi-périmètre vaut `6`.<br>中：边长为 `3`、`4`、`5` 的三角形半周长为 `6`。                   |
| `K=\sqrt{s(s-a)(s-b)(s-c)}`                          | Heron’s formula, formule de Héron, 海伦公式                         | A formula for the area of a triangle from its three side lengths.                       | EN: Heron’s formula gives area `6` for a `3`-`4`-`5` triangle.<br>FR: La formule de Héron donne une aire de `6` pour un triangle `3`-`4`-`5`.<br>中：海伦公式给出 `3`-`4`-`5` 三角形的面积为 `6`。 |
| —                                                    | ambiguous case, cas ambigu, 二义性情形                               | In triangle solving, a case where given data may determine zero, one, or two triangles. | EN: The `SSA` case may be ambiguous.<br>FR: Le cas `CCA` peut être ambigu.<br>中：已知两边和非夹角的 `SSA` 情形可能产生二义性。                                                                         |
| —                                                    | included angle, angle compris, 夹角                               | The angle between two given sides.                                                      | EN: In `SAS`, the known angle is the included angle.<br>FR: Dans le cas `CAC`, l’angle connu est l’angle compris.<br>中：在边角边中，已知角是两条已知边的夹角。                                         |

## 6.9 Vectors and trigonometric components

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                                         | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                        | Definition                                                                                    | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\vec{v}`                                                              | vector, vecteur, 向量                                                      | A quantity with magnitude and direction.                                                      | EN: A velocity vector has both speed and direction.<br>FR: Un vecteur vitesse a une norme et une direction.<br>中：速度向量既有大小，也有方向。                                                                                            |
| `\lVert \vec{v}\rVert`                                                 | magnitude, norme, 向量大小 / 模                                               | The length of a vector.                                                                       | EN: If `\vec{v}=(3,4)`, then `\lVert\vec{v}\rVert=5`.<br>FR: Si `\vec{v}=(3,4)`, alors `\lVert\vec{v}\rVert=5`.<br>中：若 `\vec{v}=(3,4)`，则 `\lVert\vec{v}\rVert=5`。                                                          |
| `\hat{u}`                                                              | unit vector, vecteur unitaire, 单位向量                                      | A vector with magnitude `1`.                                                                  | EN: A unit vector gives direction without changing length scale.<br>FR: Un vecteur unitaire donne une direction sans changer l’échelle.<br>中：单位向量表示方向，其长度为 `1`。                                                            |
| `(v_x,v_y)`                                                            | components, composantes, 分量                                              | The coordinate parts of a vector.                                                             | EN: The vector `(3,4)` has components `3` and `4`.<br>FR: Le vecteur `(3,4)` a pour composantes `3` et `4`.<br>中：向量 `(3,4)` 的分量是 `3` 和 `4`。                                                                                |
| `v_x=\lVert\vec{v}\rVert\cos\theta`                                    | x-component, composante horizontale, x 分量                                | The horizontal component of a vector with magnitude `\lVert\vec{v}\rVert` and angle `\theta`. | EN: If `\lVert\vec{v}\rVert=10` and `\theta=60^\circ`, then `v_x=5`.<br>FR: Si `\lVert\vec{v}\rVert=10` et `\theta=60^\circ`, alors `v_x=5`.<br>中：若 `\lVert\vec{v}\rVert=10` 且 `\theta=60^\circ`，则 `v_x=5`。                |
| `v_y=\lVert\vec{v}\rVert\sin\theta`                                    | y-component, composante verticale, y 分量                                  | The vertical component of a vector with magnitude `\lVert\vec{v}\rVert` and angle `\theta`.   | EN: If `\lVert\vec{v}\rVert=10` and `\theta=30^\circ`, then `v_y=5`.<br>FR: Si `\lVert\vec{v}\rVert=10` et `\theta=30^\circ`, alors `v_y=5`.<br>中：若 `\lVert\vec{v}\rVert=10` 且 `\theta=30^\circ`，则 `v_y=5`。                |
| `\vec{u}+\vec{v}`                                                      | vector addition, addition vectorielle, 向量加法                              | Adding vectors by adding corresponding components.                                            | EN: `(1,2)+(3,4)=(4,6)`.<br>FR: `(1,2)+(3,4)=(4,6)`.<br>中：`(1,2)+(3,4)=(4,6)`。                                                                                                                                             |
| `c\vec{v}`                                                             | scalar multiplication, multiplication par un scalaire, 数乘                | Multiplying a vector by a number, changing its magnitude and possibly direction.              | EN: `2(3,4)=(6,8)`.<br>FR: `2(3,4)=(6,8)`.<br>中：`2(3,4)=(6,8)`。                                                                                                                                                            |
| `\vec{u}\cdot\vec{v}`                                                  | dot product, produit scalaire, 点积 / 数量积                                  | A product measuring directional alignment between two vectors.                                | EN: If `\vec{u}=(1,0)` and `\vec{v}=(0,1)`, then `\vec{u}\cdot\vec{v}=0`.<br>FR: Si `\vec{u}=(1,0)` et `\vec{v}=(0,1)`, alors `\vec{u}\cdot\vec{v}=0`.<br>中：若 `\vec{u}=(1,0)` 且 `\vec{v}=(0,1)`，则 `\vec{u}\cdot\vec{v}=0`。 |
| `\vec{u}\cdot\vec{v}=\lVert\vec{u}\rVert\lVert\vec{v}\rVert\cos\theta` | dot product angle formula, formule angulaire du produit scalaire, 点积夹角公式 | A formula relating dot product to vector magnitudes and the angle between them.               | EN: If two vectors are perpendicular, their dot product is `0`.<br>FR: Si deux vecteurs sont perpendiculaires, leur produit scalaire est `0`.<br>中：若两个向量垂直，则它们的点积为 `0`。                                                    |
| `\vec{u}\times\vec{v}`                                                 | cross product, produit vectoriel, 叉积 / 向量积                               | In three dimensions, a vector product perpendicular to both input vectors.                    | EN: `\vec{i}\times\vec{j}=\vec{k}`.<br>FR: `\vec{i}\times\vec{j}=\vec{k}`.<br>中：`\vec{i}\times\vec{j}=\vec{k}`。                                                                                                            |
# 7. Sequences, Series, Summation, and Discrete Change

## 7.1 Sequences and indexing

| Symbol (LaTeX)           | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                              | Definition                                                              | Examples                                                                                                                                                     |
| ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `a_n`                    | sequence term, terme d’une suite, 数列项          | An individual element of a sequence, usually indexed by an integer `n`. | EN: In the sequence `a_n=n^2`, the third term is `a_3=9`.<br>FR: Dans la suite `a_n=n^2`, le troisième terme est `a_3=9`.<br>中：在数列 `a_n=n^2` 中，第三项是 `a_3=9`。 |
| `n`                      | index, indice, 指标 / 下标                         | A label indicating the position of a term in a sequence.                | EN: In `a_n`, the index is `n`.<br>FR: Dans `a_n`, l’indice est `n`.<br>中：在 `a_n` 中，`n` 是下标。                                                                 |
| `\{a_n\}_{n=1}^{\infty}` | sequence, suite, 数列                            | An ordered list of terms indexed by natural numbers or integers.        | EN: `\{1,2,3,\ldots\}` is a sequence.<br>FR: `\{1,2,3,\ldots\}` est une suite.<br>中：`\{1,2,3,\ldots\}` 是一个数列。                                                |
| `a_1`                    | first term, premier terme, 首项                  | The first element of a sequence under a chosen indexing convention.     | EN: If `a_n=2n`, then `a_1=2`.<br>FR: Si `a_n=2n`, alors `a_1=2`.<br>中：若 `a_n=2n`，则首项 `a_1=2`。                                                               |
| `a_0`                    | zeroth term, terme initial d’indice zéro, 第零项  | The initial term when a sequence is indexed from `0`.                   | EN: If `a_n=2^n`, then `a_0=1`.<br>FR: Si `a_n=2^n`, alors `a_0=1`.<br>中：若 `a_n=2^n`，则第零项 `a_0=1`。                                                           |
| `a_{n+1}`                | next term, terme suivant, 下一项                  | The term following `a_n` in a sequence.                                 | EN: If `a_n=n^2`, then `a_{n+1}=(n+1)^2`.<br>FR: Si `a_n=n^2`, alors `a_{n+1}=(n+1)^2`.<br>中：若 `a_n=n^2`，则下一项 `a_{n+1}=(n+1)^2`。                             |
| `a_{n-1}`                | previous term, terme précédent, 前一项            | The term immediately before `a_n`.                                      | EN: If `a_n=3n`, then `a_{n-1}=3(n-1)`.<br>FR: Si `a_n=3n`, alors `a_{n-1}=3(n-1)`.<br>中：若 `a_n=3n`，则前一项 `a_{n-1}=3(n-1)`。                                   |
| `a_n=f(n)`               | explicit formula, formule explicite, 通项公式      | A formula giving `a_n` directly in terms of the index `n`.              | EN: `a_n=2n+1` gives the `n`th odd number.<br>FR: `a_n=2n+1` donne le `n`-ième nombre impair.<br>中：`a_n=2n+1` 给出第 `n` 个奇数。                                   |
| `a_{n+1}=F(a_n)`         | recursive formula, formule de récurrence, 递推公式 | A formula defining a term from one or more previous terms.              | EN: `a_{n+1}=a_n+2`, `a_1=1`, defines the odd numbers.<br>FR: `a_{n+1}=a_n+2`, `a_1=1`, définit les nombres impairs.<br>中：`a_{n+1}=a_n+2` 且 `a_1=1` 定义奇数列。   |
| `a_n\to L`               | limit of a sequence, limite d’une suite, 数列极限  | A number that the terms of a sequence approach as `n` becomes large.    | EN: `\frac{1}{n}\to 0` as `n\to\infty`.<br>FR: `\frac{1}{n}\to 0` quand `n\to\infty`.<br>中：当 `n\to\infty` 时，`\frac{1}{n}\to 0`。                              |
| `n\to\infty`             | tends to infinity, tend vers l’infini, 趋于无穷    | Indicates that the index or variable grows without bound.               | EN: As `n\to\infty`, `2^n` grows without bound.<br>FR: Quand `n\to\infty`, `2^n` croît sans borne.<br>中：当 `n\to\infty` 时，`2^n` 无界增长。                         |

## 7.2 Arithmetic and geometric sequences

| Symbol (LaTeX)          | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                  | Definition                                                                        | Examples                                                                                                                                                                     |
| ----------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `a_{n+1}-a_n=d`         | arithmetic sequence, suite arithmétique, 等差数列                                      | A sequence with a constant difference between consecutive terms.                  | EN: `3,7,11,15,\ldots` is arithmetic with common difference `4`.<br>FR: `3,7,11,15,\ldots` est une suite arithmétique de raison `4`.<br>中：`3,7,11,15,\ldots` 是公差为 `4` 的等差数列。 |
| `d`                     | common difference, raison arithmétique, 公差                                         | The constant difference between consecutive terms in an arithmetic sequence.      | EN: In `5,8,11,\ldots`, the common difference is `3`.<br>FR: Dans `5,8,11,\ldots`, la raison arithmétique est `3`.<br>中：在 `5,8,11,\ldots` 中，公差是 `3`。                         |
| `a_n=a_1+(n-1)d`        | arithmetic sequence formula, formule d’une suite arithmétique, 等差数列通项公式            | The explicit formula for an arithmetic sequence indexed from `1`.                 | EN: If `a_1=2` and `d=5`, then `a_n=2+5(n-1)`.<br>FR: Si `a_1=2` et `d=5`, alors `a_n=2+5(n-1)`.<br>中：若 `a_1=2` 且 `d=5`，则 `a_n=2+5(n-1)`。                                    |
| `\frac{a_{n+1}}{a_n}=r` | geometric sequence, suite géométrique, 等比数列                                        | A sequence with a constant ratio between consecutive nonzero terms.               | EN: `2,6,18,54,\ldots` is geometric with ratio `3`.<br>FR: `2,6,18,54,\ldots` est une suite géométrique de raison `3`.<br>中：`2,6,18,54,\ldots` 是公比为 `3` 的等比数列。               |
| `r`                     | common ratio, raison géométrique, 公比                                               | The constant factor between consecutive terms in a geometric sequence.            | EN: In `5,10,20,\ldots`, the common ratio is `2`.<br>FR: Dans `5,10,20,\ldots`, la raison géométrique est `2`.<br>中：在 `5,10,20,\ldots` 中，公比是 `2`。                            |
| `a_n=a_1r^{n-1}`        | geometric sequence formula, formule d’une suite géométrique, 等比数列通项公式              | The explicit formula for a geometric sequence indexed from `1`.                   | EN: If `a_1=3` and `r=2`, then `a_n=3\cdot 2^{n-1}`.<br>FR: Si `a_1=3` et `r=2`, alors `a_n=3\cdot 2^{n-1}`.<br>中：若 `a_1=3` 且 `r=2`，则 `a_n=3\cdot 2^{n-1}`。                  |
| `a_n=a_0r^n`            | geometric formula from zero index, formule géométrique avec indice zéro, 从零开始的等比通项 | A geometric formula used when the first listed term is `a_0`.                     | EN: If `a_0=1` and `r=2`, then `a_n=2^n`.<br>FR: Si `a_0=1` et `r=2`, alors `a_n=2^n`.<br>中：若 `a_0=1` 且 `r=2`，则 `a_n=2^n`。                                                   |
| `r>1`                   | exponential growth, croissance exponentielle, 指数增长                                 | Growth by a constant multiplicative factor greater than `1`.                      | EN: `a_n=2^n` grows exponentially.<br>FR: `a_n=2^n` croît exponentiellement.<br>中：`a_n=2^n` 呈指数增长。                                                                           |
| `0<r<1`                 | exponential decay, décroissance exponentielle, 指数衰减                                | Decrease by a constant multiplicative factor between `0` and `1`.                 | EN: `a_n=(\frac{1}{2})^n` decays exponentially.<br>FR: `a_n=(\frac{1}{2})^n` décroît exponentiellement.<br>中：`a_n=(\frac{1}{2})^n` 呈指数衰减。                                    |
| `a,b,\frac{a+b}{2}`     | arithmetic mean, moyenne arithmétique, 算术平均数                                       | The number halfway between two numbers in an arithmetic sense.                    | EN: The arithmetic mean of `4` and `10` is `7`.<br>FR: La moyenne arithmétique de `4` et `10` est `7`.<br>中：`4` 和 `10` 的算术平均数是 `7`。                                          |
| `a,b,\sqrt{ab}`         | geometric mean, moyenne géométrique, 几何平均数                                         | The positive number forming a geometric progression between two positive numbers. | EN: The geometric mean of `4` and `9` is `6`.<br>FR: La moyenne géométrique de `4` et `9` est `6`.<br>中：`4` 和 `9` 的几何平均数是 `6`。                                               |

## 7.3 Summation notation

| Symbol (LaTeX)            | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                          | Definition                                               | Examples                                                                                                                                                        |
| ------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\sum`                    | summation sign, symbole de sommation, 求和符号                 | A symbol denoting the addition of a sequence of terms.   | EN: `\sum` means add the indicated terms.<br>FR: `\sum` signifie additionner les termes indiqués.<br>中：`\sum` 表示把指定项相加。                                         |
| `\sum_{k=1}^{n}a_k`       | finite sum, somme finie, 有限和                               | The sum of a finite number of terms.                     | EN: `\sum_{k=1}^{3}k=1+2+3=6`.<br>FR: `\sum_{k=1}^{3}k=1+2+3=6`.<br>中：`\sum_{k=1}^{3}k=1+2+3=6`。                                                                |
| `k`                       | index of summation, indice de sommation, 求和指标              | The variable that runs through the values being summed.  | EN: In `\sum_{k=1}^{n}a_k`, the summation index is `k`.<br>FR: Dans `\sum_{k=1}^{n}a_k`, l’indice de sommation est `k`.<br>中：在 `\sum_{k=1}^{n}a_k` 中，求和指标是 `k`。 |
| `k=1`                     | lower limit, borne inférieure, 下限                          | The starting value of the summation index.               | EN: In `\sum_{k=1}^{n}a_k`, the lower limit is `1`.<br>FR: Dans `\sum_{k=1}^{n}a_k`, la borne inférieure est `1`.<br>中：在 `\sum_{k=1}^{n}a_k` 中，下限是 `1`。         |
| `n`                       | upper limit, borne supérieure, 上限                          | The final value of the summation index.                  | EN: In `\sum_{k=1}^{n}a_k`, the upper limit is `n`.<br>FR: Dans `\sum_{k=1}^{n}a_k`, la borne supérieure est `n`.<br>中：在 `\sum_{k=1}^{n}a_k` 中，上限是 `n`。         |
| `a_k`                     | summand, terme de la somme, 被加项                            | The expression being added in a summation.               | EN: In `\sum_{k=1}^{n}k^2`, the summand is `k^2`.<br>FR: Dans `\sum_{k=1}^{n}k^2`, le terme sommé est `k^2`.<br>中：在 `\sum_{k=1}^{n}k^2` 中，被加项是 `k^2`。           |
| `\sum_{k=1}^{n}c=nc`      | constant sum rule, règle de somme constante, 常数求和规则        | A constant added `n` times gives `n` times the constant. | EN: `\sum_{k=1}^{5}3=15`.<br>FR: `\sum_{k=1}^{5}3=15`.<br>中：`\sum_{k=1}^{5}3=15`。                                                                               |
| `\sum_{k=1}^{n}(a_k+b_k)` | sum rule, règle de linéarité de la somme, 求和加法规则           | A sum of sums can be split into separate sums.           | EN: `\sum(a_k+b_k)=\sum a_k+\sum b_k`.<br>FR: `\sum(a_k+b_k)=\sum a_k+\sum b_k`.<br>中：`\sum(a_k+b_k)=\sum a_k+\sum b_k`。                                        |
| `\sum_{k=1}^{n}ca_k`      | constant multiple rule, règle du facteur constant, 常数倍求和规则 | A constant factor can be pulled outside a finite sum.    | EN: `\sum_{k=1}^{n}2a_k=2\sum_{k=1}^{n}a_k`.<br>FR: `\sum_{k=1}^{n}2a_k=2\sum_{k=1}^{n}a_k`.<br>中：`\sum_{k=1}^{n}2a_k=2\sum_{k=1}^{n}a_k`。                      |
