| `\int e^x\,dx=e^x+C`                       | exponential integral, intégrale de l’exponentielle, 指数函数积分                 | The natural exponential function is its own antiderivative.                            | EN: `\int e^x\,dx=e^x+C`.<br>FR: `\int e^x\,dx=e^x+C`.<br>中：`\int e^x\,dx=e^x+C`。                                                                                                            |
| `\int \sin x\,dx=-\cos x+C`                | integral of sine, intégrale du sinus, 正弦积分                                 | The antiderivative of sine.                                                            | EN: `\int \sin x\,dx=-\cos x+C`.<br>FR: `\int \sin x\,dx=-\cos x+C`.<br>中：`\int \sin x\,dx=-\cos x+C`。                                                                                       |
| `\int \cos x\,dx=\sin x+C`                 | integral of cosine, intégrale du cosinus, 余弦积分                             | The antiderivative of cosine.                                                          | EN: `\int \cos x\,dx=\sin x+C`.<br>FR: `\int \cos x\,dx=\sin x+C`.<br>中：`\int \cos x\,dx=\sin x+C`。                                                                                          |
| `\int \sec^2 x\,dx=\tan x+C`               | integral of secant squared, intégrale de la sécante carrée, 正割平方积分         | The antiderivative of `\sec^2 x`.                                                      | EN: `\int \sec^2 x\,dx=\tan x+C`.<br>FR: `\int \sec^2 x\,dx=\tan x+C`.<br>中：`\int \sec^2 x\,dx=\tan x+C`。                                                                                    |

## 9.2 Definite integrals and accumulation

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                    | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                | Definition                                                       | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\int_a^b f(x)\,dx`                               | definite integral, intégrale définie, 定积分                        | A signed accumulation of `f(x)` over the interval `[a,b]`.       | EN: `\int_0^1 x\,dx=\frac{1}{2}`.<br>FR: `\int_0^1 x\,dx=\frac{1}{2}`.<br>中：`\int_0^1 x\,dx=\frac{1}{2}`。                                                                                                |
| `a`                                               | lower limit of integration, borne inférieure d’intégration, 积分下限 | The starting point of a definite integral.                       | EN: In `\int_0^1 x^2\,dx`, the lower limit is `0`.<br>FR: Dans `\int_0^1 x^2\,dx`, la borne inférieure est `0`.<br>中：在 `\int_0^1 x^2\,dx` 中，积分下限是 `0`。                                                   |
| `b`                                               | upper limit of integration, borne supérieure d’intégration, 积分上限 | The ending point of a definite integral.                         | EN: In `\int_0^1 x^2\,dx`, the upper limit is `1`.<br>FR: Dans `\int_0^1 x^2\,dx`, la borne supérieure est `1`.<br>中：在 `\int_0^1 x^2\,dx` 中，积分上限是 `1`。                                                   |
| `\Delta x`                                        | partition width, largeur de subdivision, 分割宽度                    | The width of subintervals in a Riemann sum.                      | EN: For equal partitions of `[0,1]` into `n` pieces, `\Delta x=1/n`.<br>FR: Pour une subdivision uniforme de `[0,1]` en `n` parties, `\Delta x=1/n`.<br>中：把 `[0,1]` 等分为 `n` 份时，`\Delta x=1/n`。           |
| `\sum_{i=1}^{n}f(x_i^*)\Delta x`                  | Riemann sum, somme de Riemann, 黎曼和                               | A finite sum approximating a definite integral by rectangles.    | EN: A Riemann sum approximates area by adding rectangle areas.<br>FR: Une somme de Riemann approxime une aire par des rectangles.<br>中：黎曼和通过矩形面积之和近似积分。                                                  |
| `x_i^*`                                           | sample point, point d’échantillonnage, 取样点                       | A chosen point inside each subinterval of a partition.           | EN: In a midpoint Riemann sum, `x_i^*` is the midpoint of each subinterval.<br>FR: Dans une somme de Riemann au milieu, `x_i^*` est le milieu de chaque sous-intervalle.<br>中：在中点黎曼和中，`x_i^*` 是每个小区间的中点。 |
| `\lim_{n\to\infty}\sum_{i=1}^{n}f(x_i^*)\Delta x` | Riemann integral, intégrale de Riemann, 黎曼积分                     | The limit of Riemann sums, when this limit exists.               | EN: `\int_a^b f(x)\,dx` is defined as a limit of Riemann sums.<br>FR: `\int_a^b f(x)\,dx` se définit comme une limite de sommes de Riemann.<br>中：`\int_a^b f(x)\,dx` 可定义为黎曼和的极限。                         |
| `\int_a^b f(x)\,dx`                               | signed area, aire algébrique, 有向面积                               | Area above the axis counts positive; area below counts negative. | EN: `\int_{-1}^{1}x\,dx=0` because positive and negative areas cancel.<br>FR: `\int_{-1}^{1}x\,dx=0`, car les aires positive et négative s’annulent.<br>中：`\int_{-1}^{1}x\,dx=0`，因为正负面积相互抵消。             |
| `\int_a^b \lvert f(x)\rvert\,dx`                  | total area, aire totale, 总面积                                     | The geometric area between the graph and the `x`-axis.           | EN: `\int_{-1}^{1}\lvert x\rvert\,dx=1`.<br>FR: `\int_{-1}^{1}\lvert x\rvert\,dx=1`.<br>中：`\int_{-1}^{1}\lvert x\rvert\,dx=1`。                                                                           |
| `\int_b^a f(x)\,dx=-\int_a^b f(x)\,dx`            | reversal of limits, inversion des bornes, 积分限反向                  | Reversing the limits of integration changes the sign.            | EN: `\int_1^0 x\,dx=-\frac{1}{2}`.<br>FR: `\int_1^0 x\,dx=-\frac{1}{2}`.<br>中：`\int_1^0 x\,dx=-\frac{1}{2}`。                                                                                             |
| `\int_a^a f(x)\,dx=0`                             | zero-width integral, intégrale sur un intervalle nul, 零长度区间积分    | The integral over an interval of zero length is zero.            | EN: `\int_2^2 x^3\,dx=0`.<br>FR: `\int_2^2 x^3\,dx=0`.<br>中：`\int_2^2 x^3\,dx=0`。                                                                                                                        |

## 9.3 Fundamental theorem of calculus

| Symbol (LaTeX)                           | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                           | Definition                                                                                  | Examples                                                                                                                                                                          |                                |                                            |                                          |          |
| ---------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------- | -------- |
| `F'(x)=f(x)`                             | antiderivative relation, relation de primitive, 原函数关系                       | A relation connecting a function `f` with an antiderivative `F`.                            | EN: If `F(x)=x^3/3`, then `F'(x)=x^2`.<br>FR: Si `F(x)=x^3/3`, alors `F'(x)=x^2`.<br>中：若 `F(x)=x^3/3`，则 `F'(x)=x^2`。                                                              |                                |                                            |                                          |          |
| `\int_a^b f(x)\,dx=F(b)-F(a)`            | fundamental theorem of calculus, théorème fondamental de l’analyse, 微积分基本定理 | A theorem connecting definite integrals with antiderivatives.                               | EN: `\int_0^2 x\,dx=\frac{2^2}{2}-0=2`.<br>FR: `\int_0^2 x\,dx=\frac{2^2}{2}-0=2`.<br>中：`\int_0^2 x\,dx=\frac{2^2}{2}-0=2`。                                                       |                                |                                            |                                          |          |
| `F(x)=\int_a^x f(t)\,dt`                 | accumulation function, fonction d’accumulation, 积累函数                        | A function defined by accumulated area from a fixed point to `x`.                           | EN: If `F(x)=\int_0^x t^2\,dt`, then `F'(x)=x^2`.<br>FR: Si `F(x)=\int_0^x t^2\,dt`, alors `F'(x)=x^2`.<br>中：若 `F(x)=\int_0^x t^2\,dt`，则 `F'(x)=x^2`。                             |                                |                                            |                                          |          |
| `\frac{d}{dx}\int_a^x f(t)\,dt=f(x)`     | first fundamental theorem, premier théorème fondamental, 第一基本定理             | Differentiating an accumulation function recovers the integrand.                            | EN: `\frac{d}{dx}\int_1^x \cos t\,dt=\cos x`.<br>FR: `\frac{d}{dx}\int_1^x \cos t\,dt=\cos x`.<br>中：`\frac{d}{dx}\int_1^x \cos t\,dt=\cos x`。                                     |                                |                                            |                                          |          |
| `\int_a^b f(x)\,dx=F(b)-F(a)`            | second fundamental theorem, second théorème fondamental, 第二基本定理             | A definite integral can be evaluated using any antiderivative.                              | EN: With `F'(x)=f(x)`, compute the integral by evaluating `F(b)-F(a)`.<br>FR: Si `F'(x)=f(x)`, on calcule l’intégrale par `F(b)-F(a)`.<br>中：若 `F'(x)=f(x)`，则定积分可由 `F(b)-F(a)` 计算。 |                                |                                            |                                          |          |
| `\left.F(x)\right                        | _a^b`                                                                       | evaluation bar, barre d’évaluation, 代入记号                                                    | A notation meaning `F(b)-F(a)`.                                                                                                                                                   | EN: `\left.\frac{x^2}{2}\right | _0^2=2`.<br>FR: `\left.\frac{x^2}{2}\right | _0^2=2`.<br>中：`\left.\frac{x^2}{2}\right | _0^2=2`。 |
| `\frac{d}{dx}\int_{g(x)}^{h(x)}f(t)\,dt` | variable-limit differentiation, dérivation à bornes variables, 变限积分求导       | Differentiation of an integral whose limits depend on `x`.                                  | EN: `\frac{d}{dx}\int_0^{x^2}\sin t\,dt=2x\sin(x^2)`.<br>FR: `\frac{d}{dx}\int_0^{x^2}\sin t\,dt=2x\sin(x^2)`.<br>中：`\frac{d}{dx}\int_0^{x^2}\sin t\,dt=2x\sin(x^2)`。             |                                |                                            |                                          |          |
| `t` in `\int_a^x f(t)\,dt`               | dummy variable, variable muette, 哑变量                                        | A variable used only inside an integral or summation, replaceable without changing meaning. | EN: `\int_0^x f(t)\,dt=\int_0^x f(u)\,du`.<br>FR: `\int_0^x f(t)\,dt=\int_0^x f(u)\,du`.<br>中：`\int_0^x f(t)\,dt=\int_0^x f(u)\,du`。                                              |                                |                                            |                                          |          |

## 9.4 Properties of definite integrals

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                                | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                       | Definition                                                                                               | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| ------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\int_a^b (f+g)=\int_a^b f+\int_a^b g`                        | additivity of integrals, additivité de l’intégrale, 积分加法性               | The integral of a sum is the sum of the integrals.                                                       | EN: `\int_0^1(x+x^2)\,dx=\int_0^1x\,dx+\int_0^1x^2\,dx`.<br>FR: `\int_0^1(x+x^2)\,dx=\int_0^1x\,dx+\int_0^1x^2\,dx`.<br>中：`\int_0^1(x+x^2)\,dx=\int_0^1x\,dx+\int_0^1x^2\,dx`。                                                    |
| `\int_a^b cf=c\int_a^b f`                                     | homogeneity of integrals, homogénéité de l’intégrale, 积分齐次性             | A constant factor can be pulled outside the integral.                                                    | EN: `\int_0^1 3x\,dx=3\int_0^1x\,dx`.<br>FR: `\int_0^1 3x\,dx=3\int_0^1x\,dx`.<br>中：`\int_0^1 3x\,dx=3\int_0^1x\,dx`。                                                                                                             |
| `\int_a^c f+\int_c^b f=\int_a^b f`                            | interval additivity, additivité par intervalles, 区间可加性                  | An integral over `[a,b]` can be split at an intermediate point `c`.                                      | EN: `\int_0^2 f=\int_0^1 f+\int_1^2 f`.<br>FR: `\int_0^2 f=\int_0^1 f+\int_1^2 f`.<br>中：`\int_0^2 f=\int_0^1 f+\int_1^2 f`。                                                                                                       |
| `f(x)\geq 0\Rightarrow \int_a^b f(x)\,dx\geq 0`               | positivity, positivité, 正性                                              | A nonnegative function has a nonnegative integral over an interval with `a\leq b`.                       | EN: Since `x^2\geq 0`, `\int_0^1 x^2\,dx\geq 0`.<br>FR: Comme `x^2\geq 0`, `\int_0^1 x^2\,dx\geq 0`.<br>中：因为 `x^2\geq 0`，所以 `\int_0^1 x^2\,dx\geq 0`。                                                                             |
| `f\leq g\Rightarrow \int_a^b f\leq \int_a^b g`                | comparison property, propriété de comparaison, 积分比较性质                   | If one function is no larger than another on an interval, its integral is no larger.                     | EN: Since `x^2\leq x` on `[0,1]`, `\int_0^1x^2\,dx\leq\int_0^1x\,dx`.<br>FR: Comme `x^2\leq x` sur `[0,1]`, `\int_0^1x^2\,dx\leq\int_0^1x\,dx`.<br>中：因为在 `[0,1]` 上 `x^2\leq x`，所以 `\int_0^1x^2\,dx\leq\int_0^1x\,dx`。             |
| `\left\lvert\int_a^b f\right\rvert\leq\int_a^b\lvert f\rvert` | integral triangle inequality, inégalité triangulaire intégrale, 积分三角不等式 | The absolute value of an integral is bounded by the integral of the absolute value.                      | EN: Cancellation can make `\int f` smaller than `\int \lvert f\rvert`.<br>FR: Les annulations peuvent rendre `\int f` plus petite que `\int \lvert f\rvert`.<br>中：正负抵消可能使 `\int f` 小于 `\int \lvert f\rvert`。                      |
| `m(b-a)\leq\int_a^b f\leq M(b-a)`                             | integral bounds, encadrement d’une intégrale, 积分估计                      | If `m\leq f(x)\leq M`, then the integral is bounded by rectangle areas.                                  | EN: If `2\leq f(x)\leq 5` on `[0,3]`, then `6\leq\int_0^3f(x)\,dx\leq 15`.<br>FR: Si `2\leq f(x)\leq 5` sur `[0,3]`, alors `6\leq\int_0^3f(x)\,dx\leq 15`.<br>中：若在 `[0,3]` 上 `2\leq f(x)\leq 5`，则 `6\leq\int_0^3f(x)\,dx\leq 15`。 |
| `\frac{1}{b-a}\int_a^b f(x)\,dx`                              | average value of a function, valeur moyenne d’une fonction, 函数平均值       | The average height of a function over an interval.                                                       | EN: The average value of `f(x)=x` on `[0,2]` is `1`.<br>FR: La valeur moyenne de `f(x)=x` sur `[0,2]` est `1`.<br>中：`f(x)=x` 在 `[0,2]` 上的平均值是 `1`。                                                                                |
| `\int_{-a}^{a}f(x)\,dx=0` for odd `f`                         | symmetry of odd functions, symétrie des fonctions impaires, 奇函数积分对称性    | The integral of an odd function over a symmetric interval is zero.                                       | EN: `\int_{-1}^{1}x^3\,dx=0`.<br>FR: `\int_{-1}^{1}x^3\,dx=0`.<br>中：`\int_{-1}^{1}x^3\,dx=0`。                                                                                                                                     |
| `\int_{-a}^{a}f(x)\,dx=2\int_0^a f(x)\,dx` for even `f`       | symmetry of even functions, symétrie des fonctions paires, 偶函数积分对称性     | The integral of an even function over a symmetric interval is twice the integral over half the interval. | EN: `\int_{-1}^{1}x^2\,dx=2\int_0^1x^2\,dx`.<br>FR: `\int_{-1}^{1}x^2\,dx=2\int_0^1x^2\,dx`.<br>中：`\int_{-1}^{1}x^2\,dx=2\int_0^1x^2\,dx`。                                                                                        |

## 9.5 Techniques of integration

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                         | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                               | Definition                                                                              | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| ------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `u=g(x)`                                               | substitution, changement de variable, 换元法                                       | A method replacing part of the integrand by a new variable to simplify integration.     | EN: For `\int 2x\cos(x^2)\,dx`, let `u=x^2`.<br>FR: Pour `\int 2x\cos(x^2)\,dx`, poser `u=x^2`.<br>中：对 `\int 2x\cos(x^2)\,dx`，可令 `u=x^2`。                                                                   |
| `du=g'(x)\,dx`                                         | differential substitution, substitution différentielle, 微分换元                    | The corresponding differential relation in substitution.                                | EN: If `u=x^2`, then `du=2x\,dx`.<br>FR: Si `u=x^2`, alors `du=2x\,dx`.<br>中：若 `u=x^2`，则 `du=2x\,dx`。                                                                                                       |
| `\int_a^b f(g(x))g'(x)\,dx=\int_{g(a)}^{g(b)}f(u)\,du` | definite substitution, changement de variable dans une intégrale définie, 定积分换元 | A substitution method that also changes the limits of integration.                      | EN: `\int_0^1 2x e^{x^2}\,dx=\int_0^1 e^u\,du`.<br>FR: `\int_0^1 2x e^{x^2}\,dx=\int_0^1 e^u\,du`.<br>中：`\int_0^1 2x e^{x^2}\,dx=\int_0^1 e^u\,du`。                                                         |
| `\int u\,dv=uv-\int v\,du`                             | integration by parts, intégration par parties, 分部积分法                            | An integration method derived from the product rule.                                    | EN: `\int x e^x\,dx=xe^x-\int e^x\,dx`.<br>FR: `\int x e^x\,dx=xe^x-\int e^x\,dx`.<br>中：`\int x e^x\,dx=xe^x-\int e^x\,dx`。                                                                                 |
| —                                                      | partial fraction decomposition, décomposition en éléments simples, 部分分式分解       | A method for integrating rational functions by decomposing them into simpler fractions. | EN: Decompose `\frac{1}{x^2-1}` before integrating.<br>FR: Décomposer `\frac{1}{x^2-1}` en éléments simples avant d’intégrer.<br>中：积分 `\frac{1}{x^2-1}` 前可先作部分分式分解。                                         |
| —                                                      | trigonometric substitution, substitution trigonométrique, 三角换元                  | A method using trigonometric identities to simplify radicals.                           | EN: For `\sqrt{a^2-x^2}`, use `x=a\sin\theta`.<br>FR: Pour `\sqrt{a^2-x^2}`, utiliser `x=a\sin\theta`.<br>中：对于 `\sqrt{a^2-x^2}`，可令 `x=a\sin\theta`。                                                         |
| —                                                      | trigonometric integration, intégration trigonométrique, 三角积分                    | Integration involving powers or products of trigonometric functions.                    | EN: To integrate `\sin^2x`, use `\sin^2x=\frac{1-\cos 2x}{2}`.<br>FR: Pour intégrer `\sin^2x`, utiliser `\sin^2x=\frac{1-\cos 2x}{2}`.<br>中：积分 `\sin^2x` 时可用 `\sin^2x=\frac{1-\cos 2x}{2}`。                 |
| —                                                      | completing the square, complétion du carré, 配方法                                 | Rewriting a quadratic expression to reveal a standard integral form.                    | EN: Complete the square in `x^2+2x+5` as `(x+1)^2+4`.<br>FR: Compléter le carré dans `x^2+2x+5` donne `(x+1)^2+4`.<br>中：`x^2+2x+5` 配方得 `(x+1)^2+4`。                                                         |
| —                                                      | reduction formula, formule de réduction, 递推积分公式                                 | A formula expressing an integral in terms of a simpler integral of the same type.       | EN: Reduction formulas are useful for powers like `\int \sin^n x\,dx`.<br>FR: Les formules de réduction sont utiles pour des puissances comme `\int \sin^n x\,dx`.<br>中：递推积分公式常用于 `\int \sin^n x\,dx` 这类积分。 |
| —                                                      | table integral, intégrale tabulée, 积分表公式                                        | A standard integral formula listed for direct use.                                      | EN: `\int \frac{1}{1+x^2}\,dx=\arctan x+C` is a table integral.<br>FR: `\int \frac{1}{1+x^2}\,dx=\arctan x+C` est une intégrale tabulée.<br>中：`\int \frac{1}{1+x^2}\,dx=\arctan x+C` 是常用积分公式。               |

## 9.6 Area, volume, and geometric applications

| Symbol (LaTeX)                              | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                    | Definition                                                                      | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `A=\int_a^b f(x)\,dx`                       | area under a curve, aire sous une courbe, 曲线下方面积                     | The area between a nonnegative function and the `x`-axis over `[a,b]`.          | EN: The area under `y=x` from `0` to `2` is `2`.<br>FR: L’aire sous `y=x` de `0` à `2` vaut `2`.<br>中：`y=x` 在 `0` 到 `2` 下方的面积是 `2`。                                                                      |
| `A=\int_a^b (f(x)-g(x))\,dx`                | area between curves, aire entre deux courbes, 两曲线间面积                 | The area between an upper curve `f` and a lower curve `g`.                      | EN: The area between `y=x` and `y=x^2` on `[0,1]` is `1/6`.<br>FR: L’aire entre `y=x` et `y=x^2` sur `[0,1]` vaut `1/6`.<br>中：`y=x` 与 `y=x^2` 在 `[0,1]` 上围成的面积是 `1/6`。                                   |
| `V=\int_a^b A(x)\,dx`                       | volume by cross sections, volume par sections, 截面法体积                 | Volume computed by integrating cross-sectional area.                            | EN: If cross-sectional area is `A(x)`, volume is `\int A(x)\,dx`.<br>FR: Si l’aire de section est `A(x)`, le volume est `\int A(x)\,dx`.<br>中：若截面积为 `A(x)`，体积为 `\int A(x)\,dx`。                          |
| `V=\pi\int_a^b [R(x)]^2\,dx`                | disk method, méthode des disques, 圆盘法                                | A volume method for solids of revolution with no hole.                          | EN: Rotating `y=x` on `[0,1]` around the `x`-axis gives `V=\pi/3`.<br>FR: La rotation de `y=x` sur `[0,1]` autour de l’axe des abscisses donne `V=\pi/3`.<br>中：将 `y=x` 在 `[0,1]` 上绕 `x` 轴旋转，体积为 `\pi/3`。 |
| `V=\pi\int_a^b ([R(x)]^2-[r(x)]^2)\,dx`     | washer method, méthode des rondelles, 垫片法                            | A volume method for solids of revolution with an inner radius and outer radius. | EN: The washer method subtracts the inner disk from the outer disk.<br>FR: La méthode des rondelles soustrait le disque intérieur du disque extérieur.<br>中：垫片法用外圆盘面积减去内圆盘面积。                            |
| `V=2\pi\int_a^b x f(x)\,dx`                 | shell method, méthode des coquilles cylindriques, 柱壳法                | A volume method using cylindrical shells.                                       | EN: Rotating around the `y`-axis often favors the shell method.<br>FR: Une rotation autour de l’axe des ordonnées favorise souvent la méthode des coquilles.<br>中：绕 `y` 轴旋转时，柱壳法常较方便。                    |
| `s=\int_a^b\sqrt{1+[f'(x)]^2}\,dx`          | arc length, longueur d’arc, 弧长                                       | The length of a curve segment.                                                  | EN: The arc length of a graph depends on both horizontal and vertical change.<br>FR: La longueur d’arc dépend des variations horizontale et verticale.<br>中：曲线弧长同时取决于水平变化和竖直变化。                          |
| `S=2\pi\int_a^b f(x)\sqrt{1+[f'(x)]^2}\,dx` | surface area of revolution, aire d’une surface de révolution, 旋转曲面面积 | The area of a surface formed by rotating a curve around an axis.                | EN: Rotating a curve around the `x`-axis creates a surface of revolution.<br>FR: La rotation d’une courbe autour de l’axe des abscisses crée une surface de révolution.<br>中：曲线绕 `x` 轴旋转会形成旋转曲面。         |
| `M=\int_a^b \rho(x)\,dx`                    | mass from density, masse par densité, 由密度求质量                         | Total mass computed by integrating linear density.                              | EN: If density is `\rho(x)`, mass is `\int_a^b\rho(x)\,dx`.<br>FR: Si la densité est `\rho(x)`, la masse est `\int_a^b\rho(x)\,dx`.<br>中：若线密度为 `\rho(x)`，质量为 `\int_a^b\rho(x)\,dx`。                      |
| `\bar{x}=\frac{1}{M}\int_a^b x\rho(x)\,dx`  | center of mass, centre de masse, 质心                                  | The balance point of a mass distribution.                                       | EN: For uniform density on `[0,2]`, the center of mass is `1`.<br>FR: Pour une densité uniforme sur `[0,2]`, le centre de masse est `1`.<br>中：在 `[0,2]` 上均匀分布的质心是 `1`。                                   |

## 9.7 Improper integrals

| Symbol (LaTeX)                       | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                                    | Definition                                                                                       | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\int_a^\infty f(x)\,dx`             | improper integral over an infinite interval, intégrale impropre sur un intervalle infini, 无穷区间反常积分   | An integral over an unbounded interval, defined by a limit.                                      | EN: `\int_1^\infty \frac{1}{x^2}\,dx=1`.<br>FR: `\int_1^\infty \frac{1}{x^2}\,dx=1`.<br>中：`\int_1^\infty \frac{1}{x^2}\,dx=1`。                                                                                                                                                     |
| `\int_a^b f(x)\,dx` with singularity | improper integral with singularity, intégrale impropre avec singularité, 瑕积分                         | An integral where the integrand becomes unbounded inside or at an endpoint.                      | EN: `\int_0^1 \frac{1}{\sqrt{x}}\,dx=2`.<br>FR: `\int_0^1 \frac{1}{\sqrt{x}}\,dx=2`.<br>中：`\int_0^1 \frac{1}{\sqrt{x}}\,dx=2`。                                                                                                                                                     |
| `\lim_{t\to\infty}\int_a^t f(x)\,dx` | improper integral definition, définition d’une intégrale impropre, 反常积分定义                            | The value of an improper integral defined through a limiting process.                            | EN: `\int_1^\infty f(x)\,dx=\lim_{t\to\infty}\int_1^t f(x)\,dx`.<br>FR: `\int_1^\infty f(x)\,dx=\lim_{t\to\infty}\int_1^t f(x)\,dx`.<br>中：`\int_1^\infty f(x)\,dx=\lim_{t\to\infty}\int_1^t f(x)\,dx`。                                                                             |
| —                                    | convergent improper integral, intégrale impropre convergente, 收敛反常积分                                 | An improper integral whose defining limit exists and is finite.                                  | EN: `\int_1^\infty \frac{1}{x^2}\,dx` converges.<br>FR: `\int_1^\infty \frac{1}{x^2}\,dx` converge.<br>中：`\int_1^\infty \frac{1}{x^2}\,dx` 收敛。                                                                                                                                     |
| —                                    | divergent improper integral, intégrale impropre divergente, 发散反常积分                                   | An improper integral whose defining limit fails to exist or is infinite.                         | EN: `\int_1^\infty \frac{1}{x}\,dx` diverges.<br>FR: `\int_1^\infty \frac{1}{x}\,dx` diverge.<br>中：`\int_1^\infty \frac{1}{x}\,dx` 发散。                                                                                                                                             |
| `\int_1^\infty \frac{1}{x^p}\,dx`    | p-integral, intégrale de Riemann, p 型积分                                                              | A standard improper integral used as a convergence benchmark.                                    | EN: `\int_1^\infty \frac{1}{x^p}\,dx` converges when `p>1`.<br>FR: `\int_1^\infty \frac{1}{x^p}\,dx` converge lorsque `p>1`.<br>中：当 `p>1` 时，`\int_1^\infty \frac{1}{x^p}\,dx` 收敛。                                                                                                  |
| —                                    | comparison test for integrals, critère de comparaison, 积分比较判别法                                       | A method comparing a nonnegative integrand with another whose convergence is known.              | EN: If `0\leq f(x)\leq g(x)` and `\int g` converges, then `\int f` converges.<br>FR: Si `0\leq f(x)\leq g(x)` et `\int g` converge, alors `\int f` converge.<br>中：若 `0\leq f(x)\leq g(x)` 且 `\int g` 收敛，则 `\int f` 收敛。                                                             |
| —                                    | absolute convergence of an improper integral, convergence absolue d’une intégrale impropre, 反常积分绝对收敛 | An improper integral is absolutely convergent when the integral of the absolute value converges. | EN: If `\int_a^\infty \lvert f(x)\rvert\,dx` converges, then `\int_a^\infty f(x)\,dx` converges.<br>FR: Si `\int_a^\infty \lvert f(x)\rvert\,dx` converge, alors `\int_a^\infty f(x)\,dx` converge.<br>中：若 `\int_a^\infty \lvert f(x)\rvert\,dx` 收敛，则 `\int_a^\infty f(x)\,dx` 收敛。 |

## 9.8 Numerical integration

| Symbol (LaTeX)    | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                    | Definition                                                                               | Examples                                                                                                                                                              |
| ----------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `L_n`             | left Riemann sum, somme de Riemann à gauche, 左端点黎曼和  | A Riemann sum using the left endpoint of each subinterval.                               | EN: A left sum for an increasing function underestimates area.<br>FR: Une somme à gauche sous-estime l’aire pour une fonction croissante.<br>中：对递增函数，左端点黎曼和通常低估面积。    |
| `R_n`             | right Riemann sum, somme de Riemann à droite, 右端点黎曼和 | A Riemann sum using the right endpoint of each subinterval.                              | EN: A right sum for an increasing function overestimates area.<br>FR: Une somme à droite surestime l’aire pour une fonction croissante.<br>中：对递增函数，右端点黎曼和通常高估面积。      |
| `M_n`             | midpoint rule, règle du point milieu, 中点法            | A numerical integration method using midpoint rectangle heights.                         | EN: The midpoint rule often improves on left and right sums.<br>FR: La règle du point milieu améliore souvent les sommes à gauche et à droite.<br>中：中点法通常比左右端点法更准确。   |
| `T_n`             | trapezoidal rule, règle des trapèzes, 梯形法            | A numerical integration method approximating area by trapezoids.                         | EN: The trapezoidal rule approximates a curved region by trapezoids.<br>FR: La règle des trapèzes approxime une région courbe par des trapèzes.<br>中：梯形法用梯形近似曲线下方面积。  |
| `S_n`             | Simpson’s rule, règle de Simpson, 辛普森法               | A numerical integration method using quadratic interpolation over pairs of subintervals. | EN: Simpson’s rule is often more accurate for smooth functions.<br>FR: La règle de Simpson est souvent plus précise pour les fonctions lisses.<br>中：对于光滑函数，辛普森法通常更准确。 |
| `E_n`             | numerical error, erreur numérique, 数值误差              | The difference between an approximation and the exact integral.                          | EN: Smaller step sizes often reduce numerical error.<br>FR: Des pas plus petits réduisent souvent l’erreur numérique.<br>中：更小的步长通常能降低数值误差。                            |
| `h=\frac{b-a}{n}` | step size, pas, 步长                                   | The width of each subinterval in a uniform numerical integration scheme.                 | EN: If `[0,1]` is divided into `10` pieces, then `h=0.1`.<br>FR: Si `[0,1]` est divisé en `10` parties, alors `h=0,1`.<br>中：若 `[0,1]` 被分成 `10` 份，则步长 `h=0.1`。         |
| —                 | quadrature, quadrature, 求积法                          | A general term for numerical methods that approximate integrals.                         | EN: Gaussian quadrature is a high-accuracy integration method.<br>FR: La quadrature de Gauss est une méthode d’intégration de haute précision.<br>中：高斯求积是一种高精度积分方法。   |

## 9.9 Differential equations and integral form

| Symbol (LaTeX)                          | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                                     | Definition                                                                             | Examples                                                                                                                                                                               |
| --------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\frac{dy}{dx}=f(x)`                    | differential equation, équation différentielle, 微分方程                                                  | An equation involving an unknown function and its derivatives.                         | EN: `\frac{dy}{dx}=2x` is a differential equation.<br>FR: `\frac{dy}{dx}=2x` est une équation différentielle.<br>中：`\frac{dy}{dx}=2x` 是微分方程。                                           |
| `y=\int f(x)\,dx`                       | solving by integration, résolution par intégration, 积分求解                                              | Finding a function by integrating its derivative.                                      | EN: If `dy/dx=2x`, then `y=x^2+C`.<br>FR: Si `dy/dx=2x`, alors `y=x^2+C`.<br>中：若 `dy/dx=2x`，则 `y=x^2+C`。                                                                               |
| `y(x_0)=y_0`                            | initial condition, condition initiale, 初始条件                                                           | A specified value used to determine the constant in a solution.                        | EN: If `y=x^2+C` and `y(0)=3`, then `C=3`.<br>FR: Si `y=x^2+C` et `y(0)=3`, alors `C=3`.<br>中：若 `y=x^2+C` 且 `y(0)=3`，则 `C=3`。                                                          |
| `y' = ky`                               | exponential growth equation, équation de croissance exponentielle, 指数增长方程                             | A differential equation where the growth rate is proportional to the current amount.   | EN: The solution of `y'=ky` is `y=Ce^{kx}`.<br>FR: La solution de `y'=ky` est `y=Ce^{kx}`.<br>中：`y'=ky` 的解是 `y=Ce^{kx}`。                                                               |
| `y'=-ky`                                | exponential decay equation, équation de décroissance exponentielle, 指数衰减方程                            | A differential equation where the quantity decreases at a rate proportional to itself. | EN: Radioactive decay is modeled by `y'=-ky`.<br>FR: La décroissance radioactive est modélisée par `y'=-ky`.<br>中：放射性衰减可由 `y'=-ky` 建模。                                                 |
| `\frac{dy}{dx}=g(x)h(y)`                | separable differential equation, équation différentielle séparable, 可分离变量微分方程                         | A differential equation whose variables can be separated on opposite sides.            | EN: `dy/dx=xy` is separable because `dy/y=x\,dx`.<br>FR: `dy/dx=xy` est séparable car `dy/y=x\,dx`.<br>中：`dy/dx=xy` 可分离变量，因为 `dy/y=x\,dx`。                                             |
| `\int \frac{1}{h(y)}\,dy=\int g(x)\,dx` | separation of variables, séparation des variables, 分离变量法                                              | A method for solving separable differential equations by integrating both sides.       | EN: For `dy/dx=xy`, integrate `dy/y=x\,dx`.<br>FR: Pour `dy/dx=xy`, intégrer `dy/y=x\,dx`.<br>中：对 `dy/dx=xy`，可积分 `dy/y=x\,dx`。                                                         |
| `y'+p(x)y=q(x)`                         | first-order linear differential equation, équation différentielle linéaire du premier ordre, 一阶线性微分方程 | A differential equation linear in the unknown function and its first derivative.       | EN: `y'+y=e^x` is first-order linear.<br>FR: `y'+y=e^x` est linéaire du premier ordre.<br>中：`y'+y=e^x` 是一阶线性微分方程。                                                                      |
| `\mu(x)=e^{\int p(x)\,dx}`              | integrating factor, facteur intégrant, 积分因子                                                           | A function used to solve first-order linear differential equations.                    | EN: For `y'+p(x)y=q(x)`, use integrating factor `\mu(x)`.<br>FR: Pour `y'+p(x)y=q(x)`, on utilise le facteur intégrant `\mu(x)`.<br>中：对 `y'+p(x)y=q(x)`，可使用积分因子 `\mu(x)`。              |
| `y''=f(x,y,y')`                         | second-order differential equation, équation différentielle du second ordre, 二阶微分方程                   | A differential equation involving a second derivative.                                 | EN: Newtonian motion often gives second-order differential equations.<br>FR: La mécanique newtonienne donne souvent des équations différentielles du second ordre.<br>中：牛顿力学常产生二阶微分方程。 |
| —                                       | general solution, solution générale, 通解                                                               | A family of solutions containing arbitrary constants.                                  | EN: `y=x^2+C` is the general solution of `dy/dx=2x`.<br>FR: `y=x^2+C` est la solution générale de `dy/dx=2x`.<br>中：`y=x^2+C` 是 `dy/dx=2x` 的通解。                                         |
| —                                       | particular solution, solution particulière, 特解                                                        | A solution obtained after applying initial or boundary conditions.                     | EN: With `y(0)=1`, `y=x^2+1` is a particular solution.<br>FR: Avec `y(0)=1`, `y=x^2+1` est une solution particulière.<br>中：若 `y(0)=1`，则 `y=x^2+1` 是一个特解。                               |

# 10. Multivariable Calculus, Vector Calculus, and Optimization

## 10.1 Functions of several variables

| Symbol (LaTeX)                           | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                              | Definition                                                                               | Examples                                                                                                                                                                       |
| ---------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `f(x,y)`                                 | function of two variables, fonction de deux variables, 二元函数    | A function whose input consists of two variables and whose output is usually a number.   | EN: `f(x,y)=x^2+y^2` is a function of two variables.<br>FR: `f(x,y)=x^2+y^2` est une fonction de deux variables.<br>中：`f(x,y)=x^2+y^2` 是一个二元函数。                                |
| `f(x_1,\ldots,x_n)`                      | function of n variables, fonction de n variables, n 元函数        | A function whose input consists of `n` variables.                                        | EN: `f(x,y,z)=x+y+z` is a function of three variables.<br>FR: `f(x,y,z)=x+y+z` est une fonction de trois variables.<br>中：`f(x,y,z)=x+y+z` 是一个三元函数。                             |
| `f:\mathbb{R}^n\to\mathbb{R}`            | scalar-valued function, fonction à valeurs scalaires, 标量值函数    | A function taking vector inputs and returning scalar outputs.                            | EN: Temperature `T(x,y,z)` is a scalar-valued function of position.<br>FR: La température `T(x,y,z)` est une fonction scalaire de la position.<br>中：温度 `T(x,y,z)` 是位置的标量值函数。   |
| `\mathbf{F}:\mathbb{R}^n\to\mathbb{R}^m` | vector-valued function, fonction à valeurs vectorielles, 向量值函数 | A function whose output is a vector.                                                     | EN: `\mathbf{F}(t)=(\cos t,\sin t)` traces a circle.<br>FR: `\mathbf{F}(t)=(\cos t,\sin t)` trace un cercle.<br>中：`\mathbf{F}(t)=(\cos t,\sin t)` 描出一个圆。                       |
| `D\subseteq\mathbb{R}^n`                 | domain, domaine de définition, 定义域                             | The set of all allowed input points of a multivariable function.                         | EN: The domain of `f(x,y)=\sqrt{1-x^2-y^2}` is the unit disk.<br>FR: Le domaine de `f(x,y)=\sqrt{1-x^2-y^2}` est le disque unité.<br>中：`f(x,y)=\sqrt{1-x^2-y^2}` 的定义域是单位圆盘。    |
| `f(D)`                                   | range, image, 值域 / 像                                           | The set of output values actually attained by a function.                                | EN: The range of `f(x,y)=x^2+y^2` is `[0,\infty)`.<br>FR: L’image de `f(x,y)=x^2+y^2` est `[0,\infty)`.<br>中：`f(x,y)=x^2+y^2` 的值域是 `[0,\infty)`。                               |
| `(x,y,z)`                                | point in space, point de l’espace, 空间点                         | An ordered triple representing a point in three-dimensional space.                       | EN: `(1,2,3)` is a point in `\mathbb{R}^3`.<br>FR: `(1,2,3)` est un point de `\mathbb{R}^3`.<br>中：`(1,2,3)` 是 `\mathbb{R}^3` 中的点。                                              |
| `z=f(x,y)`                               | surface graph, graphe de surface, 曲面图像                         | The graph of a function of two variables in three-dimensional space.                     | EN: `z=x^2+y^2` is a paraboloid.<br>FR: `z=x^2+y^2` est un paraboloïde.<br>中：`z=x^2+y^2` 是抛物面。                                                                                 |
| `f(x,y)=c`                               | level curve, courbe de niveau, 等高线 / 水平曲线                      | A curve consisting of points where a function of two variables has a constant value.     | EN: The level curves of `f(x,y)=x^2+y^2` are circles.<br>FR: Les courbes de niveau de `f(x,y)=x^2+y^2` sont des cercles.<br>中：`f(x,y)=x^2+y^2` 的等高线是圆。                         |
| `f(x,y,z)=c`                             | level surface, surface de niveau, 等值面                          | A surface consisting of points where a function of three variables has a constant value. | EN: The level surfaces of `f(x,y,z)=x^2+y^2+z^2` are spheres.<br>FR: Les surfaces de niveau de `f(x,y,z)=x^2+y^2+z^2` sont des sphères.<br>中：`f(x,y,z)=x^2+y^2+z^2` 的等值面是球面。   |
| `\mathbf{r}(t)`                          | parametrized curve, courbe paramétrée, 参数曲线                    | A curve represented by a vector-valued function of one parameter.                        | EN: `\mathbf{r}(t)=(t,t^2)` parametrizes a parabola.<br>FR: `\mathbf{r}(t)=(t,t^2)` paramètre une parabole.<br>中：`\mathbf{r}(t)=(t,t^2)` 参数化一条抛物线。                             |
| `\mathbf{r}(u,v)`                        | parametrized surface, surface paramétrée, 参数曲面                 | A surface represented by a vector-valued function of two parameters.                     | EN: `\mathbf{r}(u,v)=(u,v,u^2+v^2)` parametrizes a paraboloid.<br>FR: `\mathbf{r}(u,v)=(u,v,u^2+v^2)` paramètre un paraboloïde.<br>中：`\mathbf{r}(u,v)=(u,v,u^2+v^2)` 参数化一个抛物面。 |

## 10.2 Partial derivatives and gradients

| Symbol (LaTeX)                  | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                 | Definition                                                                   | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| ------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\frac{\partial f}{\partial x}` | partial derivative with respect to x, dérivée partielle par rapport à x, 对 x 的偏导数 | The derivative of `f` with respect to `x`, holding other variables constant. | EN: If `f(x,y)=x^2y`, then `\frac{\partial f}{\partial x}=2xy`.<br>FR: Si `f(x,y)=x^2y`, alors `\frac{\partial f}{\partial x}=2xy`.<br>中：若 `f(x,y)=x^2y`，则 `\frac{\partial f}{\partial x}=2xy`。                      |
| `\frac{\partial f}{\partial y}` | partial derivative with respect to y, dérivée partielle par rapport à y, 对 y 的偏导数 | The derivative of `f` with respect to `y`, holding other variables constant. | EN: If `f(x,y)=x^2y`, then `\frac{\partial f}{\partial y}=x^2`.<br>FR: Si `f(x,y)=x^2y`, alors `\frac{\partial f}{\partial y}=x^2`.<br>中：若 `f(x,y)=x^2y`，则 `\frac{\partial f}{\partial y}=x^2`。                      |
| `f_x`                           | x-partial notation, notation de dérivée partielle en x, x 偏导记号                    | A compact notation for `\frac{\partial f}{\partial x}`.                      | EN: For `f=x^2+y`, `f_x=2x`.<br>FR: Pour `f=x^2+y`, `f_x=2x`.<br>中：对于 `f=x^2+y`，`f_x=2x`。                                                                                                                            |
| `f_y`                           | y-partial notation, notation de dérivée partielle en y, y 偏导记号                    | A compact notation for `\frac{\partial f}{\partial y}`.                      | EN: For `f=x^2+y`, `f_y=1`.<br>FR: Pour `f=x^2+y`, `f_y=1`.<br>中：对于 `f=x^2+y`，`f_y=1`。                                                                                                                               |
| `\nabla f`                      | gradient, gradient, 梯度                                                            | The vector of all first partial derivatives of a scalar-valued function.     | EN: If `f(x,y)=x^2+y^2`, then `\nabla f=(2x,2y)`.<br>FR: Si `f(x,y)=x^2+y^2`, alors `\nabla f=(2x,2y)`.<br>中：若 `f(x,y)=x^2+y^2`，则 `\nabla f=(2x,2y)`。                                                                |
| `D_{\mathbf{u}}f`               | directional derivative, dérivée directionnelle, 方向导数                              | The rate of change of `f` in the direction of a unit vector `\mathbf{u}`.    | EN: `D_{\mathbf{u}}f=\nabla f\cdot\mathbf{u}` when `f` is differentiable.<br>FR: `D_{\mathbf{u}}f=\nabla f\cdot\mathbf{u}` lorsque `f` est différentiable.<br>中：当 `f` 可微时，`D_{\mathbf{u}}f=\nabla f\cdot\mathbf{u}`。 |
| `\mathbf{u}`                    | unit direction vector, vecteur direction unitaire, 单位方向向量                         | A vector of length `1` specifying a direction.                               | EN: Directional derivatives use unit vectors.<br>FR: Les dérivées directionnelles utilisent des vecteurs unitaires.<br>中：方向导数使用单位方向向量。                                                                               |
| `\nabla f\cdot\mathbf{u}`       | gradient projection, projection du gradient, 梯度投影                                 | The component of the gradient in the direction `\mathbf{u}`.                 | EN: The largest directional derivative equals `\lVert\nabla f\rVert`.<br>FR: La plus grande dérivée directionnelle vaut `\lVert\nabla f\rVert`.<br>中：最大的方向导数等于 `\lVert\nabla f\rVert`。                               |
| `\nabla f\perp f(x,y)=c`        | gradient normal property, propriété normale du gradient, 梯度法向性质                   | The gradient is perpendicular to level curves or level surfaces.             | EN: `\nabla f` is normal to the level curve `f(x,y)=c`.<br>FR: `\nabla f` est normal à la courbe de niveau `f(x,y)=c`.<br>中：`\nabla f` 垂直于等高线 `f(x,y)=c`。                                                            |
| `f_{xx}`                        | second partial derivative, dérivée partielle seconde, 二阶偏导数                       | A partial derivative taken twice with respect to one or more variables.      | EN: If `f=x^3y`, then `f_{xx}=6xy`.<br>FR: Si `f=x^3y`, alors `f_{xx}=6xy`.<br>中：若 `f=x^3y`，则 `f_{xx}=6xy`。                                                                                                          |
| `f_{xy}`                        | mixed partial derivative, dérivée partielle mixte, 混合偏导数                          | A second partial derivative taken with respect to different variables.       | EN: If `f=x^2y^3`, then `f_{xy}=6xy^2`.<br>FR: Si `f=x^2y^3`, alors `f_{xy}=6xy^2`.<br>中：若 `f=x^2y^3`，则 `f_{xy}=6xy^2`。                                                                                              |
| `f_{xy}=f_{yx}`                 | equality of mixed partials, égalité des dérivées mixtes, 混合偏导相等                   | Under suitable smoothness conditions, mixed partial derivatives are equal.   | EN: If second partials are continuous, then `f_{xy}=f_{yx}`.<br>FR: Si les dérivées partielles secondes sont continues, alors `f_{xy}=f_{yx}`.<br>中：若二阶偏导连续，则 `f_{xy}=f_{yx}`。                                       |

## 10.3 Differentiability, linearization, and chain rules

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                    | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                  | Definition                                                                          | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| ------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `df`                                              | differential, différentielle, 微分                                   | The linear part of the change in a differentiable multivariable function.           | EN: If `f(x,y)=x^2+y^2`, then `df=2x\,dx+2y\,dy`.<br>FR: Si `f(x,y)=x^2+y^2`, alors `df=2x\,dx+2y\,dy`.<br>中：若 `f(x,y)=x^2+y^2`，则 `df=2x\,dx+2y\,dy`。                                                                                                                                                           |
| `dz=f_x\,dx+f_y\,dy`                              | total differential, différentielle totale, 全微分                     | The first-order change in `z=f(x,y)` from small changes in `x` and `y`.             | EN: For `z=x^2+y^2`, `dz=2x\,dx+2y\,dy`.<br>FR: Pour `z=x^2+y^2`, `dz=2x\,dx+2y\,dy`.<br>中：对于 `z=x^2+y^2`，`dz=2x\,dx+2y\,dy`。                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `L(x,y)`                                          | linearization, linéarisation, 线性化                                  | The tangent-plane approximation to a function near a point.                         | EN: Linearization approximates a surface by its tangent plane.<br>FR: La linéarisation approxime une surface par son plan tangent.<br>中：线性化用切平面近似曲面。                                                                                                                                                            |
| `L(x,y)=f(a,b)+f_x(a,b)(x-a)+f_y(a,b)(y-b)`       | tangent plane approximation, approximation par plan tangent, 切平面近似 | A first-order approximation to `f(x,y)` near `(a,b)`.                               | EN: Near `(a,b)`, `f(x,y)\approx L(x,y)`.<br>FR: Près de `(a,b)`, `f(x,y)\approx L(x,y)`.<br>中：在 `(a,b)` 附近，`f(x,y)\approx L(x,y)`。                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `z=f(x,y)`                                        | tangent plane, plan tangent, 切平面                                   | A plane that best approximates a surface near a point.                              | EN: The tangent plane to `z=f(x,y)` uses `f_x` and `f_y`.<br>FR: Le plan tangent à `z=f(x,y)` utilise `f_x` et `f_y`.<br>中：曲面 `z=f(x,y)` 的切平面使用 `f_x` 和 `f_y`。                                                                                                                                                  |
| `\frac{dz}{dt}=f_x\frac{dx}{dt}+f_y\frac{dy}{dt}` | multivariable chain rule, règle de la chaîne multivariable, 多元链式法则 | A rule for differentiating a function whose variables depend on another variable.   | EN: If `z=f(x(t),y(t))`, then use the multivariable chain rule.<br>FR: Si `z=f(x(t),y(t))`, on utilise la règle de la chaîne multivariable.<br>中：若 `z=f(x(t),y(t))`，则使用多元链式法则。                                                                                                                                  |
| `\frac{\partial z}{\partial s}`                   | partial chain rule, règle de la chaîne partielle, 偏导链式法则           | A chain rule for functions depending on several intermediate variables.             | EN: If `z=f(x,y)`, `x=x(s,t)`, and `y=y(s,t)`, compute `\partial z/\partial s` by summing paths through `x` and `y`.<br>FR: Si `z=f(x,y)`, `x=x(s,t)` et `y=y(s,t)`, on somme les contributions passant par `x` et `y`.<br>中：若 `z=f(x,y)`、`x=x(s,t)`、`y=y(s,t)`，求 `\partial z/\partial s` 时要累加经过 `x` 和 `y` 的路径。 |
| `J`                                               | Jacobian matrix, matrice jacobienne, 雅可比矩阵                         | The matrix of first partial derivatives of a vector-valued function.                | EN: The Jacobian records local first-order behavior of a multivariable map.<br>FR: La matrice jacobienne décrit le comportement local au premier ordre.<br>中：雅可比矩阵记录多元映射的一阶局部行为。                                                                                                                                |
| `\det J`                                          | Jacobian determinant, déterminant jacobien, 雅可比行列式                 | The determinant measuring local area or volume scaling under a change of variables. | EN: In polar coordinates, the Jacobian determinant is `r`.<br>FR: En coordonnées polaires, le déterminant jacobien vaut `r`.<br>中：在极坐标中，雅可比行列式为 `r`。                                                                                                                                                            |
| `H_f`                                             | Hessian matrix, matrice hessienne, Hessian 矩阵 / 海森矩阵               | The matrix of second partial derivatives of a scalar function.                      | EN: For `f(x,y)=x^2+y^2`, the Hessian is `\begin{pmatrix}2&0\\0&2\end{pmatrix}`.<br>FR: Pour `f(x,y)=x^2+y^2`, la matrice hessienne est `\begin{pmatrix}2&0\\0&2\end{pmatrix}`.<br>中：对于 `f(x,y)=x^2+y^2`，Hessian 矩阵是 `\begin{pmatrix}2&0\\0&2\end{pmatrix}`。                                                    |

## 10.4 Multiple integrals

| Symbol (LaTeX)                          | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                              | Definition                                                                                            | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| --------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\iint_D f(x,y)\,dA`                    | double integral, intégrale double, 二重积分                        | An integral accumulating a function over a two-dimensional region.                                    | EN: `\iint_D 1\,dA` gives the area of `D`.<br>FR: `\iint_D 1\,dA` donne l’aire de `D`.<br>中：`\iint_D 1\,dA` 给出区域 `D` 的面积。                                                                                                                      |
| `dA`                                    | area element, élément d’aire, 面积元                              | An infinitesimal element of area.                                                                     | EN: In Cartesian coordinates, `dA=dx\,dy`.<br>FR: En coordonnées cartésiennes, `dA=dx\,dy`.<br>中：在直角坐标中，`dA=dx\,dy`。                                                                                                                           |
| `\iiint_E f(x,y,z)\,dV`                 | triple integral, intégrale triple, 三重积分                        | An integral accumulating a function over a three-dimensional region.                                  | EN: `\iiint_E 1\,dV` gives the volume of `E`.<br>FR: `\iiint_E 1\,dV` donne le volume de `E`.<br>中：`\iiint_E 1\,dV` 给出区域 `E` 的体积。                                                                                                              |
| `dV`                                    | volume element, élément de volume, 体积元                         | An infinitesimal element of volume.                                                                   | EN: In Cartesian coordinates, `dV=dx\,dy\,dz`.<br>FR: En coordonnées cartésiennes, `dV=dx\,dy\,dz`.<br>中：在直角坐标中，`dV=dx\,dy\,dz`。                                                                                                               |
| `\int_a^b\int_c^d f(x,y)\,dy\,dx`       | iterated integral, intégrale itérée, 累次积分                      | A multiple integral computed by integrating one variable at a time.                                   | EN: An iterated integral evaluates a double integral step by step.<br>FR: Une intégrale itérée calcule une intégrale double étape par étape.<br>中：累次积分逐个变量计算二重积分。                                                                              |
| —                                       | order of integration, ordre d’intégration, 积分次序                | The sequence in which variables are integrated.                                                       | EN: Changing the order of integration may simplify a problem.<br>FR: Changer l’ordre d’intégration peut simplifier un problème.<br>中：改变积分次序可能简化问题。                                                                                             |
| —                                       | Fubini’s theorem, théorème de Fubini, Fubini 定理                | A theorem allowing multiple integrals to be computed as iterated integrals under suitable conditions. | EN: Fubini’s theorem permits integrating first in `x` or first in `y` when conditions hold.<br>FR: Le théorème de Fubini permet d’intégrer d’abord selon `x` ou selon `y` sous certaines conditions.<br>中：在条件满足时，Fubini 定理允许先对 `x` 或先对 `y` 积分。 |
| `\int\int_D f\,dA`                      | integral over a region, intégrale sur un domaine, 区域积分         | An integral where the domain is a plane region rather than a simple interval.                         | EN: Integrating over a disk is often easier in polar coordinates.<br>FR: Intégrer sur un disque est souvent plus simple en coordonnées polaires.<br>中：在圆盘上积分通常用极坐标更方便。                                                                         |
| `\iiint_E \rho(x,y,z)\,dV`              | mass integral, intégrale de masse, 质量积分                        | Total mass obtained by integrating density over a region.                                             | EN: If density is constant `\rho`, then mass is `\rho` times volume.<br>FR: Si la densité est constante `\rho`, alors la masse est `\rho` fois le volume.<br>中：若密度为常数 `\rho`，则质量等于 `\rho` 乘以体积。                                                |
| `\bar{x}=\frac{1}{M}\iiint_E x\rho\,dV` | center of mass coordinate, coordonnée du centre de masse, 质心坐标 | A coordinate of the balance point of a mass distribution.                                             | EN: The center of mass uses weighted averages of coordinates.<br>FR: Le centre de masse utilise des moyennes pondérées des coordonnées.<br>中：质心坐标是坐标的加权平均。                                                                                     |

## 10.5 Coordinate systems and change of variables

| Symbol (LaTeX)                             | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                     | Definition                                                                     | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ------------------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `(r,\theta)`                               | polar coordinates, coordonnées polaires, 极坐标                          | A two-dimensional coordinate system using distance from the origin and angle.  | EN: The point `(x,y)` can be written as `(r,\theta)` in polar coordinates.<br>FR: Le point `(x,y)` peut s’écrire `(r,\theta)` en coordonnées polaires.<br>中：点 `(x,y)` 可用极坐标 `(r,\theta)` 表示。             |
| `x=r\cos\theta,\ y=r\sin\theta`            | polar conversion, conversion polaire, 极坐标转换                           | Formulas converting polar coordinates to Cartesian coordinates.                | EN: If `r=2` and `\theta=0`, then `(x,y)=(2,0)`.<br>FR: Si `r=2` et `\theta=0`, alors `(x,y)=(2,0)`.<br>中：若 `r=2` 且 `\theta=0`，则 `(x,y)=(2,0)`。                                                          |
| `dA=r\,dr\,d\theta`                        | polar area element, élément d’aire polaire, 极坐标面积元                    | The area element in polar coordinates.                                         | EN: The factor `r` appears in polar integration.<br>FR: Le facteur `r` apparaît dans l’intégration polaire.<br>中：极坐标积分中会出现因子 `r`。                                                                        |
| `(r,\theta,z)`                             | cylindrical coordinates, coordonnées cylindriques, 柱坐标                | A three-dimensional coordinate system combining polar coordinates with height. | EN: Cylindrical coordinates suit cylinders and rotational symmetry.<br>FR: Les coordonnées cylindriques conviennent aux cylindres et aux symétries de rotation.<br>中：柱坐标适合圆柱和旋转对称问题。                     |
| `x=r\cos\theta,\ y=r\sin\theta,\ z=z`      | cylindrical conversion, conversion cylindrique, 柱坐标转换                 | Formulas converting cylindrical coordinates to Cartesian coordinates.          | EN: In cylindrical coordinates, `z` stays unchanged.<br>FR: En coordonnées cylindriques, `z` reste inchangé.<br>中：在柱坐标中，`z` 保持不变。                                                                        |
| `dV=r\,dr\,d\theta\,dz`                    | cylindrical volume element, élément de volume cylindrique, 柱坐标体积元     | The volume element in cylindrical coordinates.                                 | EN: The volume element in cylindrical coordinates includes `r`.<br>FR: L’élément de volume cylindrique contient `r`.<br>中：柱坐标体积元包含因子 `r`。                                                                |
| `(\rho,\theta,\phi)`                       | spherical coordinates, coordonnées sphériques, 球坐标                    | A three-dimensional coordinate system using radius and two angles.             | EN: Spherical coordinates are useful for spheres.<br>FR: Les coordonnées sphériques sont utiles pour les sphères.<br>中：球坐标适合球形区域。                                                                        |
| `x=\rho\sin\phi\cos\theta`                 | spherical x-coordinate, coordonnée x sphérique, 球坐标 x 转换              | The Cartesian `x` coordinate in common spherical-coordinate convention.        | EN: In spherical coordinates, `x=\rho\sin\phi\cos\theta`.<br>FR: En coordonnées sphériques, `x=\rho\sin\phi\cos\theta`.<br>中：在球坐标中，`x=\rho\sin\phi\cos\theta`。                                           |
| `dV=\rho^2\sin\phi\,d\rho\,d\phi\,d\theta` | spherical volume element, élément de volume sphérique, 球坐标体积元         | The volume element in spherical coordinates.                                   | EN: The factor `\rho^2\sin\phi` appears in spherical integration.<br>FR: Le facteur `\rho^2\sin\phi` apparaît dans l’intégration sphérique.<br>中：球坐标积分中会出现因子 `\rho^2\sin\phi`。                           |
| `\left\lvert\det J\right\rvert`            | absolute Jacobian determinant, déterminant jacobien absolu, 雅可比行列式绝对值 | The scaling factor used when changing variables in multiple integrals.         | EN: A change of variables multiplies by `\left\lvert\det J\right\rvert`.<br>FR: Un changement de variables multiplie par `\left\lvert\det J\right\rvert`.<br>中：换元积分需要乘以 `\left\lvert\det J\right\rvert`。 |

## 10.6 Vector fields and line integrals

| Symbol (LaTeX)                       | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                        | Definition                                                                     | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| ------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `\mathbf{F}(x,y,z)`                  | vector field, champ de vecteurs, 向量场                                                     | A function assigning a vector to each point in a region.                       | EN: A wind map can be modeled as a vector field.<br>FR: Une carte du vent peut être modélisée par un champ de vecteurs.<br>中：风场图可以建模为向量场。                                                                                                                                            |
| `\mathbf{F}=P\mathbf{i}+Q\mathbf{j}` | plane vector field, champ vectoriel plan, 平面向量场                                          | A vector field in two dimensions with component functions `P` and `Q`.         | EN: `\mathbf{F}(x,y)=(-y,x)` rotates around the origin.<br>FR: `\mathbf{F}(x,y)=(-y,x)` tourne autour de l’origine.<br>中：`\mathbf{F}(x,y)=(-y,x)` 表示绕原点旋转的向量场。                                                                                                                       |
| `\int_C f\,ds`                       | scalar line integral, intégrale curviligne scalaire, 标量线积分                               | An integral of a scalar function along a curve with respect to arc length.     | EN: `\int_C f\,ds` accumulates density along a wire.<br>FR: `\int_C f\,ds` accumule une densité le long d’un fil.<br>中：`\int_C f\,ds` 可表示沿导线累积密度。                                                                                                                                    |
| `ds`                                 | arc length element, élément de longueur d’arc, 弧长元                                       | An infinitesimal element of length along a curve.                              | EN: For `\mathbf{r}(t)`, `ds=\lVert\mathbf{r}'(t)\rVert\,dt`.<br>FR: Pour `\mathbf{r}(t)`, `ds=\lVert\mathbf{r}'(t)\rVert\,dt`.<br>中：对于 `\mathbf{r}(t)`，`ds=\lVert\mathbf{r}'(t)\rVert\,dt`。                                                                                         |
| `\int_C \mathbf{F}\cdot d\mathbf{r}` | vector line integral, intégrale curviligne vectorielle, 向量线积分                            | An integral measuring the component of a vector field along a curve.           | EN: Work done by a force field is `\int_C \mathbf{F}\cdot d\mathbf{r}`.<br>FR: Le travail d’un champ de force est `\int_C \mathbf{F}\cdot d\mathbf{r}`.<br>中：力场做功可表示为 `\int_C \mathbf{F}\cdot d\mathbf{r}`。                                                                          |
| `d\mathbf{r}`                        | vector displacement element, élément de déplacement vectoriel, 向量位移元                     | An infinitesimal vector tangent to a curve.                                    | EN: If `\mathbf{r}(t)` parametrizes `C`, then `d\mathbf{r}=\mathbf{r}'(t)\,dt`.<br>FR: Si `\mathbf{r}(t)` paramètre `C`, alors `d\mathbf{r}=\mathbf{r}'(t)\,dt`.<br>中：若 `\mathbf{r}(t)` 参数化 `C`，则 `d\mathbf{r}=\mathbf{r}'(t)\,dt`。                                                  |
| `\int_C P\,dx+Q\,dy`                 | differential-form line integral, intégrale curviligne sous forme différentielle, 微分形式线积分 | A two-dimensional line integral written using component differentials.         | EN: `\int_C P\,dx+Q\,dy` equals `\int_C \mathbf{F}\cdot d\mathbf{r}` for `\mathbf{F}=(P,Q)`.<br>FR: `\int_C P\,dx+Q\,dy` égale `\int_C \mathbf{F}\cdot d\mathbf{r}` pour `\mathbf{F}=(P,Q)`.<br>中：对 `\mathbf{F}=(P,Q)`，`\int_C P\,dx+Q\,dy` 等于 `\int_C \mathbf{F}\cdot d\mathbf{r}`。 |
| —                                    | orientation, orientation, 方向 / 定向                                                        | A chosen direction of traversal along a curve or surface.                      | EN: Reversing the orientation of a curve changes the sign of a vector line integral.<br>FR: Inverser l’orientation d’une courbe change le signe d’une intégrale curviligne vectorielle.<br>中：反转曲线方向会改变向量线积分的符号。                                                                      |
| —                                    | circulation, circulation, 环流                                                             | A line integral measuring how much a vector field flows around a closed curve. | EN: Circulation around a closed curve is written `\oint_C \mathbf{F}\cdot d\mathbf{r}`.<br>FR: La circulation autour d’une courbe fermée s’écrit `\oint_C \mathbf{F}\cdot d\mathbf{r}`.<br>中：沿闭曲线的环流写作 `\oint_C \mathbf{F}\cdot d\mathbf{r}`。                                        |
| `\oint_C`                            | closed line integral, intégrale curviligne fermée, 闭路线积分                                 | A line integral over a closed curve.                                           | EN: `\oint_C` indicates that the path returns to its starting point.<br>FR: `\oint_C` indique que le chemin revient à son point de départ.<br>中：`\oint_C` 表示路径回到起点。                                                                                                                  |

## 10.7 Conservative fields and potentials

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                       | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                 | Definition                                                                              | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ---------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\mathbf{F}=\nabla \phi`                             | conservative vector field, champ conservatif, 保守向量场                               | A vector field that is the gradient of a scalar potential function.                     | EN: If `\mathbf{F}=\nabla\phi`, then `\mathbf{F}` is conservative.<br>FR: Si `\mathbf{F}=\nabla\phi`, alors `\mathbf{F}` est conservatif.<br>中：若 `\mathbf{F}=\nabla\phi`，则 `\mathbf{F}` 是保守向量场。          |
| `\phi`                                               | potential function, fonction potentielle, 势函数                                     | A scalar function whose gradient gives a vector field.                                  | EN: For `\mathbf{F}=(2x,2y)`, a potential is `\phi=x^2+y^2`.<br>FR: Pour `\mathbf{F}=(2x,2y)`, un potentiel est `\phi=x^2+y^2`.<br>中：对于 `\mathbf{F}=(2x,2y)`，势函数可取 `\phi=x^2+y^2`。                       |
| `\int_C \nabla\phi\cdot d\mathbf{r}=\phi(B)-\phi(A)` | gradient theorem, théorème du gradient, 梯度定理                                      | A theorem evaluating a line integral of a gradient field by endpoint values.            | EN: In a conservative field, work depends only on endpoints.<br>FR: Dans un champ conservatif, le travail ne dépend que des extrémités.<br>中：在保守场中，做功只取决于端点。                                             |
| —                                                    | path independence, indépendance du chemin, 路径无关                                   | A property where a line integral depends only on endpoints, not the path.               | EN: Conservative fields have path-independent line integrals.<br>FR: Les champs conservatifs ont des intégrales curvilignes indépendantes du chemin.<br>中：保守场的线积分与路径无关。                                  |
| `\oint_C \mathbf{F}\cdot d\mathbf{r}=0`              | zero circulation condition, condition de circulation nulle, 环流为零条件                | A property of conservative fields on suitable domains.                                  | EN: For a conservative field, every closed line integral is zero.<br>FR: Pour un champ conservatif, toute intégrale sur une courbe fermée est nulle.<br>中：对保守场，沿任意闭曲线的线积分为零。                             |
| `P_y=Q_x`                                            | two-dimensional conservative test, critère conservatif en dimension deux, 二维保守场判别 | On a suitable simply connected domain, `\mathbf{F}=(P,Q)` is conservative if `P_y=Q_x`. | EN: If `P_y=Q_x` on a simply connected region, the field may be conservative.<br>FR: Si `P_y=Q_x` sur un domaine simplement connexe, le champ peut être conservatif.<br>中：在单连通区域上，若 `P_y=Q_x`，向量场可能是保守场。 |
