| `T:V\to W`           | linear transformation, application linéaire, 线性变换             | A map preserving vector addition and scalar multiplication.                 | EN: `T(x,y)=(2x,2y)` is a linear transformation.<br>FR: `T(x,y)=(2x,2y)` est une application linéaire.<br>中：`T(x,y)=(2x,2y)` 是线性变换。                                                                                                                |
| `T(u+v)=T(u)+T(v)`   | additivity, additivité, 加法保持性                                 | One of the defining properties of a linear transformation.                  | EN: A linear map satisfies `T(u+v)=T(u)+T(v)`.<br>FR: Une application linéaire vérifie `T(u+v)=T(u)+T(v)`.<br>中：线性映射满足 `T(u+v)=T(u)+T(v)`。                                                                                                         |
| `T(cv)=cT(v)`        | homogeneity, homogénéité, 数乘保持性                               | One of the defining properties of a linear transformation.                  | EN: A linear map satisfies `T(cv)=cT(v)`.<br>FR: Une application linéaire vérifie `T(cv)=cT(v)`.<br>中：线性映射满足 `T(cv)=cT(v)`。                                                                                                                        |
| `T(x)=Ax`            | matrix transformation, transformation matricielle, 矩阵变换       | A linear transformation represented by multiplication by a matrix.          | EN: Every `m\times n` matrix defines a map from `\mathbb{R}^n` to `\mathbb{R}^m`.<br>FR: Toute matrice `m\times n` définit une application de `\mathbb{R}^n` vers `\mathbb{R}^m`.<br>中：每个 `m\times n` 矩阵定义一个从 `\mathbb{R}^n` 到 `\mathbb{R}^m` 的映射。 |
| `\ker T`             | kernel, noyau, 核                                              | The set of all vectors mapped to zero by a linear transformation.           | EN: `\ker T=\{v:T(v)=0\}`.<br>FR: `\ker T=\{v:T(v)=0\}`.<br>中：`\ker T=\{v:T(v)=0\}`。                                                                                                                                                               |
| `\operatorname{im}T` | image, image, 像                                               | The set of all outputs of a linear transformation.                          | EN: The image of `T(x)=Ax` is the column space of `A`.<br>FR: L’image de `T(x)=Ax` est l’espace colonne de `A`.<br>中：`T(x)=Ax` 的像是 `A` 的列空间。                                                                                                       |
| `T^{-1}`             | inverse transformation, application inverse, 逆变换              | A transformation that reverses the action of `T`, when it exists.           | EN: A linear transformation is invertible if it is one-to-one and onto.<br>FR: Une application linéaire est inversible si elle est injective et surjective.<br>中：线性变换若既单射又满射，则可逆。                                                                  |
| —                    | one-to-one linear map, application linéaire injective, 单射线性映射 | A linear map whose kernel contains only the zero vector.                    | EN: `T` is one-to-one exactly when `\ker T=\{\mathbf{0}\}`.<br>FR: `T` est injective exactement lorsque `\ker T=\{\mathbf{0}\}`.<br>中：`T` 是单射当且仅当 `\ker T=\{\mathbf{0}\}`。                                                                         |
| —                    | onto linear map, application linéaire surjective, 满射线性映射      | A linear map whose image equals the whole codomain.                         | EN: `T:V\to W` is onto if `\operatorname{im}T=W`.<br>FR: `T:V\to W` est surjective si `\operatorname{im}T=W`.<br>中：若 `\operatorname{im}T=W`，则 `T:V\to W` 是满射。                                                                                      |
| —                    | change of basis, changement de base, 换基                       | Rewriting coordinates of vectors relative to a different basis.             | EN: Change of basis changes coordinates, not the vector itself.<br>FR: Le changement de base modifie les coordonnées, pas le vecteur lui-même.<br>中：换基改变坐标表示，但不改变向量本身。                                                                             |
| `P^{-1}AP`           | similar matrices, matrices semblables, 相似矩阵                   | Matrices representing the same linear transformation under different bases. | EN: Similar matrices have the same eigenvalues.<br>FR: Les matrices semblables ont les mêmes valeurs propres.<br>中：相似矩阵有相同的特征值。                                                                                                                    |

## 11.10 Eigenvalues, eigenvectors, and diagonalization

| Symbol (LaTeX)                   | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                              | Definition                                                                                 | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `Av=\lambda v`                   | eigenvalue equation, équation aux valeurs propres, 特征值方程                       | An equation saying that `A` sends a nonzero vector to a scalar multiple of itself.         | EN: If `Av=\lambda v`, then `v` is an eigenvector and `\lambda` is an eigenvalue.<br>FR: Si `Av=\lambda v`, alors `v` est un vecteur propre et `\lambda` une valeur propre.<br>中：若 `Av=\lambda v`，则 `v` 是特征向量，`\lambda` 是特征值。                             |
| `\lambda`                        | eigenvalue, valeur propre, 特征值                                                 | A scalar by which a matrix scales an eigenvector.                                          | EN: The matrix `2I` has eigenvalue `2`.<br>FR: La matrice `2I` a pour valeur propre `2`.<br>中：矩阵 `2I` 的特征值是 `2`。                                                                                                                                          |
| `v`                              | eigenvector, vecteur propre, 特征向量                                              | A nonzero vector whose direction is preserved by a linear transformation.                  | EN: Every nonzero vector is an eigenvector of `2I`.<br>FR: Tout vecteur non nul est un vecteur propre de `2I`.<br>中：任意非零向量都是 `2I` 的特征向量。                                                                                                                  |
| `\det(A-\lambda I)=0`            | characteristic equation, équation caractéristique, 特征方程                        | The equation used to find eigenvalues of a square matrix.                                  | EN: Solve `\det(A-\lambda I)=0` to find eigenvalues.<br>FR: Résoudre `\det(A-\lambda I)=0` pour trouver les valeurs propres.<br>中：解 `\det(A-\lambda I)=0` 可求特征值。                                                                                          |
| `p_A(\lambda)=\det(A-\lambda I)` | characteristic polynomial, polynôme caractéristique, 特征多项式                     | The polynomial whose roots are eigenvalues of `A`.                                         | EN: A `2\times2` matrix has a characteristic polynomial of degree `2`.<br>FR: Une matrice `2\times2` a un polynôme caractéristique de degré `2`.<br>中：`2\times2` 矩阵的特征多项式次数为 `2`。                                                                         |
| `E_\lambda=\ker(A-\lambda I)`    | eigenspace, espace propre, 特征子空间                                               | The subspace of all eigenvectors for `\lambda`, together with the zero vector.             | EN: The eigenspace for `\lambda` is the null space of `A-\lambda I`.<br>FR: L’espace propre associé à `\lambda` est le noyau de `A-\lambda I`.<br>中：`\lambda` 的特征子空间是 `A-\lambda I` 的零空间。                                                                 |
| —                                | algebraic multiplicity, multiplicité algébrique, 代数重数                          | The multiplicity of an eigenvalue as a root of the characteristic polynomial.              | EN: If `(λ-2)^3` divides the characteristic polynomial, `2` has algebraic multiplicity at least `3`.<br>FR: Si `(λ-2)^3` divise le polynôme caractéristique, `2` a une multiplicité algébrique au moins `3`.<br>中：若 `(λ-2)^3` 整除特征多项式，则 `2` 的代数重数至少为 `3`。 |
| —                                | geometric multiplicity, multiplicité géométrique, 几何重数                         | The dimension of the eigenspace of an eigenvalue.                                          | EN: Geometric multiplicity is `\dim E_\lambda`.<br>FR: La multiplicité géométrique est `\dim E_\lambda`.<br>中：几何重数是 `\dim E_\lambda`。                                                                                                                     |
| `A=PDP^{-1}`                     | diagonalization, diagonalisation, 对角化                                          | Writing a matrix as a product involving a diagonal matrix of eigenvalues.                  | EN: If `A=PDP^{-1}`, powers of `A` become easier to compute.<br>FR: Si `A=PDP^{-1}`, les puissances de `A` deviennent plus faciles à calculer.<br>中：若 `A=PDP^{-1}`，则计算 `A` 的幂更容易。                                                                         |
| `D`                              | diagonal matrix of eigenvalues, matrice diagonale des valeurs propres, 特征值对角矩阵 | The diagonal matrix appearing in a diagonalization.                                        | EN: In diagonalization, the entries of `D` are eigenvalues.<br>FR: Dans une diagonalisation, les entrées de `D` sont des valeurs propres.<br>中：在对角化中，`D` 的对角元素是特征值。                                                                                       |
| `P`                              | eigenvector matrix, matrice des vecteurs propres, 特征向量矩阵                       | The matrix whose columns are eigenvectors in a diagonalization.                            | EN: In `A=PDP^{-1}`, columns of `P` are eigenvectors.<br>FR: Dans `A=PDP^{-1}`, les colonnes de `P` sont des vecteurs propres.<br>中：在 `A=PDP^{-1}` 中，`P` 的列是特征向量。                                                                                         |
| —                                | defective matrix, matrice défective, 缺陷矩阵                                      | A matrix that does not have enough linearly independent eigenvectors to be diagonalizable. | EN: A defective matrix cannot be diagonalized.<br>FR: Une matrice défective ne peut pas être diagonalisée.<br>中：缺陷矩阵不能对角化。                                                                                                                                |

## 11.11 Inner product spaces and orthogonality

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                                   | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                           | Definition                                                                                         | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\langle u,v\rangle`                                             | inner product, produit intérieur, 内积                                                        | A generalized dot product satisfying linearity, symmetry or conjugate symmetry, and positivity.    | EN: In `\mathbb{R}^n`, `\langle u,v\rangle=u\cdot v`.<br>FR: Dans `\mathbb{R}^n`, `\langle u,v\rangle=u\cdot v`.<br>中：在 `\mathbb{R}^n` 中，`\langle u,v\rangle=u\cdot v`。                                                                     |
| `\langle v,v\rangle\geq 0`                                       | positive definiteness, positivité définie, 正定性                                              | An inner product satisfies `\langle v,v\rangle>0` for every nonzero vector `v`.                    | EN: The inner product of a nonzero vector with itself is positive.<br>FR: Le produit intérieur d’un vecteur non nul avec lui-même est positif.<br>中：非零向量与自身的内积为正。                                                                           |
| `\lVert v\rVert=\sqrt{\langle v,v\rangle}`                       | norm from inner product, norme induite par le produit intérieur, 内积诱导范数                     | The length defined by an inner product.                                                            | EN: In Euclidean space, this gives the usual vector length.<br>FR: Dans l’espace euclidien, cela donne la longueur usuelle.<br>中：在欧氏空间中，这给出通常的向量长度。                                                                                         |
| `u\perp v`                                                       | orthogonality, orthogonalité, 正交性                                                           | Two vectors are orthogonal when their inner product is zero.                                       | EN: If `\langle u,v\rangle=0`, then `u\perp v`.<br>FR: Si `\langle u,v\rangle=0`, alors `u\perp v`.<br>中：若 `\langle u,v\rangle=0`，则 `u\perp v`。                                                                                             |
| `\{q_1,\ldots,q_n\}`                                             | orthogonal set, famille orthogonale, 正交组                                                    | A set of nonzero vectors that are pairwise orthogonal.                                             | EN: The standard basis of `\mathbb{R}^n` is orthogonal.<br>FR: La base canonique de `\mathbb{R}^n` est orthogonale.<br>中：`\mathbb{R}^n` 的标准基是正交组。                                                                                           |
| `\lVert q_i\rVert=1`                                             | orthonormal set, famille orthonormée, 标准正交组                                                 | A set of vectors that are pairwise orthogonal and all have norm `1`.                               | EN: `\{(1,0),(0,1)\}` is orthonormal.<br>FR: `\{(1,0),(0,1)\}` est orthonormée.<br>中：`\{(1,0),(0,1)\}` 是标准正交组。                                                                                                                              |
| `Q^TQ=I`                                                         | orthonormal columns, colonnes orthonormées, 标准正交列                                           | A matrix has orthonormal columns when its column vectors are orthonormal.                          | EN: If `Q^TQ=I`, the columns of `Q` are orthonormal.<br>FR: Si `Q^TQ=I`, les colonnes de `Q` sont orthonormées.<br>中：若 `Q^TQ=I`，则 `Q` 的列向量标准正交。                                                                                             |
| —                                                                | Gram-Schmidt process, procédé de Gram-Schmidt, Gram-Schmidt 正交化                             | A method converting a linearly independent set into an orthonormal set spanning the same subspace. | EN: Gram-Schmidt turns a basis into an orthonormal basis.<br>FR: Le procédé de Gram-Schmidt transforme une base en base orthonormée.<br>中：Gram-Schmidt 过程把一组基转化为标准正交基。                                                                      |
| `\operatorname{proj}_W v`                                        | orthogonal projection onto a subspace, projection orthogonale sur un sous-espace, 到子空间的正交投影 | The closest vector in a subspace `W` to a given vector `v`.                                        | EN: Orthogonal projection gives the best approximation in a subspace.<br>FR: La projection orthogonale donne la meilleure approximation dans un sous-espace.<br>中：正交投影给出子空间中的最佳近似。                                                          |
| `W^\perp`                                                        | orthogonal complement, complément orthogonal, 正交补                                           | The set of all vectors orthogonal to every vector in `W`.                                          | EN: If `W` is the `x`-axis in `\mathbb{R}^2`, then `W^\perp` is the `y`-axis.<br>FR: Si `W` est l’axe des abscisses dans `\mathbb{R}^2`, alors `W^\perp` est l’axe des ordonnées.<br>中：若 `W` 是 `\mathbb{R}^2` 中的 `x` 轴，则 `W^\perp` 是 `y` 轴。 |
| `\lvert\langle u,v\rangle\rvert\leq\lVert u\rVert\lVert v\rVert` | Cauchy-Schwarz inequality, inégalité de Cauchy-Schwarz, Cauchy-Schwarz 不等式                  | A fundamental inequality bounding the inner product by the product of norms.                       | EN: Equality holds when the vectors are linearly dependent.<br>FR: L’égalité a lieu lorsque les vecteurs sont linéairement dépendants.<br>中：当两个向量线性相关时取等号。                                                                                  |
| `\lVert u+v\rVert\leq\lVert u\rVert+\lVert v\rVert`              | triangle inequality, inégalité triangulaire, 三角不等式                                          | A norm inequality stating that the direct path is no longer than a two-step path.                  | EN: The triangle inequality generalizes the geometric triangle rule.<br>FR: L’inégalité triangulaire généralise la règle géométrique du triangle.<br>中：三角不等式推广了几何中的三角形边长关系。                                                                 |

## 11.12 Orthogonal projections and least squares

| Symbol (LaTeX)              | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                       | Definition                                                                                     | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| --------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\hat{b}`                   | projection of b, projection de b, b 的投影                                 | The closest vector to `b` in a chosen subspace, often the column space of `A`.                 | EN: In least squares, `\hat{b}` is the projection of `b` onto `\operatorname{Col}(A)`.<br>FR: En moindres carrés, `\hat{b}` est la projection de `b` sur `\operatorname{Col}(A)`.<br>中：在最小二乘中，`\hat{b}` 是 `b` 到 `\operatorname{Col}(A)` 的投影。 |
| `b-\hat{b}`                 | residual vector, vecteur résiduel, 残差向量                                 | The difference between observed data and its projection or prediction.                         | EN: The residual is orthogonal to the column space in least squares.<br>FR: Le résidu est orthogonal à l’espace colonne dans les moindres carrés.<br>中：在最小二乘中，残差与列空间正交。                                                                      |
| `A^T(b-A\hat{x})=0`         | normal equation condition, condition d’équation normale, 正规方程条件         | The orthogonality condition characterizing least-squares solutions.                            | EN: The residual `b-A\hat{x}` is orthogonal to every column of `A`.<br>FR: Le résidu `b-A\hat{x}` est orthogonal à chaque colonne de `A`.<br>中：残差 `b-A\hat{x}` 与 `A` 的每一列都正交。                                                                |
| `A^TA\hat{x}=A^Tb`          | normal equations, équations normales, 正规方程                              | Equations used to find a least-squares solution.                                               | EN: Solve `A^TA\hat{x}=A^Tb` to obtain the least-squares estimate.<br>FR: Résoudre `A^TA\hat{x}=A^Tb` pour obtenir l’estimation des moindres carrés.<br>中：解 `A^TA\hat{x}=A^Tb` 可得到最小二乘估计。                                                    |
| `\min_x\lVert Ax-b\rVert^2` | least squares problem, problème des moindres carrés, 最小二乘问题             | The problem of finding `x` that minimizes squared error.                                       | EN: Linear regression is a least-squares problem.<br>FR: La régression linéaire est un problème des moindres carrés.<br>中：线性回归是一个最小二乘问题。                                                                                                     |
| `P=A(A^TA)^{-1}A^T`         | projection matrix, matrice de projection, 投影矩阵                          | A matrix that maps vectors onto the column space of `A`, when `A` has independent columns.     | EN: `P^2=P` for a projection matrix.<br>FR: `P^2=P` pour une matrice de projection.<br>中：投影矩阵满足 `P^2=P`。                                                                                                                                     |
| `QR`                        | QR decomposition, décomposition QR, QR 分解                               | A factorization of a matrix into an orthonormal factor `Q` and an upper triangular factor `R`. | EN: QR decomposition is useful for least squares.<br>FR: La décomposition QR est utile pour les moindres carrés.<br>中：QR 分解常用于最小二乘问题。                                                                                                        |
| —                           | best approximation theorem, théorème de meilleure approximation, 最佳逼近定理 | A theorem stating that orthogonal projection gives the closest point in a subspace.            | EN: Projection onto a subspace gives the nearest vector in that subspace.<br>FR: La projection sur un sous-espace donne le vecteur le plus proche dans ce sous-espace.<br>中：到子空间的正交投影给出该子空间中最近的向量。                                           |

## 11.13 Matrix factorizations and spectral theory

| Symbol (LaTeX)     | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                   | Definition                                                                             | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| ------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `A=LU`             | LU decomposition, décomposition LU, LU 分解                                           | A factorization of a matrix into lower and upper triangular matrices.                  | EN: LU decomposition helps solve many systems with the same coefficient matrix.<br>FR: La décomposition LU aide à résoudre plusieurs systèmes avec la même matrice de coefficients.<br>中：LU 分解适合求解多个同系数矩阵的方程组。 |
| `A=QR`             | QR decomposition, décomposition QR, QR 分解                                           | A factorization into a matrix with orthonormal columns and an upper triangular matrix. | EN: QR decomposition can be obtained using Gram-Schmidt.<br>FR: La décomposition QR peut être obtenue par Gram-Schmidt.<br>中：QR 分解可由 Gram-Schmidt 正交化得到。                                                       |
| `A=PDP^{-1}`       | eigen-decomposition, décomposition propre, 特征分解                                     | A decomposition of a diagonalizable matrix using eigenvectors and eigenvalues.         | EN: Eigen-decomposition simplifies powers of a matrix.<br>FR: La décomposition propre simplifie les puissances d’une matrice.<br>中：特征分解可简化矩阵幂的计算。                                                              |
| `A=Q\Lambda Q^T`   | spectral decomposition, décomposition spectrale, 谱分解                                | A decomposition of a real symmetric matrix using orthogonal eigenvectors.              | EN: A real symmetric matrix has an orthogonal spectral decomposition.<br>FR: Une matrice réelle symétrique possède une décomposition spectrale orthogonale.<br>中：实对称矩阵具有正交谱分解。                                 |
| `A=U\Sigma V^T`    | singular value decomposition, décomposition en valeurs singulières, 奇异值分解           | A factorization expressing a matrix through orthogonal directions and singular values. | EN: SVD applies to every real matrix.<br>FR: La SVD s’applique à toute matrice réelle.<br>中：奇异值分解适用于任意实矩阵。                                                                                                     |
| `\sigma_i`         | singular value, valeur singulière, 奇异值                                              | A nonnegative scaling factor appearing in the singular value decomposition.            | EN: Singular values measure stretching along special orthogonal directions.<br>FR: Les valeurs singulières mesurent l’étirement selon des directions orthogonales spéciales.<br>中：奇异值度量矩阵在特殊正交方向上的拉伸。          |
| `\Sigma`           | singular value matrix, matrice des valeurs singulières, 奇异值矩阵                       | The diagonal or rectangular diagonal matrix containing singular values.                | EN: In `A=U\Sigma V^T`, `\Sigma` contains the singular values.<br>FR: Dans `A=U\Sigma V^T`, `\Sigma` contient les valeurs singulières.<br>中：在 `A=U\Sigma V^T` 中，`\Sigma` 包含奇异值。                                |
| `U,V`              | singular vector matrices, matrices des vecteurs singuliers, 奇异向量矩阵                  | Orthogonal matrices whose columns are left and right singular vectors.                 | EN: Columns of `U` and `V` are singular vectors.<br>FR: Les colonnes de `U` et `V` sont des vecteurs singuliers.<br>中：`U` 和 `V` 的列是奇异向量。                                                                       |
| `A^TA`             | Gram matrix, matrice de Gram, Gram 矩阵                                               | A matrix of inner products, often used to analyze columns of `A`.                      | EN: `A^TA` contains dot products of columns of `A`.<br>FR: `A^TA` contient les produits scalaires des colonnes de `A`.<br>中：`A^TA` 包含 `A` 的列向量之间的点积。                                                           |
| `A^TA` eigenvalues | singular values from eigenvalues, valeurs singulières par valeurs propres, 由特征值求奇异值 | Singular values of `A` are square roots of eigenvalues of `A^TA`.                      | EN: If `A^TA` has eigenvalue `9`, then `A` has singular value `3`.<br>FR: Si `A^TA` a pour valeur propre `9`, alors `A` a une valeur singulière `3`.<br>中：若 `A^TA` 有特征值 `9`，则 `A` 有奇异值 `3`。                    |

## 11.14 Quadratic forms and positive definiteness

| Symbol (LaTeX)      | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                           | Definition                                                                       | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| ------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `x^TAx`             | quadratic form, forme quadratique, 二次型                                      | A scalar expression built from a matrix and a vector, homogeneous of degree two. | EN: If `A=I`, then `x^TAx=\lVert x\rVert^2`.<br>FR: Si `A=I`, alors `x^TAx=\lVert x\rVert^2`.<br>中：若 `A=I`，则 `x^TAx=\lVert x\rVert^2`。                                                                                         |
| `A\succ 0`          | positive definite matrix, matrice définie positive, 正定矩阵                    | A symmetric matrix satisfying `x^TAx>0` for every nonzero `x`.                   | EN: The identity matrix is positive definite.<br>FR: La matrice identité est définie positive.<br>中：单位矩阵是正定矩阵。                                                                                                                 |
| `A\succeq 0`        | positive semidefinite matrix, matrice semi-définie positive, 半正定矩阵          | A symmetric matrix satisfying `x^TAx\geq 0` for every `x`.                       | EN: `A^TA` is always positive semidefinite.<br>FR: `A^TA` est toujours semi-définie positive.<br>中：`A^TA` 总是半正定矩阵。                                                                                                             |
| `A\prec 0`          | negative definite matrix, matrice définie négative, 负定矩阵                    | A symmetric matrix satisfying `x^TAx<0` for every nonzero `x`.                   | EN: `-I` is negative definite.<br>FR: `-I` est définie négative.<br>中：`-I` 是负定矩阵。                                                                                                                                              |
| —                   | indefinite matrix, matrice indéfinie, 不定矩阵                                  | A symmetric matrix whose quadratic form takes both positive and negative values. | EN: `\begin{pmatrix}1&0\\0&-1\end{pmatrix}` is indefinite.<br>FR: `\begin{pmatrix}1&0\\0&-1\end{pmatrix}` est indéfinie.<br>中：`\begin{pmatrix}1&0\\0&-1\end{pmatrix}` 是不定矩阵。                                                   |
| —                   | Cholesky decomposition, décomposition de Cholesky, Cholesky 分解              | A factorization of a positive definite matrix as `A=LL^T`.                       | EN: Cholesky decomposition is used for positive definite systems.<br>FR: La décomposition de Cholesky est utilisée pour les systèmes définis positifs.<br>中：Cholesky 分解用于正定线性系统。                                               |
| —                   | Sylvester’s criterion, critère de Sylvester, Sylvester 判别法                  | A test for positive definiteness using leading principal minors.                 | EN: A symmetric matrix is positive definite if all leading principal minors are positive.<br>FR: Une matrice symétrique est définie positive si tous ses mineurs principaux dominants sont positifs.<br>中：对称矩阵正定当且仅当所有顺序主子式为正。 |
| `x^TAx+2b^Tx+c`     | general quadratic function, fonction quadratique générale, 一般二次函数           | A function with quadratic, linear, and constant terms.                           | EN: Quadratic optimization often studies `x^TAx+2b^Tx+c`.<br>FR: L’optimisation quadratique étudie souvent `x^TAx+2b^Tx+c`.<br>中：二次优化常研究 `x^TAx+2b^Tx+c`。                                                                      |
| `\nabla(x^TAx)=2Ax` | gradient of a quadratic form, gradient d’une forme quadratique, 二次型梯度       | The gradient formula for a symmetric matrix `A`.                                 | EN: If `A` is symmetric, then `\nabla(x^TAx)=2Ax`.<br>FR: Si `A` est symétrique, alors `\nabla(x^TAx)=2Ax`.<br>中：若 `A` 对称，则 `\nabla(x^TAx)=2Ax`。                                                                               |
| `H=2A`              | Hessian of a quadratic form, hessienne d’une forme quadratique, 二次型 Hessian | The constant second-derivative matrix of a quadratic function.                   | EN: For `f(x)=x^TAx`, the Hessian is `2A` when `A` is symmetric.<br>FR: Pour `f(x)=x^TAx`, la hessienne est `2A` si `A` est symétrique.<br>中：对 `f(x)=x^TAx`，若 `A` 对称，则 Hessian 为 `2A`。                                         |
# 12. Probability, Statistics, and Data Analysis

## 12.1 Counting, sample spaces, and events

| Symbol (LaTeX)                     | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                      | Definition                                                                   | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| ---------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `\Omega`                           | sample space, univers, 样本空间                            | The set of all possible outcomes of a random experiment.                     | EN: For one die roll, `\Omega=\{1,2,3,4,5,6\}`.<br>FR: Pour un lancer de dé, `\Omega=\{1,2,3,4,5,6\}`.<br>中：掷一次骰子的样本空间是 `\Omega=\{1,2,3,4,5,6\}`。                                                |
| `\omega`                           | outcome, issue / résultat, 样本点 / 结果                    | A single possible result in a sample space.                                  | EN: Rolling a `4` is one outcome.<br>FR: Obtenir `4` est une issue.<br>中：掷出 `4` 是一个样本点。                                                                                                          |
| `A\subseteq\Omega`                 | event, événement, 事件                                   | A subset of the sample space.                                                | EN: The event “even number” is `A=\{2,4,6\}`.<br>FR: L’événement “nombre pair” est `A=\{2,4,6\}`.<br>中：“掷出偶数”这一事件是 `A=\{2,4,6\}`。                                                                |
| `A^c`                              | complement event, événement complémentaire, 对立事件 / 补事件 | The event that `A` does not occur.                                           | EN: If `A` is “even number”, then `A^c=\{1,3,5\}`.<br>FR: Si `A` est “nombre pair”, alors `A^c=\{1,3,5\}`.<br>中：若 `A` 是“偶数”，则 `A^c=\{1,3,5\}`。                                                   |
| `A\cup B`                          | union of events, réunion d’événements, 事件并             | The event that `A` occurs, or `B` occurs, or both occur.                     | EN: `A\cup B` means at least one of the two events occurs.<br>FR: `A\cup B` signifie qu’au moins l’un des deux événements se produit.<br>中：`A\cup B` 表示两个事件中至少一个发生。                              |
| `A\cap B`                          | intersection of events, intersection d’événements, 事件交 | The event that both `A` and `B` occur.                                       | EN: `A\cap B` means both events occur.<br>FR: `A\cap B` signifie que les deux événements se produisent.<br>中：`A\cap B` 表示两个事件同时发生。                                                               |
| `A\cap B=\varnothing`              | disjoint events, événements disjoints, 互斥事件            | Events that cannot occur at the same time.                                   | EN: Rolling `1` and rolling `6` in one die roll are disjoint events.<br>FR: Obtenir `1` et obtenir `6` en un lancer sont des événements disjoints.<br>中：一次掷骰中“掷出 `1`”和“掷出 `6`”是互斥事件。             |
| `\#A`                              | number of outcomes, nombre d’issues, 结果个数              | The number of elements in an event or sample space.                          | EN: If `A=\{2,4,6\}`, then `\#A=3`.<br>FR: Si `A=\{2,4,6\}`, alors `\#A=3`.<br>中：若 `A=\{2,4,6\}`，则 `\#A=3`。                                                                                      |
| `n!`                               | factorial, factorielle, 阶乘                             | The product of positive integers from `1` to `n`, with `0!=1`.               | EN: `5!=120`.<br>FR: `5!=120`, cinq factorielle vaut cent vingt.<br>中：`5!=120`，五的阶乘是一百二十。                                                                                                        |
| `P(n,k)=\frac{n!}{(n-k)!}`         | permutation, arrangement, 排列                           | The number of ordered selections of `k` objects from `n` distinct objects.   | EN: There are `P(5,2)=20` ordered ways to choose two from five.<br>FR: Il y a `P(5,2)=20` arrangements de deux éléments parmi cinq.<br>中：从五个不同对象中有序选两个，有 `P(5,2)=20` 种。                          |
| `\binom{n}{k}`                     | combination, combinaison, 组合                           | The number of unordered selections of `k` objects from `n` distinct objects. | EN: There are `\binom{5}{2}=10` ways to choose two from five.<br>FR: Il y a `\binom{5}{2}=10` combinaisons de deux éléments parmi cinq.<br>中：从五个不同对象中无序选两个，有 `\binom{5}{2}=10` 种。                |
| `\binom{n}{k}=\frac{n!}{k!(n-k)!}` | binomial coefficient, coefficient binomial, 二项式系数      | A coefficient appearing in combinations and binomial expansions.             | EN: In `(a+b)^5`, the coefficient of `a^3b^2` is `\binom{5}{2}=10`.<br>FR: Dans `(a+b)^5`, le coefficient de `a^3b^2` est `\binom{5}{2}=10`.<br>中：在 `(a+b)^5` 中，`a^3b^2` 的系数是 `\binom{5}{2}=10`。 |

## 12.2 Probability rules

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                                      | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                         | Definition                                                                                    | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `P(A)`                                                              | probability, probabilité, 概率                                                              | A number between `0` and `1` measuring how likely event `A` is to occur.                      | EN: For a fair die, `P(\{6\})=\frac{1}{6}`.<br>FR: Pour un dé équilibré, `P(\{6\})=\frac{1}{6}`.<br>中：对公平骰子，掷出 `6` 的概率是 `\frac{1}{6}`。                                                    |
| `0\leq P(A)\leq 1`                                                  | probability bound, encadrement d’une probabilité, 概率范围                                    | Every probability lies between zero and one.                                                  | EN: A probability cannot be negative.<br>FR: Une probabilité ne peut pas être négative.<br>中：概率不能为负数。                                                                                     |
| `P(\Omega)=1`                                                       | total probability of sample space, probabilité de l’univers, 样本空间概率                       | The probability that some outcome in the sample space occurs is one.                          | EN: For a die roll, `P(\Omega)=1`.<br>FR: Pour un lancer de dé, `P(\Omega)=1`.<br>中：掷骰时，样本空间的概率是 `1`。                                                                                     |
| `P(\varnothing)=0`                                                  | probability of impossible event, probabilité de l’événement impossible, 不可能事件概率           | The empty event has probability zero.                                                         | EN: The probability of rolling a `7` on a standard die is `0`.<br>FR: La probabilité d’obtenir `7` avec un dé standard est `0`.<br>中：标准骰子掷出 `7` 的概率是 `0`。                                 |
| `P(A^c)=1-P(A)`                                                     | complement rule, règle du complément, 补事件公式                                               | The probability that `A` does not occur equals one minus the probability that `A` occurs.     | EN: If `P(A)=0.3`, then `P(A^c)=0.7`.<br>FR: Si `P(A)=0,3`, alors `P(A^c)=0,7`.<br>中：若 `P(A)=0.3`，则 `P(A^c)=0.7`。                                                                         |
| `P(A\cup B)=P(A)+P(B)-P(A\cap B)`                                   | addition rule, formule d’addition, 加法公式                                                   | A rule for the probability that at least one of two events occurs.                            | EN: If overlap exists, subtract `P(A\cap B)` once.<br>FR: S’il y a recouvrement, on soustrait une fois `P(A\cap B)`.<br>中：若两个事件有重叠，需要减去一次 `P(A\cap B)`。                                   |
| `P(A\cup B)=P(A)+P(B)`                                              | addition rule for disjoint events, formule d’addition pour événements disjoints, 互斥事件加法公式 | If two events are disjoint, the probability of their union is the sum of their probabilities. | EN: For one die roll, `P(\{1\}\cup\{2\})=\frac{1}{3}`.<br>FR: Pour un lancer de dé, `P(\{1\}\cup\{2\})=\frac{1}{3}`.<br>中：一次掷骰中，掷出 `1` 或 `2` 的概率是 `\frac{1}{3}`。                          |
| `P(A\mid B)`                                                        | conditional probability, probabilité conditionnelle, 条件概率                                 | The probability of `A` given that `B` has occurred.                                           | EN: `P(A\mid B)` reads “probability of `A` given `B`”.<br>FR: `P(A\mid B)` se lit “probabilité de `A` sachant `B`”.<br>中：`P(A\mid B)` 读作“在 `B` 发生条件下 `A` 的概率”。                            |
| `P(A\mid B)=\frac{P(A\cap B)}{P(B)}`                                | conditional probability formula, formule de probabilité conditionnelle, 条件概率公式            | A formula defining conditional probability when `P(B)>0`.                                     | EN: If `P(A\cap B)=0.2` and `P(B)=0.5`, then `P(A\mid B)=0.4`.<br>FR: Si `P(A\cap B)=0,2` et `P(B)=0,5`, alors `P(A\mid B)=0,4`.<br>中：若 `P(A\cap B)=0.2` 且 `P(B)=0.5`，则 `P(A\mid B)=0.4`。 |
| `P(A\cap B)=P(A\mid B)P(B)`                                         | multiplication rule, formule de multiplication, 乘法公式                                      | A rule for the probability that both `A` and `B` occur.                                       | EN: First compute `P(B)`, then multiply by `P(A\mid B)`.<br>FR: On calcule d’abord `P(B)`, puis on multiplie par `P(A\mid B)`.<br>中：先计算 `P(B)`，再乘以 `P(A\mid B)`。                          |
| `P(A\cap B)=P(A)P(B)`                                               | independence rule, règle d’indépendance, 独立事件乘法公式                                         | If `A` and `B` are independent, the probability of both equals the product of probabilities.  | EN: Two fair coin flips are independent.<br>FR: Deux lancers de pièce équilibrée sont indépendants.<br>中：两次公平抛硬币是独立的。                                                                     |
| `P(A)=\sum_i P(A\mid B_i)P(B_i)`                                    | law of total probability, formule des probabilités totales, 全概率公式                         | A formula computing `P(A)` by partitioning the sample space into cases `B_i`.                 | EN: Total probability adds probabilities over mutually exclusive cases.<br>FR: La formule des probabilités totales additionne les cas incompatibles.<br>中：全概率公式把事件按互斥情形分解后相加。             |
| `P(B_i\mid A)=\frac{P(A\mid B_i)P(B_i)}{\sum_j P(A\mid B_j)P(B_j)}` | Bayes’ theorem, théorème de Bayes, 贝叶斯公式                                                  | A formula for updating probabilities after observing evidence.                                | EN: Bayes’ theorem converts likelihoods into posterior probabilities.<br>FR: Le théorème de Bayes transforme des vraisemblances en probabilités a posteriori.<br>中：贝叶斯公式把似然转化为后验概率。       |

## 12.3 Independence, dependence, and conditional structure

| Symbol (LaTeX)        | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                         | Definition                                                                                                               | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `A\perp B`            | independent events, événements indépendants, 独立事件                         | Events where occurrence of one does not change the probability of the other.                                             | EN: If `A` and `B` are independent, then `P(A\mid B)=P(A)`.<br>FR: Si `A` et `B` sont indépendants, alors `P(A\mid B)=P(A)`.<br>中：若 `A` 与 `B` 独立，则 `P(A\mid B)=P(A)`。                                             |
| `P(A\mid B)\neq P(A)` | dependent events, événements dépendants, 相依事件                             | Events where occurrence of one changes the probability of the other.                                                     | EN: Drawing cards without replacement creates dependent events.<br>FR: Tirer des cartes sans remise crée des événements dépendants.<br>中：不放回抽牌会产生相依事件。                                                            |
| `A\perp B\mid C`      | conditional independence, indépendance conditionnelle, 条件独立               | Events `A` and `B` are independent once event or information `C` is known.                                               | EN: `A\perp B\mid C` does not necessarily imply `A\perp B`.<br>FR: `A\perp B\mid C` n’implique pas nécessairement `A\perp B`.<br>中：`A\perp B\mid C` 不必然推出 `A\perp B`。                                             |
| —                     | mutually independent events, événements mutuellement indépendants, 相互独立事件 | A collection of events where every finite intersection probability factors into the product of individual probabilities. | EN: Three coin flips are mutually independent.<br>FR: Trois lancers de pièce sont mutuellement indépendants.<br>中：三次抛硬币是相互独立的。                                                                                    |
| —                     | pairwise independent events, événements deux à deux indépendants, 两两独立事件  | Events where each pair is independent, which may not imply mutual independence.                                          | EN: Pairwise independence is weaker than mutual independence.<br>FR: L’indépendance deux à deux est plus faible que l’indépendance mutuelle.<br>中：两两独立弱于相互独立。                                                     |
| `B_1,\ldots,B_n`      | partition, partition, 划分                                                  | A collection of disjoint events whose union is the whole sample space.                                                   | EN: Outcomes of a die roll form a partition of the sample space.<br>FR: Les issues d’un lancer de dé forment une partition de l’univers.<br>中：骰子的各个点数结果构成样本空间的划分。                                                 |
| `P(A\cap B)=0`        | mutually exclusive, incompatibles, 互斥                                     | Events that cannot happen simultaneously.                                                                                | EN: “Rolling `1`” and “rolling `2`” are mutually exclusive.<br>FR: “Obtenir `1`” et “obtenir `2`” sont incompatibles.<br>中：“掷出 `1`”和“掷出 `2`”互斥。                                                                   |
| —                     | independent is not disjoint, indépendant n’est pas disjoint, 独立不等于互斥      | Except in trivial cases, independent events with positive probabilities are not disjoint.                                | EN: If two positive-probability events are disjoint, they cannot be independent.<br>FR: Si deux événements de probabilité positive sont disjoints, ils ne peuvent pas être indépendants.<br>中：若两个正概率事件互斥，则它们不能独立。 |
| `P(A\mid B)>P(A)`     | positive association, association positive, 正相关联                          | Event `B` increases the conditional probability of event `A`.                                                            | EN: If `P(A\mid B)>P(A)`, observing `B` makes `A` more likely.<br>FR: Si `P(A\mid B)>P(A)`, observer `B` rend `A` plus probable.<br>中：若 `P(A\mid B)>P(A)`，观察到 `B` 会使 `A` 更可能发生。                                   |
| `P(A\mid B)<P(A)`     | negative association, association négative, 负相关联                          | Event `B` decreases the conditional probability of event `A`.                                                            | EN: If `P(A\mid B)<P(A)`, observing `B` makes `A` less likely.<br>FR: Si `P(A\mid B)<P(A)`, observer `B` rend `A` moins probable.<br>中：若 `P(A\mid B)<P(A)`，观察到 `B` 会使 `A` 更不可能发生。                                 |

## 12.4 Random variables and distributions

| Symbol (LaTeX)           | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                           | Definition                                                                                     | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| ------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `X`                      | random variable, variable aléatoire, 随机变量                                                   | A function assigning numerical values to outcomes in a sample space.                           | EN: Let `X` be the number shown on a die.<br>FR: Soit `X` le nombre obtenu sur un dé.<br>中：令 `X` 为骰子掷出的点数。                                                                                 |
| `X(\omega)`              | value of a random variable, valeur d’une variable aléatoire, 随机变量取值                         | The numerical value assigned to outcome `\omega`.                                              | EN: If outcome `\omega` is rolling `5`, then `X(\omega)=5`.<br>FR: Si l’issue `\omega` est obtenir `5`, alors `X(\omega)=5`.<br>中：若样本点 `\omega` 是掷出 `5`，则 `X(\omega)=5`。                   |
| —                        | discrete random variable, variable aléatoire discrète, 离散随机变量                               | A random variable taking countably many possible values.                                       | EN: A die roll is a discrete random variable.<br>FR: Un lancer de dé est une variable aléatoire discrète.<br>中：骰子点数是离散随机变量。                                                                |
| —                        | continuous random variable, variable aléatoire continue, 连续随机变量                             | A random variable taking values over intervals, described by density rather than point masses. | EN: Measurement error is often modeled as continuous.<br>FR: L’erreur de mesure est souvent modélisée comme continue.<br>中：测量误差常被建模为连续随机变量。                                                |
| `p_X(x)=P(X=x)`          | probability mass function, fonction de masse, 概率质量函数                                        | A function giving probabilities of values of a discrete random variable.                       | EN: For a fair die, `p_X(k)=1/6` for `k=1,\ldots,6`.<br>FR: Pour un dé équilibré, `p_X(k)=1/6` pour `k=1,\ldots,6`.<br>中：对公平骰子，`k=1,\ldots,6` 时 `p_X(k)=1/6`。                              |
| `f_X(x)`                 | probability density function, densité de probabilité, 概率密度函数                                | A function whose integral over an interval gives probability for a continuous random variable. | EN: For continuous `X`, `P(a\leq X\leq b)=\int_a^b f_X(x)\,dx`.<br>FR: Pour `X` continue, `P(a\leq X\leq b)=\int_a^b f_X(x)\,dx`.<br>中：对连续随机变量 `X`，`P(a\leq X\leq b)=\int_a^b f_X(x)\,dx`。 |
| `F_X(x)=P(X\leq x)`      | cumulative distribution function, fonction de répartition, 累积分布函数                           | A function giving the probability that `X` is at most `x`.                                     | EN: `F_X(x)` is nondecreasing.<br>FR: `F_X(x)` est croissante au sens large.<br>中：`F_X(x)` 是非递减函数。                                                                                         |
| `X\sim D`                | distributed as, suit la loi, 服从分布                                                           | A notation stating that random variable `X` has distribution `D`.                              | EN: `X\sim N(0,1)` means `X` follows a standard normal distribution.<br>FR: `X\sim N(0,1)` signifie que `X` suit une loi normale standard.<br>中：`X\sim N(0,1)` 表示 `X` 服从标准正态分布。            |
| `\operatorname{supp}(X)` | support, support, 支撑集                                                                       | The set of values where a random variable has positive probability or positive density.        | EN: A die-roll variable has support `\{1,2,3,4,5,6\}`.<br>FR: Une variable de lancer de dé a pour support `\{1,2,3,4,5,6\}`.<br>中：骰子点数变量的支撑集是 `\{1,2,3,4,5,6\}`。                           |
| `P(X\in A)`              | event defined by a random variable, événement défini par une variable aléatoire, 由随机变量定义的事件 | The probability that the random variable takes a value in a set `A`.                           | EN: `P(X\in\{2,4,6\})` is the probability of an even die roll.<br>FR: `P(X\in\{2,4,6\})` est la probabilité d’obtenir un nombre pair.<br>中：`P(X\in\{2,4,6\})` 是掷出偶数的概率。                    |
| `X_1,\ldots,X_n`         | random sample, échantillon aléatoire, 随机样本                                                  | A collection of random variables, often assumed independent and identically distributed.       | EN: `X_1,\ldots,X_n` may represent `n` independent measurements.<br>FR: `X_1,\ldots,X_n` peut représenter `n` mesures indépendantes.<br>中：`X_1,\ldots,X_n` 可表示 `n` 次独立测量。                  |

## 12.5 Expectation, variance, and moments

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                            | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                           | Definition                                                                                     | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| --------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\mathbb{E}[X]`                                           | expectation, espérance, 期望                                                  | The long-run average or probability-weighted mean of a random variable.                        | EN: For a fair die, `\mathbb{E}[X]=3.5`.<br>FR: Pour un dé équilibré, `\mathbb{E}[X]=3,5`.<br>中：公平骰子的点数期望是 `3.5`。                                                                                                 |
| `\sum_x x p_X(x)`                                         | expectation of a discrete variable, espérance discrète, 离散期望                | The weighted sum of possible values using their probabilities.                                 | EN: If `P(X=0)=P(X=1)=1/2`, then `\mathbb{E}[X]=1/2`.<br>FR: Si `P(X=0)=P(X=1)=1/2`, alors `\mathbb{E}[X]=1/2`.<br>中：若 `P(X=0)=P(X=1)=1/2`，则 `\mathbb{E}[X]=1/2`。                                                 |
| `\int_{-\infty}^{\infty}x f_X(x)\,dx`                     | expectation of a continuous variable, espérance continue, 连续期望              | The integral formula for the expectation of a continuous random variable.                      | EN: Continuous expectation is computed by integrating `x f_X(x)`.<br>FR: L’espérance continue se calcule en intégrant `x f_X(x)`.<br>中：连续型期望通过积分 `x f_X(x)` 计算。                                                   |
| `\operatorname{Var}(X)`                                   | variance, variance, 方差                                                      | The expected squared deviation from the mean.                                                  | EN: Variance measures spread around the mean.<br>FR: La variance mesure la dispersion autour de la moyenne.<br>中：方差度量随机变量围绕均值的离散程度。                                                                               |
| `\operatorname{Var}(X)=\mathbb{E}[(X-\mu)^2]`             | variance formula, formule de la variance, 方差公式                              | The definition of variance using the mean `\mu=\mathbb{E}[X]`.                                 | EN: If values are far from the mean, variance is large.<br>FR: Si les valeurs sont loin de la moyenne, la variance est grande.<br>中：若取值远离均值，方差较大。                                                                 |
| `\operatorname{Var}(X)=\mathbb{E}[X^2]-(\mathbb{E}[X])^2` | computational variance formula, formule de calcul de la variance, 方差计算公式    | An equivalent formula often easier for computation.                                            | EN: Compute variance by finding `\mathbb{E}[X^2]` and `\mathbb{E}[X]`.<br>FR: Calculer la variance avec `\mathbb{E}[X^2]` et `\mathbb{E}[X]`.<br>中：可通过 `\mathbb{E}[X^2]` 和 `\mathbb{E}[X]` 计算方差。                  |
| `\sigma=\sqrt{\operatorname{Var}(X)}`                     | standard deviation, écart type, 标准差                                         | The square root of variance, measured in the same units as the variable.                       | EN: Standard deviation has the same unit as `X`.<br>FR: L’écart type a la même unité que `X`.<br>中：标准差与随机变量 `X` 使用相同单位。                                                                                           |
| `\mathbb{E}[aX+b]=a\mathbb{E}[X]+b`                       | linearity of expectation, linéarité de l’espérance, 期望线性性                   | Expectation is linear under scaling and addition.                                              | EN: If `Y=2X+3`, then `\mathbb{E}[Y]=2\mathbb{E}[X]+3`.<br>FR: Si `Y=2X+3`, alors `\mathbb{E}[Y]=2\mathbb{E}[X]+3`.<br>中：若 `Y=2X+3`，则 `\mathbb{E}[Y]=2\mathbb{E}[X]+3`。                                           |
| `\operatorname{Var}(aX+b)=a^2\operatorname{Var}(X)`       | variance scaling rule, règle de changement d’échelle de la variance, 方差缩放规则 | Adding a constant does not change variance, while scaling by `a` multiplies variance by `a^2`. | EN: If `Y=3X+5`, then `\operatorname{Var}(Y)=9\operatorname{Var}(X)`.<br>FR: Si `Y=3X+5`, alors `\operatorname{Var}(Y)=9\operatorname{Var}(X)`.<br>中：若 `Y=3X+5`，则 `\operatorname{Var}(Y)=9\operatorname{Var}(X)`。 |
| `\mathbb{E}[X^k]`                                         | raw moment, moment brut, 原点矩                                                | The expectation of a power of a random variable.                                               | EN: `\mathbb{E}[X^2]` is the second raw moment.<br>FR: `\mathbb{E}[X^2]` est le moment brut d’ordre deux.<br>中：`\mathbb{E}[X^2]` 是二阶原点矩。                                                                          |
| `\mathbb{E}[(X-\mu)^k]`                                   | central moment, moment centré, 中心矩                                          | The expectation of a power of deviation from the mean.                                         | EN: Variance is the second central moment.<br>FR: La variance est le moment centré d’ordre deux.<br>中：方差是二阶中心矩。                                                                                                   |
| `\mathbb{E}[g(X)]`                                        | expected value of a function, espérance d’une fonction, 函数的期望               | The expectation of a transformed random variable.                                              | EN: If `g(X)=X^2`, then `\mathbb{E}[g(X)]=\mathbb{E}[X^2]`.<br>FR: Si `g(X)=X^2`, alors `\mathbb{E}[g(X)]=\mathbb{E}[X^2]`.<br>中：若 `g(X)=X^2`，则 `\mathbb{E}[g(X)]=\mathbb{E}[X^2]`。                               |

## 12.6 Common discrete distributions

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                       | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                            | Definition                                                                                   | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ---------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `X\sim \operatorname{Bernoulli}(p)`                  | Bernoulli distribution, loi de Bernoulli, 伯努利分布              | A distribution for a single trial with success probability `p`.                              | EN: A coin flip coded as `1` for heads and `0` for tails is Bernoulli.<br>FR: Un lancer de pièce codé `1` pour pile et `0` pour face suit une loi de Bernoulli.<br>中：把抛硬币正面记为 `1`、反面记为 `0`，得到伯努利变量。                                                 |
| `P(X=1)=p,\ P(X=0)=1-p`                              | Bernoulli probability mass, masse de Bernoulli, 伯努利概率质量      | The probability mass function of a Bernoulli random variable.                                | EN: If `p=0.7`, then `P(X=1)=0.7`.<br>FR: Si `p=0,7`, alors `P(X=1)=0,7`.<br>中：若 `p=0.7`，则 `P(X=1)=0.7`。                                                                                                                                            |
| `X\sim \operatorname{Binomial}(n,p)`                 | binomial distribution, loi binomiale, 二项分布                   | The distribution of the number of successes in `n` independent Bernoulli trials.             | EN: The number of heads in `10` fair coin flips is binomial.<br>FR: Le nombre de piles en `10` lancers de pièce équilibrée suit une loi binomiale.<br>中：公平硬币抛 `10` 次出现正面的次数服从二项分布。                                                                  |
| `P(X=k)=\binom{n}{k}p^k(1-p)^{n-k}`                  | binomial probability mass, masse binomiale, 二项分布概率公式         | The probability of exactly `k` successes in `n` independent trials.                          | EN: For `X\sim\operatorname{Binomial}(10,0.5)`, `P(X=5)=\binom{10}{5}0.5^{10}`.<br>FR: Pour `X\sim\operatorname{Binomial}(10,0,5)`, `P(X=5)=\binom{10}{5}0,5^{10}`.<br>中：若 `X\sim\operatorname{Binomial}(10,0.5)`，则 `P(X=5)=\binom{10}{5}0.5^{10}`。 |
| `X\sim \operatorname{Geometric}(p)`                  | geometric distribution, loi géométrique, 几何分布                | The distribution of the number of trials until the first success, under a common convention. | EN: Waiting for the first heads can be modeled by a geometric distribution.<br>FR: L’attente du premier pile peut être modélisée par une loi géométrique.<br>中：等待第一次出现正面可用几何分布建模。                                                                   |
| `P(X=k)=(1-p)^{k-1}p`                                | geometric probability mass, masse géométrique, 几何分布概率公式      | The probability that the first success occurs on trial `k`.                                  | EN: If `p=0.5`, then `P(X=3)=0.25\cdot0.5=0.125`.<br>FR: Si `p=0,5`, alors `P(X=3)=0,25\cdot0,5=0,125`.<br>中：若 `p=0.5`，则 `P(X=3)=0.25\cdot0.5=0.125`。                                                                                               |
| `X\sim \operatorname{Poisson}(\lambda)`              | Poisson distribution, loi de Poisson, 泊松分布                   | A distribution often used for counts of rare events in a fixed interval.                     | EN: The number of calls per minute can be modeled by a Poisson distribution.<br>FR: Le nombre d’appels par minute peut être modélisé par une loi de Poisson.<br>中：每分钟来电数可用泊松分布建模。                                                                   |
| `P(X=k)=e^{-\lambda}\frac{\lambda^k}{k!}`            | Poisson probability mass, masse de Poisson, 泊松分布概率公式         | The probability of observing `k` events when the mean count is `\lambda`.                    | EN: If `\lambda=2`, then `P(X=0)=e^{-2}`.<br>FR: Si `\lambda=2`, alors `P(X=0)=e^{-2}`.<br>中：若 `\lambda=2`，则 `P(X=0)=e^{-2}`。                                                                                                                       |
| `X\sim \operatorname{Hypergeometric}(N,K,n)`         | hypergeometric distribution, loi hypergéométrique, 超几何分布     | The distribution of successes in sampling without replacement from a finite population.      | EN: Drawing cards without replacement uses a hypergeometric model.<br>FR: Tirer des cartes sans remise utilise un modèle hypergéométrique.<br>中：不放回抽牌可用超几何分布建模。                                                                                     |
| `X\sim \operatorname{DiscreteUniform}\{1,\ldots,n\}` | discrete uniform distribution, loi uniforme discrète, 离散均匀分布 | A distribution assigning equal probability to finitely many values.                          | EN: A fair die follows a discrete uniform distribution on `\{1,\ldots,6\}`.<br>FR: Un dé équilibré suit une loi uniforme discrète sur `\{1,\ldots,6\}`.<br>中：公平骰子服从 `\{1,\ldots,6\}` 上的离散均匀分布。                                                      |
| —                                                    | memoryless property, propriété sans mémoire, 无记忆性            | A property where the future waiting time distribution does not depend on the past.           | EN: The geometric distribution is memoryless.<br>FR: La loi géométrique est sans mémoire.<br>中：几何分布具有无记忆性。                                                                                                                                          |

## 12.7 Common continuous distributions

| Symbol (LaTeX)                              | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                       | Definition                                                                                           | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| ------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `X\sim \operatorname{Uniform}(a,b)`         | continuous uniform distribution, loi uniforme continue, 连续均匀分布          | A distribution with constant density on an interval `[a,b]`.                                         | EN: A random point chosen uniformly from `[0,1]` has uniform distribution.<br>FR: Un point choisi uniformément dans `[0,1]` suit une loi uniforme.<br>中：从 `[0,1]` 中均匀随机选点服从连续均匀分布。                                                   |
| `f(x)=\frac{1}{b-a}`                        | uniform density, densité uniforme, 均匀分布密度                               | The density of `\operatorname{Uniform}(a,b)` on `[a,b]`.                                             | EN: For `\operatorname{Uniform}(0,1)`, the density is `1`.<br>FR: Pour `\operatorname{Uniform}(0,1)`, la densité vaut `1`.<br>中：对 `\operatorname{Uniform}(0,1)`，密度为 `1`。                                                             |
| `X\sim N(\mu,\sigma^2)`                     | normal distribution, loi normale, 正态分布                                  | A bell-shaped distribution determined by mean `\mu` and variance `\sigma^2`.                         | EN: Measurement errors are often modeled as normal.<br>FR: Les erreurs de mesure sont souvent modélisées par une loi normale.<br>中：测量误差常用正态分布建模。                                                                                     |
| `X\sim N(0,1)`                              | standard normal distribution, loi normale standard, 标准正态分布              | A normal distribution with mean `0` and variance `1`.                                                | EN: A standardized variable often follows `N(0,1)` approximately.<br>FR: Une variable standardisée suit souvent approximativement `N(0,1)`.<br>中：标准化变量常近似服从 `N(0,1)`。                                                                |
| `\phi(x)=\frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi}}e^{-x^2/2}`   | standard normal density, densité normale standard, 标准正态密度               | The density function of the standard normal distribution.                                            | EN: The curve of `\phi(x)` is symmetric about zero.<br>FR: La courbe de `\phi(x)` est symétrique par rapport à zéro.<br>中：`\phi(x)` 的曲线关于零对称。                                                                                        |
| `\Phi(x)`                                   | standard normal CDF, fonction de répartition normale standard, 标准正态分布函数 | The cumulative distribution function of `N(0,1)`.                                                    | EN: `\Phi(0)=0.5`.<br>FR: `\Phi(0)=0,5`.<br>中：`\Phi(0)=0.5`。                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `X\sim \operatorname{Exponential}(\lambda)` | exponential distribution, loi exponentielle, 指数分布                       | A distribution often used for waiting times between events in a Poisson process.                     | EN: Waiting time until the next call can be modeled exponentially.<br>FR: Le temps d’attente jusqu’au prochain appel peut être modélisé par une loi exponentielle.<br>中：等待下一次来电的时间可用指数分布建模。                                          |
| `f(x)=\lambda e^{-\lambda x}`               | exponential density, densité exponentielle, 指数分布密度                      | The density of an exponential random variable for `x\geq 0`.                                         | EN: For an exponential distribution, larger `\lambda` means shorter average waiting time.<br>FR: Pour une loi exponentielle, un plus grand `\lambda` signifie un temps d’attente moyen plus court.<br>中：对指数分布，`\lambda` 越大，平均等待时间越短。 |
| `X\sim \Gamma(\alpha,\beta)`                | gamma distribution, loi gamma, Gamma 分布                                 | A flexible continuous distribution often used for waiting times and positive quantities.             | EN: The gamma distribution generalizes the exponential distribution.<br>FR: La loi gamma généralise la loi exponentielle.<br>中：Gamma 分布推广了指数分布。                                                                                      |
| `X\sim \chi^2_k`                            | chi-square distribution, loi du khi-deux, 卡方分布                          | A distribution arising as the sum of squares of `k` independent standard normal variables.           | EN: Chi-square distributions appear in variance inference.<br>FR: Les lois du khi-deux apparaissent dans l’inférence sur la variance.<br>中：卡方分布常出现在方差推断中。                                                                            |
| `T\sim t_\nu`                               | Student’s t distribution, loi de Student, t 分布                          | A distribution used in inference when variance is estimated from data.                               | EN: The `t` distribution is used for small-sample mean inference.<br>FR: La loi de Student est utilisée pour l’inférence sur la moyenne en petit échantillon.<br>中：小样本均值推断常使用 `t` 分布。                                                |
| `F\sim F_{d_1,d_2}`                         | F distribution, loi de Fisher, F 分布                                     | A distribution of ratios of scaled chi-square variables, used in variance comparison and regression. | EN: The `F` distribution appears in ANOVA.<br>FR: La loi de Fisher apparaît dans l’ANOVA.<br>中：F 分布出现在方差分析中。                                                                                                                         |

## 12.8 Joint distributions, covariance, and correlation

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                           | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                        | Definition                                                                                     | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| -------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `(X,Y)`                                                  | random vector, vecteur aléatoire, 随机向量                                   | A vector whose components are random variables.                                                | EN: `(X,Y)` can represent height and weight of a randomly chosen person.<br>FR: `(X,Y)` peut représenter la taille et le poids d’une personne choisie au hasard.<br>中：`(X,Y)` 可表示随机选取个体的身高和体重。                                     |
| `p_{X,Y}(x,y)`                                           | joint probability mass function, fonction de masse conjointe, 联合概率质量函数   | A function giving probabilities for pairs of values of discrete random variables.              | EN: `p_{X,Y}(x,y)=P(X=x,Y=y)`.<br>FR: `p_{X,Y}(x,y)=P(X=x,Y=y)`.<br>中：`p_{X,Y}(x,y)=P(X=x,Y=y)`。                                                                                                                                   |
| `f_{X,Y}(x,y)`                                           | joint density, densité conjointe, 联合密度                                   | A density function for a continuous random vector.                                             | EN: Integrating `f_{X,Y}` over a region gives probability.<br>FR: Intégrer `f_{X,Y}` sur une région donne une probabilité.<br>中：对 `f_{X,Y}` 在某区域上积分得到概率。                                                                           |
| `p_X(x)=\sum_y p_{X,Y}(x,y)`                             | marginal distribution, loi marginale, 边缘分布                               | The distribution of one variable obtained by summing or integrating out the other variable.    | EN: Marginalizing removes the variable not being studied.<br>FR: Marginaliser élimine la variable qui n’est pas étudiée.<br>中：边缘化会消去暂不研究的变量。                                                                                       |
| `f_X(x)=\int f_{X,Y}(x,y)\,dy`                           | marginal density, densité marginale, 边缘密度                                | The density of one variable obtained by integrating the joint density over the other variable. | EN: `f_X(x)` is obtained by integrating over `y`.<br>FR: `f_X(x)` s’obtient en intégrant selon `y`.<br>中：`f_X(x)` 通过对 `y` 积分得到。                                                                                                    |
| `P(X=x\mid Y=y)`                                         | conditional distribution, loi conditionnelle, 条件分布                       | The distribution of one random variable given the value of another.                            | EN: Conditional distributions describe how `X` behaves when `Y` is known.<br>FR: Les lois conditionnelles décrivent le comportement de `X` lorsque `Y` est connu.<br>中：条件分布描述在已知 `Y` 时 `X` 的分布。                                    |
| `X\perp Y`                                               | independent random variables, variables aléatoires indépendantes, 独立随机变量 | Random variables whose joint distribution factors into the product of marginals.               | EN: If `X` and `Y` are independent, then `P(X\in A,Y\in B)=P(X\in A)P(Y\in B)`.<br>FR: Si `X` et `Y` sont indépendantes, alors `P(X\in A,Y\in B)=P(X\in A)P(Y\in B)`.<br>中：若 `X` 与 `Y` 独立，则 `P(X\in A,Y\in B)=P(X\in A)P(Y\in B)`。 |
| `\operatorname{Cov}(X,Y)`                                | covariance, covariance, 协方差                                              | A measure of joint variation between two random variables.                                     | EN: Positive covariance means the variables tend to move together.<br>FR: Une covariance positive signifie que les variables tendent à varier ensemble.<br>中：正协方差表示两个变量倾向于同向变化。                                                    |
| `\operatorname{Cov}(X,Y)=\mathbb{E}[(X-\mu_X)(Y-\mu_Y)]` | covariance formula, formule de covariance, 协方差公式                         | The definition of covariance using deviations from the means.                                  | EN: Covariance depends on the units of `X` and `Y`.<br>FR: La covariance dépend des unités de `X` et de `Y`.<br>中：协方差依赖于 `X` 和 `Y` 的单位。                                                                                            |
| `\rho_{X,Y}`                                             | correlation coefficient, coefficient de corrélation, 相关系数                | A standardized measure of linear association between two variables.                            | EN: Correlation lies between `-1` and `1`.<br>FR: La corrélation est comprise entre `-1` et `1`.<br>中：相关系数介于 `-1` 和 `1` 之间。                                                                                                        |
