| ---------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\sigma`-algebra                               | sigma-algebra, tribu / sigma-algèbre, σ-代数                             | A collection of subsets closed under complements and countable unions.                                       | EN: Borel sets form a sigma-algebra.<br>FR: Les boréliens forment une tribu.<br>中：Borel 集构成一个 σ-代数。                                                                                         |
| `\mathcal{B}(X)`                               | Borel sigma-algebra, tribu borélienne, Borel σ-代数                      | The sigma-algebra generated by the open sets of a topological space.                                         | EN: `\mathcal{B}(\mathbb{R})` contains all open intervals.<br>FR: `\mathcal{B}(\mathbb{R})` contient tous les intervalles ouverts.<br>中：`\mathcal{B}(\mathbb{R})` 包含所有开区间。                  |
| `(X,\mathcal{A})`                              | measurable space, espace mesurable, 可测空间                               | A set together with a sigma-algebra of measurable subsets.                                                   | EN: `(\mathbb{R},\mathcal{B}(\mathbb{R}))` is a measurable space.<br>FR: `(\mathbb{R},\mathcal{B}(\mathbb{R}))` est un espace mesurable.<br>中：`(\mathbb{R},\mathcal{B}(\mathbb{R}))` 是可测空间。 |
| `\mu`                                          | measure, mesure, 测度                                                    | A function assigning nonnegative sizes to measurable sets, countably additive.                               | EN: Length on intervals is a measure.<br>FR: La longueur sur les intervalles est une mesure.<br>中：区间长度是一种测度。                                                                                |
| `\mu(\varnothing)=0`                           | measure of empty set, mesure de l’ensemble vide, 空集测度                  | The empty set has measure zero.                                                                              | EN: Any measure assigns `0` to the empty set.<br>FR: Toute mesure attribue `0` à l’ensemble vide.<br>中：任何测度都把空集测为 `0`。                                                                      |
| `\mu\left(\bigcup_n A_n\right)=\sum_n\mu(A_n)` | countable additivity, additivité dénombrable, 可数可加性                    | The measure of a countable disjoint union equals the sum of the measures.                                    | EN: Disjoint interval lengths add.<br>FR: Les longueurs d’intervalles disjoints s’additionnent.<br>中：互不相交的区间长度可以相加。                                                                         |
| —                                              | measure zero set, ensemble de mesure nulle, 零测集                        | A set whose measure is zero.                                                                                 | EN: A single point has Lebesgue measure zero in `\mathbb{R}`.<br>FR: Un singleton a une mesure de Lebesgue nulle dans `\mathbb{R}`.<br>中：单点集在 `\mathbb{R}` 中的 Lebesgue 测度为零。                |
| —                                              | almost everywhere, presque partout, 几乎处处                               | A property holds almost everywhere if it fails only on a measure zero set.                                   | EN: Two functions equal almost everywhere may differ on isolated points.<br>FR: Deux fonctions égales presque partout peuvent différer en des points isolés.<br>中：两个几乎处处相等的函数可以在孤立点上不同。     |
| `f` measurable                                 | measurable function, fonction mesurable, 可测函数                          | A function whose preimages of suitable measurable sets are measurable.                                       | EN: Continuous real-valued functions are Borel measurable.<br>FR: Les fonctions réelles continues sont boréliennes mesurables.<br>中：实值连续函数是 Borel 可测的。                                      |
| `\int f\,d\mu`                                 | Lebesgue integral, intégrale de Lebesgue, Lebesgue 积分                  | An integral defined using measure, extending the Riemann integral in important ways.                         | EN: Lebesgue integration handles limits of functions effectively.<br>FR: L’intégration de Lebesgue traite efficacement les limites de fonctions.<br>中：Lebesgue 积分能有效处理函数列极限。                |
| `L^p(X,\mu)`                                   | Lp space, espace Lp, Lp 空间                                             | A function space of measurable functions whose `p`th power is integrable, modulo almost-everywhere equality. | EN: `L^2` is a Hilbert space under its standard inner product.<br>FR: `L^2` est un espace de Hilbert avec son produit intérieur standard.<br>中：`L^2` 在标准内积下是 Hilbert 空间。                    |
| —                                              | dominated convergence theorem, théorème de convergence dominée, 控制收敛定理 | A theorem allowing limit and integral to be interchanged under domination by an integrable function.         | EN: Dominated convergence is a core tool in modern analysis.<br>FR: La convergence dominée est un outil central de l’analyse moderne.<br>中：控制收敛定理是现代分析中的核心工具。                               |
# 16. Complex Analysis, Analytic Functions, and Contour Integration

## 16.1 Complex numbers and the complex plane

| Symbol (LaTeX)                | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                        | Definition                                                                                         | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| ----------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `\mathbb{C}`                  | complex numbers, nombres complexes, 复数                   | The number system consisting of numbers of the form `a+bi`, where `a,b\in\mathbb{R}` and `i^2=-1`. | EN: `3+2i` is a complex number.<br>FR: `3+2i` est un nombre complexe.<br>中：`3+2i` 是一个复数。                                                                                                   |
| `z=a+bi`                      | standard form, forme algébrique, 代数形式                    | The usual representation of a complex number by its real and imaginary parts.                      | EN: In `z=4-7i`, the real part is `4` and the imaginary part is `-7`.<br>FR: Dans `z=4-7i`, la partie réelle est `4` et la partie imaginaire est `-7`.<br>中：在 `z=4-7i` 中，实部是 `4`，虚部是 `-7`。 |
| `i`                           | imaginary unit, unité imaginaire, 虚数单位                   | The number satisfying `i^2=-1`.                                                                    | EN: `i^4=1`.<br>FR: `i^4=1`.<br>中：`i^4=1`。                                                                                                                                                 |
| `\operatorname{Re}z`          | real part, partie réelle, 实部                             | The real component of a complex number.                                                            | EN: If `z=5+3i`, then `\operatorname{Re}z=5`.<br>FR: Si `z=5+3i`, alors `\operatorname{Re}z=5`.<br>中：若 `z=5+3i`，则 `\operatorname{Re}z=5`。                                                  |
| `\operatorname{Im}z`          | imaginary part, partie imaginaire, 虚部                    | The real coefficient of `i` in a complex number.                                                   | EN: If `z=5+3i`, then `\operatorname{Im}z=3`.<br>FR: Si `z=5+3i`, alors `\operatorname{Im}z=3`.<br>中：若 `z=5+3i`，则 `\operatorname{Im}z=3`。                                                  |
| `\bar{z}`                     | complex conjugate, conjugué complexe, 共轭复数               | The complex number obtained by changing the sign of the imaginary part.                            | EN: If `z=2-5i`, then `\bar{z}=2+5i`.<br>FR: Si `z=2-5i`, alors `\bar{z}=2+5i`.<br>中：若 `z=2-5i`，则 `\bar{z}=2+5i`。                                                                          |
| `z\bar{z}`                    | product with conjugate, produit avec le conjugué, 与共轭的乘积 | The product of a complex number and its conjugate, equal to the square of its modulus.             | EN: If `z=3+4i`, then `z\bar{z}=25`.<br>FR: Si `z=3+4i`, alors `z\bar{z}=25`.<br>中：若 `z=3+4i`，则 `z\bar{z}=25`。                                                                             |
| `\lvert z\rvert`              | modulus, module, 模                                       | The distance of a complex number from the origin in the complex plane.                             | EN: `\lvert 3+4i\rvert=5`.<br>FR: `\lvert 3+4i\rvert=5`.<br>中：`\lvert 3+4i\rvert=5`。                                                                                                       |
| `\lvert z-w\rvert`            | complex distance, distance complexe, 复平面距离               | The Euclidean distance between two complex numbers viewed as points.                               | EN: The distance between `1+i` and `4+5i` is `5`.<br>FR: La distance entre `1+i` et `4+5i` vaut `5`.<br>中：`1+i` 与 `4+5i` 之间的距离是 `5`。                                                       |
| `\mathbb{C}\cong\mathbb{R}^2` | complex plane, plan complexe, 复平面                        | The geometric representation of complex numbers as points in the plane.                            | EN: The number `a+bi` corresponds to the point `(a,b)`.<br>FR: Le nombre `a+bi` correspond au point `(a,b)`.<br>中：复数 `a+bi` 对应平面点 `(a,b)`。                                                 |
| —                             | real axis, axe réel, 实轴                                  | The horizontal axis of the complex plane, consisting of complex numbers with zero imaginary part.  | EN: `5` lies on the real axis.<br>FR: `5` appartient à l’axe réel.<br>中：`5` 位于实轴上。                                                                                                         |
| —                             | imaginary axis, axe imaginaire, 虚轴                       | The vertical axis of the complex plane, consisting of complex numbers with zero real part.         | EN: `3i` lies on the imaginary axis.<br>FR: `3i` appartient à l’axe imaginaire.<br>中：`3i` 位于虚轴上。                                                                                           |

## 16.2 Polar form, exponential form, and roots

| Symbol (LaTeX)                       | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                           | Definition                                                                                            | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| ------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `z=r(\cos\theta+i\sin\theta)`        | polar form, forme polaire, 三角形式 / 极形式                       | A representation of a nonzero complex number using modulus `r` and argument `\theta`.                 | EN: `1+i=\sqrt{2}(\cos\frac{\pi}{4}+i\sin\frac{\pi}{4})`.<br>FR: `1+i=\sqrt{2}(\cos\frac{\pi}{4}+i\sin\frac{\pi}{4})`.<br>中：`1+i=\sqrt{2}(\cos\frac{\pi}{4}+i\sin\frac{\pi}{4})`。                            |
| `r=\lvert z\rvert`                   | modulus in polar form, module en forme polaire, 极形式中的模      | The radial distance of `z` from the origin.                                                           | EN: If `z=-3+4i`, then `r=5`.<br>FR: Si `z=-3+4i`, alors `r=5`.<br>中：若 `z=-3+4i`，则 `r=5`。                                                                                                                    |
| `\arg z`                             | argument, argument, 辐角                                      | An angle that a nonzero complex number makes with the positive real axis.                             | EN: One argument of `i` is `\frac{\pi}{2}`.<br>FR: Un argument de `i` est `\frac{\pi}{2}`.<br>中：`i` 的一个辐角是 `\frac{\pi}{2}`。                                                                                  |
| `\operatorname{Arg}z`                | principal argument, argument principal, 主辐角                 | A chosen single value of the argument, usually in a specified interval such as `(-\pi,\pi]`.          | EN: `\operatorname{Arg}(-1)=\pi` under the common convention.<br>FR: `\operatorname{Arg}(-1)=\pi` selon la convention courante.<br>中：按常见约定，`\operatorname{Arg}(-1)=\pi`。                                     |
| `e^{i\theta}=\cos\theta+i\sin\theta` | Euler formula, formule d’Euler, 欧拉公式                        | A formula connecting complex exponentials with trigonometric functions.                               | EN: `e^{i\pi}=-1`.<br>FR: `e^{i\pi}=-1`.<br>中：`e^{i\pi}=-1`。                                                                                                                                                 |
| `z=re^{i\theta}`                     | exponential form, forme exponentielle, 指数形式                 | A compact polar representation of a complex number.                                                   | EN: `1+i=\sqrt{2}e^{i\pi/4}`.<br>FR: `1+i=\sqrt{2}e^{i\pi/4}`.<br>中：`1+i=\sqrt{2}e^{i\pi/4}`。                                                                                                                |
| `e^{i(\theta+2\pi k)}`               | periodicity of argument, périodicité de l’argument, 辐角周期性   | Adding integer multiples of `2\pi` gives the same complex direction.                                  | EN: `e^{i\theta}=e^{i(\theta+2\pi)}`.<br>FR: `e^{i\theta}=e^{i(\theta+2\pi)}`.<br>中：`e^{i\theta}=e^{i(\theta+2\pi)}`。                                                                                        |
| `z^n=r^ne^{in\theta}`                | De Moivre’s formula, formule de Moivre, 棣莫弗公式               | A formula for powers of complex numbers in polar form.                                                | EN: If `z=e^{i\theta}`, then `z^3=e^{3i\theta}`.<br>FR: Si `z=e^{i\theta}`, alors `z^3=e^{3i\theta}`.<br>中：若 `z=e^{i\theta}`，则 `z^3=e^{3i\theta}`。                                                           |
| `z^{1/n}`                            | nth root, racine n-ième, n 次方根                              | A complex number whose `n`th power equals `z`; nonzero complex numbers have `n` distinct `n`th roots. | EN: The square roots of `1` are `1` and `-1`.<br>FR: Les racines carrées de `1` sont `1` et `-1`.<br>中：`1` 的平方根是 `1` 和 `-1`。                                                                                 |
| `e^{2\pi i k/n}`                     | nth roots of unity, racines n-ièmes de l’unité, n 次单位根      | Complex solutions of `z^n=1`.                                                                         | EN: The cube roots of unity are `1`, `e^{2\pi i/3}`, and `e^{4\pi i/3}`.<br>FR: Les racines cubiques de l’unité sont `1`, `e^{2\pi i/3}` et `e^{4\pi i/3}`.<br>中：三次单位根是 `1`、`e^{2\pi i/3}` 和 `e^{4\pi i/3}`。 |
| `\omega`                             | primitive root of unity, racine primitive de l’unité, 本原单位根 | An `n`th root of unity whose powers generate all `n`th roots of unity.                                | EN: `e^{2\pi i/n}` is a primitive `n`th root of unity.<br>FR: `e^{2\pi i/n}` est une racine primitive n-ième de l’unité.<br>中：`e^{2\pi i/n}` 是一个 n 次本原单位根。                                                   |

## 16.3 Complex functions, limits, and continuity

| Symbol (LaTeX)              | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                      | Definition                                                                                                  | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| --------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `f:\mathbb{C}\to\mathbb{C}` | complex function, fonction complexe, 复变函数                              | A function whose input and output are complex numbers.                                                      | EN: `f(z)=z^2` is a complex function.<br>FR: `f(z)=z^2` est une fonction complexe.<br>中：`f(z)=z^2` 是一个复变函数。                                                                                                                      |
| `w=f(z)`                    | complex output, valeur complexe, 复值输出                                  | The complex value assigned to the input `z`.                                                                | EN: If `f(z)=z^2`, then `f(1+i)=2i`.<br>FR: Si `f(z)=z^2`, alors `f(1+i)=2i`.<br>中：若 `f(z)=z^2`，则 `f(1+i)=2i`。                                                                                                                   |
| `f(z)=u(x,y)+iv(x,y)`       | real and imaginary components, parties réelle et imaginaire, 实部函数与虚部函数 | A complex function written using real-valued functions `u` and `v` of `x` and `y`.                          | EN: If `f(z)=z^2`, then `u=x^2-y^2` and `v=2xy`.<br>FR: Si `f(z)=z^2`, alors `u=x^2-y^2` et `v=2xy`.<br>中：若 `f(z)=z^2`，则 `u=x^2-y^2`，`v=2xy`。                                                                                    |
| `\lim_{z\to z_0}f(z)`       | complex limit, limite complexe, 复极限                                    | The value approached by `f(z)` as `z` approaches `z_0` from all directions in the complex plane.            | EN: `\lim_{z\to 1}z^2=1`.<br>FR: `\lim_{z\to 1}z^2=1`.<br>中：`\lim_{z\to 1}z^2=1`。                                                                                                                                                |
| `z\to z_0`                  | approach in the complex plane, tendance dans le plan complexe, 复平面趋近   | A variable approaches a point through arbitrary paths in the plane.                                         | EN: Complex limits must agree along every path to `z_0`.<br>FR: Les limites complexes doivent être les mêmes le long de tout chemin vers `z_0`.<br>中：复极限要求沿所有路径趋近 `z_0` 时结果一致。                                                   |
| `\epsilon`-`\delta` limit   | epsilon-delta complex limit, limite complexe epsilon-delta, 复极限 ε-δ 定义 | A rigorous definition using complex distance `\lvert z-z_0\rvert`.                                          | EN: If `0<\lvert z-z_0\rvert<\delta`, then `\lvert f(z)-L\rvert<\epsilon`.<br>FR: Si `0<\lvert z-z_0\rvert<\delta`, alors `\lvert f(z)-L\rvert<\epsilon`.<br>中：若 `0<\lvert z-z_0\rvert<\delta`，则 `\lvert f(z)-L\rvert<\epsilon`。 |
| `f` continuous at `z_0`     | continuity at a point, continuité en un point, 一点处连续                   | A function is continuous at `z_0` if `\lim_{z\to z_0}f(z)=f(z_0)`.                                          | EN: `f(z)=z^3+1` is continuous everywhere.<br>FR: `f(z)=z^3+1` est continue partout.<br>中：`f(z)=z^3+1` 处处连续。                                                                                                                     |
| `D\subseteq\mathbb{C}`      | domain, domaine, 区域 / 定义域                                              | A set on which a complex function is defined; in complex analysis, “domain” often means open and connected. | EN: The punctured plane `\mathbb{C}\setminus\{0\}` is a domain.<br>FR: Le plan privé de l’origine `\mathbb{C}\setminus\{0\}` est un domaine.<br>中：去掉原点的复平面 `\mathbb{C}\setminus\{0\}` 是一个区域。                                     |
| `f(D)`                      | image of a domain, image d’un domaine, 区域的像                            | The set of values attained by `f` on `D`.                                                                   | EN: The image of the unit circle under `z\mapsto z^2` is still the unit circle.<br>FR: L’image du cercle unité par `z\mapsto z^2` est encore le cercle unité.<br>中：单位圆在映射 `z\mapsto z^2` 下的像仍是单位圆。                               |
| `f^{-1}(A)`                 | preimage, image réciproque, 原像                                         | The set of input points mapped into a set `A`.                                                              | EN: Under `f(z)=z^2`, the preimage of `{1}` is `\{-1,1\}`.<br>FR: Pour `f(z)=z^2`, l’image réciproque de `{1}` est `\{-1,1\}`.<br>中：在 `f(z)=z^2` 下，`{1}` 的原像是 `\{-1,1\}`。                                                        |

## 16.4 Complex differentiability and holomorphic functions

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                  | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                  | Definition                                                                                                            | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| ----------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `f'(z_0)`                                       | complex derivative, dérivée complexe, 复导数                                          | The limit of the complex difference quotient, if it exists.                                                           | EN: If `f(z)=z^2`, then `f'(z)=2z`.<br>FR: Si `f(z)=z^2`, alors `f'(z)=2z`.<br>中：若 `f(z)=z^2`，则 `f'(z)=2z`。                                                                                                                     |
| `f'(z_0)=\lim_{h\to0}\frac{f(z_0+h)-f(z_0)}{h}` | complex derivative definition, définition de la dérivée complexe, 复导数定义            | A derivative requiring the quotient limit to be independent of the direction from which `h` approaches zero.          | EN: Complex differentiability is stronger than real differentiability in two variables.<br>FR: La dérivabilité complexe est plus forte que la dérivabilité réelle en deux variables.<br>中：复可导比二元实函数可微更强。                        |
| —                                               | complex differentiable, dérivable au sens complexe, 复可导                            | A function is complex differentiable at a point if the complex derivative exists there.                               | EN: `f(z)=\bar{z}` is not complex differentiable at most points.<br>FR: `f(z)=\bar{z}` n’est pas dérivable au sens complexe en général.<br>中：`f(z)=\bar{z}` 通常不是复可导函数。                                                          |
| —                                               | holomorphic function, fonction holomorphe, 全纯函数                                    | A function complex differentiable on an open set.                                                                     | EN: Every polynomial in `z` is holomorphic on `\mathbb{C}`.<br>FR: Tout polynôme en `z` est holomorphe sur `\mathbb{C}`.<br>中：每个关于 `z` 的多项式都在 `\mathbb{C}` 上全纯。                                                                 |
| —                                               | analytic function, fonction analytique, 解析函数                                       | A function locally expressible as a convergent power series. In complex analysis, holomorphic functions are analytic. | EN: `e^z` is analytic on all of `\mathbb{C}`.<br>FR: `e^z` est analytique sur tout `\mathbb{C}`.<br>中：`e^z` 在整个 `\mathbb{C}` 上解析。                                                                                               |
| —                                               | entire function, fonction entière, 整函数                                             | A function holomorphic on the whole complex plane.                                                                    | EN: `\sin z` and `e^z` are entire functions.<br>FR: `\sin z` et `e^z` sont des fonctions entières.<br>中：`\sin z` 和 `e^z` 是整函数。                                                                                                  |
| `u_x=v_y,\ u_y=-v_x`                            | Cauchy-Riemann equations, équations de Cauchy-Riemann, Cauchy-Riemann 方程           | Necessary equations for complex differentiability of `f=u+iv`, and sufficient under suitable smoothness assumptions.  | EN: For `f(z)=z^2`, the Cauchy-Riemann equations hold everywhere.<br>FR: Pour `f(z)=z^2`, les équations de Cauchy-Riemann sont vérifiées partout.<br>中：对 `f(z)=z^2`，Cauchy-Riemann 方程处处成立。                                      |
| `\frac{\partial f}{\partial \bar{z}}=0`         | Wirtinger holomorphic condition, condition holomorphe de Wirtinger, Wirtinger 全纯条件 | A compact way to express holomorphicity using derivatives with respect to `z` and `\bar{z}`.                          | EN: A smooth function is holomorphic when `\partial f/\partial\bar{z}=0`.<br>FR: Une fonction lisse est holomorphe lorsque `\partial f/\partial\bar{z}=0`.<br>中：光滑函数满足 `\partial f/\partial\bar{z}=0` 时为全纯函数。                   |
| —                                               | meromorphic function, fonction méromorphe, 亚纯函数                                    | A function holomorphic except at isolated poles.                                                                      | EN: `1/z` is meromorphic on `\mathbb{C}`.<br>FR: `1/z` est méromorphe sur `\mathbb{C}`.<br>中：`1/z` 是 `\mathbb{C}` 上的亚纯函数。                                                                                                       |
| —                                               | branch, branche, 分支                                                                | A single-valued choice of a multi-valued complex function on a specified domain.                                      | EN: A branch of `\log z` can be defined on `\mathbb{C}\setminus(-\infty,0]`.<br>FR: Une branche de `\log z` peut être définie sur `\mathbb{C}\setminus(-\infty,0]`.<br>中：`\log z` 的一个分支可定义在 `\mathbb{C}\setminus(-\infty,0]` 上。 |

## 16.5 Elementary complex functions

| Symbol (LaTeX)              | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                   | Definition                                                                                         | Examples                                                                                                                                                                              |
| --------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `e^z`                       | complex exponential, exponentielle complexe, 复指数函数                                  | The exponential function extended to complex arguments.                                            | EN: `e^{x+iy}=e^x(\cos y+i\sin y)`.<br>FR: `e^{x+iy}=e^x(\cos y+i\sin y)`.<br>中：`e^{x+iy}=e^x(\cos y+i\sin y)`。                                                                       |
| `e^{z+2\pi i}=e^z`          | periodicity of complex exponential, périodicité de l’exponentielle complexe, 复指数周期性 | The complex exponential has period `2\pi i`.                                                       | EN: `e^{z+2\pi i}=e^z` for all complex `z`.<br>FR: `e^{z+2\pi i}=e^z` pour tout complexe `z`.<br>中：对任意复数 `z`，`e^{z+2\pi i}=e^z`。                                                      |
| `\log z`                    | complex logarithm, logarithme complexe, 复对数                                         | A multi-valued inverse of the complex exponential.                                                 | EN: `\log z=\ln\lvert z\rvert+i(\arg z+2\pi k)`.<br>FR: `\log z=\ln\lvert z\rvert+i(\arg z+2\pi k)`.<br>中：`\log z=\ln\lvert z\rvert+i(\arg z+2\pi k)`。                                |
| `\operatorname{Log}z`       | principal logarithm, logarithme principal, 主值对数                                     | A single-valued branch of the logarithm using the principal argument.                              | EN: `\operatorname{Log}1=0`.<br>FR: `\operatorname{Log}1=0`.<br>中：`\operatorname{Log}1=0`。                                                                                            |
| `z^\alpha=e^{\alpha\log z}` | complex power, puissance complexe, 复幂                                               | A power function defined through the complex logarithm, often multi-valued.                        | EN: `z^{1/2}` has two values for nonzero `z`.<br>FR: `z^{1/2}` a deux valeurs pour `z\neq0`.<br>中：当 `z\neq0` 时，`z^{1/2}` 有两个值。                                                        |
| `\sin z`                    | complex sine, sinus complexe, 复正弦                                                   | The sine function extended to complex arguments.                                                   | EN: `\sin z=\frac{e^{iz}-e^{-iz}}{2i}`.<br>FR: `\sin z=\frac{e^{iz}-e^{-iz}}{2i}`.<br>中：`\sin z=\frac{e^{iz}-e^{-iz}}{2i}`。                                                           |
| `\cos z`                    | complex cosine, cosinus complexe, 复余弦                                               | The cosine function extended to complex arguments.                                                 | EN: `\cos z=\frac{e^{iz}+e^{-iz}}{2}`.<br>FR: `\cos z=\frac{e^{iz}+e^{-iz}}{2}`.<br>中：`\cos z=\frac{e^{iz}+e^{-iz}}{2}`。                                                              |
| `\sinh z`                   | hyperbolic sine, sinus hyperbolique, 双曲正弦                                           | A function defined by exponential combinations.                                                    | EN: `\sinh z=\frac{e^z-e^{-z}}{2}`.<br>FR: `\sinh z=\frac{e^z-e^{-z}}{2}`.<br>中：`\sinh z=\frac{e^z-e^{-z}}{2}`。                                                                       |
| `\cosh z`                   | hyperbolic cosine, cosinus hyperbolique, 双曲余弦                                       | A function defined by symmetric exponential combinations.                                          | EN: `\cosh z=\frac{e^z+e^{-z}}{2}`.<br>FR: `\cosh z=\frac{e^z+e^{-z}}{2}`.<br>中：`\cosh z=\frac{e^z+e^{-z}}{2}`。                                                                       |
| `\tan z`                    | complex tangent, tangente complexe, 复正切                                             | The quotient `\sin z/\cos z`, defined where `\cos z\neq0`.                                         | EN: `\tan z` has poles where `\cos z=0`.<br>FR: `\tan z` a des pôles lorsque `\cos z=0`.<br>中：`\tan z` 在 `\cos z=0` 处有极点。                                                             |
| —                           | branch cut, coupure de branche, 分支割线                                                | A curve or set removed from the plane to define a single-valued branch of a multi-valued function. | EN: The negative real axis is a common branch cut for the principal logarithm.<br>FR: L’axe réel négatif est une coupure courante pour le logarithme principal.<br>中：负实轴是主值对数常用的分支割线。 |

## 16.6 Curves, contour integrals, and path dependence

| Symbol (LaTeX)                      | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                       | Definition                                                                                    | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\gamma:[a,b]\to\mathbb{C}`         | parametrized curve, courbe paramétrée, 参数曲线                                             | A curve in the complex plane described by a parameter.                                        | EN: `\gamma(t)=e^{it}`, `0\leq t\leq2\pi`, parametrizes the unit circle.<br>FR: `\gamma(t)=e^{it}`, `0\leq t\leq2\pi`, paramètre le cercle unité.<br>中：`\gamma(t)=e^{it}`，`0\leq t\leq2\pi`，参数化单位圆。                              |
| `\gamma'(t)`                        | curve velocity, vitesse de la courbe, 曲线速度                                              | The derivative of a parametrized curve with respect to its parameter.                         | EN: If `\gamma(t)=e^{it}`, then `\gamma'(t)=ie^{it}`.<br>FR: Si `\gamma(t)=e^{it}`, alors `\gamma'(t)=ie^{it}`.<br>中：若 `\gamma(t)=e^{it}`，则 `\gamma'(t)=ie^{it}`。                                                                |
| `\int_\gamma f(z)\,dz`              | contour integral, intégrale curviligne complexe, 围道积分 / 复线积分                            | The integral of a complex function along a curve.                                             | EN: `\int_\gamma f(z)\,dz=\int_a^b f(\gamma(t))\gamma'(t)\,dt`.<br>FR: `\int_\gamma f(z)\,dz=\int_a^b f(\gamma(t))\gamma'(t)\,dt`.<br>中：`\int_\gamma f(z)\,dz=\int_a^b f(\gamma(t))\gamma'(t)\,dt`。                              |
| `dz`                                | complex differential, différentielle complexe, 复微分                                      | The differential along a complex path, represented by `\gamma'(t)\,dt` after parametrization. | EN: Along `\gamma(t)`, one writes `dz=\gamma'(t)\,dt`.<br>FR: Le long de `\gamma(t)`, on écrit `dz=\gamma'(t)\,dt`.<br>中：沿 `\gamma(t)`，可写 `dz=\gamma'(t)\,dt`。                                                                   |
| `\int_\gamma f(z)\,\lvert dz\rvert` | integral with respect to arc length, intégrale par rapport à la longueur d’arc, 关于弧长的积分 | An integral accumulating values along a curve with arc length measure.                        | EN: `\int_\gamma 1\,\lvert dz\rvert` gives the length of `\gamma`.<br>FR: `\int_\gamma 1\,\lvert dz\rvert` donne la longueur de `\gamma`.<br>中：`\int_\gamma 1\,\lvert dz\rvert` 给出曲线 `\gamma` 的长度。                               |
| `L(\gamma)`                         | length of a curve, longueur d’une courbe, 曲线长度                                          | The arc length of a parametrized curve.                                                       | EN: The unit circle has length `2\pi`.<br>FR: Le cercle unité a une longueur `2\pi`.<br>中：单位圆的长度是 `2\pi`。                                                                                                                        |
| `-\gamma`                           | reverse path, chemin inverse, 反向路径                                                      | The same geometric path traversed in the opposite direction.                                  | EN: `\int_{-\gamma}f(z)\,dz=-\int_\gamma f(z)\,dz`.<br>FR: `\int_{-\gamma}f(z)\,dz=-\int_\gamma f(z)\,dz`.<br>中：`\int_{-\gamma}f(z)\,dz=-\int_\gamma f(z)\,dz`。                                                                  |
| `\gamma_1+\gamma_2`                 | concatenation of paths, concaténation de chemins, 路径连接                                  | A path obtained by traversing one path after another.                                         | EN: Integrals over concatenated paths add.<br>FR: Les intégrales sur des chemins concaténés s’additionnent.<br>中：沿连接路径的积分等于各段积分之和。                                                                                               |
| `\oint_\gamma f(z)\,dz`             | closed contour integral, intégrale sur un contour fermé, 闭合围道积分                         | A contour integral over a closed curve.                                                       | EN: `\oint` indicates that the path is closed.<br>FR: `\oint` indique que le chemin est fermé.<br>中：`\oint` 表示积分路径闭合。                                                                                                            |
| —                                   | path independence, indépendance du chemin, 路径无关                                         | A property where the integral depends only on endpoints, not on the chosen path.              | EN: If `f` has a primitive on a domain, its contour integrals are path independent.<br>FR: Si `f` possède une primitive sur un domaine, ses intégrales curvilignes sont indépendantes du chemin.<br>中：若 `f` 在区域上有原函数，则其线积分与路径无关。 |

## 16.7 Cauchy theorem and Cauchy integral formula

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                                         | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                                       | Definition                                                                                         | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\int_\gamma f(z)\,dz=0`                                               | Cauchy integral theorem, théorème intégral de Cauchy, Cauchy 积分定理                                       | Under suitable hypotheses, the integral of a holomorphic function around a closed contour is zero. | EN: If `f` is holomorphic inside and on a simple closed curve, then the contour integral is zero.<br>FR: Si `f` est holomorphe à l’intérieur et sur une courbe fermée simple, l’intégrale est nulle.<br>中：若 `f` 在简单闭曲线及其内部全纯，则围道积分为零。                                                                       |
| —                                                                      | primitive, primitive, 原函数                                                                               | A holomorphic function `F` such that `F'=f`.                                                       | EN: If `f(z)=2z`, then `F(z)=z^2` is a primitive.<br>FR: Si `f(z)=2z`, alors `F(z)=z^2` est une primitive.<br>中：若 `f(z)=2z`，则 `F(z)=z^2` 是一个原函数。                                                                                                                                                            |
| `\int_\gamma f(z)\,dz=F(b)-F(a)`                                       | fundamental theorem for complex line integrals, théorème fondamental des intégrales complexes, 复线积分基本定理 | If `f=F'`, then the integral over a path equals the endpoint difference of `F`.                    | EN: If `F'=f`, the integral depends only on endpoints.<br>FR: Si `F'=f`, l’intégrale ne dépend que des extrémités.<br>中：若 `F'=f`，积分只取决于端点。                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `f(a)=\frac{1}{2\pi i}\oint_\gamma\frac{f(z)}{z-a}\,dz`                | Cauchy integral formula, formule intégrale de Cauchy, Cauchy 积分公式                                       | A formula recovering the value of a holomorphic function from its boundary values.                 | EN: Cauchy’s formula shows that holomorphic functions are strongly constrained.<br>FR: La formule de Cauchy montre que les fonctions holomorphes sont fortement contraintes.<br>中：Cauchy 积分公式说明全纯函数受到很强约束。                                                                                                  |
| `f^{(n)}(a)=\frac{n!}{2\pi i}\oint_\gamma\frac{f(z)}{(z-a)^{n+1}}\,dz` | generalized Cauchy integral formula, formule intégrale généralisée de Cauchy, 高阶 Cauchy 积分公式            | A formula giving all derivatives of a holomorphic function from contour integrals.                 | EN: Holomorphic functions have derivatives of all orders.<br>FR: Les fonctions holomorphes possèdent des dérivées de tout ordre.<br>中：全纯函数具有任意阶导数。                                                                                                                                                          |
| —                                                                      | Cauchy estimates, estimations de Cauchy, Cauchy 估计                                                      | Bounds on derivatives of a holomorphic function in terms of maximum values on surrounding circles. | EN: Cauchy estimates control derivatives by boundary size.<br>FR: Les estimations de Cauchy contrôlent les dérivées par les valeurs au bord.<br>中：Cauchy 估计用边界大小控制导数。                                                                                                                                       |
| —                                                                      | Morera’s theorem, théorème de Morera, Morera 定理                                                         | A theorem giving holomorphicity from vanishing contour integrals.                                  | EN: If all small triangular contour integrals vanish and the function is continuous, Morera’s theorem gives holomorphicity.<br>FR: Si toutes les intégrales sur petits triangles s’annulent et la fonction est continue, le théorème de Morera donne l’holomorphie.<br>中：若函数连续且所有小三角形围道积分为零，Morera 定理推出全纯性。 |
| —                                                                      | Goursat theorem, théorème de Goursat, Goursat 定理                                                        | A refinement of Cauchy’s theorem requiring holomorphicity without assuming continuous derivative.  | EN: Goursat’s theorem strengthens the foundation of Cauchy theory.<br>FR: Le théorème de Goursat renforce les fondements de la théorie de Cauchy.<br>中：Goursat 定理加强了 Cauchy 理论的基础。                                                                                                                          |
| —                                                                      | simply connected domain, domaine simplement connexe, 单连通区域                                              | A domain with no holes, where many global integral results become simpler.                         | EN: On a simply connected domain, every holomorphic function has a primitive if all closed contour integrals vanish.<br>FR: Sur un domaine simplement connexe, les intégrales fermées nulles donnent des primitives.<br>中：在单连通区域上，闭路积分为零通常保证原函数存在。                                                          |

## 16.8 Power series, Taylor series, and analytic continuation

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                             | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                           | Definition                                                                                                            | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| ---------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\sum_{n=0}^{\infty}a_n(z-z_0)^n`                          | complex power series, série entière complexe, 复幂级数          | An infinite series in powers of `z-z_0`.                                                                              | EN: `\sum_{n=0}^{\infty}z^n` is a power series centered at `0`.<br>FR: `\sum_{n=0}^{\infty}z^n` est une série entière centrée en `0`.<br>中：`\sum_{n=0}^{\infty}z^n` 是以 `0` 为中心的幂级数。                                                    |
| `z_0`                                                      | center of a power series, centre d’une série entière, 幂级数中心 | The point around which a power series is expanded.                                                                    | EN: In `\sum a_n(z-2)^n`, the center is `2`.<br>FR: Dans `\sum a_n(z-2)^n`, le centre est `2`.<br>中：在 `\sum a_n(z-2)^n` 中，中心是 `2`。                                                                                                     |
| `R`                                                        | radius of convergence, rayon de convergence, 收敛半径           | The radius of the disk where a power series converges absolutely.                                                     | EN: `\sum z^n` has radius of convergence `1`.<br>FR: `\sum z^n` a pour rayon de convergence `1`.<br>中：`\sum z^n` 的收敛半径是 `1`。                                                                                                           |
| `\lvert z-z_0\rvert<R`                                     | disk of convergence, disque de convergence, 收敛圆盘            | The open disk where a power series converges.                                                                         | EN: A power series converges inside its disk of convergence.<br>FR: Une série entière converge à l’intérieur de son disque de convergence.<br>中：幂级数在其收敛圆盘内部收敛。                                                                         |
| `f(z)=\sum_{n=0}^{\infty}\frac{f^{(n)}(z_0)}{n!}(z-z_0)^n` | Taylor series, série de Taylor, Taylor 级数                   | The power series expansion of a holomorphic function around a point.                                                  | EN: `e^z=\sum_{n=0}^{\infty}\frac{z^n}{n!}`.<br>FR: `e^z=\sum_{n=0}^{\infty}\frac{z^n}{n!}`.<br>中：`e^z=\sum_{n=0}^{\infty}\frac{z^n}{n!}`。                                                                                             |
| `a_n=\frac{f^{(n)}(z_0)}{n!}`                              | Taylor coefficient, coefficient de Taylor, Taylor 系数        | The coefficient of `(z-z_0)^n` in the Taylor expansion.                                                               | EN: For `e^z` at `0`, every Taylor coefficient is `1/n!`.<br>FR: Pour `e^z` en `0`, chaque coefficient de Taylor vaut `1/n!`.<br>中：`e^z` 在 `0` 处的 Taylor 系数为 `1/n!`。                                                                   |
| —                                                          | analytic continuation, prolongement analytique, 解析延拓        | Extending an analytic function beyond its original domain while preserving analyticity.                               | EN: Analytic continuation can extend a function from a small disk to a larger domain.<br>FR: Le prolongement analytique peut étendre une fonction d’un petit disque à un domaine plus grand.<br>中：解析延拓可以把函数从小圆盘扩展到更大区域。                |
| —                                                          | identity theorem, théorème d’identité, 恒等定理                 | If two holomorphic functions agree on a set with a limit point inside a domain, they agree everywhere on that domain. | EN: A holomorphic function is determined by its values on any small accumulating set.<br>FR: Une fonction holomorphe est déterminée par ses valeurs sur tout petit ensemble ayant un point d’accumulation.<br>中：全纯函数由任意具有聚点的小集合上的取值决定。 |
| —                                                          | isolated zero, zéro isolé, 孤立零点                             | A zero of a nonzero holomorphic function that is separated from other zeros.                                          | EN: Nonzero holomorphic functions have isolated zeros.<br>FR: Les fonctions holomorphes non nulles ont des zéros isolés.<br>中：非零全纯函数的零点是孤立的。                                                                                           |
| —                                                          | order of a zero, ordre d’un zéro, 零点阶数                      | The smallest power with nonzero coefficient in the Taylor expansion at a zero.                                        | EN: If `f(z)=(z-a)^3g(z)` and `g(a)\neq0`, then `a` is a zero of order `3`.<br>FR: Si `f(z)=(z-a)^3g(z)` et `g(a)\neq0`, alors `a` est un zéro d’ordre `3`.<br>中：若 `f(z)=(z-a)^3g(z)` 且 `g(a)\neq0`，则 `a` 是三阶零点。                       |

## 16.9 Laurent series and isolated singularities

| Symbol (LaTeX)                          | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                              | Definition                                                                                       | Examples                                                                                                                                                      |
| --------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\sum_{n=-\infty}^{\infty}a_n(z-z_0)^n` | Laurent series, série de Laurent, Laurent 级数                   | A series allowing negative powers, used near isolated singularities.                             | EN: `1/z` has Laurent series `z^{-1}` around `0`.<br>FR: `1/z` a pour série de Laurent `z^{-1}` autour de `0`.<br>中：`1/z` 在 `0` 附近的 Laurent 级数是 `z^{-1}`。     |
| `\sum_{n=-\infty}^{-1}a_n(z-z_0)^n`     | principal part, partie principale, 主要部分                        | The negative-power part of a Laurent series.                                                     | EN: The principal part of `1/z+1` at `0` is `1/z`.<br>FR: La partie principale de `1/z+1` en `0` est `1/z`.<br>中：`1/z+1` 在 `0` 处的主要部分是 `1/z`。                 |
| `a_{-1}`                                | residue, résidu, 留数                                            | The coefficient of `(z-z_0)^{-1}` in the Laurent expansion.                                      | EN: The residue of `1/z` at `0` is `1`.<br>FR: Le résidu de `1/z` en `0` est `1`.<br>中：`1/z` 在 `0` 处的留数是 `1`。                                                 |
| —                                       | isolated singularity, singularité isolée, 孤立奇点                 | A point where a function fails to be holomorphic but is holomorphic in a punctured neighborhood. | EN: `z=0` is an isolated singularity of `1/z`.<br>FR: `z=0` est une singularité isolée de `1/z`.<br>中：`z=0` 是 `1/z` 的孤立奇点。                                    |
| —                                       | removable singularity, singularité amovible, 可去奇点              | A singularity that can be removed by defining or redefining the function at that point.          | EN: `\frac{\sin z}{z}` has a removable singularity at `0`.<br>FR: `\frac{\sin z}{z}` a une singularité amovible en `0`.<br>中：`\frac{\sin z}{z}` 在 `0` 处有可去奇点。 |
| —                                       | pole, pôle, 极点                                                 | An isolated singularity where the function grows like a finite negative power.                   | EN: `1/z^2` has a pole of order `2` at `0`.<br>FR: `1/z^2` a un pôle d’ordre `2` en `0`.<br>中：`1/z^2` 在 `0` 处有二阶极点。                                           |
| —                                       | essential singularity, singularité essentielle, 本性奇点           | An isolated singularity whose Laurent series has infinitely many negative-power terms.           | EN: `e^{1/z}` has an essential singularity at `0`.<br>FR: `e^{1/z}` a une singularité essentielle en `0`.<br>中：`e^{1/z}` 在 `0` 处有本性奇点。                        |
| `\operatorname{ord}_{z_0}(f)`           | order of a zero or pole, ordre d’un zéro ou d’un pôle, 零点或极点阶数 | An integer measuring the multiplicity of a zero or the negative multiplicity of a pole.          | EN: `f(z)=(z-a)^2` has order `2` at `a`.<br>FR: `f(z)=(z-a)^2` a ordre `2` en `a`.<br>中：`f(z)=(z-a)^2` 在 `a` 处阶数为 `2`。                                        |
| —                                       | punctured disk, disque épointé, 去心圆盘                           | A disk with its center removed.                                                                  | EN: `0<\lvert z-a\rvert<r` describes a punctured disk.<br>FR: `0<\lvert z-a\rvert<r` décrit un disque épointé.<br>中：`0<\lvert z-a\rvert<r` 描述一个去心圆盘。          |
| —                                       | annulus, couronne, 环域                                          | A region between two concentric circles.                                                         | EN: A Laurent series often converges on an annulus.<br>FR: Une série de Laurent converge souvent sur une couronne.<br>中：Laurent 级数常在环域上收敛。                    |

## 16.10 Residue theorem and contour methods

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                               | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                          | Definition                                                                                      | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| ------------------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\operatorname{Res}(f,a)`                                    | residue at a point, résidu en un point, 点处留数               | The coefficient of `(z-a)^{-1}` in the Laurent expansion of `f` at `a`.                         | EN: `\operatorname{Res}(1/(z-a),a)=1`.<br>FR: `\operatorname{Res}(1/(z-a),a)=1`.<br>中：`\operatorname{Res}(1/(z-a),a)=1`。                                                                                |
| `\oint_\gamma f(z)\,dz=2\pi i\sum \operatorname{Res}(f,a_k)` | residue theorem, théorème des résidus, 留数定理                | A theorem evaluating contour integrals by summing residues of singularities inside the contour. | EN: Residue theorem reduces many contour integrals to local calculations.<br>FR: Le théorème des résidus réduit de nombreuses intégrales curvilignes à des calculs locaux.<br>中：留数定理把许多围道积分化为局部留数计算。    |
| `\operatorname{Ind}(\gamma,a)`                               | winding number, indice d’un contour, 绕数                    | The number of times a closed curve winds around a point.                                        | EN: The unit circle traversed counterclockwise has winding number `1` around `0`.<br>FR: Le cercle unité parcouru dans le sens positif a indice `1` autour de `0`.<br>中：逆时针走一遍单位圆对 `0` 的绕数是 `1`。        |
| `\frac{1}{2\pi i}\oint_\gamma\frac{dz}{z-a}`                 | index integral, intégrale de l’indice, 绕数积分公式              | A contour integral formula for the winding number.                                              | EN: This integral equals `1` if `\gamma` winds once around `a` positively.<br>FR: Cette intégrale vaut `1` si `\gamma` entoure `a` une fois positivement.<br>中：若 `\gamma` 正向绕 `a` 一圈，该积分等于 `1`。         |
| `\operatorname{Res}(f,a)=\lim_{z\to a}(z-a)f(z)`             | residue at a simple pole, résidu en un pôle simple, 简单极点留数 | A formula for the residue when `a` is a simple pole.                                            | EN: The residue of `1/(z-2)` at `2` is `1`.<br>FR: Le résidu de `1/(z-2)` en `2` est `1`.<br>中：`1/(z-2)` 在 `2` 处的留数是 `1`。                                                                               |
| `\operatorname{Res}\frac{g}{h}`                              | residue of quotient, résidu d’un quotient, 商函数留数           | If `h(a)=0`, `h'(a)\neq0`, and `g` is holomorphic, then the residue is `g(a)/h'(a)`.            | EN: For `g/h` with a simple zero of `h`, use `g(a)/h'(a)`.<br>FR: Pour `g/h` avec un zéro simple de `h`, utiliser `g(a)/h'(a)`.<br>中：对 `g/h`，若 `h` 在 `a` 有简单零点，可用 `g(a)/h'(a)`。                         |
| —                                                            | contour deformation, déformation de contour, 围道变形          | Changing a contour without crossing singularities, usually preserving the integral.             | EN: Holomorphic regions allow contour deformation.<br>FR: Les régions holomorphes permettent la déformation des contours.<br>中：在全纯区域内可进行围道变形。                                                           |
| —                                                            | keyhole contour, contour en trou de serrure, 钥孔围道          | A contour used around a branch cut, often for integrals involving logarithms or powers.         | EN: Keyhole contours help evaluate real integrals with branch points.<br>FR: Les contours en trou de serrure aident à calculer des intégrales réelles avec points de branchement.<br>中：钥孔围道常用于含分支点的实积分。 |
| —                                                            | semicircular contour, contour semi-circulaire, 半圆围道        | A contour using a real interval and a large semicircle, often for Fourier-type integrals.       | EN: Semicircular contours are used with exponential decay estimates.<br>FR: Les contours semi-circulaires sont utilisés avec des estimations de décroissance exponentielle.<br>中：半圆围道常配合指数衰减估计使用。       |
| —                                                            | Jordan’s lemma, lemme de Jordan, Jordan 引理                 | A lemma estimating contour integrals over large arcs in certain oscillatory integrals.          | EN: Jordan’s lemma helps evaluate integrals involving `e^{iaz}`.<br>FR: Le lemme de Jordan aide à calculer des intégrales contenant `e^{iaz}`.<br>中：Jordan 引理有助于计算含 `e^{iaz}` 的积分。                      |

## 16.11 Major theorems of holomorphic functions

| Symbol (LaTeX) | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                         | Definition                                                                                     | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| —              | Liouville’s theorem, théorème de Liouville, Liouville 定理                  | Every bounded entire function is constant.                                                     | EN: Liouville’s theorem helps prove the fundamental theorem of algebra.<br>FR: Le théorème de Liouville aide à prouver le théorème fondamental de l’algèbre.<br>中：Liouville 定理可用于证明代数基本定理。                                                                                                                             |
| —              | fundamental theorem of algebra, théorème fondamental de l’algèbre, 代数基本定理 | Every nonconstant complex polynomial has at least one complex root.                            | EN: `z^2+1` has roots `i` and `-i` in `\mathbb{C}`.<br>FR: `z^2+1` a pour racines `i` et `-i` dans `\mathbb{C}`.<br>中：`z^2+1` 在 `\mathbb{C}` 中有根 `i` 和 `-i`。                                                                                                                                                           |
| —              | maximum modulus principle, principe du maximum, 最大模原理                     | A nonconstant holomorphic function cannot attain a strict maximum of modulus inside a domain.  | EN: The maximum of `\lvert f\rvert` on a compact region occurs on the boundary if `f` is holomorphic inside.<br>FR: Le maximum de `\lvert f\rvert` sur une région compacte se trouve au bord si `f` est holomorphe à l’intérieur.<br>中：若 `f` 在区域内部全纯，则紧区域上 `\lvert f\rvert` 的最大值出现在边界。                                 |
| —              | minimum modulus principle, principe du minimum, 最小模原理                     | A nonvanishing holomorphic function follows a corresponding minimum principle for its modulus. | EN: Apply the maximum principle to `1/f` when `f` has no zeros.<br>FR: Appliquer le principe du maximum à `1/f` lorsque `f` n’a pas de zéros.<br>中：当 `f` 无零点时，可对 `1/f` 使用最大模原理。                                                                                                                                        |
| —              | open mapping theorem, théorème de l’application ouverte, 开映射定理            | A nonconstant holomorphic function maps open sets to open sets.                                | EN: Holomorphic nonconstant maps preserve openness.<br>FR: Les applications holomorphes non constantes préservent les ouverts.<br>中：非常数全纯映射把开集映为开集。                                                                                                                                                                    |
| —              | inverse function theorem, théorème d’inversion locale, 反函数定理              | If `f'(a)\neq0`, a holomorphic function is locally invertible near `a`.                        | EN: Near a point where `f'(a)\neq0`, the inverse is holomorphic.<br>FR: Près d’un point où `f'(a)\neq0`, l’inverse est holomorphe.<br>中：在 `f'(a)\neq0` 的点附近，反函数也是全纯的。                                                                                                                                                  |
| —              | argument principle, principe de l’argument, 辐角原理                          | A theorem relating change in argument around a contour to numbers of zeros and poles.          | EN: The argument principle counts zeros minus poles inside a contour.<br>FR: Le principe de l’argument compte les zéros moins les pôles à l’intérieur d’un contour.<br>中：辐角原理计算围道内部零点数减去极点数。                                                                                                                           |
| —              | Rouché’s theorem, théorème de Rouché, Rouché 定理                           | A theorem comparing two holomorphic functions to count zeros inside a contour.                 | EN: Rouché’s theorem can locate polynomial roots inside disks.<br>FR: Le théorème de Rouché peut localiser des racines de polynômes dans des disques.<br>中：Rouché 定理可用于判断多项式根位于哪些圆盘内。                                                                                                                                  |
| —              | Schwarz lemma, lemme de Schwarz, Schwarz 引理                               | A theorem controlling holomorphic self-maps of the unit disk fixing the origin.                | EN: If `f(0)=0` and `\lvert f(z)\rvert\leq1` in the unit disk, then `\lvert f(z)\rvert\leq\lvert z\rvert`.<br>FR: Si `f(0)=0` et `\lvert f(z)\rvert\leq1` dans le disque unité, alors `\lvert f(z)\rvert\leq\lvert z\rvert`.<br>中：若 `f(0)=0` 且在单位圆盘内 `\lvert f(z)\rvert\leq1`，则 `\lvert f(z)\rvert\leq\lvert z\rvert`。 |
| —              | Picard theorem, théorème de Picard, Picard 定理                             | A deep theorem describing values taken near essential singularities.                           | EN: Near an essential singularity, a holomorphic function takes almost every complex value infinitely often.<br>FR: Près d’une singularité essentielle, une fonction holomorphe prend presque toute valeur complexe infiniment souvent.<br>中：在本性奇点附近，全纯函数几乎会无限次取到所有复值。                                                 |

## 16.12 Conformal maps, harmonic functions, and applications

| Symbol (LaTeX)         | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                            | Definition                                                                                       | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ---------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| —                      | conformal map, application conforme, 保角映射                                    | A holomorphic map with nonzero derivative, preserving angles locally.                            | EN: `f(z)=z^2` is conformal away from `0`.<br>FR: `f(z)=z^2` est conforme hors de `0`.<br>中：`f(z)=z^2` 在 `0` 以外是保角映射。                                                                                                         |
| `f'(z)\neq0`           | conformality condition, condition de conformité, 保角条件                        | A local condition ensuring a holomorphic function preserves angles and orientation.              | EN: If `f'(a)\neq0`, then `f` is locally conformal near `a`.<br>FR: Si `f'(a)\neq0`, alors `f` est localement conforme près de `a`.<br>中：若 `f'(a)\neq0`，则 `f` 在 `a` 附近局部保角。                                                   |
| `\frac{az+b}{cz+d}`    | Möbius transformation, transformation de Möbius, Möbius 变换 / 分式线性变换          | A rational map with `ad-bc\neq0`, acting on the extended complex plane.                          | EN: `z\mapsto 1/z` is a Möbius transformation.<br>FR: `z\mapsto 1/z` est une transformation de Möbius.<br>中：`z\mapsto 1/z` 是 Möbius 变换。                                                                                       |
| `\widehat{\mathbb{C}}` | Riemann sphere, sphère de Riemann, Riemann 球面                                | The extended complex plane `\mathbb{C}\cup\{\infty\}`.                                           | EN: Möbius transformations act naturally on the Riemann sphere.<br>FR: Les transformations de Möbius agissent naturellement sur la sphère de Riemann.<br>中：Möbius 变换自然作用在 Riemann 球面上。                                        |
| `\Delta u=0`           | harmonic function, fonction harmonique, 调和函数                                 | A real-valued function whose Laplacian is zero.                                                  | EN: The real part of a holomorphic function is harmonic.<br>FR: La partie réelle d’une fonction holomorphe est harmonique.<br>中：全纯函数的实部是调和函数。                                                                                 |
| `u_x=v_y,\ u_y=-v_x`   | harmonic conjugate condition, condition de conjuguée harmonique, 调和共轭条件      | Conditions linking two harmonic functions as real and imaginary parts of a holomorphic function. | EN: If `u` has harmonic conjugate `v`, then `u+iv` is holomorphic.<br>FR: Si `u` possède une conjuguée harmonique `v`, alors `u+iv` est holomorphe.<br>中：若 `u` 有调和共轭函数 `v`，则 `u+iv` 是全纯函数。                                    |
| —                      | harmonic conjugate, conjuguée harmonique, 调和共轭                               | A function `v` such that `u+iv` is holomorphic.                                                  | EN: For `u(x,y)=x`, a harmonic conjugate is `v(x,y)=y`.<br>FR: Pour `u(x,y)=x`, une conjuguée harmonique est `v(x,y)=y`.<br>中：对 `u(x,y)=x`，一个调和共轭是 `v(x,y)=y`。                                                                |
| —                      | Dirichlet problem, problème de Dirichlet, Dirichlet 问题                       | The problem of finding a harmonic function with prescribed boundary values.                      | EN: Finding steady-state temperature from boundary temperature is a Dirichlet problem.<br>FR: Trouver une température stationnaire à partir de valeurs au bord est un problème de Dirichlet.<br>中：由边界温度求稳态温度是 Dirichlet 问题。   |
| —                      | Poisson kernel, noyau de Poisson, Poisson 核                                  | A kernel used to solve the Dirichlet problem on disks or half-planes.                            | EN: The Poisson kernel reconstructs harmonic functions from boundary data in the disk.<br>FR: Le noyau de Poisson reconstruit des fonctions harmoniques à partir des données au bord du disque.<br>中：Poisson 核可由圆盘边界数据重构调和函数。 |
| —                      | analytic signal, signal analytique, 解析信号                                     | A signal-theoretic construction using complex-valued functions to encode amplitude and phase.    | EN: Complex analysis supports methods in signal processing.<br>FR: L’analyse complexe soutient des méthodes du traitement du signal.<br>中：复分析支撑信号处理中的一些方法。                                                                    |
| —                      | Laplace transform method, méthode de la transformée de Laplace, Laplace 变换方法 | A method using complex variables to study differential equations and systems.                    | EN: Poles of a Laplace transform reveal system behavior.<br>FR: Les pôles d’une transformée de Laplace révèlent le comportement d’un système.<br>中：Laplace 变换的极点揭示系统行为。                                                       |
| —                      | Fourier contour method, méthode de contour pour Fourier, Fourier 围道方法        | A method using complex contour integrals to evaluate Fourier-type integrals.                     | EN: Residues can evaluate certain Fourier integrals.<br>FR: Les résidus peuvent calculer certaines intégrales de Fourier.<br>中：留数可用于计算某些 Fourier 型积分。                                                                         |
# 17. Differential Equations, Dynamical Systems, and Mathematical Modeling

## 17.1 Basic concepts of differential equations

| Symbol (LaTeX)                  | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                                             | Definition                                                                                  | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| ------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\frac{dy}{dx}`                 | derivative in a differential equation, dérivée dans une équation différentielle, 微分方程中的导数                     | A derivative appearing as part of an equation involving an unknown function.                | EN: In `\frac{dy}{dx}=2x`, the derivative of `y` is specified by `2x`.<br>FR: Dans `\frac{dy}{dx}=2x`, la dérivée de `y` est donnée par `2x`.<br>中：在 `\frac{dy}{dx}=2x` 中，`y` 的导数由 `2x` 给出。          |
| `y=y(x)`                        | unknown function, fonction inconnue, 未知函数                                                                     | The function to be solved for in a differential equation.                                   | EN: In `y'=y`, the unknown function is `y(x)`.<br>FR: Dans `y'=y`, la fonction inconnue est `y(x)`.<br>中：在 `y'=y` 中，未知函数是 `y(x)`。                                                                    |
| `F(x,y,y',\ldots,y^{(n)})=0`    | ordinary differential equation, équation différentielle ordinaire, 常微分方程                                      | A differential equation involving derivatives with respect to one independent variable.     | EN: `y''+y=0` is an ordinary differential equation.<br>FR: `y''+y=0` est une équation différentielle ordinaire.<br>中：`y''+y=0` 是常微分方程。                                                               |
| `\frac{\partial u}{\partial t}` | partial derivative in a differential equation, dérivée partielle dans une équation différentielle, 偏微分方程中的偏导数 | A partial derivative of an unknown function of several variables.                           | EN: In `u_t=u_{xx}`, `u` depends on both `x` and `t`.<br>FR: Dans `u_t=u_{xx}`, `u` dépend de `x` et de `t`.<br>中：在 `u_t=u_{xx}` 中，`u` 同时依赖 `x` 和 `t`。                                               |
| —                               | partial differential equation, équation aux dérivées partielles, 偏微分方程                                        | A differential equation involving partial derivatives of an unknown multivariable function. | EN: The heat equation is a partial differential equation.<br>FR: L’équation de la chaleur est une équation aux dérivées partielles.<br>中：热方程是偏微分方程。                                                  |
| `n`                             | order of a differential equation, ordre d’une équation différentielle, 微分方程阶数                                 | The highest derivative order appearing in a differential equation.                          | EN: `y''+y=0` is second order.<br>FR: `y''+y=0` est du second ordre.<br>中：`y''+y=0` 是二阶方程。                                                                                                           |
| —                               | degree of a differential equation, degré d’une équation différentielle, 微分方程度                                 | The power of the highest derivative when the equation is polynomial in derivatives.         | EN: `(y')^2+y=0` has degree `2` in `y'`.<br>FR: `(y')^2+y=0` a degré `2` en `y'`.<br>中：`(y')^2+y=0` 关于 `y'` 的次数是 `2`。                                                                                |
| `y'=f(x,y)`                     | first-order differential equation, équation différentielle du premier ordre, 一阶微分方程                           | A differential equation involving only the first derivative of the unknown function.        | EN: `y'=x+y` is first order.<br>FR: `y'=x+y` est du premier ordre.<br>中：`y'=x+y` 是一阶微分方程。                                                                                                            |
| `y''=f(x,y,y')`                 | second-order differential equation, équation différentielle du second ordre, 二阶微分方程                           | A differential equation involving the second derivative.                                    | EN: Newton’s law often gives equations of the form `mx''=F`.<br>FR: La loi de Newton donne souvent des équations de la forme `mx''=F`.<br>中：牛顿定律常给出形如 `mx''=F` 的方程。                                  |
| —                               | solution of a differential equation, solution d’une équation différentielle, 微分方程的解                           | A function satisfying the differential equation on a specified domain.                      | EN: `y=Ce^x` solves `y'=y`.<br>FR: `y=Ce^x` résout `y'=y`.<br>中：`y=Ce^x` 是 `y'=y` 的解。                                                                                                                |
| —                               | general solution, solution générale, 通解                                                                       | A family of solutions containing arbitrary constants.                                       | EN: The general solution of `y'=2x` is `y=x^2+C`.<br>FR: La solution générale de `y'=2x` est `y=x^2+C`.<br>中：`y'=2x` 的通解是 `y=x^2+C`。                                                                 |
| —                               | particular solution, solution particulière, 特解                                                                | A solution obtained by applying initial or boundary conditions.                             | EN: If `y=x^2+C` and `y(0)=3`, then `y=x^2+3` is a particular solution.<br>FR: Si `y=x^2+C` et `y(0)=3`, alors `y=x^2+3` est une solution particulière.<br>中：若 `y=x^2+C` 且 `y(0)=3`，则 `y=x^2+3` 是特解。 |

## 17.2 Initial value problems, boundary value problems, and well-posedness

| Symbol (LaTeX)             | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                | Definition                                                                           | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| -------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
