| Symbol (LaTeX)                                                                                                       | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                          | Definition                                                                                               | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\partial f(x)`                                                                                                      | subdifferential, sous-différentiel, 次微分                                    | The set of all subgradients of a convex function at `x`.                                                 | EN: For `f(x)=\lvert x\rvert`, `\partial f(0)=[-1,1]`.<br>FR: Pour `f(x)=\lvert x\rvert`, `\partial f(0)=[-1,1]`.<br>中：对 `f(x)=\lvert x\rvert`，`\partial f(0)=[-1,1]`。                                    |
| `g\in\partial f(x)`                                                                                                  | subgradient, sous-gradient, 次梯度                                            | A vector defining an affine global lower bound for a convex function at `x`.                             | EN: A subgradient generalizes the gradient to nonsmooth convex functions.<br>FR: Un sous-gradient généralise le gradient aux fonctions convexes non lisses.<br>中：次梯度把梯度推广到非光滑凸函数。                         |
| `f(y)\geq f(x)+g^T(y-x)`                                                                                             | subgradient inequality, inégalité de sous-gradient, 次梯度不等式                 | The defining inequality for a subgradient of a convex function.                                          | EN: Subgradient inequalities support cutting-plane methods.<br>FR: Les inégalités de sous-gradient soutiennent les méthodes de plans coupants.<br>中：次梯度不等式支撑割平面方法。                                        |
| `0\in\partial f(x^\star)`                                                                                            | nonsmooth optimality condition, condition d’optimalité non lisse, 非光滑最优性条件 | A necessary and sufficient condition for minimizing a proper convex function under suitable assumptions. | EN: For convex nonsmooth minimization, zero must belong to the subdifferential.<br>FR: Pour la minimisation convexe non lisse, zéro doit appartenir au sous-différentiel.<br>中：对凸非光滑最小化，零必须属于次微分。         |
| —                                                                                                                    | nonsmooth function, fonction non lisse, 非光滑函数                              | A function not differentiable everywhere.                                                                | EN: The absolute value function is nonsmooth at `0`.<br>FR: La fonction valeur absolue n’est pas lisse en `0`.<br>中：绝对值函数在 `0` 处非光滑。                                                                      |
| —                                                                                                                    | subgradient method, méthode du sous-gradient, 次梯度法                         | An iterative method using subgradients instead of gradients.                                             | EN: Subgradient methods can handle L1-regularized objectives.<br>FR: Les méthodes de sous-gradient peuvent traiter les objectifs régularisés L1.<br>中：次梯度法可处理 L1 正则化目标。                                   |
| `\operatorname{prox}_{\lambda f}(v)`                                                                                 | proximal operator, opérateur proximal, 近端算子                                | The point balancing closeness to `v` and the penalty `f`.                                                | EN: Proximal operators turn some nonsmooth penalties into simple updates.<br>FR: Les opérateurs proximaux transforment certaines pénalités non lisses en mises à jour simples.<br>中：近端算子可把某些非光滑惩罚转化为简单更新。 |
| `\operatorname{prox}_{\lambda f}(v)=\operatorname{argmin}_x\left(f(x)+\frac{1}{2\lambda}\lVert x-v\rVert_2^2\right)` | proximal mapping formula, formule de l’application proximale, 近端映射公式       | The optimization definition of the proximal operator.                                                    | EN: The quadratic term keeps the update near `v`.<br>FR: Le terme quadratique garde la mise à jour près de `v`.<br>中：二次项使更新保持在 `v` 附近。                                                                    |
| —                                                                                                                    | proximal gradient method, méthode du gradient proximal, 近端梯度法              | A method for minimizing a smooth term plus a nonsmooth proximable term.                                  | EN: Proximal gradient is standard for sparse learning objectives.<br>FR: Le gradient proximal est standard pour les objectifs d’apprentissage parcimonieux.<br>中：近端梯度法常用于稀疏学习目标。                          |
| —                                                                                                                    | soft-thresholding, seuillage doux, 软阈值                                     | The proximal operator of the L1 norm, shrinking coefficients toward zero.                                | EN: Soft-thresholding explains sparsity in lasso updates.<br>FR: Le seuillage doux explique la parcimonie dans les mises à jour du lasso.<br>中：软阈值解释 Lasso 更新中的稀疏性。                                       |
| —                                                                                                                    | Moreau envelope, enveloppe de Moreau, Moreau 包络                            | A smoothed approximation of a function obtained through proximal minimization.                           | EN: The Moreau envelope smooths many nonsmooth convex functions.<br>FR: L’enveloppe de Moreau lisse beaucoup de fonctions convexes non lisses.<br>中：Moreau 包络可平滑许多非光滑凸函数。                                 |
| —                                                                                                                    | ADMM, méthode ADMM, 交替方向乘子法                                                | An algorithm splitting structured optimization problems into easier subproblems with multiplier updates. | EN: ADMM is useful for distributed and composite optimization.<br>FR: L’ADMM est utile pour l’optimisation distribuée et composée.<br>中：ADMM 适合分布式优化与复合优化。                                                |

## 23.9 Numerical optimization algorithms

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                  | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                              | Definition                                                                                     | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| ----------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `x_{k+1}=x_k-\alpha_k\nabla f(x_k)`             | gradient descent, descente de gradient, 梯度下降                   | An iterative method moving opposite the gradient to reduce the objective.                      | EN: Gradient descent is a basic method for smooth optimization.<br>FR: La descente de gradient est une méthode de base pour l’optimisation lisse.<br>中：梯度下降是光滑优化的基本方法。                                    |
| `\alpha_k`                                      | step size, pas, 步长                                             | The scalar determining how far an algorithm moves at iteration `k`.                            | EN: A too-large step size can make gradient descent diverge.<br>FR: Un pas trop grand peut faire diverger la descente de gradient.<br>中：步长过大可能使梯度下降发散。                                                    |
| —                                               | line search, recherche linéaire, 线搜索                           | A procedure for choosing a step size along a search direction.                                 | EN: Backtracking line search reduces the step until sufficient decrease holds.<br>FR: La recherche linéaire par retour arrière réduit le pas jusqu’à une diminution suffisante.<br>中：回溯线搜索不断缩小步长直到满足充分下降。 |
| —                                               | Armijo condition, condition d’Armijo, Armijo 条件                | A sufficient decrease condition used in line search.                                           | EN: Armijo line search avoids steps that reduce the objective too little.<br>FR: La recherche d’Armijo évite les pas qui réduisent trop peu l’objectif.<br>中：Armijo 线搜索避免目标下降过少的步长。                       |
| —                                               | Newton’s method, méthode de Newton, Newton 法                   | A second-order method using the Hessian to form a quadratic local approximation.               | EN: Newton’s method can converge very fast near a nondegenerate minimizer.<br>FR: La méthode de Newton peut converger très vite près d’un minimiseur non dégénéré.<br>中：Newton 法在非退化极小点附近可快速收敛。           |
| `x_{k+1}=x_k-\nabla^2 f(x_k)^{-1}\nabla f(x_k)` | Newton update, mise à jour de Newton, Newton 更新                | The standard unconstrained Newton step for smooth optimization.                                | EN: The Newton update uses curvature through the Hessian.<br>FR: La mise à jour de Newton utilise la courbure via la hessienne.<br>中：Newton 更新通过 Hessian 使用曲率信息。                                          |
| —                                               | quasi-Newton method, méthode quasi-Newton, 拟 Newton 法          | A method approximating Hessian information rather than computing the exact Hessian.            | EN: BFGS is a widely used quasi-Newton method.<br>FR: BFGS est une méthode quasi-Newton très utilisée.<br>中：BFGS 是广泛使用的拟 Newton 方法。                                                                       |
| —                                               | BFGS method, méthode BFGS, BFGS 方法                             | A quasi-Newton method updating an approximation of the inverse Hessian.                        | EN: BFGS often works well for medium-scale smooth problems.<br>FR: BFGS fonctionne souvent bien pour des problèmes lisses de taille moyenne.<br>中：BFGS 常适合中等规模光滑问题。                                       |
| —                                               | conjugate gradient method, méthode du gradient conjugué, 共轭梯度法 | A method using conjugate search directions, especially effective for large quadratic problems. | EN: Conjugate gradient solves large positive definite linear systems efficiently.<br>FR: Le gradient conjugué résout efficacement de grands systèmes définis positifs.<br>中：共轭梯度法高效求解大型正定线性系统。            |
| —                                               | coordinate descent, descente par coordonnées, 坐标下降             | An algorithm optimizing one coordinate or block at a time.                                     | EN: Coordinate descent is effective for some sparse regression problems.<br>FR: La descente par coordonnées est efficace pour certaines régressions parcimonieuses.<br>中：坐标下降对某些稀疏回归问题有效。                 |
| —                                               | trust-region method, méthode de région de confiance, 信赖域方法     | A method minimizing a local model within a region where the model is trusted.                  | EN: Trust-region methods adjust the radius according to model accuracy.<br>FR: Les méthodes de région de confiance ajustent le rayon selon la précision du modèle.<br>中：信赖域方法根据模型准确性调整半径。                 |
| —                                               | interior-point method, méthode de point intérieur, 内点法         | A method approaching constrained optima through the interior of the feasible region.           | EN: Interior-point methods are central for large-scale convex optimization.<br>FR: Les méthodes de point intérieur sont centrales en optimisation convexe à grande échelle.<br>中：内点法是大规模凸优化的核心方法。         |
| —                                               | barrier method, méthode de barrière, 障碍法                       | A method adding a penalty that prevents iterates from crossing constraint boundaries.          | EN: Log barriers keep iterates inside inequality constraints.<br>FR: Les barrières logarithmiques gardent les itérés à l’intérieur des contraintes d’inégalité.<br>中：对数障碍使迭代点留在不等式约束内部。                   |

## 23.10 Stochastic optimization and learning algorithms

| Symbol (LaTeX)                            | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                      | Definition                                                                                              | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| ----------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `F(x)=\mathbb{E}_{\xi}[f(x,\xi)]`         | stochastic objective, objectif stochastique, 随机目标函数                    | An objective defined as an expectation over random data or noise.                                       | EN: Machine learning losses are often expectations over data distributions.<br>FR: Les pertes en apprentissage sont souvent des espérances sur les distributions de données.<br>中：机器学习损失常是关于数据分布的期望。                              |
| `\nabla f(x,\xi_k)`                       | stochastic gradient, gradient stochastique, 随机梯度                       | A noisy gradient estimate based on a random sample or mini-batch.                                       | EN: Stochastic gradients reduce computation per iteration.<br>FR: Les gradients stochastiques réduisent le calcul par itération.<br>中：随机梯度降低每次迭代的计算量。                                                                             |
| `x_{k+1}=x_k-\alpha_k\nabla f(x_k,\xi_k)` | stochastic gradient descent, descente de gradient stochastique, 随机梯度下降 | An iterative method using stochastic gradients instead of full gradients.                               | EN: SGD is fundamental in large-scale machine learning.<br>FR: La SGD est fondamentale en apprentissage à grande échelle.<br>中：SGD 是大规模机器学习的基础方法。                                                                                 |
| —                                         | mini-batch, mini-lot, 小批量                                              | A small subset of data used to estimate a gradient.                                                     | EN: Mini-batches balance noisy updates and computational efficiency.<br>FR: Les mini-lots équilibrent mises à jour bruitées et efficacité computationnelle.<br>中：小批量在噪声更新与计算效率之间取平衡。                                              |
| —                                         | learning rate schedule, calendrier du taux d’apprentissage, 学习率调度      | A rule for changing the step size during training.                                                      | EN: Decaying learning rates can improve convergence stability.<br>FR: Des taux d’apprentissage décroissants peuvent améliorer la stabilité de convergence.<br>中：递减学习率可改善收敛稳定性。                                                    |
| —                                         | momentum, momentum, 动量法                                                | An acceleration technique using a running average of past update directions.                            | EN: Momentum can reduce oscillation in narrow valleys.<br>FR: Le momentum peut réduire les oscillations dans des vallées étroites.<br>中：动量法可减少狭长谷中的振荡。                                                                            |
| —                                         | Nesterov acceleration, accélération de Nesterov, Nesterov 加速           | An accelerated gradient method using a look-ahead point.                                                | EN: Nesterov acceleration improves convergence rates for smooth convex optimization.<br>FR: L’accélération de Nesterov améliore les taux de convergence en optimisation convexe lisse.<br>中：Nesterov 加速改善光滑凸优化的收敛率。               |
| —                                         | adaptive gradient method, méthode de gradient adaptatif, 自适应梯度法        | A method adjusting learning rates by coordinate using past gradient information.                        | EN: Adaptive methods are common in deep learning optimization.<br>FR: Les méthodes adaptatives sont courantes en optimisation de l’apprentissage profond.<br>中：自适应方法常用于深度学习优化。                                                    |
| `Adam`                                    | Adam optimizer, optimiseur Adam, Adam 优化器                              | An adaptive stochastic optimization method using moving averages of gradients and squared gradients.    | EN: Adam is widely used for neural network training.<br>FR: Adam est très utilisé pour l’entraînement des réseaux neuronaux.<br>中：Adam 广泛用于神经网络训练。                                                                                |
| —                                         | variance reduction, réduction de variance, 方差缩减                        | Techniques reducing stochastic gradient noise to improve convergence.                                   | EN: SVRG and SAGA are variance-reduced stochastic methods.<br>FR: SVRG et SAGA sont des méthodes stochastiques à réduction de variance.<br>中：SVRG 与 SAGA 是方差缩减随机方法。                                                               |
| —                                         | online optimization, optimisation en ligne, 在线优化                       | Optimization where decisions are made sequentially as data arrive.                                      | EN: Online learning updates a model after each new example or batch.<br>FR: L’apprentissage en ligne met à jour un modèle après chaque nouvel exemple ou lot.<br>中：在线学习在每个新样本或批量后更新模型。                                            |
| —                                         | regret, regret, 后悔值                                                    | The difference between cumulative loss of an online algorithm and the best fixed decision in hindsight. | EN: Low regret means the algorithm performs nearly as well as the best fixed comparator.<br>FR: Un faible regret signifie que l’algorithme performe presque aussi bien que le meilleur comparateur fixe.<br>中：低后悔值表示算法接近事后最佳固定决策。 |

## 23.11 Variational methods and calculus of variations

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                                               | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                              | Definition                                                                                          | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `J[u]`                                                                       | functional, fonctionnelle, 泛函                                                                  | A mapping whose input is a function and whose output is a scalar.                                   | EN: Energy of a curve can be written as a functional.<br>FR: L’énergie d’une courbe peut s’écrire comme une fonctionnelle.<br>中：曲线能量可以写成泛函。                                                       |
| `\delta J`                                                                   | first variation, première variation, 一阶变分                                                      | The first-order change of a functional under a perturbation of its input function.                  | EN: Vanishing first variation is the variational analogue of zero gradient.<br>FR: L’annulation de la première variation est l’analogue variationnel du gradient nul.<br>中：一阶变分为零是变分问题中梯度为零的对应物。  |
| `\delta^2 J`                                                                 | second variation, seconde variation, 二阶变分                                                      | The second-order change of a functional under perturbation.                                         | EN: The second variation helps distinguish minima from saddle points.<br>FR: La seconde variation aide à distinguer minima et points selles.<br>中：二阶变分有助于区分极小点与鞍点。                                |
| `J[u]=\int_a^b L(x,u,u')\,dx`                                                | action functional, fonctionnelle d’action, 作用量泛函                                               | A common functional defined by integrating a Lagrangian depending on a function and its derivative. | EN: Many physics problems minimize or stationarize an action functional.<br>FR: Beaucoup de problèmes physiques minimisent ou stationnarisent une fonctionnelle d’action.<br>中：许多物理问题最小化或驻定作用量泛函。 |
| `L(x,u,u')`                                                                  | Lagrangian density, densité lagrangienne, Lagrange 密度                                          | The integrand defining an action or energy functional.                                              | EN: The Lagrangian density encodes local cost or energy.<br>FR: La densité lagrangienne encode un coût ou une énergie locale.<br>中：Lagrange 密度编码局部代价或能量。                                          |
| —                                                                            | admissible function, fonction admissible, 容许函数                                                 | A function satisfying boundary conditions and regularity requirements in a variational problem.     | EN: Boundary conditions restrict the class of admissible functions.<br>FR: Les conditions aux limites restreignent la classe des fonctions admissibles.<br>中：边界条件限制容许函数类。                         |
| `\frac{\partial L}{\partial u}-\frac{d}{dx}\frac{\partial L}{\partial u'}=0` | Euler-Lagrange equation, équation d’Euler-Lagrange, Euler-Lagrange 方程                          | The differential equation satisfied by stationary points of many variational functionals.           | EN: Geodesic equations arise from Euler-Lagrange equations.<br>FR: Les équations géodésiques proviennent des équations d’Euler-Lagrange.<br>中：测地线方程来自 Euler-Lagrange 方程。                          |
| —                                                                            | stationary point of a functional, point stationnaire d’une fonctionnelle, 泛函驻点                 | A function at which the first variation vanishes.                                                   | EN: A stationary curve need not minimize the functional.<br>FR: Une courbe stationnaire ne minimise pas nécessairement la fonctionnelle.<br>中：驻曲线不一定最小化泛函。                                        |
| —                                                                            | direct method in the calculus of variations, méthode directe du calcul des variations, 变分法直接方法 | A method proving existence of minimizers using compactness and lower semicontinuity.                | EN: The direct method is central in modern variational analysis.<br>FR: La méthode directe est centrale en analyse variationnelle moderne.<br>中：直接方法是现代变分分析的核心。                                   |
| —                                                                            | lower semicontinuity, semi-continuité inférieure, 下半连续性                                        | A property preventing the limit value from jumping above the limiting lower bound.                  | EN: Lower semicontinuity helps pass inequalities to limits.<br>FR: La semi-continuité inférieure aide à passer les inégalités à la limite.<br>中：下半连续性有助于把不等式传递到极限。                                |
| —                                                                            | compactness argument, argument de compacité, 紧性论证                                              | An existence argument extracting a convergent subsequence from a minimizing sequence.               | EN: Compactness turns approximate minimizers into actual candidates.<br>FR: La compacité transforme des minimiseurs approchés en candidats réels.<br>中：紧性把近似极小序列转化为实际候选极小元。                       |
| —                                                                            | minimizing sequence, suite minimisante, 极小化序列                                                  | A sequence of admissible functions or points whose objective values approach the infimum.           | EN: The direct method begins with a minimizing sequence.<br>FR: La méthode directe commence par une suite minimisante.<br>中：直接方法从极小化序列开始。                                                         |

## 23.12 Optimal control, dynamic programming, and equilibrium

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                                 | Definition                                                                                                      | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| --------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `u(t)`                                        | control variable, variable de contrôle, 控制变量                                                      | A time-dependent decision used to influence a dynamical system.                                                 | EN: Acceleration can be a control variable in motion planning.<br>FR: L’accélération peut être une variable de contrôle en planification de mouvement.<br>中：在运动规划中，加速度可作为控制变量。                                              |
| `x(t)`                                        | state variable, variable d’état, 状态变量                                                             | A variable describing the system state over time.                                                               | EN: Position and velocity are state variables in mechanics.<br>FR: Position et vitesse sont des variables d’état en mécanique.<br>中：在力学中，位置和速度是状态变量。                                                                        |
| `\dot{x}=f(x,u,t)`                            | controlled dynamics, dynamique contrôlée, 受控动力系统                                                  | A differential equation describing how the state evolves under a control.                                       | EN: Control problems optimize choices subject to dynamics.<br>FR: Les problèmes de contrôle optimisent des choix soumis à une dynamique.<br>中：控制问题是在动力系统约束下优化选择。                                                            |
| `J(u)=\int_0^T L(x(t),u(t),t)\,dt+\Phi(x(T))` | optimal control cost, coût de contrôle optimal, 最优控制代价                                            | A functional measuring running cost plus terminal cost.                                                         | EN: Optimal control chooses `u(t)` to minimize total cost.<br>FR: Le contrôle optimal choisit `u(t)` pour minimiser le coût total.<br>中：最优控制选择 `u(t)` 以最小化总代价。                                                              |
| `V(x,t)`                                      | value function, fonction valeur, 值函数                                                              | The optimal cost-to-go from state `x` at time `t`.                                                              | EN: The value function summarizes the best future performance.<br>FR: La fonction valeur résume la meilleure performance future.<br>中：值函数概括从当前状态出发的最佳未来表现。                                                                  |
| —                                             | Bellman principle of optimality, principe d’optimalité de Bellman, Bellman 最优性原理                  | The principle that an optimal policy remains optimal after any intermediate state along the optimal trajectory. | EN: Dynamic programming relies on Bellman’s principle.<br>FR: La programmation dynamique repose sur le principe de Bellman.<br>中：动态规划依赖 Bellman 最优性原理。                                                                      |
| `V_t+\min_u\{L+\nabla V\cdot f\}=0`           | Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equation, équation de Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman, Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman 方程 | A nonlinear PDE characterizing the value function in optimal control.                                           | EN: The HJB equation is the continuous-time form of dynamic programming.<br>FR: L’équation HJB est la forme en temps continu de la programmation dynamique.<br>中：HJB 方程是动态规划的连续时间形式。                                        |
| —                                             | Pontryagin maximum principle, principe du maximum de Pontryagin, Pontryagin 最大值原理                 | A necessary condition for optimal control using adjoint variables and a Hamiltonian.                            | EN: Pontryagin’s principle converts control optimality into a boundary value problem.<br>FR: Le principe de Pontryagin convertit l’optimalité du contrôle en problème aux limites.<br>中：Pontryagin 原理把控制最优性转化为边值问题。         |
| `H(x,u,p,t)`                                  | control Hamiltonian, hamiltonien de contrôle, 控制 Hamiltonian                                      | A function combining dynamics, cost, and adjoint variables in optimal control.                                  | EN: The optimal control often minimizes or maximizes the Hamiltonian.<br>FR: Le contrôle optimal minimise ou maximise souvent le hamiltonien.<br>中：最优控制通常最小化或最大化 Hamiltonian。                                               |
| `p(t)`                                        | adjoint variable, variable adjointe, 伴随变量                                                         | A variable encoding sensitivity of the value to changes in the state.                                           | EN: Adjoint equations are used in optimal control and PDE-constrained optimization.<br>FR: Les équations adjointes sont utilisées en contrôle optimal et optimisation sous contraintes PDE.<br>中：伴随方程用于最优控制与 PDE 约束优化。      |
| —                                             | Nash equilibrium, équilibre de Nash, Nash 均衡                                                      | A strategy profile where no player can improve by unilaterally changing strategy.                               | EN: Game-theoretic optimization studies interacting decision makers.<br>FR: L’optimisation en théorie des jeux étudie des décideurs en interaction.<br>中：博弈论优化研究相互作用的决策者。                                                   |
| —                                             | variational inequality, inégalité variationnelle, 变分不等式                                           | A problem of finding a point in a set such that a given inequality holds against all feasible directions.       | EN: Equilibrium problems can often be written as variational inequalities.<br>FR: Les problèmes d’équilibre peuvent souvent s’écrire comme inégalités variationnelles.<br>中：均衡问题常可写成变分不等式。                                  |
| —                                             | fixed-point formulation, formulation en point fixe, 不动点形式                                         | A formulation where the solution is a fixed point of a mapping.                                                 | EN: Many equilibrium and optimization algorithms can be studied as fixed-point iterations.<br>FR: Beaucoup d’algorithmes d’équilibre et d’optimisation s’étudient comme itérations de point fixe.<br>中：许多均衡和优化算法可作为不动点迭代研究。 |
# 24. Functional Analysis and Operator Theory

## 24.1 Normed spaces and Banach spaces

| Symbol (LaTeX)            | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                 | Definition                                                                                                  | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `X`                       | vector space, espace vectoriel, 向量空间                              | A set whose elements can be added and multiplied by scalars, satisfying the vector space axioms.            | EN: `\mathbb{R}^n` is a finite-dimensional vector space.<br>FR: `\mathbb{R}^n` est un espace vectoriel de dimension finie.<br>中：`\mathbb{R}^n` 是有限维向量空间。                                           |
| `\lVert x\rVert`          | norm, norme, 范数                                                   | A function measuring the size of a vector, satisfying positivity, homogeneity, and the triangle inequality. | EN: `\lVert x\rVert_2` is the Euclidean norm.<br>FR: `\lVert x\rVert_2` est la norme euclidienne.<br>中：`\lVert x\rVert_2` 是欧氏范数。                                                                   |
| `(X,\lVert\cdot\rVert)`   | normed vector space, espace vectoriel normé, 赋范向量空间               | A vector space equipped with a norm.                                                                        | EN: Continuous functions on `[0,1]` with the sup norm form a normed space.<br>FR: Les fonctions continues sur `[0,1]` avec la norme sup forment un espace normé.<br>中：`[0,1]` 上的连续函数配备上确界范数构成赋范空间。 |
| `d(x,y)=\lVert x-y\rVert` | metric induced by a norm, métrique induite par une norme, 范数诱导的度量 | The distance function obtained from a norm.                                                                 | EN: Norms give distances by measuring differences.<br>FR: Les normes donnent des distances en mesurant les différences.<br>中：范数通过度量差向量给出距离。                                                        |
| `x_n\to x`                | convergence in norm, convergence en norme, 范数收敛                   | A sequence converges in norm if `\lVert x_n-x\rVert\to0`.                                                   | EN: Norm convergence is stronger than weak convergence.<br>FR: La convergence en norme est plus forte que la convergence faible.<br>中：范数收敛强于弱收敛。                                                   |
| `(x_n)` Cauchy            | Cauchy sequence, suite de Cauchy, Cauchy 列                        | A sequence whose terms become arbitrarily close to each other in norm.                                      | EN: Completeness asks whether every Cauchy sequence converges.<br>FR: La complétude demande si toute suite de Cauchy converge.<br>中：完备性询问每个 Cauchy 列是否收敛。                                          |
| `X` complete              | complete normed space, espace normé complet, 完备赋范空间               | A normed space in which every Cauchy sequence converges to an element of the space.                         | EN: Completeness prevents limit points from escaping the space.<br>FR: La complétude empêche les limites de sortir de l’espace.<br>中：完备性防止极限点逃出空间。                                                 |
| `X` Banach                | Banach space, espace de Banach, Banach 空间                         | A complete normed vector space.                                                                             | EN: `L^p` spaces are Banach spaces for `1\leq p\leq\infty`.<br>FR: Les espaces `L^p` sont des espaces de Banach pour `1\leq p\leq\infty`.<br>中：当 `1\leq p\leq\infty` 时，`L^p` 空间是 Banach 空间。        |
| `\ell^p`                  | sequence space, espace de suites, 序列空间                            | A space of scalar sequences satisfying a summability condition.                                             | EN: `\ell^2` consists of square-summable sequences.<br>FR: `\ell^2` est formé des suites de carré sommable.<br>中：`\ell^2` 由平方可和序列构成。                                                               |
| `C(K)`                    | continuous function space, espace des fonctions continues, 连续函数空间 | The space of continuous scalar-valued functions on a compact space `K`.                                     | EN: `C([0,1])` with the sup norm is a Banach space.<br>FR: `C([0,1])` avec la norme sup est un espace de Banach.<br>中：带上确界范数的 `C([0,1])` 是 Banach 空间。                                              |
| `c_0`                     | null sequence space, espace des suites nulles, 零收敛序列空间            | The Banach space of scalar sequences converging to zero, with the sup norm.                                 | EN: A sequence in `c_0` must tend to `0`.<br>FR: Une suite dans `c_0` doit tendre vers `0`.<br>中：`c_0` 中的序列必须收敛到 `0`。                                                                              |
| `X/Y`                     | quotient normed space, espace quotient normé, 商赋范空间               | A normed space formed by identifying vectors differing by elements of a subspace `Y`.                       | EN: Quotient spaces encode equivalence classes of vectors modulo a subspace.<br>FR: Les espaces quotients encodent des classes modulo un sous-espace.<br>中：商空间表示模去某个子空间后的等价类。                      |

## 24.2 Inner product spaces and Hilbert spaces

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                                              | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                                               | Definition                                                                                         | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\langle x,y\rangle`                                                        | inner product, produit scalaire, 内积                                                                             | A scalar-valued function measuring angle and length, linear in one argument and positive definite. | EN: In `\mathbb{R}^n`, the standard inner product is the dot product.<br>FR: Dans `\mathbb{R}^n`, le produit scalaire standard est le produit usuel.<br>中：在 `\mathbb{R}^n` 中，标准内积是点积。                     |
| `\lVert x\rVert=\sqrt{\langle x,x\rangle}`                                  | norm induced by inner product, norme induite par le produit scalaire, 内积诱导范数                                    | The norm obtained from an inner product.                                                           | EN: Inner products determine lengths by `\sqrt{\langle x,x\rangle}`.<br>FR: Les produits scalaires déterminent les longueurs par `\sqrt{\langle x,x\rangle}`.<br>中：内积通过 `\sqrt{\langle x,x\rangle}` 确定长度。 |
| `x\perp y`                                                                  | orthogonality, orthogonalité, 正交                                                                                | Two vectors are orthogonal if their inner product is zero.                                         | EN: If `\langle x,y\rangle=0`, then `x` and `y` are orthogonal.<br>FR: Si `\langle x,y\rangle=0`, alors `x` et `y` sont orthogonaux.<br>中：若 `\langle x,y\rangle=0`，则 `x` 与 `y` 正交。                        |
| `H`                                                                         | Hilbert space, espace de Hilbert, Hilbert 空间                                                                    | A complete inner product space.                                                                    | EN: `L^2([0,1])` is a Hilbert space.<br>FR: `L^2([0,1])` est un espace de Hilbert.<br>中：`L^2([0,1])` 是 Hilbert 空间。                                                                                        |
| `\lvert\langle x,y\rangle\rvert\leq\lVert x\rVert\lVert y\rVert`            | Cauchy-Schwarz inequality, inégalité de Cauchy-Schwarz, Cauchy-Schwarz 不等式                                      | A fundamental bound on inner products.                                                             | EN: Cauchy-Schwarz controls correlation-like quantities.<br>FR: Cauchy-Schwarz contrôle des quantités de type corrélation.<br>中：Cauchy-Schwarz 不等式控制类似相关性的量。                                              |
| `\lVert x+y\rVert^2+\lVert x-y\rVert^2=2\lVert x\rVert^2+2\lVert y\rVert^2` | parallelogram law, identité du parallélogramme, 平行四边形恒等式                                                        | An identity characterizing norms induced by inner products.                                        | EN: A norm satisfying the parallelogram law comes from an inner product.<br>FR: Une norme satisfaisant l’identité du parallélogramme provient d’un produit scalaire.<br>中：满足平行四边形恒等式的范数来自某个内积。            |
| `M^\perp`                                                                   | orthogonal complement, complément orthogonal, 正交补                                                               | The set of vectors orthogonal to every vector in a subset `M`.                                     | EN: In a Hilbert space, closed subspaces have orthogonal complements.<br>FR: Dans un espace de Hilbert, les sous-espaces fermés ont des compléments orthogonaux.<br>中：在 Hilbert 空间中，闭子空间有正交补。             |
| `P_M`                                                                       | orthogonal projection, projection orthogonale, 正交投影                                                             | The nearest-point projection onto a closed convex set or closed subspace in a Hilbert space.       | EN: Orthogonal projection gives the best approximation in a closed subspace.<br>FR: La projection orthogonale donne la meilleure approximation dans un sous-espace fermé.<br>中：正交投影给出闭子空间中的最佳逼近。          |
| `\{e_n\}`                                                                   | orthonormal system, système orthonormal, 标准正交系                                                                  | A collection of pairwise orthogonal unit vectors.                                                  | EN: Fourier sine functions form an orthonormal system after normalization.<br>FR: Les fonctions sinus de Fourier forment un système orthonormal après normalisation.<br>中：Fourier 正弦函数归一化后构成标准正交系。        |
| —                                                                           | orthonormal basis, base orthonormale, 标准正交基                                                                     | An orthonormal system whose closed linear span is the whole Hilbert space.                         | EN: Every separable Hilbert space has a countable orthonormal basis.<br>FR: Tout espace de Hilbert séparable possède une base orthonormale dénombrable.<br>中：每个可分 Hilbert 空间都有可数标准正交基。                    |
| `x=\sum_n\langle x,e_n\rangle e_n`                                          | Fourier expansion in Hilbert space, développement de Fourier dans un espace de Hilbert, Hilbert 空间中的 Fourier 展开 | Expansion of a vector by an orthonormal basis.                                                     | EN: Hilbert space expansions generalize Fourier series.<br>FR: Les développements hilbertiens généralisent les séries de Fourier.<br>中：Hilbert 空间展开推广了 Fourier 级数。                                        |
| `\sum_n\lvert\langle x,e_n\rangle\rvert^2=\lVert x\rVert^2`                 | Parseval identity, identité de Parseval, Parseval 恒等式                                                           | An identity equating norm squared with the sum of squared Fourier coefficients.                    | EN: Parseval identity converts geometric length into coefficient energy.<br>FR: L’identité de Parseval convertit la longueur géométrique en énergie des coefficients.<br>中：Parseval 恒等式把几何长度转化为系数能量。      |

## 24.3 Linear operators and boundedness

| Symbol (LaTeX)                        | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                               | Definition                                                                          | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| ------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `T:X\to Y`                            | linear operator, opérateur linéaire, 线性算子                       | A map between vector spaces preserving addition and scalar multiplication.          | EN: A matrix defines a linear operator on finite-dimensional spaces.<br>FR: Une matrice définit un opérateur linéaire en dimension finie.<br>中：矩阵定义有限维空间上的线性算子。                                                            |
| `Tx`                                  | operator action, action d’un opérateur, 算子作用                    | The value obtained by applying an operator `T` to a vector `x`.                     | EN: Differential operators act on functions.<br>FR: Les opérateurs différentiels agissent sur les fonctions.<br>中：微分算子作用于函数。                                                                                               |
| `\mathcal{L}(X,Y)`                    | bounded linear operators, opérateurs linéaires bornés, 有界线性算子空间 | The space of bounded linear operators from `X` to `Y`.                              | EN: `\mathcal{L}(X,Y)` is a Banach space when `Y` is Banach.<br>FR: `\mathcal{L}(X,Y)` est un espace de Banach lorsque `Y` est de Banach.<br>中：当 `Y` 是 Banach 空间时，`\mathcal{L}(X,Y)` 是 Banach 空间。                          |
| `\lVert T\rVert`                      | operator norm, norme d’opérateur, 算子范数                          | The supremum of `\lVert Tx\rVert` over vectors with norm at most one.               | EN: The operator norm measures maximum amplification.<br>FR: La norme d’opérateur mesure l’amplification maximale.<br>中：算子范数度量最大放大倍数。                                                                                      |
| `\lVert Tx\rVert\leq C\lVert x\rVert` | bounded operator condition, condition d’opérateur borné, 有界算子条件 | A linear operator is bounded if it satisfies this inequality for some constant `C`. | EN: Bounded linear operators are continuous.<br>FR: Les opérateurs linéaires bornés sont continus.<br>中：有界线性算子是连续的。                                                                                                        |
| —                                     | continuous linear operator, opérateur linéaire continu, 连续线性算子  | A linear operator continuous with respect to the norm topologies.                   | EN: For linear maps between normed spaces, continuity and boundedness are equivalent.<br>FR: Pour les applications linéaires entre espaces normés, continuité et bornitude sont équivalentes.<br>中：赋范空间之间的线性映射中，连续性与有界性等价。 |
| `\operatorname{Ker}(T)`               | kernel, noyau, 核                                                | The subspace of vectors mapped to zero by `T`.                                      | EN: Injectivity is equivalent to a zero kernel for linear maps.<br>FR: L’injectivité équivaut à un noyau nul pour les applications linéaires.<br>中：线性映射单射等价于核为零。                                                           |
| `\operatorname{Ran}(T)`               | range, image, 值域 / 像                                            | The set of all values `Tx` attained by an operator.                                 | EN: Surjectivity means the range equals the target space.<br>FR: La surjectivité signifie que l’image égale l’espace cible.<br>中：满射表示值域等于目标空间。                                                                             |
| `T^{-1}`                              | inverse operator, opérateur inverse, 逆算子                        | An operator reversing the action of a bijective operator.                           | EN: The inverse of a bounded bijective operator between Banach spaces is bounded.<br>FR: L’inverse d’un opérateur borné bijectif entre espaces de Banach est borné.<br>中：Banach 空间之间的有界双射算子的逆也是有界的。                        |
| `T^n`                                 | operator power, puissance d’un opérateur, 算子幂                   | Repeated composition of an operator with itself.                                    | EN: Iteration schemes often study powers `T^n`.<br>FR: Les schémas itératifs étudient souvent les puissances `T^n`.<br>中：迭代格式常研究算子幂 `T^n`。                                                                                 |
| `I`                                   | identity operator, opérateur identité, 恒等算子                     | The operator satisfying `Ix=x` for all vectors `x`.                                 | EN: Resolvents are built from `\lambda I-T`.<br>FR: Les résolvantes sont construites à partir de `\lambda I-T`.<br>中：预解式由 `\lambda I-T` 构造。                                                                                |
| —                                     | finite-rank operator, opérateur de rang fini, 有限秩算子             | An operator whose range is finite-dimensional.                                      | EN: Finite-rank operators approximate many compact operators.<br>FR: Les opérateurs de rang fini approximent beaucoup d’opérateurs compacts.<br>中：有限秩算子可逼近许多紧算子。                                                           |

## 24.4 Dual spaces and weak topologies

| Symbol (LaTeX)                         | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                               | Definition                                                                                       | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| -------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `X^\ast`                               | dual space, espace dual, 对偶空间                                   | The space of all continuous linear functionals on `X`.                                           | EN: The dual space turns vectors into scalar measurements.<br>FR: L’espace dual transforme les vecteurs en mesures scalaires.<br>中：对偶空间把向量转化为标量测量。                                                                                                  |
| `f\in X^\ast`                          | continuous linear functional, forme linéaire continue, 连续线性泛函   | A bounded linear map from `X` to the scalar field.                                               | EN: Integration against a fixed function can define a continuous functional on some function spaces.<br>FR: L’intégration contre une fonction fixée peut définir une forme continue sur certains espaces de fonctions.<br>中：对固定函数积分可在某些函数空间上定义连续泛函。 |
| `\langle f,x\rangle`                   | dual pairing, crochet de dualité, 对偶配对                          | The scalar obtained by applying a functional `f` to a vector `x`.                                | EN: Dual pairing is often written as `\langle f,x\rangle=f(x)`.<br>FR: Le crochet de dualité s’écrit souvent `\langle f,x\rangle=f(x)`.<br>中：对偶配对常写作 `\langle f,x\rangle=f(x)`。                                                                     |
| `X^{\ast\ast}`                         | bidual space, bidual, 二重对偶空间                                    | The dual space of the dual space.                                                                | EN: Every Banach space embeds canonically into its bidual.<br>FR: Tout espace de Banach se plonge canoniquement dans son bidual.<br>中：每个 Banach 空间都可典范嵌入其二重对偶。                                                                                      |
| `J:X\to X^{\ast\ast}`                  | canonical embedding, plongement canonique, 典范嵌入                 | The natural map sending `x` to evaluation at `x` on functionals.                                 | EN: The canonical embedding identifies a vector by how all functionals evaluate it.<br>FR: Le plongement canonique identifie un vecteur par toutes ses évaluations fonctionnelles.<br>中：典范嵌入通过所有泛函的取值识别向量。                                          |
| `X` reflexive                          | reflexive Banach space, espace de Banach réflexif, 自反 Banach 空间 | A Banach space whose canonical embedding into its bidual is onto.                                | EN: Hilbert spaces are reflexive.<br>FR: Les espaces de Hilbert sont réflexifs.<br>中：Hilbert 空间是自反的。                                                                                                                                                |
| `x_n\rightharpoonup x`                 | weak convergence, convergence faible, 弱收敛                       | A sequence converges weakly if every continuous linear functional converges on it.               | EN: Weak convergence tests convergence through all functionals.<br>FR: La convergence faible teste la convergence par toutes les formes continues.<br>中：弱收敛通过所有连续线性泛函检验收敛。                                                                          |
| `f_n\overset{\ast}{\rightharpoonup} f` | weak-star convergence, convergence faible-étoile, 弱星收敛          | Convergence in a dual space tested against elements of the original space.                       | EN: Weak-star convergence is central in dual-space compactness.<br>FR: La convergence faible-étoile est centrale pour la compacité dans les espaces duaux.<br>中：弱星收敛是对偶空间紧性理论的核心。                                                                   |
| `\sigma(X,X^\ast)`                     | weak topology, topologie faible, 弱拓扑                            | The coarsest topology on `X` making every element of `X^\ast` continuous.                        | EN: Weak topology has fewer open sets than norm topology.<br>FR: La topologie faible a moins d’ouverts que la topologie de norme.<br>中：弱拓扑比范数拓扑拥有更少开集。                                                                                              |
| `\sigma(X^\ast,X)`                     | weak-star topology, topologie faible-étoile, 弱星拓扑               | The coarsest topology on `X^\ast` making evaluations at points of `X` continuous.                | EN: Banach-Alaoglu uses the weak-star topology.<br>FR: Banach-Alaoglu utilise la topologie faible-étoile.<br>中：Banach-Alaoglu 定理使用弱星拓扑。                                                                                                             |
| `X^\ast=(L^p)^\ast`                    | dual representation, représentation duale, 对偶表示                 | An identification of a dual space with a more concrete function space under suitable conditions. | EN: For `1<p<\infty`, the dual of `L^p` is `L^q` with conjugate exponent `q`.<br>FR: Pour `1<p<\infty`, le dual de `L^p` est `L^q` avec exposant conjugué `q`.<br>中：当 `1<p<\infty` 时，`L^p` 的对偶是共轭指数对应的 `L^q`。                                       |
| —                                      | annihilator, annulateur, 零化子                                    | The set of functionals vanishing on a given subset or subspace.                                  | EN: Annihilators connect subspaces with dual-space geometry.<br>FR: Les annulateurs relient les sous-espaces à la géométrie duale.<br>中：零化子连接子空间与对偶空间几何。                                                                                            |

## 24.5 Compactness, weak compactness, and approximation

| Symbol (LaTeX)       | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                     | Definition                                                                                                             | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| -------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| —                    | compact set, ensemble compact, 紧集                                     | A set in which every open cover has a finite subcover, or equivalently sequential compactness in many metric settings. | EN: Closed bounded sets in finite-dimensional Euclidean spaces are compact.<br>FR: Les ensembles fermés bornés en dimension finie euclidienne sont compacts.<br>中：有限维欧氏空间中的闭有界集是紧的。                                           |
| —                    | relatively compact set, ensemble relativement compact, 相对紧集           | A set whose closure is compact.                                                                                        | EN: Relative compactness means every sequence has a convergent subsequence after closure.<br>FR: La compacité relative signifie que toute suite possède une sous-suite convergente après adhérence.<br>中：相对紧性表示闭包中每个序列都有收敛子列。 |
| —                    | weakly compact set, ensemble faiblement compact, 弱紧集                  | A set compact with respect to the weak topology.                                                                       | EN: Closed bounded convex sets in reflexive Banach spaces are weakly compact.<br>FR: Les ensembles fermés bornés convexes dans les espaces réflexifs sont faiblement compacts.<br>中：自反 Banach 空间中的闭有界凸集是弱紧的。                  |
| —                    | sequential compactness, compacité séquentielle, 序列紧性                  | A property that every sequence has a convergent subsequence.                                                           | EN: In metric spaces, compactness and sequential compactness are equivalent.<br>FR: Dans les espaces métriques, compacité et compacité séquentielle sont équivalentes.<br>中：在度量空间中，紧性与序列紧性等价。                                 |
| `B_X`                | unit ball, boule unité, 单位球                                           | The set of vectors with norm at most one.                                                                              | EN: In infinite-dimensional normed spaces, the closed unit ball is not norm compact.<br>FR: En dimension infinie, la boule unité fermée n’est pas compacte en norme.<br>中：无限维赋范空间中的闭单位球不是范数紧的。                                |
| —                    | Banach-Alaoglu theorem, théorème de Banach-Alaoglu, Banach-Alaoglu 定理 | The closed unit ball of the dual space is compact in the weak-star topology.                                           | EN: Banach-Alaoglu is a key compactness theorem in functional analysis.<br>FR: Banach-Alaoglu est un théorème clé de compacité en analyse fonctionnelle.<br>中：Banach-Alaoglu 是泛函分析中的关键紧性定理。                                   |
| —                    | Arzelà-Ascoli theorem, théorème d’Arzelà-Ascoli, Arzelà-Ascoli 定理     | A theorem characterizing compactness of families of continuous functions by boundedness and equicontinuity.            | EN: Arzelà-Ascoli is used to extract convergent subsequences of functions.<br>FR: Arzelà-Ascoli sert à extraire des sous-suites convergentes de fonctions.<br>中：Arzelà-Ascoli 定理用于抽取函数列的收敛子列。                                 |
| —                    | equicontinuity, équicontinuité, 等度连续性                                 | A uniform continuity condition holding simultaneously for a family of functions.                                       | EN: Equicontinuity prevents functions from oscillating too wildly.<br>FR: L’équicontinuité empêche les fonctions d’osciller trop violemment.<br>中：等度连续性防止函数族过度振荡。                                                             |
| —                    | compact embedding, plongement compact, 紧嵌入                            | An embedding where bounded sequences have convergent subsequences in the target space.                                 | EN: Sobolev compact embeddings are essential in PDE existence proofs.<br>FR: Les plongements compacts de Sobolev sont essentiels dans les preuves d’existence pour les EDP.<br>中：Sobolev 紧嵌入对 PDE 存在性证明很重要。                   |
| `X\hookrightarrow Y` | continuous embedding, plongement continu, 连续嵌入                        | An inclusion map from `X` into `Y` that is continuous.                                                                 | EN: Continuous embeddings compare strength of function norms.<br>FR: Les plongements continus comparent la force des normes fonctionnelles.<br>中：连续嵌入比较函数范数的强弱。                                                               |
| `X\Subset Y`         | compact embedding notation, notation de plongement compact, 紧嵌入记号     | A notation indicating that the embedding from `X` into `Y` is compact.                                                 | EN: `H^1(\Omega)\Subset L^2(\Omega)` may hold for bounded regular domains.<br>FR: `H^1(\Omega)\Subset L^2(\Omega)` peut valoir pour des domaines bornés réguliers.<br>中：对有界正则区域，可能有 `H^1(\Omega)\Subset L^2(\Omega)`。         |
| —                    | approximation property, propriété d’approximation, 逼近性质               | A property describing whether identity operators can be approximated by finite-rank operators in an appropriate sense. | EN: Approximation properties connect Banach space geometry with operator theory.<br>FR: Les propriétés d’approximation relient la géométrie des Banach à la théorie des opérateurs.<br>中：逼近性质连接 Banach 空间几何与算子理论。             |

## 24.6 Fundamental theorems of Banach spaces

| Symbol (LaTeX)            | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                              | Definition                                                                                                          | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| ------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| —                         | Hahn-Banach theorem, théorème de Hahn-Banach, Hahn-Banach 定理                                   | A theorem extending bounded linear functionals while preserving their norm under suitable assumptions.              | EN: Hahn-Banach separates points and subspaces by continuous functionals.<br>FR: Hahn-Banach sépare points et sous-espaces par des formes continues.<br>中：Hahn-Banach 定理用连续泛函分离点与子空间。                                |
| —                         | separation theorem, théorème de séparation, 分离定理                                               | A theorem separating convex sets by continuous linear functionals under suitable conditions.                        | EN: Separation theorems are central in convex analysis and duality.<br>FR: Les théorèmes de séparation sont centraux en analyse convexe et dualité.<br>中：分离定理是凸分析与对偶理论的核心。                                           |
| —                         | uniform boundedness principle, principe de bornitude uniforme, 一致有界原理                          | A theorem stating that pointwise bounded families of bounded linear operators are uniformly bounded in norm.        | EN: Pointwise control of many operators can imply uniform operator norm control.<br>FR: Le contrôle ponctuel d’une famille d’opérateurs peut impliquer un contrôle uniforme des normes.<br>中：对一族算子的逐点控制可推出算子范数的一致控制。 |
| —                         | Banach-Steinhaus theorem, théorème de Banach-Steinhaus, Banach-Steinhaus 定理                    | Another name for the uniform boundedness principle.                                                                 | EN: Banach-Steinhaus is frequently used to prove divergence phenomena.<br>FR: Banach-Steinhaus est souvent utilisé pour prouver des phénomènes de divergence.<br>中：Banach-Steinhaus 常用于证明发散现象。                       |
| —                         | open mapping theorem, théorème de l’application ouverte, 开映射定理                                 | A surjective bounded linear operator between Banach spaces maps open sets to open sets.                             | EN: Open mapping theorem implies stability of solving linear equations.<br>FR: Le théorème de l’application ouverte implique la stabilité de résolution des équations linéaires.<br>中：开映射定理蕴含线性方程求解的稳定性。             |
| —                         | bounded inverse theorem, théorème de l’inverse borné, 有界逆定理                                    | A bijective bounded linear operator between Banach spaces has a bounded inverse.                                    | EN: Algebraic invertibility plus Banach completeness gives continuous invertibility.<br>FR: L’inversibilité algébrique plus la complétude de Banach donne l’inversibilité continue.<br>中：代数可逆性加 Banach 完备性给出连续可逆性。   |
| —                         | closed graph theorem, théorème du graphe fermé, 闭图像定理                                          | A linear operator between Banach spaces with closed graph is bounded.                                               | EN: Closed graph theorem proves boundedness from graph closure.<br>FR: Le théorème du graphe fermé prouve la bornitude à partir de la fermeture du graphe.<br>中：闭图像定理从图像闭性推出有界性。                                     |
| `\operatorname{Graph}(T)` | graph of an operator, graphe d’un opérateur, 算子图像                                              | The set of pairs `(x,Tx)` for vectors in the domain of `T`.                                                         | EN: Unbounded operators are often studied through their graphs.<br>FR: Les opérateurs non bornés sont souvent étudiés par leurs graphes.<br>中：无界算子常通过其图像研究。                                                          |
| —                         | Baire category theorem, théorème de Baire, Baire 范畴定理                                          | A theorem stating that complete metric spaces cannot be written as countable unions of nowhere dense closed sets.   | EN: Many Banach space theorems rely on Baire category.<br>FR: Beaucoup de théorèmes des espaces de Banach reposent sur Baire.<br>中：许多 Banach 空间定理依赖 Baire 范畴定理。                                                      |
| —                         | principle of condensation of singularities, principe de condensation des singularités, 奇异性凝聚原理 | A consequence of uniform boundedness showing that large operator norms cause large values on a dense set.           | EN: It explains why pointwise divergence can be widespread.<br>FR: Il explique pourquoi la divergence ponctuelle peut être répandue.<br>中：它解释逐点发散为何可能广泛存在。                                                           |
| —                         | Mazur theorem, théorème de Mazur, Mazur 定理                                                     | A theorem stating that weak limits can be obtained as norm limits of convex combinations under suitable conditions. | EN: Mazur’s theorem bridges weak and strong convergence using convexity.<br>FR: Le théorème de Mazur relie convergence faible et forte par convexité.<br>中：Mazur 定理通过凸组合连接弱收敛与强收敛。                                   |
| —                         | Krein-Milman theorem, théorème de Krein-Milman, Krein-Milman 定理                                | A theorem representing compact convex sets through their extreme points in locally convex spaces.                   | EN: Krein-Milman connects convex geometry with functional analysis.<br>FR: Krein-Milman relie géométrie convexe et analyse fonctionnelle.<br>中：Krein-Milman 定理连接凸几何与泛函分析。                                            |

## 24.7 Function spaces and Sobolev spaces

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                            | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                          | Definition                                                                                           | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| --------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `L^p(\Omega)`                                             | Lp space, espace Lp, Lp 空间                                                 | The space of measurable functions whose p-th power is integrable, modulo equality almost everywhere. | EN: `L^2(\Omega)` is both a Banach space and a Hilbert space.<br>FR: `L^2(\Omega)` est à la fois un espace de Banach et de Hilbert.<br>中：`L^2(\Omega)` 既是 Banach 空间，也是 Hilbert 空间。                    |
| `\lVert f\rVert_p`                                        | Lp norm, norme Lp, Lp 范数                                                   | The norm measuring p-integrability of a function.                                                    | EN: `\lVert f\rVert_1` measures total absolute mass.<br>FR: `\lVert f\rVert_1` mesure la masse absolue totale.<br>中：`\lVert f\rVert_1` 度量绝对总质量。                                                       |
| `L^\infty(\Omega)`                                        | essentially bounded functions, fonctions essentiellement bornées, 本质有界函数空间 | The space of measurable functions bounded outside a null set.                                        | EN: `L^\infty` ignores changes on measure-zero sets.<br>FR: `L^\infty` ignore les modifications sur des ensembles de mesure nulle.<br>中：`L^\infty` 忽略零测集上的改变。                                         |
| `p,q` conjugate                                           | conjugate exponents, exposants conjugués, 共轭指数                             | Exponents satisfying `1/p+1/q=1`.                                                                    | EN: Hölder’s inequality pairs `L^p` with `L^q`.<br>FR: L’inégalité de Hölder associe `L^p` à `L^q`.<br>中：Hölder 不等式把 `L^p` 与 `L^q` 配对。                                                                |
| `\lVert fg\rVert_1\leq\lVert f\rVert_p\lVert g\rVert_q`   | Hölder inequality, inégalité de Hölder, Hölder 不等式                         | A fundamental inequality controlling products of functions in conjugate Lp spaces.                   | EN: Hölder generalizes Cauchy-Schwarz.<br>FR: Hölder généralise Cauchy-Schwarz.<br>中：Hölder 不等式推广了 Cauchy-Schwarz 不等式。                                                                                |
| `\lVert f+g\rVert_p\leq\lVert f\rVert_p+\lVert g\rVert_p` | Minkowski inequality, inégalité de Minkowski, Minkowski 不等式                | The triangle inequality for `L^p` norms.                                                             | EN: Minkowski proves that `L^p` is normed for `p\geq1`.<br>FR: Minkowski prouve que `L^p` est normé pour `p\geq1`.<br>中：Minkowski 不等式证明 `p\geq1` 时 `L^p` 是赋范空间。                                       |
| `W^{k,p}(\Omega)`                                         | Sobolev space, espace de Sobolev, Sobolev 空间                               | A function space whose weak derivatives up to order `k` lie in `L^p`.                                | EN: Sobolev spaces are central in PDE theory.<br>FR: Les espaces de Sobolev sont centraux dans la théorie des EDP.<br>中：Sobolev 空间是 PDE 理论的核心。                                                        |
| `H^k(\Omega)`                                             | L2-based Sobolev space, espace de Sobolev basé sur L2, 基于 L2 的 Sobolev 空间  | A Sobolev space usually meaning `W^{k,2}(\Omega)`.                                                   | EN: `H^1` functions have square-integrable first weak derivatives.<br>FR: Les fonctions `H^1` ont des dérivées faibles premières de carré intégrable.<br>中：`H^1` 函数具有平方可积的一阶弱导数。                      |
| `D^\alpha u`                                              | weak derivative, dérivée faible, 弱导数                                       | A generalized derivative defined by integration against test functions.                              | EN: Weak derivatives allow nonsmooth functions in PDE analysis.<br>FR: Les dérivées faibles permettent des fonctions non lisses en analyse des EDP.<br>中：弱导数允许 PDE 分析处理非光滑函数。                         |
| `C_c^\infty(\Omega)`                                      | test function space, espace des fonctions test, 测试函数空间                     | The space of smooth functions with compact support in `\Omega`.                                      | EN: Test functions are used to define distributions and weak derivatives.<br>FR: Les fonctions test servent à définir distributions et dérivées faibles.<br>中：测试函数用于定义分布与弱导数。                         |
| —                                                         | trace operator, opérateur de trace, 迹算子                                    | An operator assigning boundary values to Sobolev functions under suitable conditions.                | EN: Trace theorems make boundary conditions meaningful for weak solutions.<br>FR: Les théorèmes de trace donnent un sens aux conditions au bord pour les solutions faibles.<br>中：迹定理使弱解的边界条件有意义。      |
| —                                                         | Poincaré inequality, inégalité de Poincaré, Poincaré 不等式                   | An inequality controlling function norms by derivative norms under boundary or mean-zero conditions. | EN: Poincaré inequality is used to prove coercivity in variational PDEs.<br>FR: L’inégalité de Poincaré sert à prouver la coercivité dans les EDP variationnelles.<br>中：Poincaré 不等式用于证明变分 PDE 中的强制性。 |

## 24.8 Distributions and generalized functions

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                          | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                              | Definition                                                                                      | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| ------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\mathcal{D}(\Omega)`                                   | test function space, espace des fonctions test, 测试函数空间                                         | Another common notation for `C_c^\infty(\Omega)`.                                               | EN: Distributions act on functions in `\mathcal{D}(\Omega)`.<br>FR: Les distributions agissent sur les fonctions de `\mathcal{D}(\Omega)`.<br>中：分布作用于 `\mathcal{D}(\Omega)` 中的测试函数。                       |
| `\mathcal{D}'(\Omega)`                                  | distribution space, espace des distributions, 分布空间                                             | The space of continuous linear functionals on test functions.                                   | EN: Distributions generalize functions and measures.<br>FR: Les distributions généralisent fonctions et mesures.<br>中：分布推广了函数与测度。                                                                         |
