| —                                            | density transformation, transformation de densité, 密度变换                                    | The rule describing how probability densities change under transformations.                         | EN: For one-to-one smooth maps, densities transform with the inverse Jacobian factor.<br>FR: Pour les applications lisses injectives, les densités se transforment avec le facteur jacobien inverse.<br>中：对一一光滑映射，密度按逆 Jacobi 因子变换。 |
| —                                            | image measure, mesure image, 像测度                                                           | Another term for pushforward measure.                                                               | EN: Image measures describe how mass is transported by a map.<br>FR: Les mesures images décrivent comment la masse est transportée par une application.<br>中：像测度描述质量如何被映射搬运。                                                        |
| —                                            | transport map, application de transport, 传输映射                                              | A map pushing one measure to another.                                                               | EN: Optimal transport studies maps and plans moving one measure to another.<br>FR: Le transport optimal étudie les applications et plans déplaçant une mesure vers une autre.<br>中：最优传输研究把一个测度搬运到另一个测度的映射与计划。                       |
| `T_\#\mu=\nu`                                | measure-preserving transformation, transformation préservant la mesure, 保测变换               | A transformation that pushes `\mu` forward to `\nu`, often with `\nu=\mu`.                          | EN: Rotations preserve Lebesgue measure on the circle.<br>FR: Les rotations préservent la mesure de Lebesgue sur le cercle.<br>中：圆上的旋转保持 Lebesgue 测度。                                                                               |
| —                                            | invariant measure, mesure invariante, 不变测度                                                 | A measure unchanged by a transformation or flow.                                                    | EN: Invariant measures are central in ergodic theory.<br>FR: Les mesures invariantes sont centrales en théorie ergodique.<br>中：不变测度是遍历理论的核心。                                                                                        |

## 25.9 Signed, complex, and vector measures

| Symbol (LaTeX)                       | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                       | Definition                                                                                               | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| ------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\nu`                                | signed measure, mesure signée, 符号测度                                     | A countably additive set function allowed to take positive and negative values, but not both infinities. | EN: Difference of two finite measures is a signed measure.<br>FR: La différence de deux mesures finies est une mesure signée.<br>中：两个有限测度之差是符号测度。                                                                          |
| —                                    | positive set, ensemble positif, 正集                                      | A measurable set on which every measurable subset has nonnegative signed measure.                        | EN: Hahn decomposition separates a signed measure into positive and negative regions.<br>FR: La décomposition de Hahn sépare une mesure signée en régions positive et négative.<br>中：Hahn 分解把符号测度分成正区域和负区域。                |
| —                                    | negative set, ensemble négatif, 负集                                      | A measurable set on which every measurable subset has nonpositive signed measure.                        | EN: Negative sets support the negative part of a signed measure.<br>FR: Les ensembles négatifs portent la partie négative d’une mesure signée.<br>中：负集承载符号测度的负部分。                                                          |
| —                                    | Hahn decomposition, décomposition de Hahn, Hahn 分解                      | A decomposition of the space into a positive set and a negative set for a signed measure.                | EN: Hahn decomposition is unique up to null sets.<br>FR: La décomposition de Hahn est unique à ensembles nuls près.<br>中：Hahn 分解在零测意义下唯一。                                                                                  |
| `\nu=\nu^+-\nu^-`                    | Jordan decomposition, décomposition de Jordan, Jordan 分解                | The representation of a signed measure as the difference of two mutually singular positive measures.     | EN: Jordan decomposition separates positive and negative mass.<br>FR: La décomposition de Jordan sépare masse positive et masse négative.<br>中：Jordan 分解分离正质量与负质量。                                                         |
| `\lvert\nu\rvert`                    | total variation measure, mesure de variation totale, 总变差测度              | A positive measure measuring the total magnitude of a signed or complex measure.                         | EN: Total variation ignores signs and measures total mass movement.<br>FR: La variation totale ignore les signes et mesure la masse totale.<br>中：总变差忽略符号并度量总质量。                                                            |
| `\lVert\nu\rVert=\lvert\nu\rvert(X)` | total variation norm, norme de variation totale, 总变差范数                  | The total variation of a signed or complex measure over the whole space.                                 | EN: Finite signed measures form a normed space under total variation.<br>FR: Les mesures signées finies forment un espace normé par variation totale.<br>中：有限符号测度在总变差范数下构成赋范空间。                                            |
| —                                    | complex measure, mesure complexe, 复测度                                   | A countably additive set function taking complex values.                                                 | EN: Complex measures appear in Fourier analysis and spectral theory.<br>FR: Les mesures complexes apparaissent en analyse de Fourier et théorie spectrale.<br>中：复测度出现在 Fourier 分析和谱理论中。                                    |
| —                                    | finite signed measure, mesure signée finie, 有限符号测度                      | A signed measure with finite total variation.                                                            | EN: Finite signed measures can be integrated against bounded measurable functions.<br>FR: Les mesures signées finies peuvent intégrer les fonctions mesurables bornées.<br>中：有限符号测度可对有界可测函数积分。                             |
| `m:\mathcal{A}\to E`                 | vector measure, mesure vectorielle, 向量测度                                | A countably additive set function taking values in a vector space or Banach space.                       | EN: Vector measures generalize scalar measures to Banach-valued mass.<br>FR: Les mesures vectorielles généralisent les mesures scalaires à des masses banachiques.<br>中：向量测度把标量测度推广到 Banach 值质量。                           |
| —                                    | variation of vector measure, variation d’une mesure vectorielle, 向量测度变差 | A scalar measure or set function measuring total size of a vector measure.                               | EN: Bounded variation controls vector-valued integration.<br>FR: La variation bornée contrôle l’intégration à valeurs vectorielles.<br>中：有界变差控制向量值积分。                                                                      |
| —                                    | total variation distance, distance en variation totale, 总变差距离           | A distance between probability measures defined by the total variation of their difference.              | EN: Total variation distance measures the largest probability discrepancy over events.<br>FR: La distance en variation totale mesure le plus grand écart de probabilité sur les événements.<br>中：总变差距离度量两个概率测度在事件概率上的最大差异。 |

## 25.10 Absolute continuity, singularity, and Radon-Nikodym theorem

| Symbol (LaTeX)                           | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                    | Definition                                                                                                     | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| ---------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\nu\ll\mu`                              | absolute continuity of measures, continuité absolue des mesures, 测度绝对连续              | `\nu` is absolutely continuous with respect to `\mu` if every `\mu`-null set is also `\nu`-null.               | EN: Densities describe measures absolutely continuous with respect to a base measure.<br>FR: Les densités décrivent les mesures absolument continues par rapport à une mesure de base.<br>中：密度描述相对于基准测度绝对连续的测度。                                   |
| `\nu\perp\mu`                            | singular measures, mesures singulières, 奇异测度                                         | Two measures are singular if they are concentrated on disjoint measurable sets.                                | EN: A point mass is singular with respect to Lebesgue measure.<br>FR: Une masse ponctuelle est singulière par rapport à la mesure de Lebesgue.<br>中：点质量相对于 Lebesgue 测度是奇异的。                                                                       |
| `\frac{d\nu}{d\mu}`                      | Radon-Nikodym derivative, dérivée de Radon-Nikodym, Radon-Nikodym 导数                 | A density representing an absolutely continuous measure `\nu` with respect to `\mu`.                           | EN: If `d\nu=f\,d\mu`, then `f=\frac{d\nu}{d\mu}`.<br>FR: Si `d\nu=f\,d\mu`, alors `f=\frac{d\nu}{d\mu}`.<br>中：若 `d\nu=f\,d\mu`，则 `f=\frac{d\nu}{d\mu}`。                                                                                          |
| `d\nu=f\,d\mu`                           | density representation, représentation par densité, 密度表示                             | A notation meaning `\nu(A)=\int_A f\,d\mu`.                                                                    | EN: Probability densities are Radon-Nikodym derivatives with respect to Lebesgue measure.<br>FR: Les densités de probabilité sont des dérivées de Radon-Nikodym par rapport à la mesure de Lebesgue.<br>中：概率密度是相对于 Lebesgue 测度的 Radon-Nikodym 导数。 |
| —                                        | Radon-Nikodym theorem, théorème de Radon-Nikodym, Radon-Nikodym 定理                   | A theorem guaranteeing a density for one sigma-finite measure absolutely continuous with respect to another.   | EN: The theorem turns absolute continuity into a derivative of measures.<br>FR: Le théorème transforme la continuité absolue en dérivée de mesures.<br>中：该定理把测度绝对连续性转化为测度导数。                                                                      |
| —                                        | Lebesgue decomposition theorem, théorème de décomposition de Lebesgue, Lebesgue 分解定理 | A theorem decomposing a measure into absolutely continuous and singular parts with respect to another measure. | EN: Any finite measure can be decomposed relative to a reference measure.<br>FR: Toute mesure finie peut se décomposer relativement à une mesure de référence.<br>中：任意有限测度都可相对于参考测度分解。                                                            |
| `\nu=\nu_{\mathrm{ac}}+\nu_{\mathrm{s}}` | Lebesgue decomposition, décomposition de Lebesgue, Lebesgue 分解                       | The decomposition of `\nu` into absolutely continuous and singular components relative to `\mu`.               | EN: One part has density; the other lives on a singular set.<br>FR: Une partie possède une densité ; l’autre vit sur un ensemble singulier.<br>中：一部分有密度，另一部分集中在奇异集合上。                                                                             |
| —                                        | atomic measure, mesure atomique, 原子测度                                                | A measure concentrated on atoms, often countable point masses.                                                 | EN: A discrete distribution is an atomic probability measure.<br>FR: Une distribution discrète est une mesure de probabilité atomique.<br>中：离散分布是原子概率测度。                                                                                          |
| —                                        | atom, atome, 原子                                                                      | A measurable set of positive measure that cannot be split into smaller positive-measure pieces.                | EN: Single points are atoms for counting measure.<br>FR: Les singletons sont des atomes pour la mesure de comptage.<br>中：对计数测度，单点集是原子。                                                                                                            |
| —                                        | non-atomic measure, mesure sans atomes, 非原子测度                                        | A measure with no atoms.                                                                                       | EN: Lebesgue measure is non-atomic.<br>FR: La mesure de Lebesgue est sans atomes.<br>中：Lebesgue 测度是非原子的。                                                                                                                                          |
| `P\ll Q`                                 | dominated statistical model, modèle statistique dominé, 被支配统计模型                      | A family of probability measures all absolutely continuous with respect to a common measure.                   | EN: Dominated models admit likelihood densities.<br>FR: Les modèles dominés admettent des densités de vraisemblance.<br>中：被支配模型具有似然密度。                                                                                                            |
| `\frac{dP}{dQ}`                          | likelihood ratio, rapport de vraisemblance, 似然比                                      | The Radon-Nikodym derivative of one probability measure with respect to another.                               | EN: Likelihood ratios compare two probabilistic models.<br>FR: Les rapports de vraisemblance comparent deux modèles probabilistes.<br>中：似然比比较两个概率模型。                                                                                              |

## 25.11 Lp spaces and modes of integrability

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                                   | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                       | Definition                                                                                           | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `L^p(X,\mu)`                                                     | Lp space, espace Lp, Lp 空间                                                              | The space of measurable functions with finite `p`-norm, identified up to almost everywhere equality. | EN: `L^p` spaces are central examples of Banach spaces.<br>FR: Les espaces `L^p` sont des exemples centraux d’espaces de Banach.<br>中：`L^p` 空间是 Banach 空间的核心例子。                                                                                 |
| `\lVert f\rVert_p=\left(\int\lvert f\rvert^p\,d\mu\right)^{1/p}` | Lp norm, norme Lp, Lp 范数                                                                | The norm measuring p-th power integrability for `1\leq p<\infty`.                                    | EN: `\lVert f\rVert_2` is the root mean square size under probability measure.<br>FR: `\lVert f\rVert_2` est la taille quadratique moyenne sous une mesure de probabilité.<br>中：在概率测度下，`\lVert f\rVert_2` 是均方根大小。                               |
| `L^1`                                                            | integrable functions, fonctions intégrables, 可积函数空间                                     | The space of absolutely integrable functions.                                                        | EN: Expectations of random variables require `L^1` integrability.<br>FR: Les espérances de variables aléatoires exigent l’intégrabilité `L^1`.<br>中：随机变量的期望要求 `L^1` 可积。                                                                         |
| `L^2`                                                            | square-integrable functions, fonctions de carré intégrable, 平方可积函数空间                    | The space of functions with finite integral of the square.                                           | EN: `L^2` is a Hilbert space.<br>FR: `L^2` est un espace de Hilbert.<br>中：`L^2` 是 Hilbert 空间。                                                                                                                                                   |
| `L^\infty`                                                       | essentially bounded functions, fonctions essentiellement bornées, 本质有界函数空间              | The space of measurable functions bounded outside a null set.                                        | EN: Bounded random variables belong to `L^\infty`.<br>FR: Les variables aléatoires bornées appartiennent à `L^\infty`.<br>中：有界随机变量属于 `L^\infty`。                                                                                                |
| `p<q`                                                            | inclusion on finite measure spaces, inclusion sur espaces de mesure finie, 有限测度空间上的包含关系 | On finite measure spaces, `L^q` is contained in `L^p` when `p<q`.                                    | EN: On probability spaces, square integrability implies integrability.<br>FR: Sur les espaces probabilisés, l’intégrabilité quadratique implique l’intégrabilité.<br>中：在概率空间上，平方可积推出可积。                                                         |
| `\frac{1}{p}+\frac{1}{q}=1`                                      | conjugate exponents, exposants conjugués, 共轭指数                                          | Exponents paired in Hölder’s inequality.                                                             | EN: If `p=2`, then the conjugate exponent is also `2`.<br>FR: Si `p=2`, alors l’exposant conjugué est aussi `2`.<br>中：若 `p=2`，其共轭指数仍为 `2`。                                                                                                      |
| `\lVert fg\rVert_1\leq\lVert f\rVert_p\lVert g\rVert_q`          | Hölder inequality, inégalité de Hölder, Hölder 不等式                                      | A product-integrability inequality for functions in conjugate `L^p` spaces.                          | EN: Hölder proves that products of `L^p` and `L^q` functions are integrable.<br>FR: Hölder prouve que les produits de fonctions `L^p` et `L^q` sont intégrables.<br>中：Hölder 不等式证明 `L^p` 与 `L^q` 函数的乘积可积。                                       |
| `\lVert f+g\rVert_p\leq\lVert f\rVert_p+\lVert g\rVert_p`        | Minkowski inequality, inégalité de Minkowski, Minkowski 不等式                             | The triangle inequality for `L^p` spaces.                                                            | EN: Minkowski makes `L^p` a normed space for `p\geq1`.<br>FR: Minkowski fait de `L^p` un espace normé pour `p\geq1`.<br>中：Minkowski 不等式使 `p\geq1` 时 `L^p` 成为赋范空间。                                                                               |
| —                                                                | uniform integrability, intégrabilité uniforme, 一致可积性                                    | A family of integrable functions whose large-value tails are uniformly small in integral.            | EN: Uniform integrability is crucial for upgrading convergence in measure to `L^1` convergence.<br>FR: L’intégrabilité uniforme est cruciale pour passer de la convergence en mesure à la convergence `L^1`.<br>中：一致可积性对把依测度收敛提升为 `L^1` 收敛至关重要。 |
| —                                                                | equi-integrability, équi-intégrabilité, 等可积性                                            | Another term closely related to uniform integrability.                                               | EN: Equi-integrability prevents mass from escaping into high peaks.<br>FR: L’équi-intégrabilité empêche la masse de s’échapper vers de hauts pics.<br>中：等可积性防止质量逃逸到高尖峰中。                                                                        |
| —                                                                | Vitali convergence theorem, théorème de convergence de Vitali, Vitali 收敛定理              | A theorem giving `L^1` convergence from convergence in measure plus uniform integrability.           | EN: Vitali’s theorem refines dominated convergence without a single dominator.<br>FR: Le théorème de Vitali raffine la convergence dominée sans dominateur unique.<br>中：Vitali 定理在没有单一控制函数时细化控制收敛。                                              |

## 25.12 Regular measures, Riesz representation, and measure-theoretic language

| Symbol (LaTeX)             | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                              | Definition                                                                                                    | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| -------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| —                          | Radon measure, mesure de Radon, Radon 测度                                                       | A measure on a topological space with strong regularity properties, often finite on compact sets.             | EN: Lebesgue measure on `\mathbb{R}^n` is a Radon measure.<br>FR: La mesure de Lebesgue sur `\mathbb{R}^n` est une mesure de Radon.<br>中：`\mathbb{R}^n` 上的 Lebesgue 测度是 Radon 测度。                                                               |
| —                          | locally finite measure, mesure localement finie, 局部有限测度                                        | A measure assigning finite measure to sufficiently small neighborhoods or compact sets, depending on context. | EN: Lebesgue measure is locally finite.<br>FR: La mesure de Lebesgue est localement finie.<br>中：Lebesgue 测度是局部有限的。                                                                                                                              |
| —                          | inner regularity, régularité intérieure, 内正则性                                                  | A property allowing measure to be approximated from inside by compact sets.                                   | EN: Inner regularity lets compact sets approximate measurable sets from below.<br>FR: La régularité intérieure permet aux compacts d’approcher les ensembles mesurables par dessous.<br>中：内正则性允许用紧集从内部逼近可测集。                                    |
| —                          | outer regularity, régularité extérieure, 外正则性                                                  | A property allowing measure to be approximated from outside by open sets.                                     | EN: Outer regularity approximates sets by open supersets.<br>FR: La régularité extérieure approche les ensembles par des ouverts contenant.<br>中：外正则性用包含该集合的开集从外部逼近。                                                                            |
| —                          | regular measure, mesure régulière, 正则测度                                                        | A measure satisfying suitable inner and outer approximation properties.                                       | EN: Regularity connects measure theory with topology.<br>FR: La régularité relie la théorie de la mesure à la topologie.<br>中：正则性连接测度论与拓扑。                                                                                                      |
| `C_c(X)`                   | continuous compactly supported functions, fonctions continues à support compact, 紧支连续函数        | The space of continuous functions with compact support.                                                       | EN: Radon measures can often be represented by integration against functions in `C_c(X)`.<br>FR: Les mesures de Radon peuvent souvent être représentées par intégration contre les fonctions de `C_c(X)`.<br>中：Radon 测度常可通过对 `C_c(X)` 中函数积分来表示。 |
| `C_0(X)`                   | continuous functions vanishing at infinity, fonctions continues nulles à l’infini, 无穷远处消失的连续函数 | Continuous functions whose values become small outside compact sets.                                          | EN: Riesz representation often identifies duals of `C_0(X)` with Radon measures.<br>FR: La représentation de Riesz identifie souvent les duaux de `C_0(X)` aux mesures de Radon.<br>中：Riesz 表示常把 `C_0(X)` 的对偶识别为 Radon 测度。                      |
| —                          | Riesz representation theorem, théorème de représentation de Riesz, Riesz 表示定理                  | A theorem representing certain positive linear functionals as integration against measures.                   | EN: Riesz representation turns functionals into measures.<br>FR: La représentation de Riesz transforme les formes linéaires en mesures.<br>中：Riesz 表示定理把泛函转化为测度。                                                                                |
| `I(f)=\int f\,d\mu`        | integral representation of a functional, représentation intégrale d’une forme, 泛函的积分表示         | The representation of a linear functional by integration with respect to a measure.                           | EN: Positive functionals on continuous functions often have integral representations.<br>FR: Les formes positives sur les fonctions continues ont souvent des représentations intégrales.<br>中：连续函数上的正泛函常有积分表示。                                 |
| —                          | support of a measure, support d’une mesure, 测度支撑                                               | The smallest closed set outside which the measure is zero, under suitable topological assumptions.            | EN: A point mass has support at one point.<br>FR: Une masse ponctuelle a pour support un seul point.<br>中：点质量的支撑是一个点。                                                                                                                           |
| `\operatorname{supp}(\mu)` | support notation, notation du support, 支撑记号                                                    | Standard notation for the support of a measure.                                                               | EN: If `\operatorname{supp}(\mu)\subseteq K`, the measure is concentrated on `K`.<br>FR: Si `\operatorname{supp}(\mu)\subseteq K`, la mesure est concentrée sur `K`.<br>中：若 `\operatorname{supp}(\mu)\subseteq K`，该测度集中在 `K` 上。                 |
| —                          | tightness, tension, 紧性 / 紧致性                                                                   | A property of a family of measures whose mass can be uniformly concentrated on compact sets.                  | EN: Tightness is central in weak convergence of probability measures.<br>FR: La tension est centrale dans la convergence faible des mesures de probabilité.<br>中：紧性是概率测度弱收敛的核心概念。                                                               |
| —                          | Prokhorov theorem, théorème de Prokhorov, Prokhorov 定理                                         | A theorem relating tightness and relative compactness for probability measures under suitable conditions.     | EN: Prokhorov’s theorem is fundamental in probability limit theory.<br>FR: Le théorème de Prokhorov est fondamental dans la théorie limite des probabilités.<br>中：Prokhorov 定理是概率极限理论的基础工具。                                                     |

# 26. Differential Geometry and Tensor Calculus

## 26.1 Manifolds, charts, and smooth structures

| Symbol (LaTeX)             | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                       | Definition                                                                                           | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| -------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `M`                        | manifold, variété, 流形                                   | A space locally modeled on Euclidean space and equipped with compatible coordinate descriptions.     | EN: A sphere is a two-dimensional manifold.<br>FR: Une sphère est une variété de dimension deux.<br>中：球面是二维流形。                                                                              |
| `\dim M`                   | dimension of a manifold, dimension d’une variété, 流形维数  | The Euclidean dimension of local coordinate neighborhoods of `M`.                                    | EN: The circle has dimension `1`.<br>FR: Le cercle a dimension `1`.<br>中：圆周的维数是 `1`。                                                                                                        |
| `(U,\varphi)`              | chart, carte locale, 坐标图                                | A local coordinate system mapping an open subset of a manifold to an open subset of Euclidean space. | EN: A chart assigns coordinates to points near a location on `M`.<br>FR: Une carte attribue des coordonnées aux points près d’un lieu sur `M`.<br>中：坐标图给流形上一片局部区域赋予坐标。                      |
| `U\subset M`               | coordinate neighborhood, voisinage de coordonnées, 坐标邻域 | The domain of a chart on a manifold.                                                                 | EN: Calculations on manifolds are often done inside coordinate neighborhoods.<br>FR: Les calculs sur les variétés se font souvent dans des voisinages de coordonnées.<br>中：流形上的计算常在坐标邻域内进行。 |
| `\varphi:U\to\mathbb{R}^n` | coordinate map, application de coordonnées, 坐标映射        | The map assigning Euclidean coordinates to points in a chart domain.                                 | EN: If `p\in U`, then `\varphi(p)` gives coordinates of `p`.<br>FR: Si `p\in U`, alors `\varphi(p)` donne les coordonnées de `p`.<br>中：若 `p\in U`，则 `\varphi(p)` 给出 `p` 的坐标。                |
| `x^i`                      | local coordinate, coordonnée locale, 局部坐标               | A component function of a coordinate map.                                                            | EN: On a surface, local coordinates may be written as `(x^1,x^2)`.<br>FR: Sur une surface, les coordonnées locales peuvent s’écrire `(x^1,x^2)`.<br>中：在曲面上，局部坐标可写作 `(x^1,x^2)`。             |
| `\psi\circ\varphi^{-1}`    | transition map, application de transition, 坐标变换映射       | The map converting coordinates from one chart to another on overlapping chart domains.               | EN: Smooth transition maps define a smooth structure.<br>FR: Les applications de transition lisses définissent une structure lisse.<br>中：光滑坐标变换映射定义光滑结构。                                    |
| `C^\infty`                 | smoothness, lissité, 光滑性                                | Infinite differentiability in local coordinates.                                                     | EN: A smooth function has derivatives of all orders in charts.<br>FR: Une fonction lisse possède des dérivées de tous ordres dans les cartes.<br>中：光滑函数在坐标图中具有任意阶导数。                        |
| `\mathcal{A}`              | atlas, atlas, 图册                                        | A collection of charts covering a manifold.                                                          | EN: An atlas lets different coordinate systems describe the whole manifold.<br>FR: Un atlas permet à différents systèmes de coordonnées de décrire toute la variété.<br>中：图册用多个坐标系统覆盖整个流形。  |
| —                          | smooth atlas, atlas lisse, 光滑图册                         | An atlas whose transition maps are smooth wherever charts overlap.                                   | EN: Smooth atlases define differentiable manifolds.<br>FR: Les atlas lisses définissent les variétés différentiables.<br>中：光滑图册定义可微流形。                                                      |
| —                          | smooth manifold, variété lisse, 光滑流形                    | A manifold equipped with a smooth atlas, usually considered up to compatible refinement.             | EN: Smooth manifolds allow calculus without global coordinates.<br>FR: Les variétés lisses permettent le calcul sans coordonnées globales.<br>中：光滑流形允许在没有全局坐标的情况下做微积分。                      |
| —                          | boundary of a manifold, bord d’une variété, 流形边界        | Points locally modeled on a half-space rather than full Euclidean space.                             | EN: A closed disk is a manifold with boundary.<br>FR: Un disque fermé est une variété à bord.<br>中：闭圆盘是带边界流形。                                                                               |

## 26.2 Smooth maps, immersions, submersions, and submanifolds

| Symbol (LaTeX)              | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                             | Definition                                                                           | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| --------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `F:M\to N`                  | smooth map, application lisse, 光滑映射                           | A map between smooth manifolds whose coordinate representations are smooth.          | EN: A parametrized curve is a smooth map from an interval into a manifold.<br>FR: Une courbe paramétrée est une application lisse d’un intervalle vers une variété.<br>中：参数曲线是从区间到流形的光滑映射。                           |
| `F^\ast f=f\circ F`         | pullback of a function, tiré en arrière d’une fonction, 函数拉回  | The function on `M` obtained by composing a function on `N` with `F`.                | EN: Pullback transfers functions from the target to the source.<br>FR: Le tiré en arrière transfère les fonctions de la cible vers la source.<br>中：拉回把目标空间上的函数转移到源空间。                                                |
| `dF_p`                      | differential of a map, différentielle d’une application, 映射微分 | The linear map induced by `F` between tangent spaces at `p` and `F(p)`.              | EN: The differential is the manifold version of the Jacobian.<br>FR: La différentielle est la version variétale du jacobien.<br>中：映射微分是 Jacobian 在线性切空间中的流形版本。                                                       |
| `\operatorname{rank}(dF_p)` | rank of a smooth map, rang d’une application lisse, 光滑映射的秩    | The rank of the linear differential at a point.                                      | EN: Constant rank maps have stable local structure.<br>FR: Les applications de rang constant ont une structure locale stable.<br>中：常秩映射具有稳定的局部结构。                                                                    |
| —                           | immersion, immersion, 浸入                                      | A smooth map whose differential is injective at every point.                         | EN: A curve with nonzero velocity is an immersion.<br>FR: Une courbe à vitesse non nulle est une immersion.<br>中：速度非零的曲线是浸入。                                                                                         |
| —                           | submersion, submersion, 沉浸 / 次浸没                              | A smooth map whose differential is surjective at every point.                        | EN: Projection from a product manifold onto one factor is a submersion.<br>FR: La projection d’une variété produit sur un facteur est une submersion.<br>中：乘积流形到某个因子的投影是沉浸。                                          |
| —                           | embedding, plongement, 嵌入                                     | An immersion that is also a homeomorphism onto its image with the subspace topology. | EN: The standard circle in the plane is an embedded submanifold.<br>FR: Le cercle standard dans le plan est une sous-variété plongée.<br>中：平面中的标准圆是嵌入子流形。                                                            |
| `S\subset M`                | submanifold, sous-variété, 子流形                                | A subset of a manifold that itself carries a compatible manifold structure.          | EN: The sphere is a submanifold of Euclidean space.<br>FR: La sphère est une sous-variété de l’espace euclidien.<br>中：球面是欧氏空间的子流形。                                                                                   |
| —                           | embedded submanifold, sous-variété plongée, 嵌入子流形             | A submanifold whose inclusion map is an embedding.                                   | EN: A regular level set is often an embedded submanifold.<br>FR: Un ensemble de niveau régulier est souvent une sous-variété plongée.<br>中：正则水平集通常是嵌入子流形。                                                            |
| `F^{-1}(c)`                 | level set, ensemble de niveau, 水平集                            | The set of points mapped to a fixed value `c`.                                       | EN: The sphere is the level set of the squared-radius function.<br>FR: La sphère est un ensemble de niveau de la fonction rayon carré.<br>中：球面是平方半径函数的水平集。                                                           |
| —                           | regular value, valeur régulière, 正则值                          | A value whose preimage consists only of points where the differential is surjective. | EN: Preimages of regular values are submanifolds under the regular value theorem.<br>FR: Les préimages des valeurs régulières sont des sous-variétés par le théorème de la valeur régulière.<br>中：由正则值定理，正则值的原像是子流形。 |
| —                           | diffeomorphism, difféomorphisme, 微分同胚                         | A bijective smooth map with a smooth inverse.                                        | EN: Diffeomorphic manifolds are the same from the viewpoint of smooth geometry.<br>FR: Les variétés difféomorphes sont les mêmes du point de vue de la géométrie lisse.<br>中：微分同胚的流形在光滑几何中视为相同。                      |

## 26.3 Tangent spaces, cotangent spaces, and differentials

| Symbol (LaTeX)                              | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                          | Definition                                                                              | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `T_pM`                                      | tangent space, espace tangent, 切空间                                         | The vector space of tangent directions to `M` at point `p`.                             | EN: For a surface, `T_pM` is the tangent plane at `p`.<br>FR: Pour une surface, `T_pM` est le plan tangent en `p`.<br>中：对曲面，`T_pM` 是 `p` 点处的切平面。                                                    |
| `v\in T_pM`                                 | tangent vector, vecteur tangent, 切向量                                       | An element of the tangent space at a point.                                             | EN: The velocity of a curve at `p` is a tangent vector.<br>FR: La vitesse d’une courbe en `p` est un vecteur tangent.<br>中：曲线在 `p` 点的速度是切向量。                                                        |
| `\gamma'(0)`                                | velocity vector, vecteur vitesse, 速度向量                                     | The tangent vector represented by the derivative of a curve at a parameter value.       | EN: If `\gamma(0)=p`, then `\gamma'(0)\in T_pM`.<br>FR: Si `\gamma(0)=p`, alors `\gamma'(0)\in T_pM`.<br>中：若 `\gamma(0)=p`，则 `\gamma'(0)\in T_pM`。                                                  |
| `\frac{\partial}{\partial x^i}\bigg\vert_p` | coordinate basis vector, vecteur de base coordonné, 坐标基向量                  | A tangent basis vector associated with a local coordinate system.                       | EN: Coordinate basis vectors differentiate functions in coordinate directions.<br>FR: Les vecteurs de base coordonnés dérivent les fonctions dans les directions coordonnées.<br>中：坐标基向量沿坐标方向对函数求导。 |
| `T_p^\ast M`                                | cotangent space, espace cotangent, 余切空间                                    | The dual vector space of the tangent space at `p`.                                      | EN: Covectors at `p` are elements of `T_p^\ast M`.<br>FR: Les covecteurs en `p` sont des éléments de `T_p^\ast M`.<br>中：`p` 点处的余向量属于 `T_p^\ast M`。                                                  |
| `dx^i_p`                                    | coordinate covector, covecteur coordonné, 坐标余向量                            | A basis covector dual to the coordinate tangent basis.                                  | EN: `dx^i_p` extracts the `i`th coordinate component of a tangent vector.<br>FR: `dx^i_p` extrait la composante coordonnée `i` d’un vecteur tangent.<br>中：`dx^i_p` 提取切向量的第 `i` 个坐标分量。               |
| `df_p`                                      | differential of a function, différentielle d’une fonction, 函数微分            | A covector giving the first-order change of a function at `p`.                          | EN: `df_p(v)` is the directional derivative of `f` along `v`.<br>FR: `df_p(v)` est la dérivée directionnelle de `f` selon `v`.<br>中：`df_p(v)` 是 `f` 沿 `v` 的方向导数。                                    |
| `dF_p:T_pM\to T_{F(p)}N`                    | pushforward / differential, poussée en avant / différentielle, 推前 / 微分     | The linear map sending tangent vectors on `M` to tangent vectors on `N`.                | EN: The pushforward maps velocities of curves through `F`.<br>FR: La poussée en avant envoie les vitesses des courbes par `F`.<br>中：推前把曲线速度通过 `F` 映到目标流形。                                           |
| `F_\ast v`                                  | pushforward of a tangent vector, image directe d’un vecteur tangent, 切向量推前 | The tangent vector obtained by applying `dF_p` to `v`.                                  | EN: `F_\ast v` is the derivative of the transformed curve.<br>FR: `F_\ast v` est la dérivée de la courbe transformée.<br>中：`F_\ast v` 是变换后曲线的导数。                                                    |
| `T M`                                       | tangent bundle, fibré tangent, 切丛                                          | The disjoint union of all tangent spaces of a manifold, itself forming a vector bundle. | EN: A vector field is a section of the tangent bundle.<br>FR: Un champ de vecteurs est une section du fibré tangent.<br>中：向量场是切丛的截面。                                                                |
| `T^\ast M`                                  | cotangent bundle, fibré cotangent, 余切丛                                     | The disjoint union of all cotangent spaces of a manifold.                               | EN: Differential one-forms are sections of the cotangent bundle.<br>FR: Les formes différentielles de degré un sont des sections du fibré cotangent.<br>中：一阶微分形式是余切丛的截面。                            |
| `\pi:TM\to M`                               | bundle projection, projection de fibré, 丛投影                                | The map sending a tangent vector to its base point.                                     | EN: The tangent bundle projection records where each tangent vector lives.<br>FR: La projection du fibré tangent indique où vit chaque vecteur tangent.<br>中：切丛投影记录每个切向量所在的基点。                      |

## 26.4 Vector fields, flows, and Lie brackets

| Symbol (LaTeX)                        | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                 | Definition                                                                         | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `X`                                   | vector field, champ de vecteurs, 向量场                                              | A smooth assignment of a tangent vector to each point of a manifold.               | EN: A velocity field on a fluid domain is a vector field.<br>FR: Un champ de vitesses dans un fluide est un champ de vecteurs.<br>中：流体区域上的速度场是向量场。                                       |
| `X_p\in T_pM`                         | value of a vector field, valeur d’un champ de vecteurs, 向量场在点处的值                  | The tangent vector assigned by `X` to point `p`.                                   | EN: `X_p` gives the infinitesimal direction at `p`.<br>FR: `X_p` donne la direction infinitésimale en `p`.<br>中：`X_p` 给出 `p` 点处的无穷小方向。                                                   |
| `\mathfrak{X}(M)`                     | space of vector fields, espace des champs de vecteurs, 向量场空间                      | The collection of smooth vector fields on a manifold.                              | EN: `\mathfrak{X}(M)` is a module over smooth functions.<br>FR: `\mathfrak{X}(M)` est un module sur les fonctions lisses.<br>中：`\mathfrak{X}(M)` 是光滑函数环上的模。                              |
| `X(f)`                                | directional derivative by vector field, dérivée directionnelle par champ, 向量场方向导数 | The function obtained by differentiating `f` along the vector field `X`.           | EN: A vector field acts as a derivation on smooth functions.<br>FR: Un champ de vecteurs agit comme une dérivation sur les fonctions lisses.<br>中：向量场作为光滑函数上的导子。                         |
| `X=X^i\frac{\partial}{\partial x^i}`  | coordinate expression of vector field, expression coordonnée d’un champ, 向量场坐标表示  | A local expression of a vector field in the coordinate basis.                      | EN: The functions `X^i` are the components of `X`.<br>FR: Les fonctions `X^i` sont les composantes de `X`.<br>中：函数 `X^i` 是 `X` 的坐标分量。                                                    |
| `\Phi_t`                              | flow, flot, 流                                                                     | A family of diffeomorphisms generated by moving along a vector field.              | EN: The flow describes trajectories of an autonomous differential equation.<br>FR: Le flot décrit les trajectoires d’une équation différentielle autonome.<br>中：流描述自治微分方程的轨道。            |
| `\frac{d}{dt}\Phi_t(p)=X_{\Phi_t(p)}` | flow equation, équation du flot, 流方程                                              | The differential equation defining the flow generated by `X`.                      | EN: Integral curves solve the flow equation.<br>FR: Les courbes intégrales résolvent l’équation du flot.<br>中：积分曲线求解流方程。                                                                 |
| —                                     | integral curve, courbe intégrale, 积分曲线                                            | A curve whose velocity equals the value of a vector field at each point.           | EN: Particle paths in a velocity field are integral curves.<br>FR: Les trajectoires de particules dans un champ de vitesses sont des courbes intégrales.<br>中：速度场中的粒子路径是积分曲线。            |
| `[X,Y]`                               | Lie bracket, crochet de Lie, Lie 括号                                               | A vector field measuring the noncommutativity of two vector fields as derivations. | EN: If `[X,Y]=0`, the flows commute locally under suitable conditions.<br>FR: Si `[X,Y]=0`, les flots commutent localement sous conditions appropriées.<br>中：若 `[X,Y]=0`，在适当条件下两个流局部可交换。 |
| `[X,Y](f)=X(Y(f))-Y(X(f))`            | Lie bracket formula, formule du crochet de Lie, Lie 括号公式                          | The definition of the Lie bracket through commutators of derivations.              | EN: The Lie bracket is again a vector field.<br>FR: Le crochet de Lie est encore un champ de vecteurs.<br>中：Lie 括号仍然是向量场。                                                                |
| `\mathcal{L}_X`                       | Lie derivative, dérivée de Lie, Lie 导数                                            | A derivative measuring change of geometric objects along the flow of `X`.          | EN: Lie derivatives describe infinitesimal symmetry.<br>FR: Les dérivées de Lie décrivent les symétries infinitésimales.<br>中：Lie 导数描述无穷小对称性。                                            |
| —                                     | complete vector field, champ de vecteurs complet, 完备向量场                           | A vector field whose flow exists for all time.                                     | EN: Compact manifolds often make smooth vector fields complete.<br>FR: Les variétés compactes rendent souvent les champs lisses complets.<br>中：紧流形上光滑向量场通常是完备的。                          |

## 26.5 Tensor fields and index notation

| Symbol (LaTeX)                      | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                | Definition                                                                            | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ----------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `V^\ast`                            | dual vector space, espace dual, 对偶向量空间                                           | The vector space of linear functionals on `V`.                                        | EN: Covectors live in the dual space.<br>FR: Les covecteurs vivent dans l’espace dual.<br>中：余向量属于对偶空间。                                                                                                        |
| `T^r_s(V)`                          | tensor space of type r s, espace des tenseurs de type r s, r-s 型张量空间             | The space of multilinear objects with `r` contravariant and `s` covariant slots.      | EN: A linear map can be viewed as a type `(1,1)` tensor.<br>FR: Une application linéaire peut être vue comme un tenseur de type `(1,1)`.<br>中：线性映射可视为 `(1,1)` 型张量。                                            |
| `T^{i_1\cdots i_r}_{j_1\cdots j_s}` | tensor components, composantes d’un tenseur, 张量分量                                | The coordinate components of a tensor in a chosen basis.                              | EN: Tensor components change with coordinates, but the tensor itself is geometric.<br>FR: Les composantes changent avec les coordonnées, mais le tenseur lui-même est géométrique.<br>中：张量分量随坐标改变，但张量本身是几何对象。 |
| `X^i`                               | contravariant components, composantes contravariantes, 逆变分量                      | Components of a vector in a coordinate basis.                                         | EN: Vector components transform contravariantly under coordinate changes.<br>FR: Les composantes vectorielles se transforment contravariamment sous changement de coordonnées.<br>中：向量分量在坐标变换下按逆变规则变换。        |
| `\omega_i`                          | covariant components, composantes covariantes, 协变分量                              | Components of a covector in a dual basis.                                             | EN: Gradient-like objects often have covariant components.<br>FR: Les objets de type gradient ont souvent des composantes covariantes.<br>中：类似梯度的对象通常具有协变分量。                                                  |
| `dx^i\otimes dx^j`                  | tensor product basis, base du produit tensoriel, 张量积基                            | A basis element of a tensor product space formed from basis covectors.                | EN: The metric tensor is locally expanded using tensor product bases.<br>FR: Le tenseur métrique se développe localement avec des bases de produit tensoriel.<br>中：度量张量可用张量积基局部展开。                            |
| `A\otimes B`                        | tensor product, produit tensoriel, 张量积                                           | A bilinear construction combining tensors into a higher-type tensor.                  | EN: Tensor products combine geometric quantities without choosing coordinates.<br>FR: Les produits tensoriels combinent des quantités géométriques sans choisir de coordonnées.<br>中：张量积在不选定坐标的情况下组合几何量。      |
| `\operatorname{tr}(T)`              | contraction, contraction, 缩并                                                     | An operation pairing one contravariant and one covariant index to reduce tensor type. | EN: Taking the trace of a matrix is a contraction.<br>FR: Prendre la trace d’une matrice est une contraction.<br>中：矩阵取迹是一种缩并。                                                                                 |
| `g_{ij}`                            | metric tensor components, composantes du tenseur métrique, 度量张量分量                | Coordinate components of a metric tensor.                                             | EN: `g_{ij}` encodes lengths and angles in coordinates.<br>FR: `g_{ij}` encode longueurs et angles en coordonnées.<br>中：`g_{ij}` 在坐标中编码长度与角度。                                                                 |
| `g^{ij}`                            | inverse metric components, composantes de la métrique inverse, 逆度量分量             | Components of the inverse matrix of the metric tensor.                                | EN: The inverse metric raises indices.<br>FR: La métrique inverse relève les indices.<br>中：逆度量用于升指标。                                                                                                          |
| `v_i=g_{ij}v^j`                     | lowering an index, abaissement d’indice, 降指标                                     | Using the metric to convert a vector component into a covector component.             | EN: Lowering indices turns vectors into covectors.<br>FR: Abaisser les indices transforme des vecteurs en covecteurs.<br>中：降指标把向量转化为余向量。                                                                      |
| `\omega^i=g^{ij}\omega_j`           | raising an index, relèvement d’indice, 升指标                                       | Using the inverse metric to convert a covector component into a vector component.     | EN: Raising indices depends on the metric.<br>FR: Relever les indices dépend de la métrique.<br>中：升指标依赖度量。                                                                                                    |
| —                                   | Einstein summation convention, convention de sommation d’Einstein, Einstein 求和约定 | A convention where repeated upper and lower indices are automatically summed.         | EN: `g_{ij}v^j` means summation over `j`.<br>FR: `g_{ij}v^j` signifie une somme sur `j`.<br>中：`g_{ij}v^j` 表示对 `j` 求和。                                                                                         |

## 26.6 Differential forms and exterior calculus

| Symbol (LaTeX)                    | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                               | Definition                                                           | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| --------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `\Omega^k(M)`                     | space of k-forms, espace des k-formes, k 阶微分形式空间                                | The space of smooth differential forms of degree `k` on `M`.         | EN: Functions are `0`-forms.<br>FR: Les fonctions sont des `0`-formes.<br>中：函数是 `0` 阶微分形式。                                                                                                                         |
| `\alpha`                          | differential form, forme différentielle, 微分形式                                   | A smooth alternating covariant tensor field.                         | EN: One-forms integrate naturally along curves.<br>FR: Les 1-formes s’intègrent naturellement le long des courbes.<br>中：一阶形式可沿曲线自然积分。                                                                              |
| `dx^i`                            | coordinate one-form, 1-forme coordonnée, 坐标一形式                                  | The differential of a coordinate function.                           | EN: Locally, a one-form can be written as `\alpha_i dx^i`.<br>FR: Localement, une 1-forme s’écrit `\alpha_i dx^i`.<br>中：局部上一形式可写作 `\alpha_i dx^i`。                                                                 |
| `\alpha\wedge\beta`               | wedge product, produit extérieur, 外积                                            | An antisymmetric product of differential forms.                      | EN: The wedge product combines forms and increases degree.<br>FR: Le produit extérieur combine les formes et augmente le degré.<br>中：外积组合微分形式并提高阶数。                                                                |
| `d\alpha`                         | exterior derivative, dérivée extérieure, 外微分                                    | A coordinate-free derivative that maps `k`-forms to `(k+1)`-forms.   | EN: Exterior derivative generalizes gradient, curl, and divergence.<br>FR: La dérivée extérieure généralise gradient, rotationnel et divergence.<br>中：外微分推广梯度、旋度与散度。                                               |
| `d^2=0`                           | nilpotency of exterior derivative, nilpotence de la dérivée extérieure, 外微分平方为零 | Applying the exterior derivative twice always gives zero.            | EN: The identity `d^2=0` underlies de Rham cohomology.<br>FR: L’identité `d^2=0` fonde la cohomologie de de Rham.<br>中：恒等式 `d^2=0` 是 de Rham 上同调的基础。                                                               |
| —                                 | closed form, forme fermée, 闭形式                                                  | A differential form `\alpha` satisfying `d\alpha=0`.                 | EN: Every exact form is closed.<br>FR: Toute forme exacte est fermée.<br>中：每个恰当形式都是闭形式。                                                                                                                            |
| —                                 | exact form, forme exacte, 恰当形式                                                  | A differential form that is the exterior derivative of another form. | EN: If `\alpha=d\beta`, then `\alpha` is exact.<br>FR: Si `\alpha=d\beta`, alors `\alpha` est exacte.<br>中：若 `\alpha=d\beta`，则 `\alpha` 是恰当形式。                                                                     |
| `\iota_X\alpha`                   | interior product, produit intérieur, 内乘                                         | The contraction of a differential form with a vector field.          | EN: Interior product inserts a vector field into the first slot of a form.<br>FR: Le produit intérieur insère un champ de vecteurs dans la première place d’une forme.<br>中：内乘把向量场插入微分形式的第一个位置。                    |
| `\mathcal{L}_X\alpha`             | Lie derivative of a form, dérivée de Lie d’une forme, 形式的 Lie 导数                | The infinitesimal change of a form along a vector field.             | EN: Cartan’s formula relates Lie derivative, exterior derivative, and interior product.<br>FR: La formule de Cartan relie dérivée de Lie, dérivée extérieure et produit intérieur.<br>中：Cartan 公式联系 Lie 导数、外微分与内乘。 |
| `\mathcal{L}_X=d\iota_X+\iota_Xd` | Cartan formula, formule de Cartan, Cartan 公式                                    | A fundamental identity for the Lie derivative of differential forms. | EN: Cartan formula is central in symplectic and differential geometry.<br>FR: La formule de Cartan est centrale en géométrie symplectique et différentielle.<br>中：Cartan 公式是辛几何与微分几何的核心。                           |
| —                                 | orientation form, forme d’orientation, 定向形式                                     | A nowhere-vanishing top-degree form determining an orientation.      | EN: An orientation form selects positive coordinate systems.<br>FR: Une forme d’orientation choisit les systèmes de coordonnées positifs.<br>中：定向形式选择正向坐标系。                                                        |

## 26.7 Integration on manifolds and Stokes theorem

| Symbol (LaTeX)                           | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                                      | Definition                                                                                                                | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| ---------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\int_M \omega`                          | integral of a form, intégrale d’une forme, 微分形式积分                                                      | The integral of a top-degree differential form over an oriented manifold.                                                 | EN: Top-degree forms are the natural objects integrated over manifolds.<br>FR: Les formes de degré maximal sont les objets naturels à intégrer sur les variétés.<br>中：最高阶微分形式是流形上自然积分的对象。                                                                                    |
| `\dim M=n`                               | top-degree form, forme de degré maximal, 最高阶形式                                                         | An `n`-form on an `n`-dimensional manifold.                                                                               | EN: On a surface, area forms are top-degree forms.<br>FR: Sur une surface, les formes d’aire sont des formes de degré maximal.<br>中：在曲面上，面积形式是最高阶形式。                                                                                                                         |
| —                                        | orientation, orientation, 定向                                                                           | A consistent choice of positive bases or coordinate systems on a manifold.                                                | EN: Integration of top forms depends on orientation.<br>FR: L’intégration des formes de degré maximal dépend de l’orientation.<br>中：最高阶形式的积分依赖定向。                                                                                                                            |
| `\partial M`                             | boundary of a manifold, bord d’une variété, 流形边界                                                       | The boundary manifold associated with a manifold with boundary.                                                           | EN: The boundary of a disk is a circle.<br>FR: Le bord d’un disque est un cercle.<br>中：圆盘的边界是圆周。                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `\int_{\partial M}\omega=\int_M d\omega` | Stokes theorem, théorème de Stokes, Stokes 定理                                                          | A theorem relating the integral of a form over the boundary to the integral of its exterior derivative over the manifold. | EN: Stokes theorem unifies the fundamental theorem of calculus, Green’s theorem, and divergence theorem.<br>FR: Le théorème de Stokes unifie le théorème fondamental du calcul, le théorème de Green et le théorème de la divergence.<br>中：Stokes 定理统一微积分基本定理、Green 定理与散度定理。 |
| `\omega\vert_{\partial M}`               | restriction to the boundary, restriction au bord, 边界限制                                                 | The form induced on the boundary by restricting a form from the ambient manifold.                                         | EN: Boundary integrals use the restricted form on `\partial M`.<br>FR: Les intégrales au bord utilisent la forme restreinte à `\partial M`.<br>中：边界积分使用限制到 `\partial M` 的形式。                                                                                                 |
| —                                        | volume form, forme volume, 体积形式                                                                        | A nowhere-vanishing top-degree form used to measure oriented volume.                                                      | EN: A Riemannian metric determines a volume form.<br>FR: Une métrique riemannienne détermine une forme volume.<br>中：Riemann 度量决定一个体积形式。                                                                                                                                      |
| `dV_g`                                   | Riemannian volume form, forme volume riemannienne, Riemann 体积形式                                        | The volume form induced by a Riemannian metric `g`.                                                                       | EN: Integration on Riemannian manifolds often uses `dV_g`.<br>FR: L’intégration sur les variétés riemanniennes utilise souvent `dV_g`.<br>中：Riemann 流形上的积分常使用 `dV_g`。                                                                                                        |
| `\int_M f\,dV_g`                         | integration with respect to Riemannian volume, intégration selon le volume riemannien, 关于 Riemann 体积积分 | Integration of a scalar function using the metric-induced volume form.                                                    | EN: Total mass can be written as `\int_M \rho\,dV_g`.<br>FR: La masse totale peut s’écrire `\int_M \rho\,dV_g`.<br>中：总质量可写作 `\int_M \rho\,dV_g`。                                                                                                                             |
| —                                        | partition of unity, partition de l’unité, 单位分解                                                         | A collection of smooth functions used to patch local constructions globally.                                              | EN: Partitions of unity let local integrals and metrics be assembled globally.<br>FR: Les partitions de l’unité permettent d’assembler globalement intégrales et métriques locales.<br>中：单位分解允许把局部积分和度量拼接为全局对象。                                                              |
| —                                        | compact support, support compact, 紧支撑                                                                  | A property that a function or form vanishes outside a compact set.                                                        | EN: Compactly supported forms can often be integrated without boundary issues at infinity.<br>FR: Les formes à support compact peuvent souvent être intégrées sans problèmes à l’infini.<br>中：紧支撑形式通常避免无穷远处的边界问题。                                                            |
| —                                        | de Rham cohomology, cohomologie de de Rham, de Rham 上同调                                                | A cohomology theory defined by closed forms modulo exact forms.                                                           | EN: de Rham cohomology measures global holes using differential forms.<br>FR: La cohomologie de de Rham mesure les trous globaux par les formes différentielles.<br>中：de Rham 上同调用微分形式度量全局孔洞。                                                                                |

## 26.8 Riemannian metrics, length, and volume

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                   | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                    | Definition                                                                                   | Examples                                                                                                                                                                              |
| ------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `g`                                              | Riemannian metric, métrique riemannienne, Riemann 度量                 | A smoothly varying positive definite inner product on tangent spaces.                        | EN: A Riemannian metric defines lengths and angles on a manifold.<br>FR: Une métrique riemannienne définit longueurs et angles sur une variété.<br>中：Riemann 度量在流形上定义长度与角度。           |
| `g_p(u,v)`                                       | metric inner product, produit scalaire métrique, 度量内积                | The inner product of tangent vectors `u,v\in T_pM` given by the metric at `p`.               | EN: `g_p(u,u)` gives squared length of `u`.<br>FR: `g_p(u,u)` donne la longueur carrée de `u`.<br>中：`g_p(u,u)` 给出 `u` 的长度平方。                                                          |
| `ds^2=g_{ij}dx^i dx^j`                           | line element, élément de longueur, 线元                                | A local symbolic expression for the squared infinitesimal distance determined by the metric. | EN: The line element encodes metric geometry in coordinates.<br>FR: L’élément de longueur encode la géométrie métrique en coordonnées.<br>中：线元在坐标中编码度量几何。                             |
| `\lVert v\rVert_g=\sqrt{g(v,v)}`                 | Riemannian norm, norme riemannienne, Riemann 范数                      | The norm of a tangent vector induced by the Riemannian metric.                               | EN: Curve speed is measured by the Riemannian norm of velocity.<br>FR: La vitesse d’une courbe est mesurée par la norme riemannienne de sa vitesse.<br>中：曲线速度由其速度向量的 Riemann 范数量度。    |
| `L(\gamma)=\int_a^b\lVert\gamma'(t)\rVert_g\,dt` | length of a curve, longueur d’une courbe, 曲线长度                       | The Riemannian length of a parametrized curve.                                               | EN: Geodesics locally minimize curve length under suitable conditions.<br>FR: Les géodésiques minimisent localement la longueur sous conditions appropriées.<br>中：测地线在适当条件下局部最小化曲线长度。 |
| `d_g(p,q)`                                       | Riemannian distance, distance riemannienne, Riemann 距离               | The infimum of lengths of curves connecting two points.                                      | EN: The metric tensor induces a distance function on connected manifolds.<br>FR: Le tenseur métrique induit une fonction distance sur les variétés connexes.<br>中：度量张量在连通流形上诱导距离函数。   |
| `dV_g=\sqrt{\det(g_{ij})}\,dx^1\cdots dx^n`      | Riemannian volume element, élément de volume riemannien, Riemann 体积元 | The local coordinate expression for the volume density induced by `g`.                       | EN: Curved coordinates require the factor `\sqrt{\det(g_{ij})}`.<br>FR: Les coordonnées courbes exigent le facteur `\sqrt{\det(g_{ij})}`.<br>中：曲线坐标需要因子 `\sqrt{\det(g_{ij})}`。        |
| —                                                | isometry, isométrie, 等距映射                                            | A map preserving the Riemannian metric and hence lengths and angles.                         | EN: Rotations of the sphere are isometries.<br>FR: Les rotations de la sphère sont des isométries.<br>中：球面的旋转是等距映射。                                                                   |
| `F^\ast h=g`                                     | pullback metric, métrique tirée en arrière, 拉回度量                     | The metric on the source obtained by pulling back a target metric through `F`.               | EN: An immersion into Euclidean space inherits a pullback metric.<br>FR: Une immersion dans l’espace euclidien hérite d’une métrique tirée en arrière.<br>中：浸入欧氏空间的流形继承拉回度量。          |
| —                                                | pseudo-Riemannian metric, métrique pseudo-riemannienne, 伪 Riemann 度量 | A smoothly varying nondegenerate symmetric bilinear form not necessarily positive definite.  | EN: Lorentzian metrics in relativity are pseudo-Riemannian.<br>FR: Les métriques lorentziennes en relativité sont pseudo-riemanniennes.<br>中：相对论中的 Lorentz 度量是伪 Riemann 度量。           |
| —                                                | Lorentzian metric, métrique lorentzienne, Lorentz 度量                 | A pseudo-Riemannian metric with one time-like direction under common sign conventions.       | EN: Spacetime is modeled by Lorentzian manifolds.<br>FR: L’espace-temps est modélisé par des variétés lorentziennes.<br>中：时空用 Lorentz 流形建模。                                           |
| —                                                | conformal metric, métrique conforme, 共形度量                            | A metric obtained by multiplying another metric by a positive scalar function.               | EN: Conformal changes preserve angles but not lengths.<br>FR: Les changements conformes préservent les angles mais pas les longueurs.<br>中：共形变换保持角度，但不保持长度。                           |

## 26.9 Connections, covariant derivatives, and parallel transport

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                          | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                     | Definition                                                                                   | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| ------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\nabla`                                                | connection, connexion, 联络                                                             | A rule for differentiating vector fields along vector fields on a manifold.                  | EN: A connection lets one compare nearby tangent spaces.<br>FR: Une connexion permet de comparer des espaces tangents voisins.<br>中：联络允许比较相邻切空间。                                                           |
| `\nabla_XY`                                             | covariant derivative, dérivée covariante, 协变导数                                        | The derivative of vector field `Y` in the direction of vector field `X`.                     | EN: Covariant derivatives correct ordinary derivatives for changing coordinates.<br>FR: Les dérivées covariantes corrigent les dérivées ordinaires sous changement de coordonnées.<br>中：协变导数修正普通导数以适应坐标变化。 |
