| `\Gamma^k_{ij}`                                         | Christoffel symbols, symboles de Christoffel, Christoffel 符号                          | Coordinate coefficients of a connection.                                                     | EN: Christoffel symbols describe how coordinate basis vectors change.<br>FR: Les symboles de Christoffel décrivent comment les vecteurs de base coordonnés changent.<br>中：Christoffel 符号描述坐标基向量如何变化。       |
| `\nabla_{\partial_i}\partial_j=\Gamma^k_{ij}\partial_k` | connection coefficient formula, formule des coefficients de connexion, 联络系数公式         | The local coordinate expression defining Christoffel symbols.                                | EN: This formula encodes the connection in a coordinate chart.<br>FR: Cette formule encode la connexion dans une carte locale.<br>中：该公式在坐标图中编码联络。                                                          |
| —                                                       | Levi-Civita connection, connexion de Levi-Civita, Levi-Civita 联络                      | The unique torsion-free connection compatible with a Riemannian metric.                      | EN: Riemannian geometry normally uses the Levi-Civita connection.<br>FR: La géométrie riemannienne utilise normalement la connexion de Levi-Civita.<br>中：Riemann 几何通常使用 Levi-Civita 联络。                    |
| `\nabla g=0`                                            | metric compatibility, compatibilité métrique, 度量相容性                                   | A condition saying the connection preserves the metric under parallel transport.             | EN: Metric compatibility preserves inner products along parallel transport.<br>FR: La compatibilité métrique préserve les produits scalaires par transport parallèle.<br>中：度量相容性使平行移动保持内积。                 |
| `T(X,Y)=\nabla_XY-\nabla_YX-[X,Y]`                      | torsion tensor, tenseur de torsion, 挠率张量                                              | A tensor measuring the antisymmetric part of a connection relative to Lie brackets.          | EN: The Levi-Civita connection has zero torsion.<br>FR: La connexion de Levi-Civita a une torsion nulle.<br>中：Levi-Civita 联络的挠率为零。                                                                         |
| —                                                       | parallel vector field, champ parallèle, 平行向量场                                         | A vector field whose covariant derivative vanishes along specified directions.               | EN: Along a curve, a parallel field has zero covariant derivative.<br>FR: Le long d’une courbe, un champ parallèle a une dérivée covariante nulle.<br>中：沿曲线的平行向量场协变导数为零。                                   |
| —                                                       | parallel transport, transport parallèle, 平行移动                                         | The process of moving tangent vectors along a curve while keeping covariant derivative zero. | EN: Parallel transport on curved surfaces may depend on the path.<br>FR: Le transport parallèle sur des surfaces courbes peut dépendre du chemin.<br>中：曲面上的平行移动可能依赖路径。                                     |
| `\frac{D}{dt}`                                          | covariant derivative along a curve, dérivée covariante le long d’une courbe, 沿曲线的协变导数 | The derivative of a vector field along a parametrized curve using a connection.              | EN: Geodesic equations use `\frac{D}{dt}\gamma'(t)=0`.<br>FR: Les équations géodésiques utilisent `\frac{D}{dt}\gamma'(t)=0`.<br>中：测地线方程使用 `\frac{D}{dt}\gamma'(t)=0`。                                     |
| —                                                       | affine connection, connexion affine, 仿射联络                                             | A connection on the tangent bundle not necessarily derived from a metric.                    | EN: Affine connections define geodesics without requiring lengths.<br>FR: Les connexions affines définissent des géodésiques sans exiger de longueurs.<br>中：仿射联络可在不要求长度的情况下定义测地线。                          |
| —                                                       | connection on a vector bundle, connexion sur un fibré vectoriel, 向量丛联络                | A derivative operator acting on sections of a vector bundle.                                 | EN: Gauge theory studies connections on vector bundles.<br>FR: La théorie de jauge étudie les connexions sur les fibrés vectoriels.<br>中：规范理论研究向量丛上的联络。                                                    |

## 26.10 Geodesics, exponential maps, and completeness

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                                      | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                         | Definition                                                                                                                          | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\gamma`                                                            | geodesic, géodésique, 测地线                                                 | A curve whose velocity is parallel along itself.                                                                                    | EN: Great circles are geodesics on the sphere.<br>FR: Les grands cercles sont des géodésiques sur la sphère.<br>中：球面上的大圆是测地线。                                                                                              |
| `\nabla_{\gamma'}\gamma'=0`                                         | geodesic equation, équation géodésique, 测地线方程                             | The intrinsic equation saying acceleration vanishes with respect to the connection.                                                 | EN: Geodesics are straightest possible curves on a curved space.<br>FR: Les géodésiques sont les courbes les plus droites possibles dans un espace courbe.<br>中：测地线是弯曲空间中尽可能“直”的曲线。                                        |
| `\frac{d^2x^k}{dt^2}+\Gamma^k_{ij}\frac{dx^i}{dt}\frac{dx^j}{dt}=0` | coordinate geodesic equation, équation géodésique en coordonnées, 坐标测地线方程 | The coordinate form of the geodesic equation.                                                                                       | EN: Christoffel symbols appear as correction terms in geodesic coordinates.<br>FR: Les symboles de Christoffel apparaissent comme termes correctifs dans les coordonnées géodésiques.<br>中：Christoffel 符号在坐标测地线方程中作为修正项出现。 |
| `\operatorname{Exp}_p`                                              | exponential map, application exponentielle, 指数映射                          | The map sending an initial tangent vector to the endpoint of the geodesic with that initial velocity.                               | EN: The exponential map converts tangent vectors into nearby points.<br>FR: L’application exponentielle convertit les vecteurs tangents en points voisins.<br>中：指数映射把切向量转化为附近点。                                            |
| `\operatorname{Exp}_p(v)=\gamma_v(1)`                               | exponential map formula, formule de l’application exponentielle, 指数映射公式   | The endpoint definition of the exponential map using the geodesic starting at `p` with velocity `v`.                                | EN: Normal coordinates are built from the exponential map.<br>FR: Les coordonnées normales sont construites à partir de l’application exponentielle.<br>中：正规坐标由指数映射构造。                                                     |
| —                                                                   | normal coordinates, coordonnées normales, 正规坐标                            | Local coordinates near a point obtained from the exponential map.                                                                   | EN: In normal coordinates, Christoffel symbols vanish at the center point.<br>FR: En coordonnées normales, les symboles de Christoffel s’annulent au point central.<br>中：在正规坐标中，Christoffel 符号在中心点为零。                      |
| —                                                                   | geodesic ball, boule géodésique, 测地球                                      | A ball defined using Riemannian distance.                                                                                           | EN: Small geodesic balls look approximately Euclidean.<br>FR: Les petites boules géodésiques semblent approximativement euclidiennes.<br>中：小测地球近似欧氏球。                                                                      |
| —                                                                   | injectivity radius, rayon d’injectivité, 注入半径                             | The largest radius around a point on which the exponential map is a diffeomorphism, in a local sense.                               | EN: Injectivity radius measures how far normal coordinates remain valid.<br>FR: Le rayon d’injectivité mesure jusqu’où les coordonnées normales restent valides.<br>中：注入半径度量正规坐标保持有效的范围。                                   |
| —                                                                   | conjugate point, point conjugué, 共轭点                                      | A point along a geodesic where the exponential map fails to be nonsingular.                                                         | EN: Conjugate points indicate loss of local minimizing behavior.<br>FR: Les points conjugués indiquent une perte du comportement minimisant local.<br>中：共轭点表示局部最短性质可能失效。                                                   |
| —                                                                   | cut locus, lieu de coupure, 割迹                                            | The set where geodesics from a point cease to be minimizing or uniquely minimizing.                                                 | EN: The cut locus of a point on a sphere is its antipodal point.<br>FR: Le lieu de coupure d’un point sur une sphère est son antipode.<br>中：球面上一点的割迹是其对跖点。                                                                 |
| —                                                                   | geodesic completeness, complétude géodésique, 测地完备性                       | The property that geodesics can be extended for all time.                                                                           | EN: Complete Riemannian manifolds have globally extendable geodesics.<br>FR: Les variétés riemanniennes complètes ont des géodésiques prolongeables globalement.<br>中：完备 Riemann 流形上的测地线可全局延拓。                             |
| —                                                                   | Hopf-Rinow theorem, théorème de Hopf-Rinow, Hopf-Rinow 定理                 | A theorem relating metric completeness, geodesic completeness, and compactness of closed bounded sets under Riemannian assumptions. | EN: Hopf-Rinow connects distance geometry with geodesic existence.<br>FR: Hopf-Rinow relie géométrie métrique et existence des géodésiques.<br>中：Hopf-Rinow 定理连接距离几何与测地线存在性。                                               |

## 26.11 Curvature, Ricci geometry, and global invariants

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                                | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                      | Definition                                                                            | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| ------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `R(X,Y)Z`                                                     | Riemann curvature tensor, tenseur de courbure de Riemann, Riemann 曲率张量 | A tensor measuring noncommutativity of covariant derivatives.                         | EN: Curvature detects how parallel transport depends on paths.<br>FR: La courbure détecte la dépendance du transport parallèle au chemin.<br>中：曲率检测平行移动对路径的依赖。                                                              |
| `R(X,Y)Z=\nabla_X\nabla_YZ-\nabla_Y\nabla_XZ-\nabla_{[X,Y]}Z` | curvature formula, formule de courbure, 曲率公式                           | The definition of curvature in terms of covariant derivatives and the Lie bracket.    | EN: Flat connections have zero curvature.<br>FR: Les connexions plates ont une courbure nulle.<br>中：平坦联络的曲率为零。                                                                                                              |
| `R^l_{\ ijk}`                                                 | curvature components, composantes de courbure, 曲率分量                    | Coordinate components of the Riemann curvature tensor.                                | EN: Curvature components enter Einstein’s equations through contractions.<br>FR: Les composantes de courbure entrent dans les équations d’Einstein par contractions.<br>中：曲率分量通过缩并进入 Einstein 方程。                           |
| `K(\sigma)`                                                   | sectional curvature, courbure sectionnelle, 截面曲率                       | Curvature associated with a two-dimensional plane `\sigma` in a tangent space.        | EN: The sphere has positive sectional curvature.<br>FR: La sphère a une courbure sectionnelle positive.<br>中：球面具有正截面曲率。                                                                                                     |
| `\operatorname{Ric}`                                          | Ricci curvature, courbure de Ricci, Ricci 曲率                           | A contraction of the Riemann curvature tensor measuring averaged sectional curvature. | EN: Ricci curvature controls volume comparison and geodesic behavior.<br>FR: La courbure de Ricci contrôle la comparaison des volumes et le comportement géodésique.<br>中：Ricci 曲率控制体积比较和测地线行为。                             |
| `S`                                                           | scalar curvature, courbure scalaire, 标量曲率                              | The trace of the Ricci curvature with respect to the metric.                          | EN: Scalar curvature compresses curvature information into one function.<br>FR: La courbure scalaire compresse l’information de courbure en une fonction.<br>中：标量曲率把曲率信息压缩为一个函数。                                            |
| `G=\operatorname{Ric}-\frac{1}{2}Sg`                          | Einstein tensor, tenseur d’Einstein, Einstein 张量                       | A divergence-free tensor built from Ricci curvature and scalar curvature.             | EN: The Einstein tensor appears in general relativity.<br>FR: Le tenseur d’Einstein apparaît en relativité générale.<br>中：Einstein 张量出现在广义相对论中。                                                                             |
| —                                                             | flat manifold, variété plate, 平坦流形                                     | A manifold with zero curvature in the relevant sense.                                 | EN: Euclidean space is flat.<br>FR: L’espace euclidien est plat.<br>中：欧氏空间是平坦的。                                                                                                                                             |
| —                                                             | constant curvature, courbure constante, 常曲率                            | A condition where sectional curvature is the same at all points and planes.           | EN: Spheres, Euclidean spaces, and hyperbolic spaces are model spaces of constant curvature.<br>FR: Sphères, espaces euclidiens et hyperboliques sont des espaces modèles de courbure constante.<br>中：球面、欧氏空间与双曲空间是常曲率模型空间。 |
| —                                                             | Gaussian curvature, courbure de Gauss, Gauss 曲率                        | The intrinsic curvature of a two-dimensional Riemannian surface.                      | EN: Gaussian curvature of a sphere is positive.<br>FR: La courbure de Gauss d’une sphère est positive.<br>中：球面的 Gauss 曲率为正。                                                                                                 |
| —                                                             | mean curvature, courbure moyenne, 平均曲率                                 | An extrinsic curvature quantity measuring average bending of a hypersurface.          | EN: Minimal surfaces have zero mean curvature.<br>FR: Les surfaces minimales ont une courbure moyenne nulle.<br>中：极小曲面的平均曲率为零。                                                                                              |
| —                                                             | Gauss-Bonnet theorem, théorème de Gauss-Bonnet, Gauss-Bonnet 定理        | A theorem relating curvature integrals to topological invariants.                     | EN: Gauss-Bonnet connects geometry with topology.<br>FR: Gauss-Bonnet relie géométrie et topologie.<br>中：Gauss-Bonnet 定理连接几何与拓扑。                                                                                            |

## 26.12 Lie groups, principal bundles, and geometric structures

| Symbol (LaTeX)           | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                | Definition                                                                                   | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| ------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `G`                      | Lie group, groupe de Lie, Lie 群                                                  | A group that is also a smooth manifold, with smooth multiplication and inversion.            | EN: The rotation group is a Lie group.<br>FR: Le groupe des rotations est un groupe de Lie.<br>中：旋转群是 Lie 群。                                                                                                          |
| `\mathfrak{g}`           | Lie algebra, algèbre de Lie, Lie 代数                                              | The tangent space at the identity of a Lie group, equipped with a Lie bracket.               | EN: Lie algebras describe infinitesimal symmetries.<br>FR: Les algèbres de Lie décrivent les symétries infinitésimales.<br>中：Lie 代数描述无穷小对称性。                                                                          |
| `\exp:\mathfrak{g}\to G` | Lie group exponential map, application exponentielle de groupe de Lie, Lie 群指数映射 | A map sending infinitesimal generators to group elements.                                    | EN: Matrix exponentials define the exponential map for matrix Lie groups.<br>FR: Les exponentielles de matrices définissent l’application exponentielle pour les groupes de Lie matriciels.<br>中：矩阵指数定义矩阵 Lie 群的指数映射。 |
| `GL(n)`                  | general linear group, groupe linéaire général, 一般线性群                             | The Lie group of invertible `n\times n` matrices.                                            | EN: `GL(n)` acts on `\mathbb{R}^n` by linear transformations.<br>FR: `GL(n)` agit sur `\mathbb{R}^n` par transformations linéaires.<br>中：`GL(n)` 通过线性变换作用在 `\mathbb{R}^n` 上。                                          |
| `SO(n)`                  | special orthogonal group, groupe spécial orthogonal, 特殊正交群                       | The Lie group of orientation-preserving orthogonal transformations.                          | EN: `SO(3)` describes rotations in three-dimensional space.<br>FR: `SO(3)` décrit les rotations de l’espace tridimensionnel.<br>中：`SO(3)` 描述三维空间中的旋转。                                                                 |
| `P\to M`                 | principal bundle, fibré principal, 主丛                                            | A fiber bundle with a smooth free transitive action of a Lie group on each fiber.            | EN: Gauge fields are modeled by connections on principal bundles.<br>FR: Les champs de jauge sont modélisés par des connexions sur des fibrés principaux.<br>中：规范场由主丛上的联络建模。                                          |
| `E\to M`                 | vector bundle, fibré vectoriel, 向量丛                                              | A bundle whose fibers are vector spaces varying smoothly over a base manifold.               | EN: The tangent bundle is a vector bundle.<br>FR: Le fibré tangent est un fibré vectoriel.<br>中：切丛是向量丛。                                                                                                               |
| `\Gamma(E)`              | sections of a bundle, sections d’un fibré, 丛截面                                   | Smooth choices of one point in each fiber of a bundle.                                       | EN: Vector fields are sections of the tangent bundle.<br>FR: Les champs de vecteurs sont des sections du fibré tangent.<br>中：向量场是切丛的截面。                                                                               |
| `A`                      | connection one-form, 1-forme de connexion, 联络一形式                                 | A Lie-algebra-valued one-form describing a connection on a principal bundle in gauge theory. | EN: Electromagnetic potentials can be viewed as connection one-forms.<br>FR: Les potentiels électromagnétiques peuvent être vus comme des 1-formes de connexion.<br>中：电磁势可视为联络一形式。                                    |
| `F_A`                    | curvature two-form, 2-forme de courbure, 曲率二形式                                   | The curvature associated with a connection one-form.                                         | EN: Gauge field strength is represented by curvature.<br>FR: L’intensité d’un champ de jauge est représentée par la courbure.<br>中：规范场强由曲率表示。                                                                         |
| `F_A=dA+A\wedge A`       | curvature of a connection, courbure d’une connexion, 联络曲率                        | The local formula for curvature of a connection in gauge theory.                             | EN: Nonabelian gauge theories include the nonlinear term `A\wedge A`.<br>FR: Les théories de jauge non abéliennes incluent le terme non linéaire `A\wedge A`.<br>中：非交换规范理论包含非线性项 `A\wedge A`。                         |
| —                        | symplectic form, forme symplectique, 辛形式                                         | A closed nondegenerate two-form on a manifold.                                               | EN: Phase space in Hamiltonian mechanics carries a symplectic form.<br>FR: L’espace des phases en mécanique hamiltonienne porte une forme symplectique.<br>中：Hamilton 力学中的相空间带有辛形式。                                   |
| `(M,\omega)`             | symplectic manifold, variété symplectique, 辛流形                                   | A manifold equipped with a symplectic form.                                                  | EN: Symplectic manifolds formalize classical mechanics.<br>FR: Les variétés symplectiques formalisent la mécanique classique.<br>中：辛流形形式化经典力学。                                                                        |
| —                        | complex manifold, variété complexe, 复流形                                          | A manifold modeled on complex Euclidean space with holomorphic transition maps.              | EN: Riemann surfaces are one-dimensional complex manifolds.<br>FR: Les surfaces de Riemann sont des variétés complexes de dimension un.<br>中：Riemann 曲面是一维复流形。                                                        |
| —                        | Kähler manifold, variété kählérienne, Kähler 流形                                  | A manifold with compatible complex, symplectic, and Riemannian structures.                   | EN: Complex projective space is a basic Kähler manifold.<br>FR: L’espace projectif complexe est une variété kählérienne fondamentale.<br>中：复射影空间是基本的 Kähler 流形。                                                       |

# 27. Algebraic Topology and Homolgical Algebra

## 27.1 Homotopy, paths, and fundamental groups

| Symbol (LaTeX)                          | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                                      | Definition                                                                                                           | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| --------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `X`                                     | topological space, espace topologique, 拓扑空间                                                            | A set equipped with a topology, used as the basic object of algebraic topology.                                      | EN: A circle, a sphere, and a torus are topological spaces.<br>FR: Un cercle, une sphère et un tore sont des espaces topologiques.<br>中：圆周、球面和环面都是拓扑空间。                                                                                               |
| `f:X\to Y`                              | continuous map, application continue, 连续映射                                                             | A map preserving topological structure by pulling open sets back to open sets.                                       | EN: Algebraic topology studies spaces through continuous maps.<br>FR: La topologie algébrique étudie les espaces par les applications continues.<br>中：代数拓扑通过连续映射研究空间。                                                                                 |
| `\gamma:[0,1]\to X`                     | path, chemin, 道路 / 路径                                                                                  | A continuous map from the unit interval into a space.                                                                | EN: A path joins `x_0` to `x_1` if `\gamma(0)=x_0` and `\gamma(1)=x_1`.<br>FR: Un chemin joint `x_0` à `x_1` si `\gamma(0)=x_0` et `\gamma(1)=x_1`.<br>中：若 `\gamma(0)=x_0` 且 `\gamma(1)=x_1`，则路径连接 `x_0` 与 `x_1`。                                     |
| —                                       | path-connected space, espace connexe par arcs, 道路连通空间                                                  | A space in which any two points can be joined by a path.                                                             | EN: The circle is path-connected.<br>FR: Le cercle est connexe par arcs.<br>中：圆周是道路连通的。                                                                                                                                                               |
| `f\simeq g`                             | homotopic maps, applications homotopes, 同伦映射                                                           | Two maps are homotopic if one can be continuously deformed into the other.                                           | EN: Constant maps into a path-connected space may be homotopic under suitable domain conditions.<br>FR: Des applications constantes vers un espace connexe par arcs peuvent être homotopes sous conditions appropriées.<br>中：在适当条件下，到道路连通空间的常值映射可以同伦。 |
| `H:X\times[0,1]\to Y`                   | homotopy, homotopie, 同伦                                                                                | A continuous family of maps from `X` to `Y`, deforming one map into another.                                         | EN: `H(x,0)=f(x)` and `H(x,1)=g(x)` define a homotopy from `f` to `g`.<br>FR: `H(x,0)=f(x)` et `H(x,1)=g(x)` définissent une homotopie de `f` à `g`.<br>中：`H(x,0)=f(x)` 与 `H(x,1)=g(x)` 定义从 `f` 到 `g` 的同伦。                                            |
| `X\simeq Y`                             | homotopy equivalence, équivalence d’homotopie, 同伦等价                                                    | Two spaces are homotopy equivalent if they have maps back and forth whose composites are homotopic to identity maps. | EN: A disk is homotopy equivalent to a point.<br>FR: Un disque est homotopiquement équivalent à un point.<br>中：圆盘与一点同伦等价。                                                                                                                             |
| —                                       | contractible space, espace contractile, 可缩空间                                                           | A space homotopy equivalent to a point.                                                                              | EN: Euclidean space `\mathbb{R}^n` is contractible.<br>FR: L’espace euclidien `\mathbb{R}^n` est contractile.<br>中：欧氏空间 `\mathbb{R}^n` 是可缩的。                                                                                                          |
| `\Omega X`                              | loop space, espace des lacets, 环路空间                                                                    | The space of loops in `X` based at a chosen point.                                                                   | EN: Loops based at `x_0` start and end at `x_0`.<br>FR: Les lacets basés en `x_0` commencent et finissent en `x_0`.<br>中：以 `x_0` 为基点的环路从 `x_0` 出发并回到 `x_0`。                                                                                           |
| `\pi_1(X,x_0)`                          | fundamental group, groupe fondamental, 基本群                                                             | The group of based loops up to homotopy, with multiplication by concatenation.                                       | EN: `\pi_1(S^1)\cong\mathbb{Z}`.<br>FR: `\pi_1(S^1)\cong\mathbb{Z}`.<br>中：`\pi_1(S^1)\cong\mathbb{Z}`。                                                                                                                                                |
| —                                       | simply connected space, espace simplement connexe, 单连通空间                                               | A path-connected space whose fundamental group is trivial.                                                           | EN: The sphere `S^2` is simply connected.<br>FR: La sphère `S^2` est simplement connexe.<br>中：球面 `S^2` 是单连通的。                                                                                                                                         |
| `f_\ast:\pi_1(X,x_0)\to\pi_1(Y,f(x_0))` | induced homomorphism on fundamental groups, homomorphisme induit sur les groupes fondamentaux, 基本群诱导同态 | A continuous map induces a group homomorphism between fundamental groups.                                            | EN: Homotopic based maps induce the same homomorphism on `\pi_1`.<br>FR: Des applications basées homotopes induisent le même homomorphisme sur `\pi_1`.<br>中：带基点同伦映射在 `\pi_1` 上诱导相同同态。                                                                |

## 27.2 Covering spaces, lifting, and fibrations

| Symbol (LaTeX)                         | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                          | Definition                                                                                        | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `p:\widetilde{X}\to X`                 | covering map, application de revêtement, 覆盖映射                              | A map locally looking like a projection from disjoint copies of an open set onto that open set.   | EN: The map `\mathbb{R}\to S^1` wrapping the line around the circle is a covering map.<br>FR: L’application `\mathbb{R}\to S^1` qui enroule la droite sur le cercle est un revêtement.<br>中：把实线绕到圆周上的映射 `\mathbb{R}\to S^1` 是覆盖映射。 |
| `\widetilde{X}`                        | covering space, espace de revêtement, 覆盖空间                                 | The domain of a covering map.                                                                     | EN: The real line is a covering space of the circle.<br>FR: La droite réelle est un espace de revêtement du cercle.<br>中：实线是圆周的覆盖空间。                                                                                               |
| `p^{-1}(x)`                            | fiber of a covering, fibre d’un revêtement, 覆盖的纤维                          | The set of points in the covering space lying above a point `x`.                                  | EN: For the universal cover of the circle, each fiber is countably infinite.<br>FR: Pour le revêtement universel du cercle, chaque fibre est dénombrable infinie.<br>中：圆周的万有覆盖中，每个纤维都是可数无限的。                                       |
| —                                      | universal covering space, revêtement universel, 万有覆盖空间                     | A simply connected covering space that covers all connected covering spaces in a universal sense. | EN: `\mathbb{R}` is the universal cover of `S^1`.<br>FR: `\mathbb{R}` est le revêtement universel de `S^1`.<br>中：`\mathbb{R}` 是 `S^1` 的万有覆盖。                                                                                       |
| —                                      | deck transformation, transformation de revêtement, 覆盖变换                    | A homeomorphism of a covering space preserving the projection to the base.                        | EN: Integer translations are deck transformations of `\mathbb{R}\to S^1`.<br>FR: Les translations entières sont des transformations de revêtement de `\mathbb{R}\to S^1`.<br>中：整数平移是 `\mathbb{R}\to S^1` 的覆盖变换。                    |
| `\operatorname{Deck}(\widetilde{X}/X)` | deck transformation group, groupe des transformations de revêtement, 覆盖变换群 | The group of deck transformations of a covering.                                                  | EN: For a universal cover, the deck group is often related to `\pi_1(X)`.<br>FR: Pour un revêtement universel, le groupe de revêtement est souvent lié à `\pi_1(X)`.<br>中：对万有覆盖，覆盖变换群常与 `\pi_1(X)` 相关。                             |
| —                                      | lifting property, propriété de relèvement, 提升性质                            | A property allowing maps or homotopies into the base to be lifted to the covering space.          | EN: Paths in the base lift uniquely after choosing a starting point upstairs.<br>FR: Les chemins dans la base se relèvent de manière unique après choix d’un point initial au-dessus.<br>中：选定上方起点后，底空间路径可唯一提升。                     |
| `\widetilde{\gamma}`                   | lifted path, chemin relevé, 提升路径                                           | A path in the covering space projecting to a given path in the base.                              | EN: Lifting loops reveals information about the fundamental group.<br>FR: Relever les lacets révèle des informations sur le groupe fondamental.<br>中：提升环路可揭示基本群信息。                                                                 |
| `F\to E\to B`                          | fibration sequence, suite de fibration, 纤维化序列                              | A sequence where `E\to B` behaves like a projection with fiber `F` up to homotopy.                | EN: Fibration sequences produce long exact sequences in homotopy.<br>FR: Les suites de fibration produisent des suites exactes longues en homotopie.<br>中：纤维化序列产生同伦群长正合列。                                                          |
| —                                      | fibration, fibration, 纤维化                                                  | A map satisfying a homotopy lifting property.                                                     | EN: Covering maps are examples of fibrations under common assumptions.<br>FR: Les revêtements sont des exemples de fibrations sous hypothèses usuelles.<br>中：在常见假设下，覆盖映射是纤维化的例子。                                                   |
| —                                      | fiber bundle, fibré, 纤维丛                                                   | A space locally modeled as a product of a base space and a fiber.                                 | EN: The Möbius strip is a nontrivial line bundle over the circle.<br>FR: Le ruban de Möbius est un fibré en droites non trivial sur le cercle.<br>中：Möbius 带是圆周上的非平凡线丛。                                                            |
| —                                      | section of a bundle, section d’un fibré, 丛截面                               | A map choosing one point in each fiber continuously or smoothly.                                  | EN: A nonvanishing vector field is a section of the tangent bundle avoiding the zero section.<br>FR: Un champ de vecteurs non nul est une section du fibré tangent évitant la section nulle.<br>中：非零向量场是避开零截面的切丛截面。                |

## 27.3 Simplicial complexes, CW complexes, and cell structures

| Symbol (LaTeX)            | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                             | Definition                                                                               | Examples                                                                                                                                                                              |
| ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\Delta^n`                | standard n-simplex, simplexe standard de dimension n, 标准 n-单形 | The convex hull of `n+1` affinely independent points.                                    | EN: `\Delta^1` is an interval and `\Delta^2` is a triangle.<br>FR: `\Delta^1` est un intervalle et `\Delta^2` est un triangle.<br>中：`\Delta^1` 是区间，`\Delta^2` 是三角形。                   |
| —                         | simplex, simplexe, 单形                                         | A generalization of vertices, edges, triangles, and tetrahedra to arbitrary dimension.   | EN: A tetrahedron is a `3`-simplex.<br>FR: Un tétraèdre est un `3`-simplexe.<br>中：四面体是 `3`-单形。                                                                                        |
| `K`                       | simplicial complex, complexe simplicial, 单纯复形                 | A collection of simplices closed under taking faces and with controlled intersections.   | EN: A triangulated surface can be represented by a simplicial complex.<br>FR: Une surface triangulée peut être représentée par un complexe simplicial.<br>中：三角剖分曲面可由单纯复形表示。           |
| `\lvert K\rvert`          | geometric realization, réalisation géométrique, 几何实现          | The topological space obtained by gluing simplices of a complex.                         | EN: The geometric realization turns combinatorial data into a space.<br>FR: La réalisation géométrique transforme des données combinatoires en espace.<br>中：几何实现把组合数据转化为拓扑空间。         |
| —                         | face of a simplex, face d’un simplexe, 单形的面                   | A simplex spanned by a subset of the vertices of a simplex.                              | EN: Each edge of a triangle is a face.<br>FR: Chaque arête d’un triangle est une face.<br>中：三角形的每条边都是一个面。                                                                             |
| —                         | barycentric subdivision, subdivision barycentrique, 重心细分      | A canonical way of subdividing a simplicial complex into smaller simplices.              | EN: Barycentric subdivision refines a complex without changing its topology.<br>FR: La subdivision barycentrique raffine un complexe sans changer sa topologie.<br>中：重心细分细化复形但不改变其拓扑。 |
| `e^n`                     | n-cell, cellule de dimension n, n 维胞腔                         | A space homeomorphic to an open `n`-dimensional ball used in cell decompositions.        | EN: A `0`-cell is a point and a `1`-cell is an open interval.<br>FR: Une `0`-cellule est un point et une `1`-cellule est un intervalle ouvert.<br>中：`0` 维胞腔是点，`1` 维胞腔是开区间。            |
| `X^n`                     | n-skeleton, n-squelette, n 骨架                                 | The subspace of a CW complex formed by cells of dimension at most `n`.                   | EN: The `1`-skeleton of a triangulated surface is a graph.<br>FR: Le `1`-squelette d’une surface triangulée est un graphe.<br>中：三角剖分曲面的 `1` 骨架是图。                                     |
| —                         | CW complex, complexe CW, CW 复形                                | A space built by attaching cells dimension by dimension.                                 | EN: Spheres and projective spaces have natural CW decompositions.<br>FR: Les sphères et espaces projectifs ont des décompositions CW naturelles.<br>中：球面和射影空间有自然的 CW 分解。              |
| `\phi:S^{n-1}\to X^{n-1}` | attaching map, application d’attachement, 贴附映射                | A map describing how the boundary of an `n`-cell is glued to the previous skeleton.      | EN: Attaching maps determine the topology of a CW complex.<br>FR: Les applications d’attachement déterminent la topologie d’un complexe CW.<br>中：贴附映射决定 CW 复形的拓扑。                     |
| —                         | cellular approximation, approximation cellulaire, 胞腔逼近        | A theorem allowing maps between CW complexes to be homotoped to maps respecting skeleta. | EN: Cellular approximation makes homotopy arguments combinatorial.<br>FR: L’approximation cellulaire rend les arguments d’homotopie combinatoires.<br>中：胞腔逼近使同伦论证组合化。                 |
| —                         | triangulation, triangulation, 三角剖分                            | A representation of a space by gluing simplices.                                         | EN: Triangulation turns geometric spaces into combinatorial models.<br>FR: La triangulation transforme des espaces géométriques en modèles combinatoires.<br>中：三角剖分把几何空间转化为组合模型。      |

## 27.4 Chain complexes, cycles, boundaries, and homology

| Symbol (LaTeX)                        | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                 | Definition                                                                             | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `C_n`                                 | chain group, groupe des chaînes, 链群                               | An abelian group whose elements are formal sums of `n`-dimensional generators.         | EN: Singular `n`-chains are formal sums of singular `n`-simplices.<br>FR: Les chaînes singulières de dimension `n` sont des sommes formelles de simplexes singuliers.<br>中：奇异 `n` 链是奇异 `n` 单形的形式和。 |
| `\partial_n:C_n\to C_{n-1}`           | boundary map, application bord, 边界映射                              | A homomorphism sending an `n`-chain to its formal boundary.                            | EN: The boundary of an oriented triangle is the signed sum of its edges.<br>FR: Le bord d’un triangle orienté est la somme signée de ses arêtes.<br>中：有向三角形的边界是其边的带符号和。                            |
| `\partial_{n-1}\circ\partial_n=0`     | boundary of a boundary is zero, le bord du bord est nul, 边界的边界为零  | The fundamental identity ensuring that homology is well-defined.                       | EN: The boundary of a filled triangle is a loop, and that loop has no boundary.<br>FR: Le bord d’un triangle rempli est un lacet, et ce lacet n’a pas de bord.<br>中：填充三角形的边界是环，而该环没有边界。            |
| `(C_\bullet,\partial)`                | chain complex, complexe de chaînes, 链复形                           | A sequence of groups connected by boundary maps whose consecutive composition is zero. | EN: Chain complexes convert topology into algebra.<br>FR: Les complexes de chaînes transforment la topologie en algèbre.<br>中：链复形把拓扑转化为代数。                                                         |
| `Z_n=\operatorname{Ker}\partial_n`    | cycle group, groupe des cycles, 闭链群                               | The group of `n`-chains whose boundary is zero.                                        | EN: Loops are `1`-cycles in a chain complex.<br>FR: Les lacets sont des `1`-cycles dans un complexe de chaînes.<br>中：环路在链复形中是 `1`-闭链。                                                              |
| `B_n=\operatorname{Im}\partial_{n+1}` | boundary group, groupe des bords, 边界群                             | The group of `n`-chains that are boundaries of higher-dimensional chains.              | EN: The boundary of a disk is a boundary `1`-cycle.<br>FR: Le bord d’un disque est un `1`-cycle bord.<br>中：圆盘的边界是一个边界 `1`-闭链。                                                                      |
| `H_n(C)=Z_n/B_n`                      | nth homology group, n-ième groupe d’homologie, 第 n 同调群            | The quotient of cycles by boundaries, measuring holes not filled by chains.            | EN: `H_1` detects one-dimensional holes.<br>FR: `H_1` détecte les trous de dimension un.<br>中：`H_1` 检测一维孔洞。                                                                                        |
| `H_n(X)`                              | homology group of a space, groupe d’homologie d’un espace, 空间的同调群 | A homology group computed from a chain complex associated with `X`.                    | EN: Homology groups distinguish spaces by algebraic invariants.<br>FR: Les groupes d’homologie distinguent les espaces par des invariants algébriques.<br>中：同调群通过代数不变量区分空间。                        |
| `\tilde{H}_n(X)`                      | reduced homology, homologie réduite, 约化同调                         | A modified homology theory adjusting degree zero behavior.                             | EN: Reduced homology of a point is zero in all degrees.<br>FR: L’homologie réduite d’un point est nulle en tout degré.<br>中：一点的约化同调在所有维度上为零。                                                       |
| `C_\bullet(X;G)`                      | chains with coefficients, chaînes à coefficients, 带系数链            | Chains formed using a coefficient group or ring `G`.                                   | EN: Coefficients can reveal torsion phenomena.<br>FR: Les coefficients peuvent révéler des phénomènes de torsion.<br>中：系数可以揭示挠现象。                                                                  |
| `H_n(X;G)`                            | homology with coefficients, homologie à coefficients, 带系数同调       | Homology computed using a chosen coefficient group or ring.                            | EN: `H_n(X;\mathbb{Z})` is integral homology.<br>FR: `H_n(X;\mathbb{Z})` est l’homologie entière.<br>中：`H_n(X;\mathbb{Z})` 是整数系数同调。                                                                |
| —                                     | homology class, classe d’homologie, 同调类                           | An equivalence class of cycles differing by a boundary.                                | EN: A loop around a hole represents a nontrivial homology class.<br>FR: Un lacet autour d’un trou représente une classe d’homologie non triviale.<br>中：绕孔洞一圈的环路代表非平凡同调类。                           |

## 27.5 Singular, simplicial, and cellular homology

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                  | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                   | Definition                                                                                          | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| ----------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\sigma:\Delta^n\to X`                          | singular simplex, simplexe singulier, 奇异单形                          | A continuous map from the standard `n`-simplex into a space.                                        | EN: Singular simplices need not be embedded or geometrically straight.<br>FR: Les simplexes singuliers ne sont pas forcément plongés ni géométriquement droits.<br>中：奇异单形不必嵌入，也不必几何上是直的。             |
| `C_n^{\mathrm{sing}}(X)`                        | singular chain group, groupe des chaînes singulières, 奇异链群          | The free abelian group generated by singular `n`-simplices in `X`.                                  | EN: Singular chains exist for every topological space.<br>FR: Les chaînes singulières existent pour tout espace topologique.<br>中：每个拓扑空间都有奇异链。                                                       |
| `H_n^{\mathrm{sing}}(X)`                        | singular homology, homologie singulière, 奇异同调                       | Homology computed from the singular chain complex.                                                  | EN: Singular homology is homotopy invariant.<br>FR: L’homologie singulière est invariante par homotopie.<br>中：奇异同调是同伦不变量。                                                                            |
| `C_n^{\Delta}(K)`                               | simplicial chain group, groupe des chaînes simpliciales, 单纯链群       | The chain group generated by oriented `n`-simplices of a simplicial complex.                        | EN: Simplicial homology is computable from a triangulation.<br>FR: L’homologie simpliciale se calcule à partir d’une triangulation.<br>中：单纯同调可由三角剖分计算。                                               |
| `H_n^{\Delta}(K)`                               | simplicial homology, homologie simpliciale, 单纯同调                    | Homology computed from the oriented simplices of a simplicial complex.                              | EN: A triangulated circle has `H_1\cong\mathbb{Z}`.<br>FR: Un cercle triangulé a `H_1\cong\mathbb{Z}`.<br>中：三角剖分圆周满足 `H_1\cong\mathbb{Z}`。                                                           |
| `C_n^{\mathrm{cell}}(X)`                        | cellular chain group, groupe des chaînes cellulaires, 胞腔链群          | The chain group generated by `n`-cells of a CW complex.                                             | EN: Cellular chains often make homology calculations shorter.<br>FR: Les chaînes cellulaires rendent souvent les calculs d’homologie plus courts.<br>中：胞腔链常使同调计算更简洁。                                 |
| `H_n^{\mathrm{cell}}(X)`                        | cellular homology, homologie cellulaire, 胞腔同调                       | Homology computed from the cell structure of a CW complex.                                          | EN: Cellular homology computes spheres with only two cells.<br>FR: L’homologie cellulaire calcule les sphères avec seulement deux cellules.<br>中：胞腔同调可用两个胞腔计算球面的同调。                                  |
| `\chi(X)`                                       | Euler characteristic, caractéristique d’Euler, Euler 示性数            | An alternating sum of cell counts or ranks of homology groups under suitable finiteness conditions. | EN: A sphere has Euler characteristic `2`.<br>FR: Une sphère a caractéristique d’Euler `2`.<br>中：球面的 Euler 示性数是 `2`。                                                                                 |
| `\chi(X)=\sum_n(-1)^n\operatorname{rank}H_n(X)` | Euler-Poincaré formula, formule d’Euler-Poincaré, Euler-Poincaré 公式 | A formula relating Euler characteristic to homology ranks.                                          | EN: Homology gives a topological interpretation of cell counting.<br>FR: L’homologie donne une interprétation topologique du comptage des cellules.<br>中：同调给胞腔计数提供拓扑解释。                              |
| —                                               | homotopy invariance, invariance homotopique, 同伦不变性                  | The property that homotopy equivalent spaces have isomorphic homology groups.                       | EN: A disk and a point have the same homology.<br>FR: Un disque et un point ont la même homologie.<br>中：圆盘与一点具有相同同调。                                                                                 |
| —                                               | excision, excision, 切除性                                             | A property allowing removal of suitable subspaces without changing relative homology.               | EN: Excision is essential for local-to-global homology arguments.<br>FR: L’excision est essentielle pour les arguments homologiques local-global.<br>中：切除性对同调中的局部到整体论证很重要。                           |
| —                                               | Mayer-Vietoris sequence, suite de Mayer-Vietoris, Mayer-Vietoris 序列 | A long exact sequence computing homology from two overlapping subspaces.                            | EN: Mayer-Vietoris computes spaces by cutting them into simpler pieces.<br>FR: Mayer-Vietoris calcule les espaces en les découpant en morceaux plus simples.<br>中：Mayer-Vietoris 序列通过切分空间为简单部分来计算同调。 |

## 27.6 Cohomology, cup products, and cohomology rings

| Symbol (LaTeX)                 | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                           | Definition                                                                       | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| ------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `C^n(X;G)`                     | cochain group, groupe des cochaînes, 上链群                                    | The group of homomorphisms from `n`-chains to a coefficient group `G`.           | EN: Cochains assign algebraic values to chains.<br>FR: Les cochaînes attribuent des valeurs algébriques aux chaînes.<br>中：上链给链赋予代数值。                                                      |
| `\delta:C^n\to C^{n+1}`        | coboundary map, application cobord, 上边界映射                                   | The dual map to the chain boundary, increasing degree by one.                    | EN: Coboundaries are cohomological analogues of exact derivatives.<br>FR: Les cobords sont les analogues cohomologiques des dérivées exactes.<br>中：上边界是恰当导数的上同调对应物。                       |
| `\delta^2=0`                   | coboundary squared is zero, le cobord au carré est nul, 上边界平方为零             | The identity ensuring cohomology is well-defined.                                | EN: This follows algebraically from `\partial^2=0`.<br>FR: Cela découle algébriquement de `\partial^2=0`.<br>中：这在代数上来自 `\partial^2=0`。                                                    |
| `Z^n=\operatorname{Ker}\delta` | cocycle group, groupe des cocycles, 上闭链群                                    | The group of cochains whose coboundary is zero.                                  | EN: Closed differential forms are de Rham cocycles.<br>FR: Les formes différentielles fermées sont des cocycles de de Rham.<br>中：闭微分形式是 de Rham 上闭链。                                      |
| `B^n=\operatorname{Im}\delta`  | coboundary group, groupe des cobords, 上边界群                                  | The group of cochains that are coboundaries of lower-degree cochains.            | EN: Exact forms represent coboundaries in de Rham theory.<br>FR: Les formes exactes représentent des cobords en théorie de de Rham.<br>中：恰当形式在 de Rham 理论中代表上边界。                          |
| `H^n(X;G)`                     | cohomology group, groupe de cohomologie, 上同调群                               | The quotient of cocycles by coboundaries.                                        | EN: Cohomology often has a richer product structure than homology.<br>FR: La cohomologie possède souvent une structure de produit plus riche que l’homologie.<br>中：上同调通常比同调具有更丰富的乘法结构。    |
| `\smile`                       | cup product, cup-produit, 杯积                                                | A product operation combining cohomology classes into higher-degree classes.     | EN: Cup products make cohomology into a graded ring.<br>FR: Les cup-produits font de la cohomologie un anneau gradué.<br>中：杯积使上同调成为分次环。                                                   |
| `\alpha\smile\beta`            | product of cochains, produit de cochaînes, 上链乘积                             | A cochain-level operation inducing the cup product in cohomology.                | EN: Cup products detect structure not visible from Betti numbers alone.<br>FR: Les cup-produits détectent une structure invisible aux seuls nombres de Betti.<br>中：杯积能检测仅靠 Betti 数看不出的结构。 |
| `H^\ast(X;R)`                  | cohomology ring, anneau de cohomologie, 上同调环                                | The direct sum of cohomology groups with multiplication given by cup product.    | EN: The cohomology ring of projective space is a standard invariant.<br>FR: L’anneau de cohomologie de l’espace projectif est un invariant standard.<br>中：射影空间的上同调环是标准不变量。                |
| —                              | graded ring, anneau gradué, 分次环                                             | A ring decomposed into degree components with multiplication respecting degrees. | EN: Cohomology rings are naturally graded.<br>FR: Les anneaux de cohomologie sont naturellement gradués.<br>中：上同调环天然是分次的。                                                                 |
| `\beta_n`                      | Betti number, nombre de Betti, Betti 数                                      | The rank of a homology or cohomology group over a field.                         | EN: `\beta_1` counts independent one-dimensional holes over a field.<br>FR: `\beta_1` compte les trous indépendants de dimension un sur un corps.<br>中：`\beta_1` 在域系数下计数独立的一维孔洞。          |
| —                              | universal coefficient theorem, théorème des coefficients universels, 万有系数定理 | A theorem relating homology or cohomology with different coefficient groups.     | EN: The universal coefficient theorem separates free and torsion information.<br>FR: Le théorème des coefficients universels sépare information libre et torsion.<br>中：万有系数定理分离自由部分与挠信息。  |

## 27.7 Exact sequences and diagrammatic algebra

| Symbol (LaTeX)                           | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                         | Definition                                                                                            | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ---------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `A\xrightarrow{f}B`                      | morphism, morphisme, 态射                                   | A structure-preserving map between algebraic or topological objects.                                  | EN: Homomorphisms between groups are morphisms in the category of groups.<br>FR: Les homomorphismes entre groupes sont des morphismes dans la catégorie des groupes.<br>中：群之间的同态是群范畴中的态射。                                           |
| `0\to A\to B\to C\to0`                   | short exact sequence, suite exacte courte, 短正合列           | An exact sequence expressing `B` as an extension of `C` by `A`.                                       | EN: Short exact sequences organize subobjects and quotients.<br>FR: Les suites exactes courtes organisent sous-objets et quotients.<br>中：短正合列组织子对象与商对象。                                                                             |
| `\operatorname{Im}f=\operatorname{Ker}g` | exactness, exactitude, 正合性                                | A condition saying that the image of one map equals the kernel of the next.                           | EN: Exactness means everything killed by the next map came from the previous map.<br>FR: L’exactitude signifie que tout ce qui est tué par l’application suivante vient de la précédente.<br>中：正合性表示被下一个映射杀掉的元素都来自前一个映射。            |
| `\cdots\to A_n\to A_{n-1}\to\cdots`      | long exact sequence, suite exacte longue, 长正合列            | An infinite or extended exact sequence connecting objects across degrees.                             | EN: Homology theories often produce long exact sequences.<br>FR: Les théories d’homologie produisent souvent des suites exactes longues.<br>中：同调理论常产生长正合列。                                                                          |
| `\delta`                                 | connecting homomorphism, homomorphisme de connexion, 连接同态 | A map in a long exact sequence linking adjacent degrees.                                              | EN: Connecting homomorphisms measure obstruction to lifting cycles.<br>FR: Les homomorphismes de connexion mesurent l’obstruction au relèvement des cycles.<br>中：连接同态度量提升闭链的障碍。                                                     |
| —                                        | commutative diagram, diagramme commutatif, 交换图            | A diagram where all paths with the same start and end give the same morphism.                         | EN: Commutative diagrams express compatibility of constructions.<br>FR: Les diagrammes commutatifs expriment la compatibilité des constructions.<br>中：交换图表达构造之间的相容性。                                                                |
| —                                        | diagram chase, chasse au diagramme, 图追踪                   | A proof technique tracking elements through a commutative diagram.                                    | EN: Diagram chasing proves exactness and isomorphism results.<br>FR: La chasse au diagramme prouve des résultats d’exactitude et d’isomorphisme.<br>中：图追踪用于证明正合性和同构结论。                                                              |
| —                                        | five lemma, lemme des cinq, 五引理                           | A lemma giving an isomorphism conclusion in a morphism of exact sequences under suitable assumptions. | EN: The five lemma is frequently used with long exact sequences.<br>FR: Le lemme des cinq est fréquemment utilisé avec les suites exactes longues.<br>中：五引理常与长正合列一起使用。                                                              |
| —                                        | snake lemma, lemme du serpent, 蛇引理                        | A lemma producing an exact sequence from a commutative diagram with exact rows.                       | EN: The snake lemma constructs connecting homomorphisms.<br>FR: Le lemme du serpent construit des homomorphismes de connexion.<br>中：蛇引理构造连接同态。                                                                                      |
| —                                        | split exact sequence, suite exacte scindée, 分裂正合列         | A short exact sequence equivalent to a direct sum decomposition.                                      | EN: A split exact sequence has `B\cong A\oplus C` under suitable category conditions.<br>FR: Une suite exacte scindée donne `B\cong A\oplus C` sous conditions catégorielles appropriées.<br>中：在适当范畴条件下，分裂正合列给出 `B\cong A\oplus C`。 |
| `A\oplus B`                              | direct sum, somme directe, 直和                             | A construction combining objects with independent components.                                         | EN: Homology groups often decompose into direct sums of simpler groups.<br>FR: Les groupes d’homologie se décomposent souvent en sommes directes de groupes plus simples.<br>中：同调群常分解为更简单群的直和。                                      |
| `A\otimes B`                             | tensor product, produit tensoriel, 张量积                    | A bilinear algebraic construction used to change coefficients and build products.                     | EN: Tensor products appear in Künneth formulas.<br>FR: Les produits tensoriels apparaissent dans les formules de Künneth.<br>中：张量积出现在 Künneth 公式中。                                                                                  |

## 27.8 Functors, categories, and derived constructions

| Symbol (LaTeX)                | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                      | Definition                                                                                   | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| ----------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\mathcal{C}`                 | category, catégorie, 范畴                                | A structure consisting of objects and morphisms with identity morphisms and composition.     | EN: Topological spaces form a category with continuous maps.<br>FR: Les espaces topologiques forment une catégorie avec les applications continues.<br>中：拓扑空间和连续映射构成一个范畴。                                                                            |
| `F:\mathcal{C}\to\mathcal{D}` | functor, foncteur, 函子                                  | A map between categories preserving objects, morphisms, identities, and composition.         | EN: Homology is a functor from spaces to graded abelian groups.<br>FR: L’homologie est un foncteur des espaces vers les groupes abéliens gradués.<br>中：同调是从空间到分次 Abel 群的函子。                                                                          |
| —                             | covariant functor, foncteur covariant, 协变函子            | A functor preserving the direction of morphisms.                                             | EN: Singular homology is covariant for continuous maps.<br>FR: L’homologie singulière est covariante pour les applications continues.<br>中：奇异同调对连续映射是协变的。                                                                                            |
| —                             | contravariant functor, foncteur contravariant, 反变函子    | A functor reversing the direction of morphisms.                                              | EN: Cohomology is contravariant for continuous maps.<br>FR: La cohomologie est contravariante pour les applications continues.<br>中：上同调对连续映射是反变的。                                                                                                    |
| `\operatorname{Hom}(A,B)`     | Hom functor, foncteur Hom, Hom 函子                      | A functor assigning morphism sets or groups between objects.                                 | EN: `\operatorname{Hom}(-,B)` is contravariant in the first variable.<br>FR: `\operatorname{Hom}(-,B)` est contravariant dans la première variable.<br>中：`\operatorname{Hom}(-,B)` 对第一个变量反变。                                                         |
| `\operatorname{Ext}^n(A,B)`   | Ext functor, foncteur Ext, Ext 函子                      | A derived functor measuring extensions and failure of exactness of Hom.                      | EN: `\operatorname{Ext}^1(A,B)` classifies certain extensions of `A` by `B`.<br>FR: `\operatorname{Ext}^1(A,B)` classifie certaines extensions de `A` par `B`.<br>中：`\operatorname{Ext}^1(A,B)` 分类某些由 `B` 扩张 `A` 的结构。                                |
| `\operatorname{Tor}_n(A,B)`   | Tor functor, foncteur Tor, Tor 函子                      | A derived functor measuring failure of exactness of tensor product.                          | EN: Tor terms appear in the Künneth theorem.<br>FR: Les termes Tor apparaissent dans le théorème de Künneth.<br>中：Tor 项出现在 Künneth 定理中。                                                                                                              |
| —                             | left exact functor, foncteur exact à gauche, 左正合函子     | A functor preserving exactness at the left part of short exact sequences.                    | EN: `\operatorname{Hom}(-,B)` is typically left exact in suitable abelian categories.<br>FR: `\operatorname{Hom}(-,B)` est typiquement exact à gauche dans des catégories abéliennes appropriées.<br>中：在适当 Abel 范畴中，`\operatorname{Hom}(-,B)` 通常左正合。 |
| —                             | right exact functor, foncteur exact à droite, 右正合函子    | A functor preserving exactness at the right part of short exact sequences.                   | EN: Tensor product is usually right exact.<br>FR: Le produit tensoriel est généralement exact à droite.<br>中：张量积通常右正合。                                                                                                                               |
| `L_nF`                        | left derived functor, foncteur dérivé gauche, 左导出函子    | A derived functor measuring the failure of a right exact functor to be exact.                | EN: `\operatorname{Tor}` is a left derived functor of tensor product.<br>FR: `\operatorname{Tor}` est un foncteur dérivé gauche du produit tensoriel.<br>中：`\operatorname{Tor}` 是张量积的左导出函子。                                                          |
| `R^nF`                        | right derived functor, foncteur dérivé droit, 右导出函子    | A derived functor measuring the failure of a left exact functor to be exact.                 | EN: `\operatorname{Ext}` is a right derived functor of Hom.<br>FR: `\operatorname{Ext}` est un foncteur dérivé droit de Hom.<br>中：`\operatorname{Ext}` 是 Hom 的右导出函子。                                                                                 |
| —                             | natural transformation, transformation naturelle, 自然变换 | A systematic morphism between functors compatible with all morphisms in the source category. | EN: Boundary maps in long exact sequences are natural.<br>FR: Les applications de bord dans les suites exactes longues sont naturelles.<br>中：长正合列中的边界映射是自然的。                                                                                         |

## 27.9 Projective, injective, and flat resolutions

| Symbol (LaTeX)                     | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                     | Definition                                                                  | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| ---------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `P`                                | projective object, objet projectif, 投射对象              | An object with a lifting property against epimorphisms.                     | EN: Free modules are projective.<br>FR: Les modules libres sont projectifs.<br>中：自由模是投射模。                                                                                                       |
| `I`                                | injective object, objet injectif, 内射对象                | An object with an extension property against monomorphisms.                 | EN: Injective objects are used to compute right derived functors.<br>FR: Les objets injectifs servent à calculer les foncteurs dérivés droits.<br>中：内射对象用于计算右导出函子。                              |
| `F`                                | flat module, module plat, 平坦模                         | A module whose tensor product functor preserves exact sequences.            | EN: Flat modules control exactness after tensoring.<br>FR: Les modules plats contrôlent l’exactitude après tensorisation.<br>中：平坦模控制张量化后的正合性。                                                   |
| `\cdots\to P_1\to P_0\to A\to0`    | projective resolution, résolution projective, 投射分解    | An exact sequence resolving an object by projective objects.                | EN: Projective resolutions compute Tor and Ext.<br>FR: Les résolutions projectives calculent Tor et Ext.<br>中：投射分解用于计算 Tor 和 Ext。                                                               |
| `0\to A\to I^0\to I^1\to\cdots`    | injective resolution, résolution injective, 内射分解      | An exact sequence resolving an object by injective objects.                 | EN: Injective resolutions compute sheaf cohomology and Ext.<br>FR: Les résolutions injectives calculent la cohomologie des faisceaux et Ext.<br>中：内射分解用于计算层上同调和 Ext。                            |
| `\cdots\to F_1\to F_0\to A\to0`    | flat resolution, résolution plate, 平坦分解               | A resolution by flat modules.                                               | EN: Flat resolutions can compute Tor.<br>FR: Les résolutions plates peuvent calculer Tor.<br>中：平坦分解可用于计算 Tor。                                                                                   |
| —                                  | free resolution, résolution libre, 自由分解               | A resolution by free modules.                                               | EN: Free resolutions are explicit but may be large.<br>FR: Les résolutions libres sont explicites mais peuvent être grandes.<br>中：自由分解显式，但可能很大。                                                 |
| —                                  | chain homotopy, homotopie de chaînes, 链同伦             | A relation between chain maps showing they induce the same map on homology. | EN: Chain-homotopic maps induce identical maps on homology.<br>FR: Des applications homotopes de chaînes induisent les mêmes applications en homologie.<br>中：链同伦映射在同调上诱导相同映射。                   |
| `f_\bullet:C_\bullet\to D_\bullet` | chain map, application de chaînes, 链映射                | A degree-preserving family of homomorphisms commuting with boundary maps.   | EN: Continuous maps induce chain maps on singular chain complexes.<br>FR: Les applications continues induisent des applications de chaînes sur les complexes singuliers.<br>中：连续映射在奇异链复形上诱导链映射。 |
| —                                  | quasi-isomorphism, quasi-isomorphisme, 拟同构            | A chain map inducing isomorphisms on all homology groups.                   | EN: Derived categories invert quasi-isomorphisms.<br>FR: Les catégories dérivées inversent les quasi-isomorphismes.<br>中：导出范畴把拟同构变为可逆。                                                          |
| `H_\bullet(C)`                     | homology of a complex, homologie d’un complexe, 复形的同调 | The graded object formed from cycles modulo boundaries of a chain complex.  | EN: Homology measures failure of exactness in a complex.<br>FR: L’homologie mesure le défaut d’exactitude dans un complexe.<br>中：同调度量复形中正合性的失败。                                                 |
| —                                  | acyclic complex, complexe acyclique, 无圈复形 / 零同调复形     | A complex whose homology vanishes in all relevant degrees.                  | EN: Exact chain complexes are acyclic.<br>FR: Les complexes de chaînes exacts sont acycliques.<br>中：正合链复形是无同调的。                                                                                 |

## 27.10 Spectral sequences and filtrations

| Symbol (LaTeX)                     | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                              | Definition                                                                                      | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| ---------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `F_pC_n`                           | filtration, filtration, 滤过                                                     | A nested sequence of subobjects used to approximate or decompose a complex.                     | EN: Filtrations organize complicated complexes into layers.<br>FR: Les filtrations organisent les complexes compliqués en couches.<br>中：滤过把复杂复形组织为层次结构。                                                                         |
