| `\operatorname{gr}C`               | associated graded object, objet gradué associé, 伴随分次对象                         | The graded object obtained from successive quotients of a filtration.                           | EN: Associated graded objects simplify filtered structures.<br>FR: Les objets gradués associés simplifient les structures filtrées.<br>中：伴随分次对象简化带滤过结构。                                                                         |
| `E_r^{p,q}`                        | spectral sequence page, page d’une suite spectrale, 谱序列页                       | A bigraded collection of groups or modules appearing at stage `r` of a spectral sequence.       | EN: Spectral sequences compute hard invariants through successive approximations.<br>FR: Les suites spectrales calculent des invariants difficiles par approximations successives.<br>中：谱序列通过逐步逼近计算困难不变量。                       |
| `d_r:E_r^{p,q}\to E_r^{p+r,q-r+1}` | spectral sequence differential, différentielle de suite spectrale, 谱序列微分       | A differential on page `r` of a spectral sequence, with a degree shift depending on convention. | EN: Each page is obtained by taking homology with respect to the previous differential.<br>FR: Chaque page s’obtient en prenant l’homologie par rapport à la différentielle précédente.<br>中：每一页通过对上一页微分取同调得到。                  |
| `E_{r+1}=H(E_r,d_r)`               | page transition, transition de pages, 页间转换                                     | The rule passing from one page of a spectral sequence to the next.                              | EN: Spectral sequence calculations track what survives through pages.<br>FR: Les calculs de suites spectrales suivent ce qui survit à travers les pages.<br>中：谱序列计算追踪哪些类在各页中存活。                                                 |
| `E_\infty`                         | limiting page, page limite, 极限页                                                | The terminal or stable page encoding the associated graded of the target object.                | EN: `E_\infty` usually gives the associated graded form of the desired answer.<br>FR: `E_\infty` donne généralement la forme graduée associée de la réponse cherchée.<br>中：`E_\infty` 通常给出目标答案的伴随分次形式。                          |
| `E_r\Rightarrow H`                 | convergence of a spectral sequence, convergence d’une suite spectrale, 谱序列收敛   | A statement that a spectral sequence abuts to a target graded or filtered object `H`.           | EN: Convergence tells what the spectral sequence is computing.<br>FR: La convergence dit ce que la suite spectrale calcule.<br>中：收敛说明谱序列最终在计算什么对象。                                                                              |
| —                                  | first quadrant spectral sequence, suite spectrale du premier quadrant, 第一象限谱序列 | A spectral sequence with nonzero terms only for nonnegative bidegrees.                          | EN: First quadrant spectral sequences often have good convergence behavior.<br>FR: Les suites spectrales du premier quadrant ont souvent une bonne convergence.<br>中：第一象限谱序列通常具有较好的收敛性质。                                        |
| —                                  | double complex, bicomplexe, 双复形                                                | A bigraded object with two compatible differentials.                                            | EN: Double complexes often generate spectral sequences.<br>FR: Les bicomplexes engendrent souvent des suites spectrales.<br>中：双复形常产生谱序列。                                                                                        |
| `\operatorname{Tot}(C^{p,q})`      | total complex, complexe total, 全复形                                             | A single complex formed from a double complex by summing along total degree.                    | EN: The total complex combines horizontal and vertical differentials.<br>FR: Le complexe total combine les différentielles horizontales et verticales.<br>中：全复形结合水平与垂直微分。                                                       |
| —                                  | Leray spectral sequence, suite spectrale de Leray, Leray 谱序列                   | A spectral sequence relating cohomology of a space, a map, and higher direct images.            | EN: Leray spectral sequences are central in sheaf cohomology and algebraic geometry.<br>FR: Les suites spectrales de Leray sont centrales en cohomologie des faisceaux et géométrie algébrique.<br>中：Leray 谱序列是层上同调和代数几何中的核心工具。 |
| —                                  | Serre spectral sequence, suite spectrale de Serre, Serre 谱序列                   | A spectral sequence computing homology or cohomology of a fibration from base and fiber data.   | EN: The Serre spectral sequence computes the cohomology of fiber bundles.<br>FR: La suite spectrale de Serre calcule la cohomologie des fibrés.<br>中：Serre 谱序列用底空间与纤维数据计算纤维丛上同调。                                                |

## 27.11 Duality, products, and manifold invariants

| Symbol (LaTeX)           | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                   | Definition                                                                                               | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| ------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `[M]`                    | fundamental class, classe fondamentale, 基本类                         | The top-dimensional homology class representing an oriented closed manifold.                             | EN: The fundamental class encodes the global orientation of a manifold.<br>FR: La classe fondamentale encode l’orientation globale d’une variété.<br>中：基本类编码流形的整体定向。                                    |
| `H^k(M)\cong H_{n-k}(M)` | Poincaré duality, dualité de Poincaré, Poincaré 对偶                  | A duality between cohomology and homology of complementary degrees on oriented closed manifolds.         | EN: Poincaré duality pairs cycles and cocycles on manifolds.<br>FR: La dualité de Poincaré apparie cycles et cocycles sur les variétés.<br>中：Poincaré 对偶在流形上配对循环与上循环。                                   |
| `\frown`                 | cap product, cap-produit, 帽积                                        | An operation combining cohomology and homology to produce lower-degree homology.                         | EN: Cap product with `[M]` realizes Poincaré duality.<br>FR: Le cap-produit avec `[M]` réalise la dualité de Poincaré.<br>中：与 `[M]` 作帽积实现 Poincaré 对偶。                                                  |
| `\times`                 | cross product, produit croisé, 叉积                                   | A product operation combining homology or cohomology classes from two spaces.                            | EN: Cross products appear in the homology of product spaces.<br>FR: Les produits croisés apparaissent dans l’homologie des espaces produits.<br>中：叉积出现在乘积空间的同调中。                                        |
| —                        | Künneth theorem, théorème de Künneth, Künneth 定理                    | A theorem relating the homology or cohomology of a product space to those of its factors.                | EN: Künneth formulas compute invariants of product spaces.<br>FR: Les formules de Künneth calculent les invariants des espaces produits.<br>中：Künneth 公式计算乘积空间的不变量。                                     |
| —                        | intersection product, produit d’intersection, 交积                    | A product encoding intersections of cycles in a manifold.                                                | EN: Intersection products translate geometric intersections into algebra.<br>FR: Les produits d’intersection traduisent les intersections géométriques en algèbre.<br>中：交积把几何相交转化为代数。                   |
| —                        | orientation class, classe d’orientation, 定向类                        | A cohomological or homological class representing orientation data.                                      | EN: Orientability can be expressed through existence of orientation classes.<br>FR: L’orientabilité peut s’exprimer par l’existence de classes d’orientation.<br>中：可定向性可通过定向类的存在来表达。                    |
| —                        | Thom class, classe de Thom, Thom 类                                  | A cohomology class associated with an oriented vector bundle, used in Thom isomorphism.                  | EN: The Thom class converts bundle geometry into cohomology.<br>FR: La classe de Thom convertit la géométrie des fibrés en cohomologie.<br>中：Thom 类把向量丛几何转化为上同调。                                        |
| —                        | Thom isomorphism, isomorphisme de Thom, Thom 同构                     | An isomorphism relating cohomology of a base space to compactly supported cohomology of a vector bundle. | EN: Thom isomorphism is a basic tool for characteristic classes.<br>FR: L’isomorphisme de Thom est un outil de base pour les classes caractéristiques.<br>中：Thom 同构是特征类理论的基本工具。                         |
| —                        | characteristic class, classe caractéristique, 特征类                   | A cohomology class naturally associated with a vector bundle.                                            | EN: Characteristic classes measure twisting of vector bundles.<br>FR: Les classes caractéristiques mesurent le vrillage des fibrés vectoriels.<br>中：特征类度量向量丛的扭曲。                                        |
| `w_i(E)`                 | Stiefel-Whitney class, classe de Stiefel-Whitney, Stiefel-Whitney 类 | A characteristic class of real vector bundles with coefficients in `\mathbb{Z}/2\mathbb{Z}`.             | EN: The first Stiefel-Whitney class detects orientability of real bundles.<br>FR: La première classe de Stiefel-Whitney détecte l’orientabilité des fibrés réels.<br>中：第一 Stiefel-Whitney 类检测实向量丛的可定向性。 |
| `c_i(E)`                 | Chern class, classe de Chern, Chern 类                               | A characteristic class of complex vector bundles.                                                        | EN: Chern classes are central in complex geometry and topology.<br>FR: Les classes de Chern sont centrales en géométrie complexe et topologie.<br>中：Chern 类是复几何与拓扑中的核心概念。                               |
| `p_i(E)`                 | Pontryagin class, classe de Pontryagin, Pontryagin 类                | A characteristic class of real vector bundles derived through complexification.                          | EN: Pontryagin classes are important in smooth manifold topology.<br>FR: Les classes de Pontryagin sont importantes en topologie des variétés lisses.<br>中：Pontryagin 类在光滑流形拓扑中很重要。                     |

## 27.12 Higher homotopy, stable phenomena, and modern language

| Symbol (LaTeX)    | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                    | Definition                                                                                                      | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| ----------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\pi_n(X,x_0)`    | higher homotopy group, groupe d’homotopie supérieur, 高阶同伦群           | The group of based homotopy classes of maps from `S^n` to `X`.                                                  | EN: Higher homotopy groups detect structure beyond the fundamental group.<br>FR: Les groupes d’homotopie supérieurs détectent une structure au-delà du groupe fondamental.<br>中：高阶同伦群检测基本群之外的结构。                           |
| `\pi_n(S^k)`      | homotopy groups of spheres, groupes d’homotopie des sphères, 球面的同伦群  | Homotopy groups measuring maps between spheres, often difficult to compute.                                     | EN: Homotopy groups of spheres are central and highly nontrivial.<br>FR: Les groupes d’homotopie des sphères sont centraux et très non triviaux.<br>中：球面的同伦群是核心而极其非平凡的对象。                                                  |
| —                 | Hurewicz theorem, théorème de Hurewicz, Hurewicz 定理                  | A theorem relating homotopy groups to homology groups under connectivity assumptions.                           | EN: Hurewicz connects the first nontrivial homotopy group with homology.<br>FR: Hurewicz relie le premier groupe d’homotopie non trivial à l’homologie.<br>中：Hurewicz 定理把第一个非平凡同伦群与同调联系起来。                                 |
| `\Omega X`        | loop space, espace des lacets, 环路空间                                  | The space of based loops in `X`, used to shift homotopy degrees.                                                | EN: Loop spaces turn higher homotopy into lower homotopy of another space.<br>FR: Les espaces de lacets transforment l’homotopie supérieure en homotopie inférieure d’un autre espace.<br>中：环路空间把高阶同伦转化为另一个空间的低阶同伦。        |
| `\Sigma X`        | suspension, suspension, 悬挂                                           | A construction stretching a space between two cone points.                                                      | EN: Suspension raises dimension-like behavior in stable homotopy.<br>FR: La suspension augmente le comportement dimensionnel en homotopie stable.<br>中：悬挂在稳定同伦中提升类似维度的行为。                                                  |
| —                 | spectrum, spectre, 谱                                                 | A sequence of spaces or objects encoding stable homotopy information.                                           | EN: Spectra are basic objects of stable homotopy theory.<br>FR: Les spectres sont les objets fondamentaux de la théorie de l’homotopie stable.<br>中：谱是稳定同伦理论的基本对象。                                                         |
| `E_\ast(X)`       | generalized homology theory, théorie d’homologie généralisée, 广义同调理论 | A homology theory represented by a spectrum rather than ordinary chains alone.                                  | EN: K-theory is a generalized cohomology theory.<br>FR: La K-théorie est une théorie de cohomologie généralisée.<br>中：K 理论是一种广义上同调理论。                                                                                      |
| `K^0(X)`          | K-theory group, groupe de K-théorie, K 理论群                           | A generalized cohomology group built from vector bundles or related categorical data.                           | EN: Topological K-theory studies vector bundles through stable equivalence.<br>FR: La K-théorie topologique étudie les fibrés vectoriels par équivalence stable.<br>中：拓扑 K 理论通过稳定等价研究向量丛。                                  |
| —                 | stable equivalence, équivalence stable, 稳定等价                         | An equivalence relation after adding trivial or auxiliary summands.                                             | EN: Vector bundles can become equivalent after adding trivial bundles.<br>FR: Des fibrés vectoriels peuvent devenir équivalents après ajout de fibrés triviaux.<br>中：向量丛在加入平凡丛后可能变得等价。                                     |
| —                 | model category, catégorie modèle, 模型范畴                               | A category with classes of weak equivalences, fibrations, and cofibrations supporting abstract homotopy theory. | EN: Model categories organize homotopy theory beyond spaces.<br>FR: Les catégories modèles organisent la théorie de l’homotopie au-delà des espaces.<br>中：模型范畴把同伦理论推广到空间之外。                                                |
| —                 | weak equivalence, équivalence faible, 弱等价                            | A morphism treated as an equivalence by a homotopy theory, often inducing isomorphisms on invariants.           | EN: A weak equivalence need not be an isomorphism of underlying objects.<br>FR: Une équivalence faible n’est pas forcément un isomorphisme des objets sous-jacents.<br>中：弱等价不必是底层对象的同构。                                    |
| `D(\mathcal{A})`  | derived category, catégorie dérivée, 导出范畴                            | A category obtained from chain complexes by formally inverting quasi-isomorphisms.                              | EN: Derived categories are central in modern homological algebra and algebraic geometry.<br>FR: Les catégories dérivées sont centrales en algèbre homologique moderne et géométrie algébrique.<br>中：导出范畴是现代同调代数与代数几何的核心语言。 |
| `\infty`-category | infinity-category, infini-catégorie, 无穷范畴                            | A higher categorical structure retaining homotopies between morphisms and higher homotopies.                    | EN: Infinity-categories provide modern language for derived and homotopical mathematics.<br>FR: Les infini-catégories donnent un langage moderne aux mathématiques dérivées et homotopiques.<br>中：无穷范畴为导出数学与同伦数学提供现代语言。    |
# 28. Number Theory, Algebraic Number Theory, and Arithmetic Structures

## 28.1 Divisibility, congruences, and modular arithmetic

| Symbol (LaTeX)                    | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                              | Definition                                                                              | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| --------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `a\mid b`                         | divisibility, divisibilité, 整除                                                 | An integer `a` divides an integer `b` if `b=ak` for some integer `k`.                   | EN: `3\mid 12` because `12=3\cdot4`.<br>FR: `3\mid 12` car `12=3\cdot4`.<br>中：`3\mid 12`，因为 `12=3\cdot4`。                                                                                               |
| `a\nmid b`                        | non-divisibility, non-divisibilité, 不整除                                        | The statement that no integer multiple of `a` equals `b`.                               | EN: `5\nmid 12`.<br>FR: `5\nmid 12`.<br>中：`5\nmid 12`。                                                                                                                                                  |
| `\gcd(a,b)`                       | greatest common divisor, plus grand commun diviseur, 最大公因数                     | The largest positive integer dividing both `a` and `b`.                                 | EN: `\gcd(12,18)=6`.<br>FR: `\gcd(12,18)=6`.<br>中：`\gcd(12,18)=6`。                                                                                                                                      |
| `\operatorname{lcm}(a,b)`         | least common multiple, plus petit commun multiple, 最小公倍数                       | The smallest positive integer divisible by both `a` and `b`.                            | EN: `\operatorname{lcm}(12,18)=36`.<br>FR: `\operatorname{lcm}(12,18)=36`.<br>中：`\operatorname{lcm}(12,18)=36`。                                                                                         |
| `a\equiv b\pmod n`                | congruence modulo n, congruence modulo n, 模 n 同余                               | The integers `a` and `b` have the same remainder modulo `n`, equivalently `n\mid(a-b)`. | EN: `17\equiv 2\pmod 5`.<br>FR: `17\equiv 2\pmod 5`.<br>中：`17\equiv 2\pmod 5`。                                                                                                                          |
| `\mathbb{Z}/n\mathbb{Z}`          | residue class ring modulo n, anneau des classes résiduelles modulo n, 模 n 剩余类环 | The ring of integers modulo `n`.                                                        | EN: Arithmetic modulo `12` takes place in `\mathbb{Z}/12\mathbb{Z}`.<br>FR: L’arithmétique modulo `12` se fait dans `\mathbb{Z}/12\mathbb{Z}`.<br>中：模 `12` 的算术发生在 `\mathbb{Z}/12\mathbb{Z}` 中。          |
| `[a]_n`                           | residue class, classe de congruence, 剩余类                                       | The set of integers congruent to `a` modulo `n`.                                        | EN: `[2]_5` contains `2,7,12,\ldots`.<br>FR: `[2]_5` contient `2,7,12,\ldots`.<br>中：`[2]_5` 包含 `2,7,12,\ldots`。                                                                                         |
| `a^{-1}\pmod n`                   | modular inverse, inverse modulaire, 模逆元                                        | An integer `x` such that `ax\equiv1\pmod n`, when it exists.                            | EN: `3^{-1}\equiv4\pmod{11}` because `3\cdot4\equiv1\pmod{11}`.<br>FR: `3^{-1}\equiv4\pmod{11}` car `3\cdot4\equiv1\pmod{11}`.<br>中：`3^{-1}\equiv4\pmod{11}`，因为 `3\cdot4\equiv1\pmod{11}`。              |
| `(\mathbb{Z}/n\mathbb{Z})^\times` | group of units modulo n, groupe des unités modulo n, 模 n 单位群                   | The multiplicative group of invertible residue classes modulo `n`.                      | EN: The units modulo `10` are represented by `1,3,7,9`.<br>FR: Les unités modulo `10` sont représentées par `1,3,7,9`.<br>中：模 `10` 的单位元由 `1,3,7,9` 表示。                                                  |
| `\varphi(n)`                      | Euler totient function, indicatrice d’Euler, Euler φ 函数                        | The number of integers from `1` to `n` that are coprime to `n`.                         | EN: `\varphi(10)=4`.<br>FR: `\varphi(10)=4`.<br>中：`\varphi(10)=4`。                                                                                                                                      |
| `a^{\varphi(n)}\equiv1\pmod n`    | Euler theorem, théorème d’Euler, Euler 定理                                      | If `a` is coprime to `n`, then `a^{\varphi(n)}` is congruent to `1` modulo `n`.         | EN: Euler’s theorem generalizes Fermat’s little theorem.<br>FR: Le théorème d’Euler généralise le petit théorème de Fermat.<br>中：Euler 定理推广了 Fermat 小定理。                                                |
| `a^{p-1}\equiv1\pmod p`           | Fermat’s little theorem, petit théorème de Fermat, Fermat 小定理                  | If `p` is prime and `p\nmid a`, then `a^{p-1}\equiv1\pmod p`.                           | EN: For `p=5`, `2^4\equiv1\pmod5`.<br>FR: Pour `p=5`, `2^4\equiv1\pmod5`.<br>中：当 `p=5` 时，`2^4\equiv1\pmod5`。                                                                                            |
| —                                 | Chinese remainder theorem, théorème chinois des restes, 中国剩余定理                 | A theorem solving simultaneous congruences modulo pairwise coprime integers.            | EN: Congruences modulo `3` and `5` combine into one congruence modulo `15`.<br>FR: Des congruences modulo `3` et `5` se combinent en une congruence modulo `15`.<br>中：模 `3` 与模 `5` 的同余可合成为模 `15` 的一个同余。 |

## 28.2 Prime numbers, factorization, and arithmetic functions

| Symbol (LaTeX)                | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                         | Definition                                                                                                                | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ----------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `p`                           | prime number, nombre premier, 素数                                          | A positive integer greater than `1` whose only positive divisors are `1` and itself.                                      | EN: `2,3,5,7` are prime numbers.<br>FR: `2,3,5,7` sont des nombres premiers.<br>中：`2,3,5,7` 是素数。                                                                                                              |
| —                             | composite number, nombre composé, 合数                                      | A positive integer greater than `1` that is not prime.                                                                    | EN: `12` is composite because `12=3\cdot4`.<br>FR: `12` est composé car `12=3\cdot4`.<br>中：`12` 是合数，因为 `12=3\cdot4`。                                                                                          |
| `n=\prod_p p^{v_p(n)}`        | prime factorization, décomposition en facteurs premiers, 素因数分解            | The unique expression of a positive integer as a product of prime powers.                                                 | EN: `60=2^2\cdot3\cdot5`.<br>FR: `60=2^2\cdot3\cdot5`.<br>中：`60=2^2\cdot3\cdot5`。                                                                                                                             |
| `v_p(n)`                      | p-adic valuation of an integer, valuation p-adique d’un entier, 整数的 p 进赋值 | The exponent of prime `p` in the prime factorization of `n`.                                                              | EN: `v_2(40)=3` because `40=2^3\cdot5`.<br>FR: `v_2(40)=3` car `40=2^3\cdot5`.<br>中：`v_2(40)=3`，因为 `40=2^3\cdot5`。                                                                                            |
| `\pi(x)`                      | prime-counting function, fonction de compte des nombres premiers, 素数计数函数  | The number of primes less than or equal to `x`.                                                                           | EN: `\pi(10)=4`.<br>FR: `\pi(10)=4`.<br>中：`\pi(10)=4`。                                                                                                                                                        |
| `\pi(x)\sim \frac{x}{\log x}` | prime number theorem, théorème des nombres premiers, 素数定理                 | A theorem stating the asymptotic density of prime numbers.                                                                | EN: The prime number theorem says primes become rarer like `1/\log x`.<br>FR: Le théorème des nombres premiers dit que les premiers deviennent plus rares comme `1/\log x`.<br>中：素数定理说明素数密度大约按 `1/\log x` 下降。 |
| `\mu(n)`                      | Möbius function, fonction de Möbius, Möbius 函数                            | An arithmetic function equal to `0` if `n` has a squared prime factor, otherwise `(-1)^k` for `k` distinct prime factors. | EN: `\mu(6)=1` and `\mu(12)=0`.<br>FR: `\mu(6)=1` et `\mu(12)=0`.<br>中：`\mu(6)=1`，`\mu(12)=0`。                                                                                                                |
| `d(n)`                        | divisor-counting function, fonction nombre de diviseurs, 约数个数函数           | The number of positive divisors of `n`.                                                                                   | EN: `d(12)=6`.<br>FR: `d(12)=6`.<br>中：`d(12)=6`。                                                                                                                                                              |
| `\sigma(n)`                   | sum-of-divisors function, fonction somme des diviseurs, 约数和函数             | The sum of all positive divisors of `n`.                                                                                  | EN: `\sigma(6)=1+2+3+6=12`.<br>FR: `\sigma(6)=1+2+3+6=12`.<br>中：`\sigma(6)=1+2+3+6=12`。                                                                                                                       |
| `f\ast g`                     | Dirichlet convolution, convolution de Dirichlet, Dirichlet 卷积             | An operation on arithmetic functions defined by summing over divisors.                                                    | EN: Möbius inversion is expressed using Dirichlet convolution.<br>FR: L’inversion de Möbius s’exprime par convolution de Dirichlet.<br>中：Möbius 反演可用 Dirichlet 卷积表达。                                          |
| `\sum_{d\mid n}`              | divisor sum, somme sur les diviseurs, 约数求和                                | A sum taken over all positive divisors `d` of `n`.                                                                        | EN: `\sigma(n)=\sum_{d\mid n}d`.<br>FR: `\sigma(n)=\sum_{d\mid n}d`.<br>中：`\sigma(n)=\sum_{d\mid n}d`。                                                                                                        |
| —                             | multiplicative function, fonction multiplicative, 积性函数                    | An arithmetic function satisfying `f(mn)=f(m)f(n)` when `m` and `n` are coprime.                                          | EN: `\varphi`, `\mu`, and `d` are multiplicative.<br>FR: `\varphi`, `\mu` et `d` sont multiplicatives.<br>中：`\varphi`、`\mu` 与 `d` 都是积性函数。                                                                     |

## 28.3 Quadratic residues, reciprocity, and finite fields

| Symbol (LaTeX)             | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                    | Definition                                                                                   | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| -------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| —                          | quadratic residue, résidu quadratique, 二次剩余                                          | A number congruent to a square modulo an integer, usually modulo a prime.                    | EN: `4` is a quadratic residue modulo `7` because `2^2\equiv4\pmod7`.<br>FR: `4` est un résidu quadratique modulo `7` car `2^2\equiv4\pmod7`.<br>中：`4` 是模 `7` 的二次剩余，因为 `2^2\equiv4\pmod7`。                              |
| —                          | quadratic nonresidue, non-résidu quadratique, 二次非剩余                                  | A number not congruent to any square modulo the given modulus.                               | EN: `3` is a quadratic nonresidue modulo `7`.<br>FR: `3` est un non-résidu quadratique modulo `7`.<br>中：`3` 是模 `7` 的二次非剩余。                                                                                              |
| `\left(\frac{a}{p}\right)` | Legendre symbol, symbole de Legendre, Legendre 符号                                    | A symbol indicating whether `a` is a quadratic residue modulo an odd prime `p`.              | EN: `\left(\frac{a}{p}\right)=1` means `a` is a nonzero square modulo `p`.<br>FR: `\left(\frac{a}{p}\right)=1` signifie que `a` est un carré non nul modulo `p`.<br>中：`\left(\frac{a}{p}\right)=1` 表示 `a` 是模 `p` 的非零平方。 |
| `\left(\frac{a}{n}\right)` | Jacobi symbol, symbole de Jacobi, Jacobi 符号                                          | A generalization of the Legendre symbol to odd composite moduli.                             | EN: A Jacobi symbol equal to `1` does not always imply a quadratic residue.<br>FR: Un symbole de Jacobi égal à `1` n’implique pas toujours un résidu quadratique.<br>中：Jacobi 符号等于 `1` 不一定表示二次剩余。                       |
| —                          | quadratic reciprocity, loi de réciprocité quadratique, 二次互反律                         | A theorem relating whether `p` is a square modulo `q` to whether `q` is a square modulo `p`. | EN: Quadratic reciprocity is a foundational theorem of classical number theory.<br>FR: La réciprocité quadratique est un théorème fondateur de la théorie classique des nombres.<br>中：二次互反律是经典数论的基础定理。                  |
| `\mathbb{F}_p`             | finite field with p elements, corps fini à p éléments, p 元有限域                        | The field of integers modulo a prime `p`.                                                    | EN: `\mathbb{F}_5` has elements `0,1,2,3,4`.<br>FR: `\mathbb{F}_5` a pour éléments `0,1,2,3,4`.<br>中：`\mathbb{F}_5` 的元素是 `0,1,2,3,4`。                                                                                   |
| `\mathbb{F}_q`             | finite field, corps fini, 有限域                                                        | A field with finitely many elements, necessarily of size `q=p^r`.                            | EN: Every finite field has prime-power order.<br>FR: Tout corps fini a un cardinal puissance d’un nombre premier.<br>中：每个有限域的元素个数都是素数幂。                                                                                 |
| `\mathbb{F}_q^\times`      | multiplicative group of a finite field, groupe multiplicatif d’un corps fini, 有限域乘法群 | The group of nonzero elements of a finite field under multiplication.                        | EN: `\mathbb{F}_q^\times` is cyclic of order `q-1`.<br>FR: `\mathbb{F}_q^\times` est cyclique d’ordre `q-1`.<br>中：`\mathbb{F}_q^\times` 是 `q-1` 阶循环群。                                                                   |
| —                          | primitive root, racine primitive, 原根                                                 | A generator of a cyclic multiplicative group modulo a prime or in a finite field.            | EN: `2` is a primitive root modulo `5`.<br>FR: `2` est une racine primitive modulo `5`.<br>中：`2` 是模 `5` 的原根。                                                                                                            |
| `x^q=x`                    | finite field identity, identité des corps finis, 有限域恒等式                              | Every element of `\mathbb{F}_q` satisfies `x^q=x`.                                           | EN: The roots of `x^q-x` are exactly the elements of `\mathbb{F}_q`.<br>FR: Les racines de `x^q-x` sont exactement les éléments de `\mathbb{F}_q`.<br>中：`x^q-x` 的根正是 `\mathbb{F}_q` 的元素。                                |
| —                          | Frobenius map, application de Frobenius, Frobenius 映射                                | The map `x\mapsto x^p` in characteristic `p`.                                                | EN: Frobenius is an automorphism of finite fields.<br>FR: Frobenius est un automorphisme des corps finis.<br>中：Frobenius 是有限域的自同构。                                                                                      |
| —                          | character sum, somme de caractères, 特征和                                              | A sum involving multiplicative or additive characters over finite fields or residue classes. | EN: Character sums estimate cancellation in finite-field problems.<br>FR: Les sommes de caractères estiment la compensation dans les problèmes sur corps finis.<br>中：特征和估计有限域问题中的抵消现象。                                  |

## 28.4 Diophantine equations and rational points

| Symbol (LaTeX)  | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                               | Definition                                                                                             | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| --------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| —               | Diophantine equation, équation diophantienne, Diophantine 方程                    | An equation whose solutions are required to be integers or rational numbers.                           | EN: `x^2+y^2=z^2` is a Diophantine equation.<br>FR: `x^2+y^2=z^2` est une équation diophantienne.<br>中：`x^2+y^2=z^2` 是 Diophantine 方程。                                                                                          |
| `ax+by=c`       | linear Diophantine equation, équation diophantienne linéaire, 线性 Diophantine 方程 | A linear equation in integer unknowns.                                                                 | EN: `ax+by=c` has integer solutions exactly when `\gcd(a,b)\mid c`.<br>FR: `ax+by=c` a des solutions entières exactement lorsque `\gcd(a,b)\mid c`.<br>中：`ax+by=c` 有整数解当且仅当 `\gcd(a,b)\mid c`。                                  |
| `x^2+y^2=z^2`   | Pythagorean equation, équation pythagoricienne, Pythagoras 方程                   | The Diophantine equation describing integer right triangles.                                           | EN: `(3,4,5)` is a Pythagorean triple.<br>FR: `(3,4,5)` est un triplet pythagoricien.<br>中：`(3,4,5)` 是 Pythagoras 三元组。                                                                                                          |
| —               | rational point, point rationnel, 有理点                                            | A point on an algebraic variety whose coordinates lie in `\mathbb{Q}` or another specified field.      | EN: The point `(0,0)` is a rational point on `y^2=x^3+x`.<br>FR: Le point `(0,0)` est un point rationnel sur `y^2=x^3+x`.<br>中：点 `(0,0)` 是曲线 `y^2=x^3+x` 上的有理点。                                                                 |
| `X(\mathbb{Q})` | rational points of X, points rationnels de X, X 的有理点集                           | The set of points of `X` defined over `\mathbb{Q}`.                                                    | EN: Arithmetic geometry studies sets like `X(\mathbb{Q})`.<br>FR: La géométrie arithmétique étudie des ensembles comme `X(\mathbb{Q})`.<br>中：算术几何研究如 `X(\mathbb{Q})` 这样的集合。                                                     |
| `X(K)`          | K-rational points, points K-rationnels, K 有理点                                   | The set of points of `X` with coordinates in a field `K`.                                              | EN: Passing from `\mathbb{Q}` to `\mathbb{Q}_p` changes the solution set.<br>FR: Passer de `\mathbb{Q}` à `\mathbb{Q}_p` change l’ensemble des solutions.<br>中：从 `\mathbb{Q}` 转到 `\mathbb{Q}_p` 会改变解集。                          |
| —               | local solution, solution locale, 局部解                                            | A solution over completions such as `\mathbb{R}` or `\mathbb{Q}_p`.                                    | EN: Local solvability is often easier than rational solvability.<br>FR: La solubilité locale est souvent plus facile que la solubilité rationnelle.<br>中：局部可解性通常比有理可解性更容易判断。                                                    |
| —               | global solution, solution globale, 整体解                                          | A solution over a global field such as `\mathbb{Q}` or a number field.                                 | EN: A curve may have points over every completion but none over `\mathbb{Q}`.<br>FR: Une courbe peut avoir des points sur toute complétion mais aucun sur `\mathbb{Q}`.<br>中：一条曲线可能在每个完备化上有点，但在 `\mathbb{Q}` 上无点。               |
| —               | Hasse principle, principe de Hasse, Hasse 原理                                    | The principle that global solvability should follow from solvability over all completions, when valid. | EN: The Hasse principle holds for some quadratic forms but fails in other cases.<br>FR: Le principe de Hasse vaut pour certaines formes quadratiques mais échoue dans d’autres cas.<br>中：Hasse 原理对某些二次型成立，但在其他情形下会失败。           |
| —               | local-global principle, principe local-global, 局部-整体原则                          | A general principle comparing global solutions with local solutions everywhere.                        | EN: Local-global principles are central in arithmetic geometry.<br>FR: Les principes local-global sont centraux en géométrie arithmétique.<br>中：局部-整体原则是算术几何中的核心思想。                                                             |
| —               | Mordell equation, équation de Mordell, Mordell 方程                               | A cubic Diophantine equation often written in the form `y^2=x^3+k`.                                    | EN: Mordell equations are basic examples of elliptic curve equations.<br>FR: Les équations de Mordell sont des exemples fondamentaux d’équations de courbes elliptiques.<br>中：Mordell 方程是椭圆曲线方程的基本例子。                           |
| —               | Fermat equation, équation de Fermat, Fermat 方程                                  | The equation `x^n+y^n=z^n`, especially for integer solutions.                                          | EN: Fermat’s Last Theorem states no nonzero integer solutions exist for `n>2`.<br>FR: Le dernier théorème de Fermat affirme qu’il n’existe pas de solutions entières non nulles pour `n>2`.<br>中：Fermat 大定理断言当 `n>2` 时不存在非零整数解。 |

## 28.5 p-adic numbers, valuations, and completions

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                                  | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                            | Definition                                                                                           | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| --------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `v_p(x)`                                                        | p-adic valuation, valuation p-adique, p 进赋值                  | A function measuring the exponent of prime `p` in a nonzero rational number.                         | EN: `v_3(18)=2`.<br>FR: `v_3(18)=2`.<br>中：`v_3(18)=2`。                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `\lvert x\rvert_p`                                              | p-adic absolute value, valeur absolue p-adique, p 进绝对值       | A non-Archimedean absolute value usually defined by `\lvert x\rvert_p=p^{-v_p(x)}`.                  | EN: Numbers divisible by high powers of `p` are small in `\lvert\cdot\rvert_p`.<br>FR: Les nombres divisibles par de grandes puissances de `p` sont petits pour `\lvert\cdot\rvert_p`.<br>中：能被高次 `p` 幂整除的数在 `p` 进绝对值下很小。                                                                                                                                   |
| `\lvert x+y\rvert_p\leq\max(\lvert x\rvert_p,\lvert y\rvert_p)` | ultrametric inequality, inégalité ultramétrique, 超度量不等式      | The strong triangle inequality satisfied by p-adic absolute values.                                  | EN: p-adic geometry behaves very differently from Euclidean geometry.<br>FR: La géométrie p-adique se comporte très différemment de la géométrie euclidienne.<br>中：p 进几何与欧氏几何行为非常不同。                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `\mathbb{Q}_p`                                                  | field of p-adic numbers, corps des nombres p-adiques, p 进数域  | The completion of `\mathbb{Q}` with respect to the p-adic absolute value.                            | EN: `\mathbb{Q}_p` contains limits of p-adic Cauchy sequences of rational numbers.<br>FR: `\mathbb{Q}_p` contient les limites des suites de Cauchy p-adiques de rationnels.<br>中：`\mathbb{Q}_p` 包含有理数 p 进 Cauchy 列的极限。                                                                                                                                     |
| `\mathbb{Z}_p`                                                  | p-adic integers, entiers p-adiques, p 进整数                    | The valuation ring of `\mathbb{Q}_p`, consisting of elements with p-adic absolute value at most `1`. | EN: Elements of `\mathbb{Z}_p` have p-adic expansions with nonnegative powers of `p`.<br>FR: Les éléments de `\mathbb{Z}_p` ont des développements p-adiques en puissances non négatives de `p`.<br>中：`\mathbb{Z}_p` 的元素有非负次 `p` 幂展开。                                                                                                                      |
| `\mathbb{F}_p`                                                  | residue field of Zp, corps résiduel de Zp, Zp 的剩余域           | The quotient `\mathbb{Z}_p/p\mathbb{Z}_p`.                                                           | EN: Reducing p-adic integers modulo `p` gives elements of `\mathbb{F}_p`.<br>FR: Réduire les entiers p-adiques modulo `p` donne des éléments de `\mathbb{F}_p`.<br>中：把 p 进整数模 `p` 化得到 `\mathbb{F}_p` 的元素。                                                                                                                                                  |
| —                                                               | completion, complétion, 完备化                                  | The process of adjoining limits of Cauchy sequences under a chosen metric or absolute value.         | EN: `\mathbb{R}` completes `\mathbb{Q}` for the usual absolute value; `\mathbb{Q}_p` completes it for `\lvert\cdot\rvert_p`.<br>FR: `\mathbb{R}` complète `\mathbb{Q}` pour la valeur absolue usuelle ; `\mathbb{Q}_p` le complète pour `\lvert\cdot\rvert_p`.<br>中：`\mathbb{R}` 是 `\mathbb{Q}` 关于通常绝对值的完备化；`\mathbb{Q}_p` 是关于 `\lvert\cdot\rvert_p` 的完备化。 |
| —                                                               | non-Archimedean field, corps non archimédien, 非 Archimedes 域 | A valued field satisfying an ultrametric inequality.                                                 | EN: `\mathbb{Q}_p` is a non-Archimedean local field.<br>FR: `\mathbb{Q}_p` est un corps local non archimédien.<br>中：`\mathbb{Q}_p` 是非 Archimedes 局部域。                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| —                                                               | Hensel’s lemma, lemme de Hensel, Hensel 引理                   | A p-adic lifting theorem that promotes solutions modulo powers of `p` to p-adic solutions.           | EN: Hensel’s lemma is the p-adic analogue of Newton lifting.<br>FR: Le lemme de Hensel est l’analogue p-adique du relèvement de Newton.<br>中：Hensel 引理是 Newton 提升的 p 进类似物。                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `\mathbb{A}_{\mathbb{Q}}`                                       | adele ring, anneau des adèles, Adele 环                       | A restricted product of all completions of `\mathbb{Q}`.                                             | EN: Adeles combine real and all p-adic information.<br>FR: Les adèles combinent l’information réelle et toutes les informations p-adiques.<br>中：Adele 同时组合实信息和所有 p 进信息。                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `\mathbb{A}_K`                                                  | adele ring of K, anneau des adèles de K, K 的 Adele 环         | The adele ring formed from all completions of a global field `K`.                                    | EN: Automorphic forms are naturally expressed on adelic groups.<br>FR: Les formes automorphes s’expriment naturellement sur les groupes adéliques.<br>中：自守形式自然地用 Adele 群表达。                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `\mathbb{I}_K`                                                  | idele group, groupe des idèles, Idele 群                      | The multiplicative group of invertible adeles under a restricted product condition.                  | EN: Class field theory is elegantly formulated using ideles.<br>FR: La théorie du corps de classes se formule élégamment avec les idèles.<br>中：类域论可用 Idele 优雅表述。                                                                                                                                                                                           |

## 28.6 Number fields, rings of integers, and algebraic elements

| Symbol (LaTeX)                             | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                         | Definition                                                                                    | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| ------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `K`                                        | number field, corps de nombres, 数域                                        | A finite field extension of `\mathbb{Q}`.                                                     | EN: `\mathbb{Q}(\sqrt{2})` is a number field.<br>FR: `\mathbb{Q}(\sqrt{2})` est un corps de nombres.<br>中：`\mathbb{Q}(\sqrt{2})` 是数域。                                                          |
| `[K:\mathbb{Q}]`                           | degree of a number field, degré d’un corps de nombres, 数域次数               | The dimension of `K` as a vector space over `\mathbb{Q}`.                                     | EN: `[\mathbb{Q}(\sqrt{2}):\mathbb{Q}]=2`.<br>FR: `[\mathbb{Q}(\sqrt{2}):\mathbb{Q}]=2`.<br>中：`[\mathbb{Q}(\sqrt{2}):\mathbb{Q}]=2`。                                                           |
| `\alpha` algebraic                         | algebraic number, nombre algébrique, 代数数                                  | A complex number satisfying a nonzero polynomial equation with rational coefficients.         | EN: `\sqrt{2}` is algebraic.<br>FR: `\sqrt{2}` est algébrique.<br>中：`\sqrt{2}` 是代数数。                                                                                                           |
| —                                          | transcendental number, nombre transcendant, 超越数                           | A complex number that is not algebraic over `\mathbb{Q}`.                                     | EN: `\pi` and `e` are transcendental.<br>FR: `\pi` et `e` sont transcendants.<br>中：`\pi` 与 `e` 是超越数。                                                                                           |
| `m_\alpha(x)`                              | minimal polynomial, polynôme minimal, 最小多项式                               | The monic polynomial of least degree over a base field that has `\alpha` as a root.           | EN: The minimal polynomial of `\sqrt{2}` over `\mathbb{Q}` is `x^2-2`.<br>FR: Le polynôme minimal de `\sqrt{2}` sur `\mathbb{Q}` est `x^2-2`.<br>中：`\sqrt{2}` 在 `\mathbb{Q}` 上的最小多项式是 `x^2-2`。 |
| `\mathcal{O}_K`                            | ring of integers, anneau des entiers, 整数环                                 | The ring of algebraic integers in a number field `K`.                                         | EN: For `K=\mathbb{Q}`, one has `\mathcal{O}_K=\mathbb{Z}`.<br>FR: Pour `K=\mathbb{Q}`, on a `\mathcal{O}_K=\mathbb{Z}`.<br>中：当 `K=\mathbb{Q}` 时，`\mathcal{O}_K=\mathbb{Z}`。                   |
| —                                          | algebraic integer, entier algébrique, 代数整数                                | An algebraic number satisfying a monic polynomial with integer coefficients.                  | EN: `\sqrt{2}` is an algebraic integer because it satisfies `x^2-2=0`.<br>FR: `\sqrt{2}` est un entier algébrique car il satisfait `x^2-2=0`.<br>中：`\sqrt{2}` 是代数整数，因为它满足 `x^2-2=0`。           |
| `\operatorname{Tr}_{K/\mathbb{Q}}(\alpha)` | field trace, trace de corps, 域迹                                           | The trace of the multiplication map by `\alpha`, or the sum of conjugates under embeddings.   | EN: Field trace converts elements of `K` into rational numbers.<br>FR: La trace de corps convertit les éléments de `K` en nombres rationnels.<br>中：域迹把 `K` 的元素转化为有理数。                          |
| `N_{K/\mathbb{Q}}(\alpha)`                 | field norm, norme de corps, 域范数                                           | The determinant of multiplication by `\alpha`, or the product of conjugates under embeddings. | EN: Norms are useful for studying units and ideals.<br>FR: Les normes sont utiles pour étudier unités et idéaux.<br>中：范数用于研究单位与理想。                                                             |
| `\Delta_K`                                 | discriminant of a number field, discriminant d’un corps de nombres, 数域判别式 | An invariant measuring arithmetic ramification and the geometry of the ring of integers.      | EN: The discriminant detects which primes ramify.<br>FR: Le discriminant détecte les nombres premiers qui se ramifient.<br>中：判别式检测哪些素数发生分歧。                                                    |
| `r_1,r_2`                                  | real and complex embeddings, plongements réels et complexes, 实嵌入与复嵌入      | The numbers of real embeddings and pairs of complex embeddings of a number field.             | EN: A degree `n` number field satisfies `n=r_1+2r_2`.<br>FR: Un corps de nombres de degré `n` satisfait `n=r_1+2r_2`.<br>中：`n` 次数域满足 `n=r_1+2r_2`。                                             |
| `K\otimes_{\mathbb{Q}}\mathbb{R}`          | Minkowski space, espace de Minkowski, Minkowski 空间                        | The real vector space obtained from a number field by extending scalars to `\mathbb{R}`.      | EN: Minkowski geometry studies ideals as lattices.<br>FR: La géométrie de Minkowski étudie les idéaux comme réseaux.<br>中：Minkowski 几何把理想作为格来研究。                                               |

## 28.7 Ideals, Dedekind domains, and class groups

| Symbol (LaTeX)                             | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                        | Definition                                                                                                      | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| ------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\mathfrak{a}`                             | ideal, idéal, 理想                                                         | An additive subgroup of a ring closed under multiplication by ring elements.                                    | EN: Ideals generalize divisibility in rings of integers.<br>FR: Les idéaux généralisent la divisibilité dans les anneaux d’entiers.<br>中：理想推广了整数环中的整除关系。                                        |
| `(\alpha)`                                 | principal ideal, idéal principal, 主理想                                    | An ideal generated by a single element `\alpha`.                                                                | EN: In `\mathbb{Z}`, every ideal is principal.<br>FR: Dans `\mathbb{Z}`, tout idéal est principal.<br>中：在 `\mathbb{Z}` 中，每个理想都是主理想。                                                             |
| `\mathfrak{p}`                             | prime ideal, idéal premier, 素理想                                          | An ideal whose quotient ring is an integral domain.                                                             | EN: Prime ideals are the arithmetic analogues of prime numbers.<br>FR: Les idéaux premiers sont les analogues arithmétiques des nombres premiers.<br>中：素理想是素数的算术类似物。                            |
| `\mathfrak{m}`                             | maximal ideal, idéal maximal, 极大理想                                       | An ideal whose quotient ring is a field.                                                                        | EN: In a Dedekind domain, nonzero prime ideals are maximal.<br>FR: Dans un domaine de Dedekind, les idéaux premiers non nuls sont maximaux.<br>中：在 Dedekind 整环中，非零素理想都是极大理想。                    |
| `\mathcal{O}_K/\mathfrak{p}`               | residue field, corps résiduel, 剩余域                                       | The quotient field associated with a prime ideal of the ring of integers.                                       | EN: The residue field of `\mathfrak{p}` is finite for number fields.<br>FR: Le corps résiduel de `\mathfrak{p}` est fini pour les corps de nombres.<br>中：数域中 `\mathfrak{p}` 的剩余域是有限域。           |
| `N\mathfrak{a}`                            | norm of an ideal, norme d’un idéal, 理想范数                                 | The finite index `[\mathcal{O}_K:\mathfrak{a}]` for a nonzero ideal.                                            | EN: Ideal norms replace absolute values of integers in number fields.<br>FR: Les normes d’idéaux remplacent les valeurs absolues des entiers dans les corps de nombres.<br>中：理想范数在数域中替代整数的绝对大小。 |
| —                                          | Dedekind domain, domaine de Dedekind, Dedekind 整环                        | A noetherian integrally closed domain of dimension one, where nonzero ideals factor uniquely into prime ideals. | EN: Rings of integers of number fields are Dedekind domains.<br>FR: Les anneaux d’entiers des corps de nombres sont des domaines de Dedekind.<br>中：数域的整数环是 Dedekind 整环。                         |
| `\mathfrak{a}=\prod_i\mathfrak{p}_i^{e_i}` | ideal factorization, factorisation d’un idéal, 理想分解                      | The unique factorization of a nonzero ideal into prime ideals in a Dedekind domain.                             | EN: Ideals factor uniquely even when elements do not.<br>FR: Les idéaux se factorisent uniquement même quand les éléments ne le font pas.<br>中：即使元素没有唯一分解，理想仍可唯一分解。                             |
| `\operatorname{Cl}(K)`                     | ideal class group, groupe des classes d’idéaux, 理想类群                     | The group of fractional ideals modulo principal fractional ideals.                                              | EN: The class group measures failure of unique factorization.<br>FR: Le groupe des classes mesure l’échec de la factorisation unique.<br>中：理想类群度量唯一分解失败的程度。                                     |
| `h_K`                                      | class number, nombre de classes, 类数                                      | The order of the ideal class group.                                                                             | EN: `h_K=1` means every ideal class is principal.<br>FR: `h_K=1` signifie que toute classe d’idéaux est principale.<br>中：`h_K=1` 表示每个理想类都是主类。                                                   |
| `\mathcal{O}_K^\times`                     | unit group, groupe des unités, 单位群                                       | The group of invertible elements in the ring of integers.                                                       | EN: Units in real quadratic fields can be infinite in number.<br>FR: Les unités des corps quadratiques réels peuvent être infinies en nombre.<br>中：实二次数域中的单位可能有无限多个。                            |
| —                                          | Dirichlet unit theorem, théorème des unités de Dirichlet, Dirichlet 单位定理 | A theorem describing the structure of the unit group of a number field.                                         | EN: The unit group is finitely generated with rank `r_1+r_2-1`.<br>FR: Le groupe des unités est de type fini de rang `r_1+r_2-1`.<br>中：单位群是有限生成的，秩为 `r_1+r_2-1`。                                |

## 28.8 Ramification, decomposition, and local fields

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                          | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                                         | Definition                                                                                              | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| ------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `L/K`                                                   | field extension, extension de corps, 域扩张                                                                  | A field `L` containing a subfield `K`.                                                                  | EN: `\mathbb{Q}(\sqrt{2})/\mathbb{Q}` is a quadratic extension.<br>FR: `\mathbb{Q}(\sqrt{2})/\mathbb{Q}` est une extension quadratique.<br>中：`\mathbb{Q}(\sqrt{2})/\mathbb{Q}` 是二次扩张。            |
| `\mathfrak{p}\mathcal{O}_L=\prod_i\mathfrak{P}_i^{e_i}` | prime ideal factorization in extensions, factorisation des idéaux premiers dans les extensions, 扩张中的素理想分解 | The decomposition of a prime ideal of `K` in the ring of integers of `L`.                               | EN: Prime numbers may split, remain inert, or ramify in extensions.<br>FR: Les nombres premiers peuvent se décomposer, rester inertes ou se ramifier dans les extensions.<br>中：素数在扩张中可能分裂、惰性或分歧。 |
| `e_i`                                                   | ramification index, indice de ramification, 分歧指数                                                          | The exponent of a prime ideal above `\mathfrak{p}` in the ideal factorization.                          | EN: `e_i>1` indicates ramification.<br>FR: `e_i>1` indique une ramification.<br>中：`e_i>1` 表示发生分歧。                                                                                                |
| `f_i`                                                   | residue degree, degré résiduel, 剩余次数                                                                      | The degree of the residue field extension at a prime above `\mathfrak{p}`.                              | EN: The product `e_if_i` contributes to the extension degree.<br>FR: Le produit `e_if_i` contribue au degré de l’extension.<br>中：乘积 `e_if_i` 对扩张次数有贡献。                                           |
| —                                                       | split prime, nombre premier décomposé, 分裂素数                                                               | A prime whose ideal factors into several distinct prime ideals in an extension.                         | EN: Splitting behavior encodes arithmetic of the extension.<br>FR: Le comportement de décomposition encode l’arithmétique de l’extension.<br>中：分裂行为编码扩张的算术信息。                                    |
| —                                                       | inert prime, nombre premier inerte, 惰性素数                                                                  | A prime that remains prime in the extension.                                                            | EN: An inert prime has a larger residue field degree.<br>FR: Un nombre premier inerte a un degré résiduel plus grand.<br>中：惰性素数具有较大的剩余次数。                                                        |
| —                                                       | ramified prime, nombre premier ramifié, 分歧素数                                                              | A prime whose factorization contains a prime ideal with ramification index greater than one.            | EN: Ramified primes divide the discriminant in number fields.<br>FR: Les premiers ramifiés divisent le discriminant dans les corps de nombres.<br>中：分歧素数整除数域判别式。                                 |
| `D_{\mathfrak{P}}`                                      | decomposition group, groupe de décomposition, 分解群                                                         | The subgroup of a Galois group preserving a prime ideal above a given prime.                            | EN: Decomposition groups describe local symmetry at a prime.<br>FR: Les groupes de décomposition décrivent la symétrie locale en un premier.<br>中：分解群描述某个素位处的局部对称性。                              |
| `I_{\mathfrak{P}}`                                      | inertia group, groupe d’inertie, 惯性群                                                                      | The subgroup acting trivially on the residue field at a prime above `\mathfrak{p}`.                     | EN: Inertia measures ramification beyond residue field action.<br>FR: L’inertie mesure la ramification au-delà de l’action sur le corps résiduel.<br>中：惯性群度量超出剩余域作用的分歧。                          |
| —                                                       | local field, corps local, 局部域                                                                             | A field complete with respect to a nontrivial absolute value and locally compact under its topology.    | EN: `\mathbb{Q}_p` and `\mathbb{R}` are local fields.<br>FR: `\mathbb{Q}_p` et `\mathbb{R}` sont des corps locaux.<br>中：`\mathbb{Q}_p` 与 `\mathbb{R}` 是局部域。                                      |
| `K_v`                                                   | completion at a place, complétion en une place, 位处完备化                                                     | The completion of a global field `K` at a place `v`.                                                    | EN: Local methods study `K_v` before returning to `K`.<br>FR: Les méthodes locales étudient `K_v` avant de revenir à `K`.<br>中：局部方法先研究 `K_v`，再回到 `K`。                                            |
| —                                                       | unramified extension, extension non ramifiée, 非分歧扩张                                                       | An extension with ramification index one and separable residue extension in the relevant local setting. | EN: Unramified extensions are controlled by residue field extensions.<br>FR: Les extensions non ramifiées sont contrôlées par les extensions de corps résiduels.<br>中：非分歧扩张由剩余域扩张控制。             |

## 28.9 Galois theory and arithmetic symmetry

| Symbol (LaTeX)                       | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                                 | Definition                                                                                                     | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\operatorname{Gal}(L/K)`            | Galois group, groupe de Galois, Galois 群                                                          | The group of field automorphisms of `L` fixing `K`.                                                            | EN: `\operatorname{Gal}(\mathbb{Q}(\sqrt{2})/\mathbb{Q})` has order `2`.<br>FR: `\operatorname{Gal}(\mathbb{Q}(\sqrt{2})/\mathbb{Q})` a ordre `2`.<br>中：`\operatorname{Gal}(\mathbb{Q}(\sqrt{2})/\mathbb{Q})` 的阶为 `2`。                   |
| —                                    | Galois extension, extension galoisienne, Galois 扩张                                                | A field extension that is normal and separable.                                                                | EN: Splitting fields of separable polynomials are Galois extensions.<br>FR: Les corps de décomposition des polynômes séparables sont des extensions galoisiennes.<br>中：可分多项式的分裂域是 Galois 扩张。                                             |
| —                                    | splitting field, corps de décomposition, 分裂域                                                      | The smallest field over which a polynomial factors completely into linear factors.                             | EN: The splitting field of `x^2-2` over `\mathbb{Q}` is `\mathbb{Q}(\sqrt{2})`.<br>FR: Le corps de décomposition de `x^2-2` sur `\mathbb{Q}` est `\mathbb{Q}(\sqrt{2})`.<br>中：`x^2-2` 在 `\mathbb{Q}` 上的分裂域是 `\mathbb{Q}(\sqrt{2})`。      |
| —                                    | normal extension, extension normale, 正规扩张                                                         | An algebraic extension in which every irreducible polynomial with one root in the extension splits completely. | EN: Normality ensures all conjugates are present.<br>FR: La normalité assure la présence de tous les conjugués.<br>中：正规性保证所有共轭根都在扩张中。                                                                                                    |
| —                                    | separable extension, extension séparable, 可分扩张                                                    | An algebraic extension generated by elements whose minimal polynomials have distinct roots.                    | EN: Number field extensions are separable over `\mathbb{Q}`.<br>FR: Les extensions de corps de nombres sont séparables sur `\mathbb{Q}`.<br>中：数域在 `\mathbb{Q}` 上的扩张都是可分的。                                                                |
| `K^G`                                | fixed field, corps fixe, 固定域                                                                      | The subfield of elements fixed by every element of a group `G` of automorphisms.                               | EN: Galois theory relates subgroups to fixed fields.<br>FR: La théorie de Galois relie les sous-groupes aux corps fixes.<br>中：Galois 理论把子群与固定域联系起来。                                                                                      |
| —                                    | fundamental theorem of Galois theory, théorème fondamental de la théorie de Galois, Galois 理论基本定理 | A theorem establishing a correspondence between intermediate fields and subgroups of the Galois group.         | EN: Larger subgroups correspond to smaller fixed fields.<br>FR: Les sous-groupes plus grands correspondent à des corps fixes plus petits.<br>中：较大的子群对应较小的固定域。                                                                            |
| `G_K`                                | absolute Galois group, groupe de Galois absolu, 绝对 Galois 群                                       | The Galois group of a separable closure of `K` over `K`.                                                       | EN: `G_{\mathbb{Q}}` encodes deep arithmetic information about rational numbers.<br>FR: `G_{\mathbb{Q}}` encode une information arithmétique profonde sur les rationnels.<br>中：`G_{\mathbb{Q}}` 编码关于有理数的深层算术信息。                          |
| `\operatorname{Frob}_{\mathfrak{p}}` | Frobenius element, élément de Frobenius, Frobenius 元                                              | A distinguished conjugacy class in a Galois group associated with an unramified prime.                         | EN: Frobenius elements encode prime splitting behavior.<br>FR: Les éléments de Frobenius encodent le comportement de décomposition des premiers.<br>中：Frobenius 元编码素数分裂行为。                                                               |
| —                                    | Chebotarev density theorem, théorème de densité de Chebotarev, Chebotarev 密度定理                    | A theorem describing the density of primes with a given Frobenius conjugacy class.                             | EN: Chebotarev generalizes Dirichlet’s theorem on primes in arithmetic progressions.<br>FR: Chebotarev généralise le théorème de Dirichlet sur les premiers en progressions arithmétiques.<br>中：Chebotarev 定理推广了 Dirichlet 关于等差数列中素数的定理。 |
| —                                    | inverse Galois problem, problème inverse de Galois, 逆 Galois 问题                                   | The problem of determining which finite groups occur as Galois groups over a given field.                      | EN: The inverse Galois problem over `\mathbb{Q}` remains open in full generality.<br>FR: Le problème inverse de Galois sur `\mathbb{Q}` reste ouvert en toute généralité.<br>中：`\mathbb{Q}` 上的逆 Galois 问题在完全一般性下仍未解决。                    |
| —                                    | Galois representation, représentation galoisienne, Galois 表示                                      | A homomorphism from a Galois group into a linear group.                                                        | EN: Galois representations connect number theory with linear algebra and geometry.<br>FR: Les représentations galoisiennes relient théorie des nombres, algèbre linéaire et géométrie.<br>中：Galois 表示连接数论、线性代数与几何。                       |

## 28.10 Zeta functions, L-functions, and analytic number theory

| Symbol (LaTeX)                    | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                | Definition                                                                                           | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| --------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `\zeta(s)`                        | Riemann zeta function, fonction zêta de Riemann, Riemann ζ 函数    | A complex function initially defined by `\sum_{n\geq1}n^{-s}` for `\operatorname{Re}(s)>1`.          | EN: The zeta function encodes prime numbers through an Euler product.<br>FR: La fonction zêta encode les nombres premiers par un produit eulérien.<br>中：ζ 函数通过 Euler 乘积编码素数。                                                   |
| `\zeta(s)=\prod_p(1-p^{-s})^{-1}` | Euler product, produit eulérien, Euler 乘积                        | A product over primes expressing multiplicative arithmetic structure.                                | EN: Euler products connect unique factorization with analytic functions.<br>FR: Les produits eulériens relient factorisation unique et fonctions analytiques.<br>中：Euler 乘积把唯一分解与解析函数联系起来。                                     |
| —                                 | analytic continuation, prolongement analytique, 解析延拓             | The extension of an analytic function beyond its original domain.                                    | EN: `\zeta(s)` extends meromorphically to the complex plane.<br>FR: `\zeta(s)` se prolonge méromorphiquement au plan complexe.<br>中：`\zeta(s)` 可亚纯延拓到复平面。                                                                      |
| —                                 | functional equation, équation fonctionnelle, 函数方程                | An equation relating values of a function at different arguments.                                    | EN: The zeta functional equation relates `s` and `1-s`.<br>FR: L’équation fonctionnelle de zêta relie `s` et `1-s`.<br>中：ζ 函数方程联系 `s` 与 `1-s`。                                                                                 |
| —                                 | Riemann hypothesis, hypothèse de Riemann, Riemann 猜想             | The conjecture that nontrivial zeros of `\zeta(s)` have real part `1/2`.                             | EN: The Riemann hypothesis predicts fine regularity in the distribution of primes.<br>FR: L’hypothèse de Riemann prédit une régularité fine dans la distribution des premiers.<br>中：Riemann 猜想预言素数分布中的精细规律。                    |
| `L(s,\chi)`                       | Dirichlet L-function, fonction L de Dirichlet, Dirichlet L 函数    | An L-function associated with a Dirichlet character `\chi`.                                          | EN: Dirichlet L-functions prove primes occur in arithmetic progressions.<br>FR: Les fonctions L de Dirichlet prouvent l’existence de premiers en progressions arithmétiques.<br>中：Dirichlet L 函数用于证明等差数列中有无穷多个素数。              |
| `\chi`                            | Dirichlet character, caractère de Dirichlet, Dirichlet 特征        | A periodic completely multiplicative function used to study arithmetic progressions.                 | EN: Characters separate residue classes modulo `q`.<br>FR: Les caractères séparent les classes résiduelles modulo `q`.<br>中：特征可区分模 `q` 的剩余类。                                                                                   |
