| —                                 | conductor, conducteur, 导子                                        | The minimal modulus through which a character, representation, or L-function is effectively defined. | EN: The conductor measures arithmetic complexity.<br>FR: Le conducteur mesure la complexité arithmétique.<br>中：导子度量算术复杂度。                                                                                                      |
| `\Lambda(n)`                      | von Mangoldt function, fonction de von Mangoldt, von Mangoldt 函数 | An arithmetic function equal to `\log p` when `n` is a power of prime `p`, and `0` otherwise.        | EN: The von Mangoldt function appears in explicit formulas for primes.<br>FR: La fonction de von Mangoldt apparaît dans les formules explicites pour les premiers.<br>中：von Mangoldt 函数出现在素数显式公式中。                             |
| —                                 | explicit formula, formule explicite, 显式公式                        | A formula relating prime-counting functions to zeros of zeta or L-functions.                         | EN: Explicit formulas make the link between primes and zeros precise.<br>FR: Les formules explicites rendent précis le lien entre premiers et zéros.<br>中：显式公式精确表达素数与零点之间的联系。                                                  |
| —                                 | Dedekind zeta function, fonction zêta de Dedekind, Dedekind ζ 函数 | A zeta function attached to a number field, summing over ideals.                                     | EN: Dedekind zeta functions generalize the Riemann zeta function to number fields.<br>FR: Les fonctions zêta de Dedekind généralisent la fonction zêta de Riemann aux corps de nombres.<br>中：Dedekind ζ 函数把 Riemann ζ 函数推广到数域。 |
| —                                 | Artin L-function, fonction L d’Artin, Artin L 函数                 | An L-function attached to a Galois representation or character of a Galois group.                    | EN: Artin L-functions connect Galois symmetry with analytic behavior.<br>FR: Les fonctions L d’Artin relient symétrie galoisienne et comportement analytique.<br>中：Artin L 函数连接 Galois 对称性与解析行为。                               |

## 28.11 Elliptic curves, modular forms, and arithmetic geometry

| Symbol (LaTeX)            | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                                      | Definition                                                                                                        | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| ------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `E`                       | elliptic curve, courbe elliptique, 椭圆曲线                                                                | A smooth projective genus-one curve with a specified rational point.                                              | EN: A common affine model is `y^2=x^3+ax+b` under nonsingularity conditions.<br>FR: Un modèle affine courant est `y^2=x^3+ax+b` sous conditions de non-singularité.<br>中：常见仿射模型是在非奇异条件下的 `y^2=x^3+ax+b`。                                                    |
| `E(K)`                    | K-rational points on an elliptic curve, points K-rationnels d’une courbe elliptique, 椭圆曲线的 K 有理点       | The group of points of `E` defined over a field `K`.                                                              | EN: `E(\mathbb{Q})` is a finitely generated abelian group.<br>FR: `E(\mathbb{Q})` est un groupe abélien de type fini.<br>中：`E(\mathbb{Q})` 是有限生成 Abel 群。                                                                                                    |
| —                         | Mordell-Weil theorem, théorème de Mordell-Weil, Mordell-Weil 定理                                        | A theorem stating that rational points of an abelian variety over a number field form a finitely generated group. | EN: For elliptic curves over `\mathbb{Q}`, this gives finite generation of `E(\mathbb{Q})`.<br>FR: Pour les courbes elliptiques sur `\mathbb{Q}`, cela donne la génération finie de `E(\mathbb{Q})`.<br>中：对 `\mathbb{Q}` 上的椭圆曲线，它给出 `E(\mathbb{Q})` 的有限生成性。 |
| `\operatorname{rank}E(K)` | rank of an elliptic curve, rang d’une courbe elliptique, 椭圆曲线秩                                         | The rank of the free part of the group `E(K)`.                                                                    | EN: Rank measures how many independent infinite-order rational points exist.<br>FR: Le rang mesure combien de points rationnels indépendants d’ordre infini existent.<br>中：秩度量有多少个独立的无限阶有理点。                                                                |
| `E(K)_{\mathrm{tors}}`    | torsion subgroup, sous-groupe de torsion, 挠子群                                                          | The subgroup of points of finite order.                                                                           | EN: Torsion points satisfy `nP=0` for some positive integer `n`.<br>FR: Les points de torsion satisfont `nP=0` pour un entier positif `n`.<br>中：挠点满足某个正整数 `n` 下的 `nP=0`。                                                                                    |
| `\Delta`                  | discriminant of an elliptic curve, discriminant d’une courbe elliptique, 椭圆曲线判别式                       | A quantity detecting singularity and bad reduction of an elliptic curve model.                                    | EN: If `\Delta=0`, the cubic model is singular.<br>FR: Si `\Delta=0`, le modèle cubique est singulier.<br>中：若 `\Delta=0`，三次模型是奇异的。                                                                                                                          |
| —                         | good reduction, bonne réduction, 好约化                                                                   | A prime at which the reduced elliptic curve remains nonsingular.                                                  | EN: Good reduction means the curve keeps its smooth structure modulo `p`.<br>FR: La bonne réduction signifie que la courbe garde sa structure lisse modulo `p`.<br>中：好约化表示曲线模 `p` 后仍保持光滑结构。                                                                 |
| —                         | bad reduction, mauvaise réduction, 坏约化                                                                 | A prime at which the reduced model becomes singular.                                                              | EN: Bad primes divide the discriminant of an integral model.<br>FR: Les mauvais premiers divisent le discriminant d’un modèle entier.<br>中：坏素数整除整数模型的判别式。                                                                                                   |
| `f(z)`                    | modular form, forme modulaire, 模形式                                                                     | A holomorphic function on the upper half-plane satisfying transformation and growth conditions.                   | EN: Modular forms encode arithmetic information in Fourier coefficients.<br>FR: Les formes modulaires encodent l’information arithmétique dans les coefficients de Fourier.<br>中：模形式把算术信息编码在 Fourier 系数中。                                                   |
| `q=e^{2\pi iz}`           | q-expansion, q-développement, q 展开                                                                     | The Fourier expansion of a modular form in powers of `q`.                                                         | EN: Arithmetic properties often appear in q-expansion coefficients.<br>FR: Les propriétés arithmétiques apparaissent souvent dans les coefficients du q-développement.<br>中：算术性质常出现在 q 展开系数中。                                                               |
| —                         | modularity theorem, théorème de modularité, 模性定理                                                       | A theorem stating that elliptic curves over `\mathbb{Q}` are modular.                                             | EN: The modularity theorem was central in the proof of Fermat’s Last Theorem.<br>FR: Le théorème de modularité a été central dans la preuve du dernier théorème de Fermat.<br>中：模性定理是 Fermat 大定理证明中的核心。                                                     |
| —                         | Birch and Swinnerton-Dyer conjecture, conjecture de Birch et Swinnerton-Dyer, Birch-Swinnerton-Dyer 猜想 | A conjecture relating the rank of an elliptic curve to the order of vanishing of its L-function at `s=1`.         | EN: BSD connects rational points with analytic behavior of L-functions.<br>FR: BSD relie les points rationnels au comportement analytique des fonctions L.<br>中：BSD 猜想把有理点与 L 函数的解析行为联系起来。                                                                  |

## 28.12 Class field theory, automorphic forms, and Langlands language

| Symbol (LaTeX)         | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                     | Definition                                                                                                             | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| ---------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| —                      | class field theory, théorie du corps de classes, 类域论                                  | A theory describing abelian extensions of local or global fields through arithmetic invariants of the base field.      | EN: Class field theory generalizes quadratic reciprocity.<br>FR: La théorie du corps de classes généralise la réciprocité quadratique.<br>中：类域论推广了二次互反律。                                                                                    |
| `K^{\mathrm{ab}}`      | maximal abelian extension, extension abélienne maximale, 最大 Abel 扩张                   | The largest abelian Galois extension of a field inside a chosen separable closure.                                     | EN: Class field theory describes `\operatorname{Gal}(K^{\mathrm{ab}}/K)`.<br>FR: La théorie du corps de classes décrit `\operatorname{Gal}(K^{\mathrm{ab}}/K)`.<br>中：类域论描述 `\operatorname{Gal}(K^{\mathrm{ab}}/K)`。                         |
| `\operatorname{Art}_K` | Artin reciprocity map, application de réciprocité d’Artin, Artin 互反映射                 | A reciprocity map from idele-class-type objects to abelian Galois groups.                                              | EN: Artin reciprocity is the structural heart of class field theory.<br>FR: La réciprocité d’Artin est le cœur structurel de la théorie du corps de classes.<br>中：Artin 互反是类域论的结构核心。                                                        |
| `C_K`                  | idele class group, groupe des classes d’idèles, Idele 类群                              | The quotient of the idele group by `K^\times`.                                                                         | EN: Global class field theory uses the idele class group.<br>FR: La théorie globale du corps de classes utilise le groupe des classes d’idèles.<br>中：整体类域论使用 Idele 类群。                                                                      |
| —                      | automorphic form, forme automorphe, 自守形式                                              | A function on a group or quotient satisfying symmetry, smoothness, and growth conditions.                              | EN: Automorphic forms generalize modular forms.<br>FR: Les formes automorphes généralisent les formes modulaires.<br>中：自守形式推广了模形式。                                                                                                          |
| —                      | automorphic representation, représentation automorphe, 自守表示                           | A representation-theoretic object arising from automorphic forms on adelic groups.                                     | EN: Automorphic representations organize automorphic forms by symmetry.<br>FR: Les représentations automorphes organisent les formes automorphes par symétrie.<br>中：自守表示按对称性组织自守形式。                                                         |
| `GL_n(\mathbb{A}_K)`   | adelic general linear group, groupe linéaire général adélique, Adele 一般线性群            | The group of invertible `n\times n` matrices over the adele ring of `K`.                                               | EN: The Langlands program often studies representations of `GL_n(\mathbb{A}_K)`.<br>FR: Le programme de Langlands étudie souvent les représentations de `GL_n(\mathbb{A}_K)`.<br>中：Langlands 纲领常研究 `GL_n(\mathbb{A}_K)` 的表示。                |
| —                      | Langlands program, programme de Langlands, Langlands 纲领                               | A web of conjectures connecting Galois representations, automorphic forms, L-functions, and harmonic analysis.         | EN: Langlands theory links arithmetic symmetry with automorphic analysis.<br>FR: La théorie de Langlands relie symétrie arithmétique et analyse automorphe.<br>中：Langlands 理论连接算术对称性与自守分析。                                                  |
| —                      | functoriality, fonctorialité, 函子性                                                     | A Langlands principle predicting transfers of automorphic representations along maps of dual groups.                   | EN: Functoriality explains hidden relations among L-functions.<br>FR: La fonctorialité explique des relations cachées entre fonctions L.<br>中：函子性解释 L 函数之间的隐藏关系。                                                                            |
| `{}^LG`                | L-group, L-groupe, L 群                                                                | A dual group structure used in the Langlands correspondence.                                                           | EN: The L-group encodes the target side of Langlands functoriality.<br>FR: Le L-groupe encode le côté cible de la fonctorialité de Langlands.<br>中：L 群编码 Langlands 函子性的目标侧结构。                                                               |
| —                      | local Langlands correspondence, correspondance de Langlands locale, 局部 Langlands 对应   | A correspondence between representations of local Galois-related groups and representations of local reductive groups. | EN: Local Langlands compares local arithmetic and local harmonic analysis.<br>FR: Langlands local compare arithmétique locale et analyse harmonique locale.<br>中：局部 Langlands 对应比较局部算术与局部调和分析。                                              |
| —                      | global Langlands correspondence, correspondance de Langlands globale, 整体 Langlands 对应 | A conjectural correspondence between global Galois data and automorphic representations.                               | EN: Global Langlands aims to organize deep arithmetic information through automorphic objects.<br>FR: Langlands global vise à organiser l’information arithmétique profonde par des objets automorphes.<br>中：整体 Langlands 试图通过自守对象组织深层算术信息。 |
| —                      | trace formula, formule des traces, 迹公式                                                | An identity comparing spectral and geometric expansions, used in automorphic representation theory.                    | EN: Trace formulas are powerful tools for proving cases of functoriality.<br>FR: Les formules des traces sont des outils puissants pour prouver des cas de fonctorialité.<br>中：迹公式是证明函子性若干情形的强力工具。                                          |
# 29. Algebraic Geometry and Commutative Algebra

## 29.1 Rings, ideals, and affine algebraic objects

| Symbol (LaTeX)          | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                            | Definition                                                                            | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| ----------------------- | -------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `R`                     | commutative ring, anneau commutatif, 交换环     | A ring whose multiplication is commutative and usually has a multiplicative identity. | EN: `\mathbb{Z}` and `k[x]` are commutative rings.<br>FR: `\mathbb{Z}` et `k[x]` sont des anneaux commutatifs.<br>中：`\mathbb{Z}` 与 `k[x]` 是交换环。                                                                                           |
| `k`                     | field, corps, 域                              | A commutative ring in which every nonzero element is invertible.                      | EN: Algebraic geometry often studies polynomial equations over a field `k`.<br>FR: La géométrie algébrique étudie souvent les équations polynomiales sur un corps `k`.<br>中：代数几何常研究域 `k` 上的多项式方程。                                         |
| `k[x_1,\ldots,x_n]`     | polynomial ring, anneau de polynômes, 多项式环   | The ring of polynomials in variables `x_1,\ldots,x_n` with coefficients in `k`.       | EN: `k[x,y]` is the coordinate ring of affine two-space.<br>FR: `k[x,y]` est l’anneau de coordonnées du plan affine.<br>中：`k[x,y]` 是仿射二维空间的坐标环。                                                                                           |
| `I\subset R`            | ideal, idéal, 理想                             | An additive subgroup closed under multiplication by arbitrary elements of the ring.   | EN: The ideal `(x^2+y^2-1)` encodes the circle equation algebraically.<br>FR: L’idéal `(x^2+y^2-1)` encode algébriquement l’équation du cercle.<br>中：理想 `(x^2+y^2-1)` 用代数方式编码圆方程。                                                         |
| `(f_1,\ldots,f_r)`      | generated ideal, idéal engendré, 生成理想        | The smallest ideal containing the elements `f_1,\ldots,f_r`.                          | EN: `(x,y)` consists of polynomials with zero constant term in `k[x,y]`.<br>FR: `(x,y)` contient les polynômes de terme constant nul dans `k[x,y]`.<br>中：在 `k[x,y]` 中，`(x,y)` 由常数项为零的多项式组成。                                               |
| `R/I`                   | quotient ring, anneau quotient, 商环           | The ring obtained by identifying elements of `R` that differ by elements of `I`.      | EN: `k[x]/(x^2)` remembers first-order nilpotent information.<br>FR: `k[x]/(x^2)` retient une information nilpotente du premier ordre.<br>中：`k[x]/(x^2)` 保留一阶幂零信息。                                                                        |
| `\mathfrak{p}`          | prime ideal, idéal premier, 素理想              | An ideal whose quotient ring is an integral domain.                                   | EN: Prime ideals are algebraic analogues of irreducible geometric pieces.<br>FR: Les idéaux premiers sont des analogues algébriques des pièces géométriques irréductibles.<br>中：素理想是不可约几何部分的代数对应物。                                        |
| `\mathfrak{m}`          | maximal ideal, idéal maximal, 极大理想           | An ideal whose quotient ring is a field.                                              | EN: Maximal ideals of `k[x]` often correspond to points after choosing an algebraic closure.<br>FR: Les idéaux maximaux de `k[x]` correspondent souvent à des points après choix d’une clôture algébrique.<br>中：选择代数闭包后，`k[x]` 的极大理想常对应点。 |
| `\sqrt{I}`              | radical of an ideal, radical d’un idéal, 根理想 | The set of elements whose some positive power lies in `I`.                            | EN: `\sqrt{(x^2)}=(x)` in `k[x]`.<br>FR: `\sqrt{(x^2)}=(x)` dans `k[x]`.<br>中：在 `k[x]` 中，`\sqrt{(x^2)}=(x)`。                                                                                                                              |
| `I` radical             | radical ideal, idéal radical, 根理想            | An ideal equal to its own radical.                                                    | EN: Radical ideals correspond to reduced algebraic sets in classical affine geometry.<br>FR: Les idéaux radicaux correspondent aux ensembles algébriques réduits en géométrie affine classique.<br>中：根理想对应经典仿射几何中的约化代数集。                  |
| `R` reduced             | reduced ring, anneau réduit, 约化环             | A ring with no nonzero nilpotent elements.                                            | EN: `k[x]/(x^2)` is not reduced.<br>FR: `k[x]/(x^2)` n’est pas réduit.<br>中：`k[x]/(x^2)` 不是约化环。                                                                                                                                           |
| `\operatorname{Nil}(R)` | nilradical, nilradical, 幂零根                  | The ideal of all nilpotent elements of a ring.                                        | EN: The nilradical equals the intersection of all prime ideals.<br>FR: Le nilradical est l’intersection de tous les idéaux premiers.<br>中：幂零根等于所有素理想的交。                                                                                   |

## 29.2 Varieties, coordinate rings, and the Nullstellensatz

| Symbol (LaTeX)           | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                      | Definition                                                                                                             | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\mathbb{A}^n_k`         | affine n-space, espace affine de dimension n, n 维仿射空间                  | The space of ordered `n`-tuples over a field `k`, viewed geometrically or functorially.                                | EN: `\mathbb{A}^2_k` is the affine plane over `k`.<br>FR: `\mathbb{A}^2_k` est le plan affine sur `k`.<br>中：`\mathbb{A}^2_k` 是域 `k` 上的仿射平面。                                                                                                                                  |
| `V(I)`                   | zero locus, lieu des zéros, 零点集                                        | The set of points where all polynomials in an ideal `I` vanish.                                                        | EN: `V(y-x^2)` is a parabola in affine two-space.<br>FR: `V(y-x^2)` est une parabole dans le plan affine.<br>中：`V(y-x^2)` 是仿射平面中的抛物线。                                                                                                                                        |
| `I(X)`                   | ideal of a subset, idéal d’un sous-ensemble, 子集的理想                     | The ideal of all polynomials vanishing on a subset `X`.                                                                | EN: `I(V(I))` recovers the radical of `I` over an algebraically closed field.<br>FR: `I(V(I))` retrouve le radical de `I` sur un corps algébriquement clos.<br>中：在代数闭域上，`I(V(I))` 恢复 `I` 的根理想。                                                                               |
| `X\subset\mathbb{A}^n_k` | affine algebraic set, ensemble algébrique affine, 仿射代数集                | A subset defined as the common zero locus of polynomials.                                                              | EN: A plane curve is an affine algebraic set in `\mathbb{A}^2`.<br>FR: Une courbe plane est un ensemble algébrique affine dans `\mathbb{A}^2`.<br>中：平面曲线是 `\mathbb{A}^2` 中的仿射代数集。                                                                                            |
| `k[X]`                   | coordinate ring, anneau de coordonnées, 坐标环                            | The ring of polynomial functions on an affine algebraic set.                                                           | EN: If `X=V(I)`, then `k[X]=k[x_1,\ldots,x_n]/I(X)`.<br>FR: Si `X=V(I)`, alors `k[X]=k[x_1,\ldots,x_n]/I(X)`.<br>中：若 `X=V(I)`，则 `k[X]=k[x_1,\ldots,x_n]/I(X)`。                                                                                                               |
| —                        | algebraically closed field, corps algébriquement clos, 代数闭域            | A field in which every nonconstant polynomial has a root.                                                              | EN: `\mathbb{C}` is algebraically closed.<br>FR: `\mathbb{C}` est algébriquement clos.<br>中：`\mathbb{C}` 是代数闭域。                                                                                                                                                              |
| —                        | Hilbert’s Nullstellensatz, théorème des zéros de Hilbert, Hilbert 零点定理 | A theorem relating ideals in polynomial rings over algebraically closed fields to algebraic sets.                      | EN: The Nullstellensatz links geometry of zero sets with radical ideals.<br>FR: Le théorème des zéros relie la géométrie des lieux de zéros aux idéaux radicaux.<br>中：零点定理把零点集几何与根理想联系起来。                                                                                    |
| `I(V(I))=\sqrt{I}`       | strong Nullstellensatz, Nullstellensatz fort, 强零点定理                    | Over an algebraically closed field, the ideal of the zero locus of `I` is the radical of `I`.                          | EN: Polynomial equations determine radical ideals, not arbitrary ideals, at the level of classical points.<br>FR: Les équations polynomiales déterminent des idéaux radicaux, non des idéaux arbitraires, au niveau des points classiques.<br>中：在经典点层面，多项式方程决定的是根理想，而不是任意理想。 |
| `X` irreducible          | irreducible variety, variété irréductible, 不可约簇                        | A variety not expressible as the union of two proper closed subsets.                                                   | EN: An irreducible plane curve cannot be decomposed into two smaller algebraic curves.<br>FR: Une courbe plane irréductible ne se décompose pas en deux courbes algébriques plus petites.<br>中：不可约平面曲线不能分解成两条更小的代数曲线。                                                        |
| `I(X)` prime             | prime ideal criterion, critère de primalité, 素理想判别                     | For affine varieties over algebraically closed fields, irreducibility corresponds to the coordinate ideal being prime. | EN: `V(y-x^2)` is irreducible because `(y-x^2)` is prime.<br>FR: `V(y-x^2)` est irréductible car `(y-x^2)` est premier.<br>中：`V(y-x^2)` 不可约，因为 `(y-x^2)` 是素理想。                                                                                                               |
| —                        | regular function, fonction régulière, 正则函数                             | A function locally or globally represented by polynomial expressions in algebraic geometry.                            | EN: On affine varieties, regular functions are elements of the coordinate ring.<br>FR: Sur les variétés affines, les fonctions régulières sont les éléments de l’anneau de coordonnées.<br>中：在仿射簇上，正则函数就是坐标环中的元素。                                                            |
| —                        | morphism of affine varieties, morphisme de variétés affines, 仿射簇态射     | A map between affine varieties defined by regular functions.                                                           | EN: Morphisms of affine varieties correspond contravariantly to homomorphisms of coordinate rings.<br>FR: Les morphismes de variétés affines correspondent contravariamment aux homomorphismes d’anneaux de coordonnées.<br>中：仿射簇态射与坐标环同态反变对应。                               |

## 29.3 Localization, local rings, and germs

| Symbol (LaTeX)                       | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                             | Definition                                                                                           | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| ------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `S^{-1}R`                            | localization, localisation, 局部化                                               | A ring obtained by formally inverting elements of a multiplicative subset `S`.                       | EN: Localization focuses algebra near selected elements or primes.<br>FR: La localisation concentre l’algèbre près d’éléments ou premiers choisis.<br>中：局部化把代数聚焦到选定元素或素理想附近。                                |
| `R_f`                                | localization at one element, localisation en un élément, 单元素局部化               | The localization obtained by inverting powers of `f`.                                                | EN: `R_f` describes the open set where `f` does not vanish.<br>FR: `R_f` décrit l’ouvert où `f` ne s’annule pas.<br>中：`R_f` 描述 `f` 不为零的开集。                                                                  |
| `R_{\mathfrak{p}}`                   | localization at a prime ideal, localisation en un idéal premier, 素理想处局部化      | The localization of `R` by inverting all elements outside `\mathfrak{p}`.                            | EN: `R_{\mathfrak{p}}` studies behavior near the prime `\mathfrak{p}`.<br>FR: `R_{\mathfrak{p}}` étudie le comportement près du premier `\mathfrak{p}`.<br>中：`R_{\mathfrak{p}}` 研究素理想 `\mathfrak{p}` 附近的行为。 |
| `(R,\mathfrak{m})`                   | local ring, anneau local, 局部环                                                 | A ring with a unique maximal ideal `\mathfrak{m}`.                                                   | EN: Local rings model functions near a point.<br>FR: Les anneaux locaux modélisent les fonctions près d’un point.<br>中：局部环建模一点附近的函数。                                                                        |
| `\mathfrak{m}_p`                     | maximal ideal at a point, idéal maximal en un point, 点处极大理想                   | The ideal of functions vanishing at a point `p`.                                                     | EN: For the origin in `k[x,y]`, the maximal ideal is `(x,y)`.<br>FR: Pour l’origine dans `k[x,y]`, l’idéal maximal est `(x,y)`.<br>中：在 `k[x,y]` 中，原点对应的极大理想是 `(x,y)`。                                       |
| `\mathcal{O}_{X,p}`                  | local ring at a point, anneau local en un point, 点处局部环                        | The ring of germs of regular functions near point `p`.                                               | EN: `\mathcal{O}_{X,p}` records local algebraic behavior at `p`.<br>FR: `\mathcal{O}_{X,p}` enregistre le comportement algébrique local en `p`.<br>中：`\mathcal{O}_{X,p}` 记录 `p` 点处的局部代数行为。                  |
| —                                    | germ of a function, germe d’une fonction, 函数芽                                 | An equivalence class of functions agreeing on some neighborhood of a point.                          | EN: Germs ignore values far away from the point.<br>FR: Les germes ignorent les valeurs loin du point.<br>中：函数芽忽略远离该点处的取值。                                                                                  |
| `k(p)`                               | residue field at p, corps résiduel en p, p 点剩余域                               | The quotient of the local ring at `p` by its maximal ideal.                                          | EN: `k(p)` is the field of values at the point `p`.<br>FR: `k(p)` est le corps des valeurs au point `p`.<br>中：`k(p)` 是点 `p` 处的取值域。                                                                          |
| `\widehat{R}`                        | completion, complétion, 完备化                                                   | A limit construction completing a ring with respect to an ideal-adic topology.                       | EN: `k[[x]]` is the completion of `k[x]` at the ideal `(x)`.<br>FR: `k[[x]]` est la complétion de `k[x]` en l’idéal `(x)`.<br>中：`k[[x]]` 是 `k[x]` 在理想 `(x)` 处的完备化。                                          |
| `R[[x]]`                             | formal power series ring, anneau de séries formelles, 形式幂级数环                  | The ring of formal infinite power series over `R`.                                                   | EN: Formal power series describe infinitesimal neighborhoods algebraically.<br>FR: Les séries formelles décrivent algébriquement les voisinages infinitésimaux.<br>中：形式幂级数用代数方式描述无穷小邻域。                     |
| `\mathfrak{m}/\mathfrak{m}^2`        | cotangent space of a local ring, espace cotangent d’un anneau local, 局部环的余切空间 | The vector space measuring first-order functions vanishing at a point modulo second-order vanishing. | EN: `\mathfrak{m}/\mathfrak{m}^2` captures linear terms at the point.<br>FR: `\mathfrak{m}/\mathfrak{m}^2` capture les termes linéaires au point.<br>中：`\mathfrak{m}/\mathfrak{m}^2` 捕捉点处的一阶线性项。            |
| `(\mathfrak{m}/\mathfrak{m}^2)^\ast` | Zariski tangent space, espace tangent de Zariski, Zariski 切空间                 | The dual of the cotangent space at a point, giving algebraic tangent directions.                     | EN: Singular points often have larger Zariski tangent spaces than expected.<br>FR: Les points singuliers ont souvent des espaces tangents de Zariski plus grands que prévu.<br>中：奇异点常有比预期更大的 Zariski 切空间。   |

## 29.4 Spectrum, schemes, and structure sheaves

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                              | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                        | Definition                                                                                               | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| ----------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\operatorname{Spec}R`                                      | prime spectrum, spectre premier, 素谱                                                      | The set of prime ideals of a commutative ring, equipped with the Zariski topology and a structure sheaf. | EN: `\operatorname{Spec}\mathbb{Z}` is a fundamental arithmetic space.<br>FR: `\operatorname{Spec}\mathbb{Z}` est un espace arithmétique fondamental.<br>中：`\operatorname{Spec}\mathbb{Z}` 是基本的算术空间。            |
| `V(I)\subset\operatorname{Spec}R`                           | closed subset of spectrum, fermé du spectre, 谱中的闭集                                       | The set of prime ideals containing `I`.                                                                  | EN: Closed sets in `\operatorname{Spec}R` are defined by ideals.<br>FR: Les fermés de `\operatorname{Spec}R` sont définis par des idéaux.<br>中：`\operatorname{Spec}R` 中的闭集由理想定义。                                |
| `D(f)`                                                      | principal open set, ouvert principal, 主开集                                                | The set of prime ideals not containing `f`.                                                              | EN: `D(f)` corresponds algebraically to the localization `R_f`.<br>FR: `D(f)` correspond algébriquement à la localisation `R_f`.<br>中：`D(f)` 在代数上对应局部化 `R_f`。                                                   |
| `\mathcal{O}_X`                                             | structure sheaf, faisceau structural, 结构层                                                | A sheaf of rings assigning regular functions to open subsets of a scheme or variety.                     | EN: A scheme is not only a topological space; it includes `\mathcal{O}_X`.<br>FR: Un schéma n’est pas seulement un espace topologique ; il inclut `\mathcal{O}_X`.<br>中：概形不只是拓扑空间，还包含 `\mathcal{O}_X`。          |
| `(\operatorname{Spec}R,\mathcal{O}_{\operatorname{Spec}R})` | affine scheme, schéma affine, 仿射概形                                                       | A locally ringed space associated with a commutative ring.                                               | EN: Affine schemes translate ring theory into geometry.<br>FR: Les schémas affines traduisent la théorie des anneaux en géométrie.<br>中：仿射概形把环论翻译为几何。                                                           |
| `X` scheme                                                  | scheme, schéma, 概形                                                                       | A space locally isomorphic to affine schemes.                                                            | EN: Schemes generalize varieties and include arithmetic spaces.<br>FR: Les schémas généralisent les variétés et incluent les espaces arithmétiques.<br>中：概形推广簇，并包含算术空间。                                         |
| `X_{\mathrm{red}}`                                          | reduced scheme, schéma réduit, 约化概形                                                      | A scheme whose local rings have no nonzero nilpotent elements.                                           | EN: Passing to `X_{\mathrm{red}}` removes nilpotent thickening.<br>FR: Passer à `X_{\mathrm{red}}` enlève l’épaississement nilpotent.<br>中：转到 `X_{\mathrm{red}}` 会去掉幂零加厚。                                       |
| —                                                           | locally ringed space, espace localement annelé, 局部赋环空间                                   | A topological space with a sheaf of rings whose stalks are local rings.                                  | EN: Schemes are special locally ringed spaces.<br>FR: Les schémas sont des espaces localement annelés particuliers.<br>中：概形是特殊的局部赋环空间。                                                                          |
| `\mathcal{O}_{X,x}`                                         | stalk of the structure sheaf, fibre locale du faisceau structural, 结构层茎                  | The local ring of functions near the point `x`.                                                          | EN: Stalks encode local behavior of functions.<br>FR: Les fibres locales encodent le comportement local des fonctions.<br>中：层茎编码函数的局部行为。                                                                        |
| `X\times_S Y`                                               | fiber product of schemes, produit fibré de schémas, 概形纤维积                                | The scheme representing pairs of points in `X` and `Y` lying over the same point of `S`.                 | EN: Fiber products formalize base change.<br>FR: Les produits fibrés formalisent le changement de base.<br>中：纤维积形式化基变换。                                                                                         |
| `X_S`                                                       | scheme over S, schéma sur S, S 上概形                                                       | A scheme equipped with a morphism to a base scheme `S`.                                                  | EN: A variety over `k` can be viewed as a scheme over `\operatorname{Spec}k`.<br>FR: Une variété sur `k` peut être vue comme un schéma sur `\operatorname{Spec}k`.<br>中：`k` 上的簇可视为 `\operatorname{Spec}k` 上的概形。 |
| `X_{\bar{k}}`                                               | base change to algebraic closure, changement de base à une clôture algébrique, 到代数闭包的基变换 | The scheme obtained by extending scalars from `k` to an algebraic closure `\bar{k}`.                     | EN: Geometric properties are often checked after passing to `\bar{k}`.<br>FR: Les propriétés géométriques se vérifient souvent après passage à `\bar{k}`.<br>中：几何性质常在基变换到 `\bar{k}` 后检查。                        |

## 29.5 Morphisms, fibers, and geometric properties

| Symbol (LaTeX)                         | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                    | Definition                                                                                        | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| -------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `f:X\to Y`                             | morphism of schemes, morphisme de schémas, 概形态射      | A map of schemes compatible with their topological spaces and structure sheaves.                  | EN: A ring homomorphism `A\to B` gives a morphism `\operatorname{Spec}B\to\operatorname{Spec}A`.<br>FR: Un homomorphisme `A\to B` donne un morphisme `\operatorname{Spec}B\to\operatorname{Spec}A`.<br>中：环同态 `A\to B` 给出态射 `\operatorname{Spec}B\to\operatorname{Spec}A`。 |
| `f^{-1}(y)`                            | fiber over a point, fibre au-dessus d’un point, 点上纤维 | The scheme-theoretic preimage of a point under a morphism.                                        | EN: Fibers describe how a family varies over the base.<br>FR: Les fibres décrivent comment une famille varie sur la base.<br>中：纤维描述一个族如何随基空间变化。                                                                                                                           |
| `X_y=X\times_Y\operatorname{Spec}k(y)` | scheme-theoretic fiber, fibre schématique, 概形论纤维     | The fiber obtained by base change to the residue field of `y`.                                    | EN: Scheme-theoretic fibers keep multiplicity and field information.<br>FR: Les fibres schématiques conservent multiplicité et information de corps.<br>中：概形论纤维保留重数和域信息。                                                                                                  |
| —                                      | closed morphism, morphisme fermé, 闭态射                | A morphism sending closed subsets to closed subsets.                                              | EN: Proper morphisms are closed under broad hypotheses.<br>FR: Les morphismes propres sont fermés sous de larges hypothèses.<br>中：在广泛假设下， proper 态射是闭态射。                                                                                                                  |
| —                                      | open morphism, morphisme ouvert, 开态射                 | A morphism sending open subsets to open subsets.                                                  | EN: Smooth morphisms are open in common geometric settings.<br>FR: Les morphismes lisses sont ouverts dans des cadres géométriques usuels.<br>中：光滑态射在常见几何情形中是开态射。                                                                                                         |
| —                                      | finite morphism, morphisme fini, 有限态射                | A morphism locally corresponding to a finite module extension of rings.                           | EN: Finite morphisms are algebraic analogues of finite-sheeted maps.<br>FR: Les morphismes finis sont des analogues algébriques des applications à nombre fini de feuillets.<br>中：有限态射是有限层映射的代数类似物。                                                                       |
| —                                      | flat morphism, morphisme plat, 平坦态射                  | A morphism whose corresponding ring maps make modules flat locally.                               | EN: Flat morphisms describe families without sudden algebraic jumps.<br>FR: Les morphismes plats décrivent des familles sans sauts algébriques brusques.<br>中：平坦态射描述没有突然代数跳变的族。                                                                                           |
| —                                      | smooth morphism, morphisme lisse, 光滑态射               | A morphism behaving locally like a projection from a smooth family.                               | EN: Smooth morphisms are algebraic analogues of submersions.<br>FR: Les morphismes lisses sont des analogues algébriques des submersions.<br>中：光滑态射是沉浸映射的代数类似物。                                                                                                           |
| —                                      | étale morphism, morphisme étale, étale 态射            | A smooth morphism of relative dimension zero, behaving like a local isomorphism algebraically.    | EN: Étale maps are algebraic analogues of covering maps without ramification.<br>FR: Les morphismes étales sont des analogues algébriques des revêtements sans ramification.<br>中：étale 态射是无分歧覆盖映射的代数类似物。                                                                 |
| —                                      | unramified morphism, morphisme non ramifié, 非分歧态射    | A morphism with no infinitesimal thickening in the fibers, formalized by vanishing differentials. | EN: Unramified morphisms have discrete infinitesimal behavior.<br>FR: Les morphismes non ramifiés ont un comportement infinitésimal discret.<br>中：非分歧态射具有离散的无穷小行为。                                                                                                        |
| —                                      | proper morphism, morphisme propre, proper 态射         | A morphism satisfying an algebraic analogue of compactness.                                       | EN: Projective morphisms are proper.<br>FR: Les morphismes projectifs sont propres.<br>中：射影态射是 proper 态射。                                                                                                                                                                 |
| —                                      | projective morphism, morphisme projectif, 射影态射       | A morphism factoring through a projective space over the base with suitable closed embedding.     | EN: Projective morphisms are central in moduli and compactification problems.<br>FR: Les morphismes projectifs sont centraux dans les problèmes de modules et de compactification.<br>中：射影态射在模空间与紧化问题中很重要。                                                                |

## 29.6 Modules, exactness, and Noetherian conditions

| Symbol (LaTeX)              | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                  | Definition                                                                                   | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| --------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `M`                         | module, module, 模                                                  | An abelian group with scalar multiplication by a ring `R`.                                   | EN: Modules over rings generalize vector spaces over fields.<br>FR: Les modules sur les anneaux généralisent les espaces vectoriels sur les corps.<br>中：环上的模推广了域上的向量空间。                                                  |
| `R^n`                       | free module, module libre, 自由模                                     | A module with a basis, isomorphic to a direct sum of copies of `R`.                          | EN: `R^n` is the standard free module of rank `n`.<br>FR: `R^n` est le module libre standard de rang `n`.<br>中：`R^n` 是秩为 `n` 的标准自由模。                                                                                     |
| `M/N`                       | quotient module, module quotient, 商模                               | The module obtained by identifying elements that differ by elements of a submodule `N`.      | EN: Quotient modules record what remains after imposing relations.<br>FR: Les modules quotients enregistrent ce qui reste après imposition de relations.<br>中：商模记录施加关系后剩下的结构。                                            |
| —                           | finitely generated module, module de type fini, 有限生成模              | A module generated by finitely many elements.                                                | EN: Ideals in Noetherian rings are finitely generated.<br>FR: Les idéaux des anneaux noethériens sont de type fini.<br>中：Noether 环中的理想都是有限生成的。                                                                           |
| —                           | exact sequence, suite exacte, 正合列                                  | A sequence of module homomorphisms where the image of one map equals the kernel of the next. | EN: Exact sequences encode kernels, images, and quotients compactly.<br>FR: Les suites exactes encodent noyaux, images et quotients de manière compacte.<br>中：正合列紧凑地编码核、像与商。                                             |
| `0\to A\to B\to C\to0`      | short exact sequence, suite exacte courte, 短正合列                    | An exact sequence expressing `B` as an extension of `C` by `A`.                              | EN: A short exact sequence says `A` is a subobject and `C` is the quotient.<br>FR: Une suite exacte courte dit que `A` est un sous-objet et `C` le quotient.<br>中：短正合列表示 `A` 是子对象，`C` 是商对象。                              |
| `M\otimes_R N`              | tensor product of modules, produit tensoriel de modules, 模张量积      | A universal construction representing bilinear maps from `M\times N`.                        | EN: Tensor products perform base change algebraically.<br>FR: Les produits tensoriels réalisent algébriquement le changement de base.<br>中：张量积以代数方式实现基变换。                                                                |
| `\operatorname{Hom}_R(M,N)` | Hom module, module Hom, Hom 模                                      | The module of `R`-linear maps from `M` to `N`.                                               | EN: `\operatorname{Hom}` turns maps into algebraic objects.<br>FR: `\operatorname{Hom}` transforme les applications en objets algébriques.<br>中：`\operatorname{Hom}` 把映射本身变成代数对象。                                        |
| —                           | flat module, module plat, 平坦模                                      | A module whose tensor product functor preserves exact sequences.                             | EN: Flatness prevents relations from being destroyed under base change.<br>FR: La platitude empêche les relations d’être détruites par changement de base.<br>中：平坦性防止基变换破坏关系。                                            |
| —                           | projective module, module projectif, 投射模                           | A module that is a direct summand of a free module.                                          | EN: Vector bundles correspond to projective modules in affine geometry.<br>FR: Les fibrés vectoriels correspondent aux modules projectifs en géométrie affine.<br>中：在仿射几何中，向量丛对应投射模。                                     |
| —                           | injective module, module injectif, 内射模                             | A module satisfying an extension property for homomorphisms from submodules.                 | EN: Injective modules are used to compute derived functors.<br>FR: Les modules injectifs servent à calculer les foncteurs dérivés.<br>中：内射模用于计算导出函子。                                                                     |
| `R` Noetherian              | Noetherian ring, anneau noethérien, Noether 环                      | A ring in which every ideal is finitely generated.                                           | EN: Polynomial rings over fields are Noetherian by Hilbert’s basis theorem.<br>FR: Les anneaux de polynômes sur des corps sont noethériens par le théorème de la base de Hilbert.<br>中：由 Hilbert 基定理，域上的多项式环是 Noether 环。 |
| —                           | Hilbert basis theorem, théorème de la base de Hilbert, Hilbert 基定理 | A theorem stating that polynomial rings over Noetherian rings are Noetherian.                | EN: The theorem explains why affine algebraic geometry has finite equations locally.<br>FR: Le théorème explique pourquoi la géométrie affine possède localement des équations finies.<br>中：该定理解释仿射代数几何为何局部有有限方程。        |

## 29.7 Dimension, depth, and singularities

| Symbol (LaTeX)                    | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                               | Definition                                                                                                | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| --------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\dim R`                          | Krull dimension, dimension de Krull, Krull 维数                   | The supremum of lengths of chains of prime ideals in a ring.                                              | EN: `\dim k[x_1,\ldots,x_n]=n`.<br>FR: `\dim k[x_1,\ldots,x_n]=n`.<br>中：`\dim k[x_1,\ldots,x_n]=n`。                                                                                                                   |
| `\operatorname{ht}(\mathfrak{p})` | height of a prime ideal, hauteur d’un idéal premier, 素理想高度      | The dimension of the local ring `R_{\mathfrak{p}}`, or the maximal length of chains below `\mathfrak{p}`. | EN: Height measures codimension algebraically.<br>FR: La hauteur mesure algébriquement la codimension.<br>中：高度以代数方式度量余维数。                                                                                             |
| `\operatorname{codim}(Z,X)`       | codimension, codimension, 余维数                                   | The difference between the dimension of a space and that of a subspace, when defined.                     | EN: A hypersurface has codimension `1`.<br>FR: Une hypersurface a codimension `1`.<br>中：超曲面的余维数为 `1`。                                                                                                                 |
| —                                 | regular local ring, anneau local régulier, 正则局部环                | A Noetherian local ring whose maximal ideal can be generated by exactly `\dim R` elements.                | EN: Regular local rings algebraically model nonsingular points.<br>FR: Les anneaux locaux réguliers modélisent algébriquement les points non singuliers.<br>中：正则局部环在代数上建模非奇异点。                                        |
| —                                 | singular point, point singulier, 奇异点                            | A point where the local ring fails to be regular.                                                         | EN: The node of a nodal curve is a singular point.<br>FR: Le nœud d’une courbe nodale est un point singulier.<br>中：节点曲线的节点是奇异点。                                                                                       |
| `\operatorname{Sing}(X)`          | singular locus, lieu singulier, 奇异点集                            | The subset of points where a scheme or variety is singular.                                               | EN: The singular locus is often closed under Noetherian hypotheses.<br>FR: Le lieu singulier est souvent fermé sous hypothèses noethériennes.<br>中：在 Noether 条件下，奇异点集通常是闭的。                                           |
| `\operatorname{Reg}(X)`           | regular locus, lieu régulier, 正则点集                              | The subset of points where the local rings are regular.                                                   | EN: The regular locus of a variety is open in many standard settings.<br>FR: Le lieu régulier d’une variété est ouvert dans de nombreux cadres standards.<br>中：在许多标准情形中，簇的正则点集是开集。                                    |
| `\operatorname{depth}R`           | depth, profondeur, 深度                                           | An invariant measuring the length of a maximal regular sequence in the maximal ideal or relevant ideal.   | EN: Depth detects how far a ring is from having embedded degeneracies.<br>FR: La profondeur détecte à quel point un anneau évite les dégénérescences enfouies.<br>中：深度检测环在多大程度上避免嵌入式退化。                               |
| —                                 | regular sequence, suite régulière, 正则序列                         | A sequence of elements that are successive non-zero-divisors in appropriate quotient rings.               | EN: Regular sequences define complete intersections.<br>FR: Les suites régulières définissent les intersections complètes.<br>中：正则序列定义完全交。                                                                            |
| —                                 | Cohen-Macaulay ring, anneau de Cohen-Macaulay, Cohen-Macaulay 环 | A Noetherian local ring whose depth equals its Krull dimension.                                           | EN: Cohen-Macaulay rings have good dimension-theoretic behavior.<br>FR: Les anneaux de Cohen-Macaulay ont un bon comportement dimensionnel.<br>中：Cohen-Macaulay 环具有良好的维数行为。                                           |
| —                                 | Gorenstein ring, anneau de Gorenstein, Gorenstein 环             | A Cohen-Macaulay-type ring with a particularly symmetric duality theory.                                  | EN: Gorenstein singularities behave like manifolds from the viewpoint of duality.<br>FR: Les singularités de Gorenstein se comportent comme des variétés du point de vue de la dualité.<br>中：从对偶性看，Gorenstein 奇点类似流形。 |
| —                                 | complete intersection, intersection complète, 完全交               | A space locally cut out by the expected number of equations.                                              | EN: Hypersurfaces are basic examples of complete intersections.<br>FR: Les hypersurfaces sont des exemples fondamentaux d’intersections complètes.<br>中：超曲面是完全交的基本例子。                                                 |

## 29.8 Sheaves, quasi-coherent modules, and line bundles

| Symbol (LaTeX)                           | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                 | Definition                                                                                                          | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ---------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\mathcal{F}`                            | sheaf, faisceau, 层                                                | A structure assigning data to open sets with compatible restriction and gluing properties.                          | EN: The structure sheaf assigns regular functions to open sets.<br>FR: Le faisceau structural attribue des fonctions régulières aux ouverts.<br>中：结构层给开集赋予正则函数。                                                                     |
| `\mathcal{F}(U)`                         | sections over U, sections sur U, U 上截面                            | The data assigned by a sheaf to an open set `U`.                                                                    | EN: Sections of `\mathcal{O}_X` over `U` are regular functions on `U`.<br>FR: Les sections de `\mathcal{O}_X` sur `U` sont les fonctions régulières sur `U`.<br>中：`\mathcal{O}_X` 在 `U` 上的截面是 `U` 上的正则函数。                           |
| `\rho_{UV}`                              | restriction map, application de restriction, 限制映射                 | A map sending sections over a larger open set `U` to sections over a smaller open set `V`.                          | EN: Restriction maps make local comparison possible.<br>FR: Les applications de restriction rendent possible la comparaison locale.<br>中：限制映射使局部比较成为可能。                                                                             |
| `\mathcal{F}_x`                          | stalk of a sheaf, fibre locale d’un faisceau, 层茎                  | The direct limit of sections near a point `x`, representing local data at `x`.                                      | EN: A sheaf morphism is often checked on stalks.<br>FR: Un morphisme de faisceaux se vérifie souvent sur les fibres locales.<br>中：层态射常可在层茎上检查。                                                                                      |
| `\Gamma(X,\mathcal{F})`                  | global sections, sections globales, 全局截面                          | The sections of a sheaf over the whole space `X`.                                                                   | EN: `\Gamma(X,\mathcal{O}_X)` is the ring of global regular functions.<br>FR: `\Gamma(X,\mathcal{O}_X)` est l’anneau des fonctions régulières globales.<br>中：`\Gamma(X,\mathcal{O}_X)` 是全局正则函数环。                                    |
| `\widetilde{M}`                          | associated sheaf to a module, faisceau associé à un module, 模的伴随层 | The quasi-coherent sheaf on `\operatorname{Spec}R` associated with an `R`-module `M`.                               | EN: Modules over `R` correspond to quasi-coherent sheaves on `\operatorname{Spec}R`.<br>FR: Les modules sur `R` correspondent aux faisceaux quasi-cohérents sur `\operatorname{Spec}R`.<br>中：`R`-模对应 `\operatorname{Spec}R` 上的拟凝聚层。 |
| —                                        | quasi-coherent sheaf, faisceau quasi-cohérent, 拟凝聚层               | A sheaf locally associated with modules over affine open subsets.                                                   | EN: Quasi-coherent sheaves are the sheaf-theoretic form of modules.<br>FR: Les faisceaux quasi-cohérents sont la forme faisceautique des modules.<br>中：拟凝聚层是模的层论形式。                                                                 |
| —                                        | coherent sheaf, faisceau cohérent, 凝聚层                            | A quasi-coherent sheaf locally given by finitely generated modules with finite relations under suitable hypotheses. | EN: Coherent sheaves are algebraic analogues of finite-rank data with equations.<br>FR: Les faisceaux cohérents sont des analogues algébriques de données de rang fini avec équations.<br>中：凝聚层是带有限方程的有限秩数据的代数类似物。                  |
| `\mathcal{L}`                            | line bundle, fibré en droites, 线丛                                 | A locally free sheaf of rank one.                                                                                   | EN: Line bundles encode divisors and projective embeddings.<br>FR: Les fibrés en droites encodent diviseurs et plongements projectifs.<br>中：线丛编码除子与射影嵌入。                                                                            |
| —                                        | locally free sheaf, faisceau localement libre, 局部自由层              | A sheaf locally isomorphic to a finite-rank free module.                                                            | EN: Vector bundles correspond to locally free sheaves.<br>FR: Les fibrés vectoriels correspondent aux faisceaux localement libres.<br>中：向量丛对应局部自由层。                                                                                 |
| `\mathcal{F}\otimes\mathcal{G}`          | tensor product of sheaves, produit tensoriel de faisceaux, 层张量积   | A sheaf-theoretic tensor product extending module tensor products locally.                                          | EN: Tensoring line bundles corresponds to adding divisor classes.<br>FR: Tensoriser des fibrés en droites correspond à additionner des classes de diviseurs.<br>中：线丛张量积对应除子类相加。                                                     |
| `\mathcal{H}om(\mathcal{F},\mathcal{G})` | sheaf Hom, faisceau Hom, Hom 层                                    | The sheaf of local morphisms from `\mathcal{F}` to `\mathcal{G}`.                                                   | EN: Sheaf Hom records morphisms varying locally over the space.<br>FR: Le faisceau Hom enregistre les morphismes variant localement sur l’espace.<br>中：Hom 层记录随空间局部变化的态射。                                                           |

## 29.9 Projective geometry, graded rings, and Proj

| Symbol (LaTeX)                  | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                            | Definition                                                                                   | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| ------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `\mathbb{P}^n_k`                | projective n-space, espace projectif de dimension n, n 维射影空间 | The space of one-dimensional linear subspaces of `k^{n+1}`.                                  | EN: `\mathbb{P}^1_k` is the projective line.<br>FR: `\mathbb{P}^1_k` est la droite projective.<br>中：`\mathbb{P}^1_k` 是射影直线。                                                                                                           |
| `[x_0:\cdots:x_n]`              | homogeneous coordinates, coordonnées homogènes, 齐次坐标         | Coordinates on projective space defined up to simultaneous nonzero scalar multiplication.    | EN: `[1:2]` and `[2:4]` represent the same point in `\mathbb{P}^1`.<br>FR: `[1:2]` et `[2:4]` représentent le même point dans `\mathbb{P}^1`.<br>中：`[1:2]` 与 `[2:4]` 表示 `\mathbb{P}^1` 中同一点。                                          |
| `S=\bigoplus_{d\geq0}S_d`       | graded ring, anneau gradué, 分次环                              | A ring decomposed into degree pieces compatible with multiplication.                         | EN: Polynomial rings are graded by total degree.<br>FR: Les anneaux de polynômes sont gradués par degré total.<br>中：多项式环按总次数分次。                                                                                                       |
| `f` homogeneous                 | homogeneous polynomial, polynôme homogène, 齐次多项式             | A polynomial whose monomials all have the same total degree.                                 | EN: `x^2+y^2-z^2` is homogeneous of degree `2`.<br>FR: `x^2+y^2-z^2` est homogène de degré `2`.<br>中：`x^2+y^2-z^2` 是二次齐次多项式。                                                                                                          |
| `\operatorname{Proj}S`          | Proj construction, construction Proj, Proj 构造                | A construction producing a projective scheme from a graded ring.                             | EN: `\operatorname{Proj}k[x_0,\ldots,x_n]=\mathbb{P}^n_k`.<br>FR: `\operatorname{Proj}k[x_0,\ldots,x_n]=\mathbb{P}^n_k`.<br>中：`\operatorname{Proj}k[x_0,\ldots,x_n]=\mathbb{P}^n_k`。                                                  |
| `V_+(I)`                        | projective zero locus, lieu des zéros projectif, 射影零点集       | The set of homogeneous prime ideals containing a homogeneous ideal `I`, in the Proj setting. | EN: Projective varieties are cut out by homogeneous ideals.<br>FR: Les variétés projectives sont définies par des idéaux homogènes.<br>中：射影簇由齐次理想切出。                                                                                  |
| `S(d)`                          | graded twist, torsion graduée, 分次扭转                          | A degree-shifted graded module.                                                              | EN: Twists produce sheaves `\mathcal{O}_{\mathbb{P}^n}(d)` on projective space.<br>FR: Les torsions donnent les faisceaux `\mathcal{O}_{\mathbb{P}^n}(d)` sur l’espace projectif.<br>中：分次扭转产生射影空间上的层 `\mathcal{O}_{\mathbb{P}^n}(d)`。 |
| `\mathcal{O}_{\mathbb{P}^n}(1)` | hyperplane line bundle, fibré hyperplan, 超平面线丛               | The fundamental ample line bundle on projective space.                                       | EN: Sections of `\mathcal{O}_{\mathbb{P}^n}(1)` are linear forms.<br>FR: Les sections de `\mathcal{O}_{\mathbb{P}^n}(1)` sont des formes linéaires.<br>中：`\mathcal{O}_{\mathbb{P}^n}(1)` 的截面是线性形式。                                    |
| —                               | hyperplane, hyperplan, 超平面                                   | A codimension-one linear projective subspace.                                                | EN: In `\mathbb{P}^2`, a hyperplane is a projective line.<br>FR: Dans `\mathbb{P}^2`, un hyperplan est une droite projective.<br>中：在 `\mathbb{P}^2` 中，超平面是射影直线。                                                                       |
| —                               | very ample line bundle, fibré très ample, 很丰沛线丛              | A line bundle giving an embedding into projective space.                                     | EN: Very ample line bundles realize abstract varieties as projective subvarieties.<br>FR: Les fibrés très amples réalisent les variétés abstraites comme sous-variétés projectives.<br>中：很丰沛线丛把抽象簇实现为射影子簇。                            |
| —                               | ample line bundle, fibré ample, 丰沛线丛                         | A line bundle whose positive powers eventually give enough sections for projective geometry. | EN: Ample line bundles measure positivity in algebraic geometry.<br>FR: Les fibrés amples mesurent la positivité en géométrie algébrique.<br>中：丰沛线丛度量代数几何中的正性。                                                                        |
| —                               | Hilbert polynomial, polynôme de Hilbert, Hilbert 多项式         | A polynomial describing the growth of graded pieces or sections of twists.                   | EN: Hilbert polynomials encode dimension and degree information.<br>FR: Les polynômes de Hilbert encodent dimension et degré.<br>中：Hilbert 多项式编码维数与次数信息。                                                                              |

## 29.10 Divisors, Picard groups, and canonical classes

| Symbol (LaTeX)          | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                         | Definition                                                                          | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `D`                     | divisor, diviseur, 除子                                                     | A formal linear combination of codimension-one subvarieties or prime Weil divisors. | EN: On a smooth curve, a divisor is a formal sum of points.<br>FR: Sur une courbe lisse, un diviseur est une somme formelle de points.<br>中：在光滑曲线上，除子是点的形式和。                                                                                  |
| `\operatorname{Div}(X)` | divisor group, groupe des diviseurs, 除子群                                  | The group of divisors on a variety or scheme under addition.                        | EN: Divisors form an abelian group.<br>FR: Les diviseurs forment un groupe abélien.<br>中：除子构成 Abel 群。                                                                                                                                         |
| `\operatorname{div}(f)` | principal divisor, diviseur principal, 主除子                                | The divisor of zeros and poles of a rational function.                              | EN: Principal divisors encode rational functions geometrically.<br>FR: Les diviseurs principaux encodent géométriquement les fonctions rationnelles.<br>中：主除子用几何方式编码有理函数。                                                                     |
| —                       | effective divisor, diviseur effectif, 有效除子                                | A divisor with all coefficients nonnegative.                                        | EN: Zeros of a regular function define an effective divisor under suitable conditions.<br>FR: Les zéros d’une fonction régulière définissent un diviseur effectif sous conditions appropriées.<br>中：在适当条件下，正则函数的零点定义有效除子。                     |
| `D\sim D'`              | linear equivalence of divisors, équivalence linéaire de diviseurs, 除子线性等价 | Two divisors differing by a principal divisor.                                      | EN: Linearly equivalent divisors define the same divisor class.<br>FR: Les diviseurs linéairement équivalents définissent la même classe de diviseurs.<br>中：线性等价除子定义相同的除子类。                                                                   |
| `\operatorname{Pic}(X)` | Picard group, groupe de Picard, Picard 群                                  | The group of isomorphism classes of line bundles under tensor product.              | EN: On many smooth varieties, divisors modulo linear equivalence map to the Picard group.<br>FR: Sur beaucoup de variétés lisses, les diviseurs modulo équivalence linéaire se relient au groupe de Picard.<br>中：在许多光滑簇上，除子模线性等价与 Picard 群相关。 |
| `\mathcal{O}_X(D)`      | line bundle associated to a divisor, fibré associé à un diviseur, 除子关联线丛  | The line bundle or invertible sheaf associated with a divisor `D`.                  | EN: Divisors often become line bundles through `\mathcal{O}_X(D)`.<br>FR: Les diviseurs deviennent souvent des fibrés en droites via `\mathcal{O}_X(D)`.<br>中：除子常通过 `\mathcal{O}_X(D)` 变成线丛。                                                  |
| —                       | Cartier divisor, diviseur de Cartier, Cartier 除子                          | A divisor locally defined by a single nonzero rational function.                    | EN: Cartier divisors behave like line bundles.<br>FR: Les diviseurs de Cartier se comportent comme des fibrés en droites.<br>中：Cartier 除子的行为类似线丛。                                                                                             |
| —                       | Weil divisor, diviseur de Weil, Weil 除子                                   | A formal combination of codimension-one irreducible subvarieties.                   | EN: Weil divisors are geometric codimension-one cycles.<br>FR: Les diviseurs de Weil sont des cycles géométriques de codimension un.<br>中：Weil 除子是余维一的几何循环。                                                                                   |
| `K_X`                   | canonical divisor, diviseur canonique, 典范除子                               | A divisor class associated with top-degree differential forms on a smooth variety.  | EN: The canonical divisor controls birational geometry.<br>FR: Le diviseur canonique contrôle la géométrie birationnelle.<br>中：典范除子控制双有理几何。                                                                                                   |
| `\omega_X`              | canonical sheaf, faisceau canonique, 典范层                                  | The sheaf of top differential forms, or its appropriate generalization.             | EN: On a smooth variety, `\omega_X` is the determinant of the cotangent bundle.<br>FR: Sur une variété lisse, `\omega_X` est le déterminant du fibré cotangent.<br>中：在光滑簇上，`\omega_X` 是余切丛的行列式。                                               |
| `-K_X`                  | anticanonical divisor, diviseur anticanonique, 反典范除子                      | The negative of the canonical divisor class.                                        | EN: Positivity of `-K_X` is central in the study of Fano varieties.<br>FR: La positivité de `-K_X` est centrale dans l’étude des variétés de Fano.<br>中：`-K_X` 的正性是 Fano 簇研究的核心。                                                              |

## 29.11 Cohomology, derived functors, and duality

| Symbol (LaTeX)                                  | Term (EN, FR, ZH)                                                                                         | Definition                                                                                                                 | Examples                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
